vaiśyāstu gānagā jñeyāḥ śūdrāsteṣāṃ tu mandagāḥ
na teṣāṃ saṅkaraḥ kaściddharmāśrayakṛte kvacit
dharmasyāsya vicāro vā hyekataḥ sukhinaḥ prajāḥ
tebhyo vedāstu catvāraḥ sarahasyā mayoditāḥ
te ca dhyāyanti māmeva yajante māṃ ca nityaśaḥ
manmānasā madyajanā madbhaktā matparāyaṇāḥ
mama śuśrūṣakāścaiva mama ca vratacāriṇaḥ
avyaṅgadhāriṇaścaiva vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā
kurvanti te sadā bhadrāṃ mama pūjāṃ mamānugāḥ
tathā devāḥ sagandharvāḥ siddhāśca saha cāraṇaiḥ
viharante ramante ca dṛśyamānāśca taiḥ saha
jambūdvīpe tvahaṃ viṣṇurvedavedāṅgapūjitaḥ
śakroahaṃ śālmalīdvīpe krauñcadvīpe hyahaṃ bhagaḥ
plakṣadvīpe tvahaṃ bhānuḥ śākadvīpe divākaraḥ
puṣkare ca smṛto brahmā tataścāhaṃ maheśvaraḥ
tānmagānmama pūjārthaṃ śākadvīpādihānaya
āruhya garuḍaṃ sāmba śīghraṃ gatvāvicārayan
tatheti gṛhya tāmājñāṃ raverjāmbavatīsutaḥ
punardvāravatīṃ gatvā kāntyātīva samanvitaḥ
ākhyātavānpituḥ sarvaṃ svakīyaṃ devadarśanam
śākadvīpamanuprāpya samprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ
tatrāpaśyadyathoddiṣṭānsāmbastejasvino magān
vivasvantaṃ pūjayanto dhūpadīpādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ
soabhivādya ca tānpūrvaṃ kṛtvāpyeṣāṃ pradakṣiṇām
pṛṣṭvā cānāmayaṃ teṣāṃ praśaṃsāsāmapūrvakam
yūyaṃ hi puṇyakarmāṇo draṣṭavyārthe śubhārthinaḥ
ratā yearkasya pūjāyāṃ yeṣāṃ caiva varapradaḥ
tanayaṃ vitta māṃ viṣṇoḥ sāmbaṃ nāmnā ca viśrutam
candrabhāgātaṭe cāpi mayā sūryo niveśitaḥ
tenāhaṃ preṣitaścātra uttiṣṭhadhvaṃ vrajāmahe
te tamūcustataḥ sāmbamevametanna saṃśayaḥ
asmākamapi devena vyākhyātāṃ pūrvameva hi
aṣṭādaśa kulānīha magānāṃ vedavādinām
yāsyanti ye tvayā sārdhaṃ yathā devena bhāṣitam
tatastāni daśāṣṭau ca kulānīha samantataḥ
kṛtvājñāṃ tu raveḥ sāmbaḥ kṛtsnaṃ tvevaṃ nyavedayat
mama pūjākarā hyete prajānāṃ śāntikārakāḥ
mama pūjāṃ kariṣyanti vidhānoktāṃ yadūttama
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakānayanaṃ
nāmaikonacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha catvāriṃśadadhikaśatamoadhyāyaḥ
evaṃ sa ānayitvā tu magānsāmbo mahīpate
sa mahātmā purā sāmbaścandrabhāgāsarittaṭe
puraṃ niveśayāmāsa sthāpayitvā divākaram
kṛtvā dhanasamṛddhaṃ tu bhojakānāṃ samarpayat
tatpuraṃ savituḥ puṇyaṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam
sāṃbena kāritaṃ yasmāttasmātsāmbapuraṃ smṛtam
satkṛtya sthāpitāḥ sarve ātmanāmāṅkite pure
magānāṃ tu sadācāro dṛṣṭācārakulocitaḥ
devaśuśrūṣaṇaṃ gītaṃ vedaproktena karmaṇā
kṛtakṛtyastadā sāmbo varaṃ labdhvā punaryuvā
ādidevaṃ surajyeṣṭhamādityaṃ praṇipatya saḥ
anantaraṃ magānsarvānpraṇipatyābhivādya ca
prasthito nirmalaḥ sāmbaḥ purīṃ dvāravatīṃ tadā
magānāṃ kāraṇārthena prārthitā bhojavaṃśajāḥ
kanyādānaṃ kṛtaṃ teṣāṃ magānāṃ bhojakottamaiḥ
sarvāstāḥ sahitāḥ kanyāḥ pravālamaṇibhūṣitāḥ
arcayitvā tu tāḥ sarvāḥ preṣitāḥ saviturgṛham
punargatvā tu sāṃbena pṛṣṭo devo divākaraḥ
magānāṃ jñānamākhyāhi vedānavyaṅgameva ca
sāmbasya vacanaṃ śrutvā bhāskaro vākyamabravīt
pṛccha tvaṃ nāradaṃ gatvā sa te sarvaṃ vadiṣyati
sa cāpyāha tataḥ sāmbaṃ na jāne jñānamuttamam
bhojakānāṃ yaduśreṣṭha jñānaṃ vyāso mahāmuniḥ
taṃ gatvā paripṛccha tvaṃ praṇamya śirasā munim
kṛṣṇānurodhātte sarvaṃ sa vakṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
vyāsāśramaṃ sa gatvā tu praṇamya śirasā munim
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt
śākadvīpaṃ mayā gatvā ānītā magapuṅgavāḥ
bālā yauvanasampannāḥ sanniviṣṭā magottamāḥ
satkṛtya pūjayitvā tu puraṃ teṣāṃ samarpitam
bhojavaṃśasamutpannāḥ kanyakāḥ samalaṅkṛtāḥ
varayitvā kṛtaṃ teṣāṃ viprapraṇayanaṃ śubham
aho sabhāgyāḥ ślāghyāśca kṛtapuṇyāśca te sadā
pūjāyāṃ ye ratā bhānoryeṣāṃ caiva varapradaḥ
paryāptaṃ sarvameteṣāmiha cāmuṣmikaṃ phalam
anitye sati mānuṣye devapūjāratā hi ye
jñānaṃ prati tathā caiṣāṃ hadaye saṃśayo mama
kathaṃ pūjākarā hyete ke magāḥ ke ca bhojakāḥ
jñānaṃ kiṃ paramaṃ teṣāṃ jñeyasteṣāṃ ka eva tu
divyeti te kathaṃ proktāḥ kimarthaṃ kūrcadhāraṇam
sauravrataṃ kimarthaṃ tu vācakāste kathaṃ smṛtāḥ
athāhikañcukasyāṅgaṃ kiṃ pramāṇaṃ ca kasya vai
kasya vai kā samākhyātā yadutpannaṃ kathaṃ smṛtam
kathaṃ devāṃśca gāyanti yajñaṃ kurvanti te katham
agnihotraṃ ca kiṃ teṣāṃ pañca dolāśca kāḥ smṛtāḥ
etatsarvaṃ samākhyāhi bhojakānāṃ viceṣṭitam
sāmbasya vacanaṃ śrutvā kṛṣṇadvaipāyano muniḥ
kālīsuto mahātejā uvāca paramaṃ vacaḥ
sādhusādhu yaduśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭoasmi suvrata
durjñeyaceṣṭitaṃ kiñcidbhojakānāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
yathākhyātaṃ vaśiṣṭhena tathā te vacmi kṛtsnaśaḥ
magānāṃ caritaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ śṛṇu tvaṃ kṛṣṇanandana
jñānavedina evaite karmayogaṃ samāśritāḥ
śrūyante ṛṣayaḥ sarve maunena niyamasthitāḥ
municaryākṛtasteapi śākadvīpanivāsinaḥ
vacaḥ sūryasamākhyātaṃ kāraṇaṃ ca varaṃ tathā
arcāyāṃ te ca te nityamarcayantaśca te smṛtāḥ bhojakanyāsujātatvādbhojakāstena te smṛtāḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ yathā prokto vedāścatvāra eva tu
brahmaṇoktāstathā vedā magānāmapi suvrata
ta eva viparītāstu teṣāṃ vedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
vedā hyete magānāṃ tu purovāca prajāpatiḥ
magā vedamadhīyante vedāṅgāstena te smṛtāḥ
śeṣo na hi mahābhāgaḥ sarvasattvasukhāvahaḥ
vanditavyo magānāṃ tu astramantreṇa nityaśaḥ
yathā srajo dvijānāṃ tu pūjākāle pramīyate
sarvasaṃskārayajñeṣu yathā darbhā dvijātiṣu
pavitrāḥ kīrtitāsteṣāṃ tathā dharmo magasya tu
ebhirjayanti bhūyiṣṭhaṃ tasmindvīpe magādhipāḥ
vidyāvantaḥ kulaśreṣṭhāḥ śaucācārasamanvitāḥ
yajñāvasaktā bhaktāśca japanto mantramāditaḥ
sarveṣāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu sāvitrī parikalpyate
asmākaṃ tu yaduśreṣṭha mahāvyāhatipūrtikā
na cāpi kiñcitsmṛtikaṃ spṛśecca taccāpi nātraiva ca saṃspṛśeddhi
śvasantyanicchaṃstu parikṣipettu svābhīṣṭasūryaṃ tu nametsadaiva
yathā yajñaṃ hi mantreṇa vedaproktena karmaṇā
yathāgnihotraṃ prathitaṃ dvijānāṃ tathādhvahotraṃ vihitaṃ magānām
pañcadhūpāḥ pradātavyāḥ siddhirasyeha sarvadā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma catvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
athaikacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sāmba uvāca
vratabandhastvasau proktasteṣāṃ jātiśca kā smṛtā
vyāsa uvāca
te pṛṣṭā bhavatā sarve bhojakānāṃ kumārakāḥ
kimākhyātaṃ tatastaistu tadevācakṣva kṛtsnaśaḥ
sāmba uvāca
sanniveṣā mayā proktā bhojakānāṃ samantataḥ
tatastu bhagavānprāha vākyaṃ vākyaviśāradaḥ
ye tvayoktā śrutāḥ sāmba bhojakānāṃ kumārakāḥ
mamaivaite magā jñeyā aṣṭau śūdrā madaṅgajāḥ
dattā bhojakulotpannā daśabhyo daśakanyakāḥ
tatastu mandakebhyoapi dattāścāṣṭau hi kanyakāḥ
tato niveśitaṃ teṣāṃ mayā sāmba puraṃ smara
dāsakanyāstu yāścāṣṭau bhojakanyāśca yā daśa
etāsteṣāṃ kumārāṇāṃ jñeyāstā daśa cāṣṭa ca
tatra te bhojakanyāsu dvijairutpāditāḥ sutāḥ bhojakāstāngaṇānprāhurbrāhmaṇāndivyasaṃjñitān
dāsakanyāsu ye jātā mandagairantyasaṃjñitaiḥ
madaṅgā nāma te jñeyāḥ savituḥ paricārakāḥ
svadharmairyaṣṭumārabdhaiḥ śākadvīpearcito raviḥ
avyaṅgadhāriṇo martyāḥ pūjayante divaspatim
dṛṣṭvā vyaṅgaṃ tu vai teṣāṃ kautūhalasamanvitaḥ
sāmbaḥ prāha namaskṛtya bhūyaḥ satyavatīsutam
kuta eṣa samutpannaḥ kasmācca sa śuciḥ smṛtaḥ
bandhanīyaḥ kadā cāyaṃ kimarthaṃ caiva dhāryate
kiṃ pramāṇaṃ ca bhagavanvyaṅgaścāyaṃ kimucyate
śrutvaivaṃ vacanaṃ vyāso jāmbavatyāḥ sutasya ca
uvāca kuruśārdūla sāmbaṃ kālīsutaḥ sa tu
vyāsa uvāca
etacca me yathoktastvaṃ jātireṣāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
avyaṅgasyāpi te vacmi lakṣaṇaṃ gadataḥ śṛṇu
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakajātivarṇanaṃ nāmaikacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha dvicatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
devatā ṛṣayo nāgā gandharvāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ
yakṣarakṣāṃsi vai bhānau nivasanti ṛtukramāt
svasthānamājagāmāśu namaskṛtya divākaram
gāṅgeyabhūṣitaṃ divyaṃ nātiraktasitaṃ śubham
nāgarājāṅgasambhūto dhṛto yasmācca bhānunā
nityaṃ ca dhāraṇāttasya bhavetprīto divākaraḥ
na dhārayanti ye tvevaṃ bhojakāḥ pūjakāḥ raveḥ
saurahīnā na te yājyā ucchiṣṭā nātra saṃśayaḥ
smṛtyācāre te hi bhagnā raviṃ nārhanti pūjitum
itthaṃ jñātvā na sandeho hyavyaṅgena vinā raviḥ
nāgarājasya saṃspṛṣṭo hyārasustena saṃsmṛtaḥ
pramāṇenāṅgulānāṃ tu śatāddhi śatamuttaram
utkṛṣṭoayaṃ pramāṇena madhyamo viṃśaduttaraḥ
tadākṛtiḥ kṛtaścaiṣa nirmito viśvakarmaṇā
madhyame bhojakānāṃ tu paraḥ śata udāhṛtaḥ
tenāsya dhāraṇādvīra śucireva tadā bhavet
havirhomādikāḥ sarvā bhavantyasya kriyāḥ śubhāḥ
avyaṅgaḥ patitāṅgaśca avyaṅgoatha mahīpate
eṣa sāraśca sā ramyā vai jñeyā jayanāmabhiḥ
arheti pūjāyāṃ dhātoḥ pratyayo ṇvultataḥ smṛtaḥ
pūjitaśca pavitraśca yasmāttenārhakaḥ smṛtaḥ
sārasārtaḥ smṛtaṃ rūpaṃ pradhānaṃ sāra ucyate
ṣaṇa bhaktau smṛtau dhātustasmātsārasanaḥ smṛtaḥ
sa jñeyaḥ patitāṅgastu nityayajñairupāhṛtaḥ
ityete kathitā vīra avyaṅgā vyaṅgabhojakāḥ
śaśāṅkamaulirantye tu saṃsthito yadunaṃdana
pṛthvī mūlamāśritya sthitā ca yadusattama
mūlāśanāstvapaḥ sāmba madhye devo vibhāvasuḥ
tāsāmanantaraṃ vāta ākāśoagre samāsthitaḥ
svarlokaścāgramāśritya sthito vyaṅgasya yāvatā
evaṃ devamayaḥ sāṃba evaṃ lokamayastathā
dhāraṇīyo mahānbhaktyā pūjakaḥ prītaye raveḥ
pūjāphalaṃ na teṣāṃ syānnarakaṃ ca vrajanti hi
tathā teṣāṃ bhavennityamavyaṅgo bhojakaḥ sadā
bandhane kāraṇaṃ vīra bhūṣaṇāni ca suvrata
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne vyaṅgotpattirnāma dvicatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha tricatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
śrutvaivameva sāmbena vyāsātsatyavatīsutāt
avyaṅgasya ca utpattiṃ punarāgānmahāmatiḥ
athāgatya mahātejāḥ sāmbo gatvāśramaṃ punaḥ
nāradasya mahābāhornāradaṃ vākyamabravīt
snānamācamanaṃ caivamarghyadānaṃ mahātmane
sāmbasya vacanaṃ śrutvā nārado munisattamaḥ
uvāca kuruśārdūla sāmbaṃ jāmbavatīsutam
snānamācamanaṃ caiva svarṇadānaṃ tathaiva ca
ācāntastristataḥ snātvā vāsasī nirmale śubhe
udaṅmukhaḥ prāṅmukho vāpyācāmecca prayatnataḥ
apsu sūryastathāgniśca mātā devī sarasvatī
tasmāduttīrya cācāmennācāmettu jalāśaye
upaviśya śucau deśe prayataḥ prāgudaṅmukhaḥ
prasannāstriḥ pibettvāpaḥ prayataḥ susamāhitaḥ
sammārjanaṃ tu dviḥ kuryāttribhirabhyukṣaṇaṃ punaḥ
mūrdhānaṃ khāni cātmānamupaspṛśyānu pūrvaśaḥ
ācāntoarkaṃ namaskṛtya śauceṣu śucitāmiyāt
kriyāṃ yaḥ kurute mohādanācamyeha nāstikaḥ
bhavantīha kriyāḥ sarvā vṛthā tasya na saṃśayaḥ
śucikāmā hi vai devā vedairevamudāhṛtāḥ
inopāsākṛtaścaiva sarve devāḥ prayatnataḥ
śaucameva praśaṃsanti śaucāṅgairhi vidhīyate
ācānto maunamāsthāya devāgāraṃ tato vrajet
śvāsarodhanimittaṃ tu prāṇamācchādya vāsasā
śiraḥ prāvṛtya yatnena keśodakanivṛttaye
tataḥ pūjāṃ raveḥ kuryātpuṣpairnānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ
gāyatrīṃ saśiraskāṃ ca yajamānaḥ prayatnataḥ
puṣpāñjaliṃ tato gṛhya tacchikhāyāṃ prayatnataḥ
dhūpavelāḥ smṛtāḥ pañca dhūpeṣveva tu pañcasu
havanādyāḥ kriyāḥ pañca rakṣiṣyeahaṃ tathā punaḥ
daṇḍanāyakavelā tu pratyūṣe ṛkṣadarśanāt
nājñāvelā pradoṣastu tattvakāryaṃ vijānatā
trikālaṃ tu raveḥ pūjā kartavyā sūryadarśanāt
tathaiva maṇḍale deyaṃ nīcāhne jvalanāya ca
padmāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktotpalāni ca
kusumodakamiśrāṇi kuruṃṭakusumaṃ tathā
gandhādīni ca divyāni kṛtvā vai tāmrabhājane
arghyapātraṃ tadā gṛhya kuryādāvāhanaṃ raveḥ
ehi sūrya sahasrāṃśo tejorāśe jagatpate
anukampya māṃ deva gṛhāṇārghyaṃ divākara
anenāvāhanaṃ kṛtvā jānubhyāmavanīṃ gataḥ
oṃ namo bhagavate ādityāya viśvāya kheśāya brahmaṇelokakartṛṇe
īśānāya purāṇāya sahasrākṣāya te namaḥ
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥsvaḥoṃmahaḥ oṃjanaḥ oṃtapaḥ oṃ satyaṃ brahmaṇe muṇḍe madhye purataḥ ādityāya namaḥ
nārada uvāca
sāvitryāśca pare tantre trailokyatrāṇakāriṇe
paritaḥ parigṛhyātha dhūpabhājanamutkṣipet
tvameka eva rudrāṇāṃ vasūnāṃ ca purātanaḥ
devānāṃ gīrbhirabhitaḥ saṃstutaḥ śāśvato divi
pūrvāhṇe ca tvayā tena madhyāhne cāpareṇa tu
oṃ namo bhagavate jñānātmane tvāṃ ca
viṣṇostatparamaṃ padaṃ sadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ
divākarastu sāyāhne mantreṇārghyaṃ nivedayet oṃ
namo varuṇāya śambhave
oṃ ākṛṣṇena rajasā vartamāno niveśayannamṛtaṃ martyaṃ ca
anena vidhinā dattvā dhūpaṃ sūryāya bhojakaḥ
mantreṇa mihirāyeti nikṣubhāyeti nityaśaḥ
tato rājñai namaśceti nikṣubhāyai tato namaḥ
daṇḍanāyakasaṃjñāya piṅgalāya ca vai namaḥ
tathā rājñāya srauṣāya tatheśāya garutmate
maheśvarāya dadyāttu tathā vyomāya yādava
oṃ brahmaṇe muṇḍapataye ādityāya puruṣeśvarāya sūryāya namonamaḥ
oṃ anekakāntaye natvā śeṣāya vāsukitakṣakakarkoṭakāya padmaśaṅkhakulikebhyo nāgarājebhyo namaḥ
talasutalapātālātalavitalarasātalādivāsibhyo daityādānavapiśācebhyo namaḥ
tataḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kuryānmātṛkābhyo namonamaḥ oṃ grahebhyo namaḥ
oṃ daṇḍanāyakāya namaḥ oṃ mārtaṃḍāya namaḥ oṃ vināyakāya namaḥ
evamuddiśya nāmāni dhūpaṃ dattvā varānana
sūryaguptairabhiṣṭūya evaṃ vijñāya te tataḥ
arcitastvaṃ yathā śaktyā mayā bhaktyā vibhāvaso
aihikāmuṣmikīṃ nātha kāryasiddhiṃ vadasva me
evaṃ triṣavaṇaṃ snātvā yoarcayetpraṇato ravim
sa putravānarogī ca mṛtaḥ saṃlīyate ravau
puṣpaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ yadā na syātpatrāṇi samupāharet
sarvaṃ na syādyadā caiva praṇipātena pūjayet
aśaktaḥ praṇipātasya manasā pūjayedravim
asambhave tu dravyāṇāṃ vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ
uccāraṇācca vai teṣāṃ dhūpaprīto bhavedraviḥ
śiro nāsāmukhaṃ caiva bhṛśamāvṛtya yatnataḥ
pūjayedbhāskaraṃ vīra śithilaṃ tu na kārayet
tasmādyuktaṃ sadā kāryaṃ pūjyate ca divākaraḥ
dhūpena pūjyamānaṃ tu narāḥ paśyanti yādava
yānti te paramaṃ sthānaṃ yanna paśyanti sūrayaḥ
kriyamāṇaṃ tathārkaṃ ca bhaktyā paśyanti ye narāḥ
sarvānkāmāniha prāpya te yānti paramaṃ padam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
dhūpādivividhavarṇanaṃ nāma tricatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha catuścatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
athājagāma bhagavānvyāso dvāravatīṃ purīm
draṣṭuṃ nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam
tamāgatamṛṣiṃ dṛṣṭvā vāsudevo viśāṃpate
abhyutthāya mahātejāḥ pūjayāmāsa bhārata
śākadvīpamito gatvā jñānino mokṣagāminaḥ
tāndṛṣṭvā rūpato vipra praveśātkarmatastathā
kathamete kṣaṇamapi tiṣṭhante pṛthivītale
yeṣāṃ raviḥ sadā pūjyasteṣāṃ muktiḥ sadā vaset
nāgatvā bhojakatvaṃ hi mokṣamāpnoti kaścana
vyāsa uvāca
dhanyā ete mahātmāno bhojakā nātra saṃśayaḥ
jñāninaḥ karmaniṣṭhāśca sadā mokṣagatiṃ gatāḥ
annenauṣadhibhiścaiva ājyahomaiśca kṛtsnaśaḥ
homaṃ ca śāśvataṃ kṛtvā paraṃ homaṃ tataḥ śritāḥ
parahomasya karaṇātpūtātmāno hyakalmaṣāḥ
viśanti paramāṃ divyāṃ bhāskarīṃ taijasīṃ kalām
karmaṇaḥ sādhane caikā tatra cāgnau pratiṣṭhitā
vāyumārgasthitā vyomni dvitīyāntaḥ prakāśikā
tataḥ paraṃ tṛtīyā tu tatsmṛtaṃ sūryamaṇḍale
kṣarākṣarastu vijñeyo mahāsūryastathaiva ca
satattvaḥ sakalaḥ proktastattvahīnastu niṣkalaḥ tṛṇagulmalatāvṛkṣavṛkasiṃhadvijādhipān
surasiddhamanuṣyāṃśca sthalajāñjalajānharet
yadā kalpātmakaścaiva dvitīyāṃ tanumāśritaḥ
niṣkalastu sadā jñeyaḥ saṃsthitastaijasīṃ kalām
dvitīyā yā tanustasya akṣaraṃ tatparaṃ padam
devayānaṃ tu panthānaṃ karmayogena saṃsthitā
ādityasiddhāntaritāḥ sāṅkhyayogavidaśca ye
akāraṃ tattvataścāpi dhyāyante puruṣottama
tryakṣaraṃ ca tamoṃkāraṃ sārdhamātrātraye sthitam
vadanti cārdhamātrasthaṃ makāraṃ vyañjanātmakam
dhyāyanti ye makārīyaṃ jñānaṃ te hi sadātmakam
makāro bhagavāndevo bhāskaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ
makāradhyānayogācca magā hyete prakīrtitāḥ
bhojayanti sahasrāṃśuṃ tena te bhojakāḥ smṛtāḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakasyotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha pañcacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
bhojakajñānavarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
jñānopalabdhiṃ viprendra bhojakānāṃ mahāmune
brūhi tattvaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha kautukaṃ paramaṃ mama
vyāsa uvāca
asthisthūlaṃ snāyuyutaṃ māṃsaśoṇitalepanam
carmāvanaddhaṃ durgaṃdhipūrṇaṃ mūtrapurīṣayoḥ
jarāśokasamāviṣṭaṃ rogāyatanamāturam
kapālaṃ vṛkṣamūlāni kucailamasahāyatā
samatā sarvabhūteṣu evaṃ muktasya lakṣaṇam
tile tailaṃ gavi kṣīraṃ kāṣṭhe pāvakasantatiḥ
upāyaṃ cintayedasya dhiyā dhīraḥ samāhitaḥ
buddhīndriyāṇi saṃyamya śakunāniva pañjare
prāṇāyāmairdaheddoṣāndhāraṇābhiśca kilbiṣam
pratyāhāreṇa saṃsargāndhyānenānīśvarānguṇān
dhyāyamānasya dahyante cānte doṣā yathāgninā
tathendriyakṛtā doṣā dahyante prāṇanigrahāt
cittaṃ cittena saṃśodhya bhāvaṃ bhāvena śodhayet
cittasyātiprasādena bhāti karma śubhāśubham
parvāhṇe lohitaṃ rūpaṃ prathamamṛṅmamayaṃ smṛtam
yajurmayaṃ dvitīyaṃ tu śvetaṃ mādhyāhnikaṃ smṛtam
kṛṣṇaṃ tṛtīyaṃ sāyāhne sāmno rūpaṃ tu tatkṛtam
prathamaṃ rājasaṃ deva dvitīyaṃ sāttvikaṃ smṛtam
tṛtīyaṃ tāmasaṃ rūpaṃ traiguṇyaṃ tasya kalpitam
trayāṇāṃ vyatirekeṇa caturthaṃ sūryamaṇḍalam
oṃkārapraṇavairyuktā dhyānanirbhūtakalmaṣāḥ
sthitāḥ padmāsane vīrā nābhisaṃnyastapāṇayaḥ
suṣumnānāḍikāmārgaṃ kumbharecakapūrakaiḥ
padāṅguṣṭhānvitaḥ svinnamūrdhvamutkṣepayetkramāt
nābhideśe tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā devamagnimanāmayam
somaṃ ca hadaye dṛṣṭvā mūrdhni vāgniśikhāṃ tataḥ
vātaraśmibhirāsādya taṃ bhittvā maṇḍalaṃ param
devārcanaṃ mahābāho kīrtitaḥ keśisūdana
prathamaṃ hadayaṃ sthānaṃ dvitīyaṃ cāgnimāśritam
tṛtīyaṃ nābhisaṃsthaṃ ca caturthaṃ sūryamaṇḍalam
sthānaṃ paraṃ vai paramātmasaṃsthaṃ bhānoḥ sureśasya vadanti tajjñāḥ
jñeyaḥ sa mokṣaśca nṛṇāṃ sa eva saṃsāravicchittikaraṃ padaṃ tataḥ
idaṃ magānāṃ caritaṃ mayā te prakhyāpitaṃ yānavareṇa yuktam
jñātvātvimaṃ mokṣavido vadanti siddhāśca tatsthānamavāpnuvanti
yanmayoktamidaṃ jñānaṃ deyaṃ śraddhāvatāṃ nṛṇām
nāstikānāmabuddhīnāṃ na deyaṃ bhūtimicchatā
nārāyaṇaṃ mahābāho jagāmāyatanaṃ hareḥ
khyāto yastriṣu lokeṣu gaṃgayā paritoṣitaḥ
badaryā maṇḍito vīra naranārāyaṇāśramaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe bhojakajñānavarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
śatānīka uvāca
ya ete bhojakāḥ proktā devadevasya pūjakāḥ
nānyaṃ bhojyamathaiteṣāṃ brāhmaṇaiśca kadācana
bhāskarasya priyā hyete pūjyatvaṃ ca tathā gatāḥ
divyāścaite smṛtā viprā ādityāmbhaḥ samudbhavāḥ
kiṃ kurvāṇāstathā karma bhojyatāṃ yānti me vada
imamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭo vāsudevo mahīpate
kṛtavarmaṇā purā rājaṃstathā sāmbo mahābalaḥ
gatau sāmbapurīṃ vīra tathā nāradaparvatau
ādityakarmaṇo loke devānnakhyātimāgatāḥ
āgatāste purīṃ vīra puṇyāṃ dvāravatīṃ vibhoḥ
tāvṛṣī divamāruḍhau rājannāradaparvatau
vāsudevaṃ mahātejā hārdikyo vākyamabravīt
tāvṛṣī divyamākhyātau yau tau nāradaparvatau
abhojyāḥ kila ete vai brāhmaṇānāṃ janārdana
vāsudeva uvāca
na te bhojyā mahābāho bhojyā bhojāśca sarvadā
tacchrūyatāṃ yaduśreṣṭha yatkāryaṃ cāpi tairvibho
yatamānairmahābāho tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu
vṛṣalī yasya vai bhāryā yaścāvyaṅgaṃ na dhārayet
abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyo bhojako nātra saṃśayaḥ
ādityaṃ yaduśārdūla tathā ca vidhinā vibho
jātakarmādayo yasya na saṃskārāḥ kṛtā vibho
āruṇeyaiśca mantraiśca sāvitrīṃ na ca vai paṭhet
pitṛdevamanuṣyāṇāṃ bhūtānāṃ bhāskarasya tu
akṛtvā vidhivatpūjāṃ yastu bhuṅkte sa dharmahā
abhyaṅgena vihīno yaḥ śaṃkhahīnastathaiva ca
śirasā dhārayetkeśānsa jñeyo bhojakādhamaḥ
devārcanaṃ tathā homaṃ snānaṃ tarpaṇameva ca
dānaṃ brāhmaṇapūjāṃ ca kurvato bhojakasya tu
abhyaṅgo yaduśārdūla pavitraḥ paramaḥ smṛtaḥ
bhojakānāṃ yaduśreṣṭha tasya mūle sthito hariḥ
madhye brahmā mahātejā agre gośrutibhūṣaṇaḥ
ṛgvedo yasya mūlastho madhye sāmāni kṛtsnaśaḥ
yajurvedastathā śreṣṭhaścātharvasahitaḥ sthitaḥ
trayoagnayastathā rājaṃstrayo lokāḥ sthitāḥ kramāt
abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ soaśucirnātra saṃśayaḥ
ye prayacchanti śūdrāṇāṃ vikrīṇanti ca bhojakāḥ
teadhamā bhojakā jñeyā ye ca devasvahāriṇaḥ
na te deva priyāstāta vijñeyā bhojakādhamāḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ puroḍāśo yathā kāyaviśodhanaḥ
bhojakānāṃ tathā vīra naivedyaṃ kāyaśodhanam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakavarṇanaṃ
nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
vāsudeva uvāca
atra pṛṣṭo yathā devo bhāskaro devapūjitaḥ
aruṇena mahābāho ke priyā bhojakāstathā
pūjāyāṃ tava ke yogyāḥ ke na yogyā bhavanti ca
iti pṛṣṭaḥ sa bhagavānaruṇena divākaraḥ
yaduvāca mahābāho tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu
bhāskara uvāca
paradārānparadravyaṃ ye na hiṃsanti bhojakāḥ
vāṇijyaṃ kṛṣisevāṃ tu vedānāṃ nindanaṃ ca ye
kurvanti bhojakā jñeyāḥ sarve te mama vairiṇaḥ
yeṣāṃ bhāryāsaṅgrahaṇaṃ karṣaṇaṃ ye prakurvate
nṛpasevāṃ khagaśreṣṭha vijñeyāḥ patitāstu te
bhuñjate ye ca śūdrānnaṃ jñeyāste śatravo mama
pūjā kṛtā tu yā taistu tathārghyaṃ ca khagottama
pūjāṃ tāmatha cāpyarghyaṃ nāhaṃ gṛhṇāmi khecara
ya ete kathitā vīra ye ca śaṅkhavivarjitāḥ
nirmālyaṃ ye madīyaṃ tu naivedyaṃ kuṅkumaṃ tathā
yajante ye ca sāvitrīṃ mahāśvetāṃ ca gopateḥ
ye na jānanti me mudrāṃ kiṅkarāṇāṃ ca nāmataḥ
naite pūjayituṃ śaktā ye priyā mama bhojakāḥ
tāñchṛṇuṣva khagaśreṣṭha bhūtvā caikāgramānasaḥ
devadvijamanuṣyāṇāṃ pitṛrṇāṃ cāpi pūjakāḥ
te priyā mama vai nityaṃ śaktāḥ pūjayituṃ ravim
yeṣāṃ muṇḍaṃ śiro nityaṃ ye cābhyaṅgasamanvitāḥ
vādayanti ca ye śaṅkhaṃ divyāste bhojakā matāḥ
trikālaṃ ye ca māṃ nityaṃ susnātāḥ krodhavarjitāḥ
pūjayanti khagaśreṣṭha te priyā mama bhojakāḥ
vāre madīye naktaṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ye ca prakurvate
saptamyāmupavāsaṃ tu tathā saṅkramaṇe mama
divyāste brāhmaṇā jñeyā bhojakā mama pūjakāḥ
pūjayanti ca ye viprānmadbhaktā matparāyaṇāḥ
te priyāḥ satataṃ mahyaṃ bhojakā garuḍāgraja
na te pūjyā na vandyāśca ye dviṣanti ca māṃ sadā
ye kurvanti mahāyajñānbhojakā garuḍāgraja
pitṛdevamanuṣyāṇāṃ pūjārthaṃ santataṃ khaga
priyāste satataṃ vīra bhojakānāṃ tathottamāḥ
mama vāre ca ye vīra tathā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ca keśava
na rātrau bhuñjate prājñā matpriyāste magāḥ khaga
itthaṃ bhūtā bhojakā yā māghamāse ca saptamī
puṣpāṇāṃ karavīrāṇi tathā raktaṃ ca candanam
vācako brāhmaṇānāṃ tu naivedyaṃ modakāstathā
ghṛtāhutyo guggulaśca kṣīreṇa snapanaṃ tathā
vādyānāṃ śaṅkhaśabdaśca nṛtyaṃ nāṭyaṃ mataṃ mama
pañcavarṇā patākāstu śvetaṃ chatraṃ ca me priyam
nānyavarṇaiḥ kṛtā pūjā tathā prīṇāti māṃ khaga
yathā kṛtā bhojakena pūjā prīṇāti māṃ sadā
vāsudeva uvāca
ityuktvā bhagavāndevaścāruṇāya purānagha
lakṣaṇaṃ bhojakānāṃ tu tato merumathākramat
evaṃ bhojyā bhojakāstu na cābhojyāḥ kadācana
anuṣṭhānavihīnā ye na te bhojyāstu bhojakāḥ
bhaumāstu brāhmaṇā ye tu anuṣṭhānavivarjitāḥ
nāsti pūjyatamaṃ kiñcinmāṅgalyaṃ pāvanaṃ tathā
caturṇāmiha varṇānāṃ muktvā bhojakamuttamam
tasya bhuṅkte svayaṃ bhānurbrahmā viṣṇustathā śivaḥ
tatheha sarvabhūtānāṃ bhojakaḥ pūjya ucyate
tīrthānāṃ tu kurukṣetraṃ sarasāṃ sāgaro yathā
tathā pūjyatamo jñeyaḥ pūjyānāṃ bhojako vibho
viśeṣeṇa ca saurāṇāṃ bhojakaḥ pūjya ucyate
bhartā pūjyo yayā strīṇāṃ śiṣyāṇāṃ ca yathā guruḥ
bhojakastu tathā pūjyaḥ saurāṇāṃ hṛdikātmaja
evaṃ pūjyāstathā bhojyā bhojakā hṛdikātmaja
atha kiṃ bahunoktena śrūyatāṃ vacanaṃ mama
nāsti vedātparaṃ śāstraṃ nāsti gaṅgāsamā sarit
nāsti bhānusamo devo nāsti mātṛsamā gatiḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma saptacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
athāṣṭacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
adha sāmbo mahātejā dṛṣṭvā cakraṃ pituḥ kare
jvālāmālākarālaṃ tu mahatā tejasānvitam
etadākhyāhi me sarvaṃ śrotukāmasya kautukāt
vāsudeva uvāca
sādhusādhu mahābāho sādhu pṛṣṭosmyaahaṃ tvayā
śṛṇuṣvaikamanāḥ putra cakrasya vidhinirṇayam
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu bhānumārādhya śraddhayā
prāptaṃ cakraṃ mayā tasmādbhāskarāllokapūjitāt
nabhogaḥ pañcakārūḍhaḥ sthitaḥ sākṣāddivākaraḥ
grahāḥ somādayo yasya saṃsthitā nābhimaṇḍale
ādityā dvādaśa samā areṣu kramaśastathā
proktaṃ pathiṣu tattvāni pṛthivyādīni yāni vai
etaistattvaiḥ parivyāptaṃ cakraṃ kālātmakaṃ param
saṃkṣepātte mayākhyātaṃ dattaṃ cakramivāparam
sāmba uvāca
idaṃ tāvanmamācakṣva jñātumicchāmi tattvataḥ
vāsudeva uvāca
kamalaṃ hyṛtubhiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ ṣaṭdalaṃ cākṣayāśritam
puruṣādhiṣṭhitaṃ taddhi tatra sāṅgo raviḥ sthitaḥ
māsā arā mahābāho pakṣāśca pradhayaḥ smṛtāḥ
pathinābhiṣu yoge ca yogākhyāstapanādibhiḥ
nakṣatrāṇi grahāścaiva sadā cātra sthitāḥ smṛtāḥ
etairvyāptamidaṃ cakraṃ sthūlasūkṣmaprabhedataḥ
atroddiṣṭeṣu kāleṣu ye noddiṣṭā mayā tava
yatte kālātmakaṃ cakramidaṃ saṃkṣepato mayā
kathitaṃ tadviniṣkrāntaṃ pradīptātsūryamaṇḍalāt
asurāṇāṃ vadhāyedaṃ mayā labdhaṃ divākarāt
ārādhya tapasā sūryaṃ purā kalpe jagadgurum
ataḥ sampūjyayāmyenaṃ grahaistattvairvṛtaṃ sadā
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ puṣpottarapuraṃ vrajet
tasmāttaṃ matkulānandaṃ mitraṃ sampūjayāmyaham
piṣṭagandhādibhirvāpi raktavarṇakamiśrakaiḥ
phalaiḥ pakvairoṣadhibhistathā dūrvāṅkuraiḥ kuśaiḥ
dhūpaiśca vividhairgandhaistathā vastraiśca bhūṣaṇaiḥ
vitānaśobhāsikataiḥ palāśairupaśobhitaiḥ
chatracāmaraghaṇṭābhirbhūṣaṇairdarpaṇādibhiḥ
nṛtyavāditragītaiśca vedaiḥ puṇyakathāsvanaiḥ
sarvatra jayaghoṣaiśca sampūrṇe pūjayanti ye sampūrṇānvividhānkāmānnirvighnānprāpnuvanti te
bhavanti niyatāḥ sāmba tasya sānugrahā grahāḥ
arkasya sarvayajñānāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ siddhiprado bhṛśam
puṇyo dharmastathā puṣṭyaḥ śatrughnaśca viśeṣataḥ
śveto raktoatha pītaśca kṛṣṇaścāpi vibhāgaśaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne kālacakravarṇanaṃ
nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
athaikonapañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sūryadīkṣāvarṇanam
sāmba uvāca
kiṃ pramāṇaṃ likheccakraṃ tatra padmaṃ ca kiṃ bhavet
nemipradhyāranābhīnāṃ vibhāgaḥ kriyate katham
vāsudeva uvāca
catuḥṣaṣṭyaṅgulaṃ cakraṃ kṛtvā vṛttaṃ pramāṇataḥ
aṣṭāṅgulā bhavennemiḥ seyaṃ vibhavataḥ sadā
arakṣetraṃ ca padmasya kaṇikākesarāṇi ca
patrasandhiśca pādāṅgaṃ kramāttatrāpi bhidyate
unnataṃ kamalaṃ tattu kuryānnābhyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
ākīrṇāḥ saṃvibhaktāśca kartavyāḥ pradhayaḥ kramāt
aṅgulasthūlamūlaṃ syādarāgraṃ triguṇaṃ tataḥ
bhūmiḥ pītā bahirjñeyā karṇikākesarāṇi ca
śeṣaṃ raktaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ saṃhatāḥ patrasandhayaḥ
nābhinemyantare lekhāḥ sitāścāṅgulamānataḥ
aparāhṇeatha pūrvāhṇe varuṇamāvāhayetsadā
cakramevaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ yajanārthaṃ mayā tava
yajñenānena sambaddho dīkṣitaścārkamaṇḍale
itthaṃ me bhānunā pūrvamidamuktaṃ varānana
sāmba uvāca
ke mantrāścakrayajñeasmindevatānāṃ prakīrtitāḥ
yajñakramaśca kaḥ prokto rūpaṃ kiṃ ca pṛthakpṛthak
vāsudeva uvāca
karṇikāyāṃ daleṣvevamaṅgāni hṛdayādi ca
nāmamantrāścaturthyaṃtāsteṣāṃ pūrvoktakoṭayaḥ
namaskāraśca sarvatra eṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
svāhāntā homakāle ca karmasvanyeṣu te punaḥ
yathā karmāvasānāśca prayoktavyāḥ samāsataḥ
oṃ khaṣolkāya vidmahe divākarāya dhīmahi
tannaḥ sūryaḥ pracodayāt
sāvitrī ca mahābāho caturviṃśākṣarā matā
evaṃ mantrāḥ prayoktavyāḥ sarvakarmasvataṃdritaiḥ
tasmātsarvaprayatnena mantrāñjñātvā vidhiṃ tathā
sāmba uvāca
ādityamaṇḍale dīkṣā kasya kāryā kathaṃ ca sā
vāsudeva uvāca
brāhmaṇaṃ kṣatriyaṃ vaiśyaṃ kulīnaṃ śūdrameva ca
puruṣaṃ vā striyaṃ vāpi dīkṣayetsūryamaṇḍale
gurustaṃ dīkṣayedvipraḥ kalpajñaḥ satyavākchuciḥ
ṣaṣṭhyāmagniṃ samādhāya pūrvoktavidhinā kramāt
sampūjyārkaṃ tathā vahnau hutvā vai haviṣā ravim
śiṣyaṃ snātamathācāntaṃ khaṣolkākṛtivigraham
svāṅgairālabhya cāṅgeṣu darbhavadbhistathākṣataiḥ
puṣpaiḥ sampūjya cāṅgāni deyaḥ kāryo balistathā
bhaved ghṛtaguḍakṣīraistandulaiśca pramāṇataḥ
dattvā śiṣṭāya muktvaivaṃ dattvānte dantadhāvanam
kṣīraṃ vṛkṣodbhavaṃ tasmai dvādaśāṅgulasannibham
dantaśliṣṭeapanīte ca tena prācyāṃ kṣipettataḥ
maitrāvāruṇamīśānaṃ vakraṃ saumyasamāśritam
yāṃ diśaṃ dantakāṣṭhasya mukhaṃ paśyati tatpatim
arcayettena śāṃtiḥ syādityuktaṃ bhānunā svayam
sthāpayeta svayaṃ cāpi varaṃ śrutvā samāhitaḥ
ācamya kṛtarakṣastu kṛtadravyādhivāsanaḥ
hadayena nametprātaḥ snātvā hutvā hutāśanam
svapnaṃ pṛcchedyathā dṛṣṭaṃ śubhaṃ saṃvādayecca tam
hadayenāśubhe dṛṣṭe śatahomaṃ samācaret
svapne paśyati harmyāṇi devatānāṃ hutāśanam
nadīyānāni ramyāṇi udyānopavanāni ca
patrapuṣpaphalāḍhyāni kamalāni ca rājatam
rājānaṃ śauryasampannaṃ dhanāḍhyaṃ kṣatriyottamam
śuśrūṣaṇaparaṃ śūdraṃ yadi tattvārthamādiśet
praśastaṃ bhāṣaṇaṃ caiva yathāsambhavato matam
etaiḥ sparśanameteṣāṃ śreṣṭhamārohaṇaṃ tataḥ
vāhanāni praśastāni prāsādaṃ nāvameva ca
parvataṃ ca samāruhya vipulāṃ bhārgavīṃ bhajet
pītvā surāṃ samudraṃ ca dadhyājyaṃ kṣīrameva ca
somaṃ māṃsaṃ havirbhuktvā kāśyapīṃ labhate naraḥ
labdhvā vastrāṇi ratnāni vividhābharaṇāni ca
vāhanāni mahīṃ gāśca dhānyopakaraṇāni ca
samṛddhimāpnuyātkiñcitsvapnānāṃ darśanaṃ śubham
tasmādanyadaniṣṭaṃ syāttasmādyuktā pratikriyā
tarpayitvā dvijāñcchiṣṭānānamya pūrvavadgurum
sṛṣṭikrameṇa bhṛtyarthaṃ muktyarthaṃ nānyathā bhavet
viśuddheṣu viśuddhaṃ taṃ dhyātvā cādityavatkramāt
niyojayetpṛthivyāśca tataḥ prabhṛti sarvaśaḥ
ādityamaṇḍalaṃ śuddhaṃ sarvamuktaṃ niyojayet
evaṃ tu manasā dhyātvā juhuyāccaiva taṃ śatam
sarvairmantraiḥ kramādevaṃ dīkṣā proktā varāparā
kṛtvaiva puṣpapātaṃ tu tasminnādityamaṇḍale
baddhvāsyamañjalau puṣpaṃ kṛtvā dattvā ca mantritam
kṣipedvai kulaśuddhyarthaṃ nāmārthaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ
sampūjya śrāvayettatra samayānarkabhāṣitān
prātaḥ sāyaṃ madhyāhne raverabhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ
upasthānaṃ sadā kuryādarcanaṃ ca sadā naraḥ
adṛṣṭvārkaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ divā rātrau hutāśanam
dṛṣṭvā bhoktavyamarkākhyaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ kadācana
na laṅghyā pratimācchāyā na laṅghyāstithayaḥ kvacit
nakṣatrāṇi grahā yogā māsā māsādhipāśca ye
kālaḥ saṃvatsaraścāpi yaḥ kaścitkāla ucyate
tasmātkālādhipaḥ sūryaḥ svayaṃ kālaśca paṭhyate
cetanācetanasyāpi sarvātmā yaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
stutyo vandyaḥ sadā pūjyastvayāyaṃ sarvathā nṛpa
manasā karmaṇā vācā devanindāṃ parityajet
ityeṣā paramā dīkṣā tava saṃkṣepato mayā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryadīkṣāvarṇanaṃ
nāmaikonapañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha pañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi yathā pūjyo divākaraḥ
sthaṇḍile yaduśārdūla nibodhaikāgramānasaḥ
maṇḍalairaṣṭabhiḥ kāryaṃ cakraṃ kālātmakaṃ śubham
sarvātmā sakalo devaḥ khaṣolkaḥ kiraṇojjvalaḥ
pūjanīyaḥ sadā madhye sahasrakiraṇāyudhaḥ
aruṇaṃ pūjayetprājñaḥ sadā devāgrajaṃ śubham
dakṣiṇe pūjayeddevīṃ nikṣubhāṃ bhāskarasya tu
revataṃ dakṣiṇe pārśve uttare piṅgalaṃ sadā
saṃjñāṃ ca yaduśārdūla śreyase satataṃ budhaḥ
āgneyyāṃ lekhakaṃ vīra nairṛtyāmaśvinau tathā
vāyavyāṃ pūjayeddevaṃ manuṃ vaivasvataṃ vibhum
aiśānyāṃ pūjayeddevīṃ yamunāṃ lokapāvanīm
dvitīyāvaraṇe vīra pūrvataḥ pūjayedviyat
dakṣiṇe ca tato devīṃ paścime garuḍaṃ tathā
uttare nāgarājānaṃ putramairāvataṃ śubham
āgneyyāṃ pūjayeddheliṃ praheliṃ nairṛte tathā
vāyavyāmurvaśīṃ devīmīśāne vinatāṃ tathā
tṛtīyāvaraṇe pūrve pūjayedgurumādarāt
paścime tvarkaputraṃ tu uttare dhiṣaṇaṃ tathā
aiśāne śaśiputraṃ tu somamāgneyamaṇḍale
pūjayeddakṣiṇe koṇe nairṛte rāhumādarāt
vāyavye vikacaṃ vīra pūjayetsatataṃ budhaḥ
caturthāvaraṇe devaṃ pūjayellekhamādarāt
āgneye śāṇḍilīputraṃ dakṣiṇe dakṣiṇādhipam
virūpākṣaṃ nairṛte devaṃ jaleśaṃ paścime tathā
vāyuputraṃ ca vāyavyāṃ satataṃ pūjayennaraḥ
īśāne devamīśānaṃ pūjayetsatataṃ budhaḥ
uttare yakṣarājānāṃ kuberaṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ
pañcame pūjayedvīra sadā svāvaraṇe dvijāḥ
pūrvataḥ paramāṃ devīṃ mahāśvetāṃ mahāmatiḥ
śriyamṛddhiṃ vibhūtiṃ ca dhṛtiṃ caivonnatiṃ tathā
pṛthivīṃ yaduśārdūla mahākīrtiṃ tathaiva ca
indraṃ viṣṇuṃ cāryamaṇaṃ bhagaṃ parjanyameva ca
vivasvantaṃ tathārkaṃ ca tvaṣṭāraṃ kiraṇojjvalam
pūjayedvaruṇaṃ ṣaṣṭhe caivametāndivākarān
aruṇaṃ sarathaṃ vīra saptame pūjayedbudhaḥ
tathāśvānyaduśārdūla sadā cāvaraṇe budhaḥ
yakṣarakṣāṃsi gandharvānmāsānpakṣānahāni tu
saṃvatsaraṃ tathā putra hyetānsaṃpūjayetpurā
ya evaṃ pūjayeddevaṃ bhāskaraṃ satataṃ naraḥ
mūlamantrākṣarāṇīha cāṅgāni paricakṣate
ity uktvā bhagavān devo jagāmāśu gṛhaṃ raviḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
athaikapañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
atha rājā mahātejāḥ śatānīko dvijottamam
praṇamya śirasā bhaktyā sumantuṃ vākyam abravīt
aho devasya māhātmyaṃ bhāskarasyāmitaujasaḥ
kīrtitaṃ bhavatā mahyaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
tasmān nārkasamaṃ devaṃ loke paśyāmi suvrata
śrutvaivaṃ devamāhātmyaṃ bhāskarasyāmitaujasaḥ
kīrtitaṃ bhavatā mahyam aśvamedhaśatād varam
divākaraprasādādvai suprasannādvṛṣadhvajāt
śrutā me bahavo dharmāḥ śrutismṛtyuditāstathā
vaiṣṇavāḥ śaivadharmāśca tathā paurāṇikāḥ śrutāḥ
śṛṇvato nāsti me tṛptiramṛtasyaivameva ca
aśvamedhādayo yajñā bahusambhāravistarāḥ
hitāya sarvamartyānāṃ sarvapāpabhayāpaham
sauradharmaparaṃ puṇyaṃ pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ rājño vyāsaśiṣyo mahāmuniḥ
praṇamya śirasā vyāsamidaṃ vacanamabravīt
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmi sukhopāyaṃ mahāphalam
raviṇā kathitaṃ pūrvamaruṇasya viśāṃpate
kṛṣṇasya brahmaṇo vīra śaṅkarasya na vidyate
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ sarveṣāṃ prāṇināmayam
sauradharmatamaḥ śrīmānhitāya jagatoditaḥ
yairayaṃ śāntahṛdayaiḥ sūryabhaktairbhagārthibhiḥ
ekakālaṃ dvikālaṃ vā trikālaṃ nityameva ca
stuvanti ye sadā bhānuṃ na te prakṛtimānuṣāḥ
svargalokātparibhraṣṭāste jñeyā bhāskarā bhuvi
nānarkaḥ kīrtayedarkaṃ nānarkoarkamavāpnuyāt
ṣoḍaśāṅgā ca sā proktā raviṇeha divaukasām
prātaḥ snānaṃ japo homastathā devārcanaṃ nṛpa
dvijānāṃ pūjanaṃ bhaktyā pūjā gośvatthayostathā
itihāsapurāṇebhyo bhaktiśraddhāpuraskṛtam
śravaṇaṃ rājaśārdūla vedābhyāsastathaiva ca
madbhaktyā janavātsalyaṃ pūjāyāṃ cānumodanam
pustakasya sadā śreṣṭha mamātīva priyaṃ surāḥ
matkathāśravaṇaṃ nityaṃ svaranetrāṅgavikriyā
mamānusmaraṇaṃ nityaṃ bhaktyā śraddhāpuraskṛtam
ṣoḍaśāḍgā bhaktiriyaṃ yasminmleccheapi vartate
viprendraḥ sa muniḥ śrīmānsajātyaḥ sa ca paṇḍitaḥ
tasyāhaṃ na praṇaśyāmi sa ca me na praṇaśyati
aṣṭādaśārdhakakṣāyāḥ paraṃ cāṣṭabhirudbhavaiḥ
rodhayitvā mahābāho tathā jñānatareṇa tu
durgapālaṃ vijityāśu bhāskarārdhaṃ tu durjayam
jitvā ca purarājānāṃ mahātejamanaupamam
manasācalayā bhaktyā yo māṃ dhyāyati mānavaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmavarṇanaṃ
nāmaikapañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha dvipañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sūradharmeṣu praśnavarṇanam
sūrāya durlabhaṃ dānaṃ sūrahomaśca durlabhaḥ
tau karau ślāghyatāṃ prāptau yau pūjāṃ cakratū raveḥ
saivaikā rasanā dhanyā stotraṃ yā kurute raveḥ
tanmanaḥ puṇyatāṃ prāptaṃ yaddhitvā viṣayaṃ nṛpa
niścalā ca raverlīlā nirbhīkā krodhavarjitā
śatānīka uvāca
tvatprasādāddvijaśreṣṭha kautūhalamatīva me
yatpuṇyaṃ sthāpite sūrye kṛte sūryālaye ca yat
sthāne kṛte ca yatpuṇyaṃ tathā nīrājane kṛte
nīlauṣadhipravāpena nṛtyamaṅgalavāditaiḥ
sumānāṃ maṇḍape yacca puṣpamālāvalambanāt
pūjābhaktiviśeṣaiśca gṛhamālāvalambane
puṣpadānaviśeṣeṇa dhūpadīpaiśca yatphalam
vastrālaṅkāradāne tu puṇyaśravaṇakīrtane
magānāṃ matprasādena abhivādanapūjane
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi sūradharmeṣu praśnavarṇanaṃ nāma
dvipañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha tripañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sumatiśca raverbhaktaḥ pāṇḍaveya mahāmate
ataste nikhilaṃ vacmi śṛṇuṣvaikamanā nṛpa
kalpādau sṛjato vīra brahmaṇo vividhāḥ prajāḥ
ahaṃkāro mahānāsīnnāsti loke maduttamaḥ
ciṃtayantotha te devāḥ keśavaśca narādhipa
vivādastu mahānāsītkañjāmbunagaukasām
ahaṃ kartā vikartāahaṃ pālakoahaṃ jagatprabhuḥ
ityāha bhagavānbrahmā kṛṣṇabhīmau samarcitau
tathaitya śaṃkaraḥ kruddhaḥ kaḥ śakto madṛte bhuvi
saṃhartuṃ jagadetaddhi sraṣṭuṃ pālayituṃ tathā
na vā śakto jagatsraṣṭuṃ saṃhartuṃ rakṣituṃ tathā
evaṃ teṣāṃ pravadatāṃ kruddhānāṃ ca parasparam
samāviśattadāajñānaṃ tamo mohātmakaṃ vibho
atyarthaṃ mohamāpannā na jānantīha kiñcana
apaśyanto mithaste tu niṣaṇṇāḥ kṣmātale vibho
āramanti hi ye cānye te divākaramāsthitāḥ
tamasā mohitāḥ sarve nidrāvatkrāntacetasaḥ
manāgjñānena cākrāntāḥ kiṃ kuryāmeti mohitāḥ
atha bhūtādhipo devo gośrutābharaṇojjvalaḥ
candrārdhakṛtaśobhastu śītalāṃśuviśodhitaḥ
apaśyannabravīddevaṃ mādhavaṃ bhūdharaṃ harim
mahādeva uvāca
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho kva gatastvaṃ mahāmate
brahmā ca kva gato vīra nāhaṃ paśyāmi vāṃ kvacit
kṣmādharaṃ pṛthivīṃ vṛkṣān devagandharvadānavān
vipulaṃ sāgaraṃ sindhūnnahi paśyāmi kiñcana
brūhi me devaśārdūla vrīḍā meatīva jāyate
śaṅkarasya vacaḥ śrutvā harirvacanamabravīt
śokagadgadayā vācā tamasā mohito nṛpa
viṣṇuruvāca
mamāpi mohitaṃ cetastamasātīva śaṅkara
pṛcchāvastaṃ mahātmānaṃ yadi te rocate hara
hitvā darpamahaṅkāraṃ samamāsthāya kevalam
ityevaṃ gadato vākyaṃ viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho bhīma bhīma mahāmate
mamātīva manobuddhī tamasā vaśamāgate
na śṛṇomi na paśyāmi nidrāmohavaśaṃ gataḥ
tamasā vyāṣṭataṃ devau na jāne kva gataṃ mahaḥ
atha teṣāṃ pravadatāṃ brahmādīnāṃ divaukasām
darpakrodhabhayārtānāṃ tamasākrāntacetasām
teṣāṃ darpāpahārāya prabodhārthaṃ ca gopateḥ
tejorūpaṃ samudbhūtamaṣṭaśṛṅgamanaupamam
jvālāmālāvṛtaṃ vīra bahurūpaṃ ca bhāsate
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ gatamūrdhvaṃ bhramattathā
prakāśaṃ tejasā tasya jagatsarvamidaṃ nṛpa
pureṣvantaryathā vīra ambujasyārcibhiḥ sadā
dṛṣṭvā parasparaṃ sarve huṅkārādivikāriṇaḥ
tato vismayamāsīnaḥ dṛṣṭagopatayo nṛpa
aho tejaḥ samuddhūtamasmākaṃ śreyase nṛpa
prakāśāya ca lokānāṃ sarve paśyāma kiṃ nvidam
jñānāyordhvaṃ gato brahmā cādhastāttripurāntaka
tiryagjagāma deveśaścakrāmbujagadādharaḥ
alabdhvā tasya te sarve pramāṇaṃ gairikādhipāḥ
koayaṃ kimātmakaścāyaṃ kimidaṃ tejasāṃ nidhiḥ
ahoasya darśanātsarve sañjātā jñānino vayam
kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ sarve cāstuvaṃstridivaukasaḥ
stuvatāmapyathaiteṣāṃ sahasrakiraṇo raviḥ
ātmānaṃ darśayāmāsa kṛpayā parayā vṛtaḥ
jñātvā bhaktiṃ mahābāho brahmādīnāṃ mahopamām
atha te vyomni deveśaṃ dadṛśuḥ parameśvaram
kṛttikābhirasaṃspṛṣṭaṃ yadvā tatkārtikāsthitam
tathā hastavihīnaṃ ca saptarṣirahitaṃ tathā
sakalaṃ niṣkalaṃ caiva sadaikākārarūpiṇam
taddṛṣṭvānekaśirasamanekacaraṇaṃ tathā
anekānanamakṣībaṃ sahasrākṣamanaupamam
dṛṣṭvaivaṃ devadevasya rūpaṃ bhānormahātmanaḥ
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā brahmā stotuṃ pracakrame
praṇamya śirasā bhānumidaṃ vacanamabravīt
bhāskarāya namo nityaṃ khaṣolkāya namonamaḥ
viṣṇave kālacakrāya somāyāmitatejase
tamoghnāya surūpāya tejasāṃ nidhaye namaḥ
arthāya kāmarūpāya dharmāyāmitatejase
mokṣāya mokṣarūpāya sūryāya ca namonamaḥ
śubhāya śubharūpāya śubhadāya śubhātmane
śāntāya śāntarūpāya śāntayeasmāsu vai namaḥ
namaste brahmarūpāya brāhmaṇāya namonamaḥ
evaṃ stutvā raviṃ brahmā śraddhayā parayā vibho
tūṣṇīmāsīnmahābhāga prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā
tripurārirmahātejāḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim
mahādeva uvāca
maheśa jaya kāntīśa jaya kāleśa śaṅkara
arthakāmeśa dharmeśa jaya mokṣeśa śarmada
jaya vedāṅgarūpāya graharūpāya vai namaḥ
satyāya satyarūpāya surūpāya śubhāya ca
krodhalobhavināśāya kāmanāśāya vai jaya
kalmāṣapakṣirūpāya yatirūpāya śambhave
viśvāya viśvarūpāya viśvakarmāya vai jaya
jayoṅkāra vaṣaṭkāra svāhākāra svadhāmaya
jayāśvamedharūpāya cāgnirūpāryamāya ca
saṃsārārṇavapītāya mokṣadvārapradāya ca
īśoapyevamahīnāṅgaṃ stutvā bhānuṃ prayatnataḥ
virarāma mahārāja praṇamya śirasā ravim
atha viṣṇurmahātejāḥ kṛtāñjalipuṭo ravim
uvāca rājaśārdūla bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ
viṣṇuruvāca
divākaraṃ raviṃ bhānuṃ mārtaṇḍaṃ bhāskaraṃ bhagam
indraṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ haṃsamarkaṃ lokaguruṃ vibhum
trinetraṃ tryakṣaraṃ tryaṅgaṃ trimūrtiṃ trigatiṃ śubham
ṣaṇmukhāya namo nityaṃ trinetrāya namonamaḥ
caturviṃśatipādāya namo dvādaśapāṇaye
devānāṃ pataye nityaṃ varṇānāṃ pataye namaḥ
tvaṃ brahmā tvaṃ jagannātho rudrastvaṃ ca prajāpatiḥ
bṛhaspatirbudhastvaṃ hi tvaṃ śukrastvaṃ vibhāvasuḥ
namaste jñānarūpāya yajñāya ca namonamaḥ
prasīdāsmāsu deveśa bhūteśa kiraṇojjvala
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ prasādaṃ kuru gopate
pradadhyau nṛpaśārdūla raviṃ tadgatamānasaḥ
evaṃ te naraśārdūla devā brahmādayoanagha
stuvanti taṃ mahātmānaṃ sahasrakiraṇaṃ ravim
ityevaṃ stuvatāṃ teṣāṃ raviṃ bhaktyā mahātmanām
atha tuṣṭo ravisteṣāṃ brahmadīnāṃ jagatpatiḥ
vijñāya bhaktiṃ paramāṃ śraddhāṃ ca paramāṃ vibhuḥ
uvāca sa mahātejāḥ prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā
graheśo vyoma cārūḍhastejasā prajvalandiśaḥ
brahmāṇaṃ viṣṇumīśānamāmantryaitānviśāṃpate
dṛṣṭvā tānpraṇatāntsarvāñchirobhiravaniṃ gatān
kṛtvā tu vacanaṃ bhānorbrahmā lokagururnṛpa
jagāma śirasā bhūmāvuvāca sa kṛtāñjaliḥ
kṛtakṛtyoasmi deveśa pūtaścāsmi khagādhipa
apaśyataśca deveśa mūḍhamāsīnmano mama
gatvā śirobhiravanimaṣṭāṅgaiḥ patitasya ca
brahmaṇo vacanaṃ śrutvā pūṣā devo jagatpatiḥ
tathetyāha mahārāja virāṭa praśrayānvitam
brahmaṇe ca varaṃ dattvā rājandevo divākaraḥ
uvāca tryambakaṃ devaṃ śaśāṅkakṛtaśekharam
varaṃ varaya bhūteśa bhūbhṛjjādayitānagha
bhāskarasya vacaḥ śrutvā īśvarastripurāntaka
gatvā tu śirasā bhūmau praṇamyovāca bhāskaram
mahādeva uvāca
gatoahaṃ paramāṃ siddhiṃ gataśca paramāṃ gatim
nāprāpyamasti deveśa nāsādhyaṃ mama kiṃcana
acalāṃ dehi me bhaktimātmanaścaraṇaṃ naya
vyomakeśavacaḥ śrutvā pūṣā devo divākaraḥ
nārāyaṇa mahābāho varaṃ varaya godhara
śrutvā tu bhāskaravacaḥ kīlālajanako hariḥ
uvāca parayā bhaktyā natvā ca śirasā ravim
nārāyaṇa uvāca
yenāhaṃ sarvadevānāmuttamaḥ syāṃ jagatpate
prajānāṃ pālanaṃ deva devānāṃ ca grahādhipa
varṇānāmāśramāṇāṃ ca varṇadharmasya vā vibho
duṣṭadaityavināśāya lokānāṃ pālanāya ca
sṛṣṭoahaṃ bhavatā pūrvaṃ kalpādau ca kṛtoanagha
vyādhirduḥkhaṃ manorogaṃ dāridryaṃ santatikṣayaḥ
evaṃ tvāṃ gopate deva bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryatejovarṇanaṃ
nāma tripañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha catuḥpañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
trayīupākhyānavarṇanam
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhānurviṣṇoramitatejasaḥ
uvāca kuruśārdūla ādityaḥ kṛpayānvitaḥ
āditya uvāca
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ
yadarthaṃ prārthitaḥ kṛṣṇa tatsarvaṃ te bhaviṣyati
devadānavayakṣāṇāṃ gandharvoragarakṣasām
ajeyastvaṃ mahābāho bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ
brahmāpi satataṃ śakto jagatsraṣṭuṃ bhaviṣyati
saṃhartuṃ śaṅkaraścāpi matprasādādbhaviṣyati
tvāmārādhya bhaviṣyāmo vayaṃ sarve surottamāḥ
kathamārādhayāmo hi bhavantaṃ śraddhayānvitāḥ
bhavato hi na paśyāmo mūrtiṃ paramapūjitām
jvālāmālākulaṃ sarvamanekākṛti cādbhutam
bhaktiṃ vinā pūjayituṃ na śakyante divaukasaḥ
tasmāddarśaya tāṃ mūrtimātmano yā parā matā
yena tvāṃ pūjayitvā tu vayaṃ siddhā bhavāmahe
sūrya uvāca
sādhu sādhu mahādeva sādhu pṛṣṭoasmi suvrata
śṛṇu caikamanāḥ kṛtsnaṃ gadato mama mānada
śreyase sarvalokānāmādimadhyāntakṛtsadā
ekā me rājasī mūrtirbrahmeti parikīrtitā
sṛṣṭiṃ karoti sā nityaṃ kalpādau jagatāṃ vibho
dvitīyā sāttvikī proktā yā parā parikīrtitā
jagatsā pālayennityaṃ duṣṭadaityavināśinī
tṛtīyā tāmasī jñeyā īśeti ṣarikīrtitā
trailokyaṃ saṃharetsā tu kalpānte śūlapāṇinī
caturthī tu guṇairhīnā satyādibhiranuttamā
sā cāśakyā kvaciddraṣṭuṃ sthitā sā cābhavatsadā
tayā tatamidaṃ sarvaṃ yaccodgīthaṃ tu me gatiḥ
niṣkalā sakalā sā tu surūpā rūpavarjitā
antargatā ca lokānāṃ na ca karmaphalaṃ gatā
tiṣṭhamānāpyaliptā sā padmapatramivāmbhasā
anaṣṭā ca sadā ṣaḍbhiḥ saptātītya vyavasthitā
catustanā ca sā ṣaḍbhyasturīyākhyā supūjitā
na sā spraṣṭuṃ tvayā śakyā hariṇā brahmaṇā na ca
māmanārādhya bhūteśa vyomarūpaṃ kadācana
ahaṃkāravimūḍhānāṃ tamasā ca trilocana
prakāśāya ca lokānāṃ jvālāmālāsamākulam
yasya saṃdarśanādeva yūyaṃ sarve prabodhitāḥ
tasmādārādhayasvainamaspṛṣṭaṃ gamanopamam
manmūrtiṃ yena tāṃ divyāṃ drakṣyasi tvaṃ trilocana
dakṣiṇe līyate brahmā vāme tasya janārdanaḥ
gāyatrī līyate tasya hṛdaye lokamātaraḥ
līyante mūrddhni vai vedaḥ saṣaḍaṅgapadakramaḥ
ākāśaṃ vyoma ityāhuḥ pṛthivī nikṣubhā matā
bhūtaśreyohaamākāśo nikṣubhā dayitā mama
tasmādārādhaya vyoma tvaṃ brahmā keśavastathā
tato yāsyasi saṃsiddhiṃ ṣaḍaṅgāṃ paramāṃ śubhām
kalāpagrāmamāśritya śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ
ārādhayatu māṃ bhaktyā vyomarūpaṃ janārdanaḥ
antarikṣagataṃ tīrthaṃ puṣkaraṃ lokapāvanam
evaṃ māṃ satataṃ yūyaṃ samārādhya jagatpatim
samānāṃ ca sudivyānāṃ sahasratrayamādarāt
tato drakṣyatha me mūrtiṃ paramāṃ yāṃ vidurbudhāḥ
kadambagolakākārāṃ raśmimālākulāṃ parām
atha nārāyaṇo devaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt
viṣṇuruvāca
tamārādhya vayaṃ sarve yāsyāmaḥ siddhimuttamām
kīdṛgvyoma tvahaṃ brahmā haraśca tripurāntakaḥ
ārādhayāmahe deva bhaktyā śreyoarthamātmanaḥ
yena siddhiṃ gamiṣyāmastamārādhya divākaram
tasmānno lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi vyomnaḥ paramapūjita
catuḥpañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
atha pañjapañcāśadadhikaśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
āditya uvāca
sādhusādhu suraśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭoasmi bhūdhara
śṛṇuṣvaikamanāḥ kṛṣṇa gadato nikhilaṃ mama
tvāmārādhya ca cakrāṃkaṃ śaṃkaro vṛttamādarāt
yatheṣṭamṛbhavaḥ sarve bhaktyā māṃ pūjayaṃtu vai
tato brahmādayo devāḥ śrutvā vākyaṃ vibhāvasoḥ
asmābhirbhagavānpṛṣṭa stejasā prajvalaṃti ca
saṃbhūtā jñāninaḥ sarve bhavato darśanādvayam
vayaṃ tvanmūrtayaḥ sarve tejasā tava saṃvṛtāḥ
utpattisthitināśāya lokānāṃ tava śāsanāt
sthitāḥ sarve surajyeṣṭha lokapālāśca kṛtsnaśaḥ
adhunā sādha yāmeha vyomnaḥ pūjāṃ vrajāmahe
itthaṃ teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā bhāskaro vāritaskaraḥ
uvāca brahmaviṣṇvīśānsāmapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ
āditya uvāca
yūyaṃ manmūrtayaḥ sarve yuṣmākamahameva hi
yadetaddarśanaṃ devāḥ pramāṇa ca yaduttamam
jvālāmālākulaṃ śubhraṃ śāṃḍileyamivojjhitam
yuṣmākaṃ devaśārdūlāstannibodhata kāraṇam
ahaṃkāravimūḍhānāṃ mithaḥ kalahināṃ tathā
prabodhārthaṃ hi yuṣmākaṃ tamaso nāśanāya ca
pravartanāya sarveṣāṃ karmaṇāṃ ca pradarśitam
tasmādevaṃ viditvā tu nāhaṃkāraḥ kadācana
mānaṃ darpamahaṃkāraṃ pūrvaṃ tyaktvā sudūrataḥ
ārādhayata māṃ bhaktyā satataṃ śraddhayānvitāḥ
jagāmādarśanaṃ teṣāṃ paśyatāmeva bhārata
atha te vismitāḥ sarve brahmaviṣṇupinākinaḥ
bṛhadbhānurmahātejā lokadīpo vibhāvasuḥ
yena sarve vayaṃ trātā nighnatā vipulaṃ tamaḥ
ārādhayāmastaṃ sarve gatvā sthānāni kṛtsnaśaḥ
tadvyoma pūjayitvā tu parayā śraddhayā vibhoḥ
āmaṃtrya te mithaḥ sarve gatāḥ pūjārthamādarāt
jagāma puṣkaraṃ brahmā śālagrāmaṃ janārdanaḥ
ārādhayaṃti taṃ devaṃ bhāskaraṃ vāritaskaram
vyomni kṛtvā catuṣkoṇaṃ brahmā nityamapūjayat
apūjayatsadā vṛttaṃ vyomaṃ bhaktyā samanvitaḥ
divyavarṣasahasrāṃte pūjayaṃto divākaram
gaṃdhamālyopahāraistu nṛtyagītapravāditaiḥ
atoṣayanmahātmānaṃ kurvāṇāstapa uttamam
atha teṣāṃ mahārāja prasanno bhuvanādhipaḥ
darśayāmāsa lokātmā yugapadvai vibhāvasuḥ
kṛṣṇātmā ca mahātejāścaturdhā yogatonagha
gatvaikena suraśreṣṭhaṃ sobravītparamaṃ vacaḥ
sa tatāpa tathānyena rathārūḍho divaṃ sadā
evaṃ yogabalādbhānuḥ kṛtavānmahadadbhutam
ugre tapasi vartaṃtaṃ dṛṣṭvā cainaṃ caturmukham
uvāca taṃ mahārāja bhāskaraścaturānanam
paśyapaśya suraśreṣṭha varadaṃ māmupāgatam
dṛṣṭvā jagāma praṇato hyavaniṃ mukhapaṃkajaiḥ
uvāca paramaṃ vākyaṃ kṛtāṃjalipuṭaḥ sthitaḥ
namaste bhūta bhavyeśa bhūtāde bhūtabhāvana
āditya uvāca
evameva yathāttha tvaṃ nāsti tatra vicāraṇā
tvaṃ me prathamajaḥ putraḥ saṃbhūtaḥ kāraṇātpurā
yamicchasi surajyeṣṭha mā tvaṃ śaṃkāṃ kuru prabho
kartuṃ śaknomi sṛṣṭiṃ ca prasādāttava gopate
kṛtākṛtā hi me deva sṛṣṭirneha prasidhyati
āditya uvāca
tato yāsyati te siddhiṃ kṛtsnā sṛṣṭiścaturmukha
taṃ vai vyoḍhaṃ vivastraṃtaṃ lokanāthaṃ jagatpatim
punarāha surajyeṣṭhaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim
āditya uvāca
yanme rūpaṃ mahadvyoma pṛṣṭhaśṛṃgamanuttamam
indraḥ pūrvadiśo bhāge āgneyyāṃ śāṃḍilīsutaḥ
dakṣiṇasyāṃ yamo nityaṃ nairṛtyāmatha nirṛtiḥ
paścimāyāṃ tu varuṇo vāyavyāṃ tu sadāgatiḥ
aiśānyāṃ śaṃkaro devo madhye tvaṃ viṣṇunā saha
śrutvaitvaṃ vacanaṃ bhānorvedhāḥ prītyā tamabravīt
kṛtakṛtyaṃ tathātmānaṃ manyate ca narādhipa
cakāra ca tathā sarvaṃ bhāska roktamaśeṣataḥ
dadarśa tatra bhūteśaṃ tapastīvraṃ samāśritam
kapardinaṃ śūladharaṃ candrārkakṛtaśekharam
pūjayaṃtaṃ paraṃ vyoma suvrataṃ teja sānvitam
gandhamālyopahāraiśca nṛtyagītapravāditaiḥ
saṃpūjyaiva mahadvyoma jagāma śirasā mahīm
dṛṣṭvaivaṃ pūjayantaṃ ca bhāskarastripurāṃtakam
tuṣṭovocanmahātejā gośrutābharaṇaṃ haram
bhīma tuṣṭoasmi te vatsa varaṃ matto vṛṇuṣva vai
tavāṃtikamahaṃ prāpto varado bhūbhṛdālaya
śrutvaivaṃ vacanaṃ bhānormahādevo mahīpate
uvāca praṇato bhūtvā aṣṭāṃgairbhūtalaṃ gataḥ
śubhālaya śubhādhāra vikartana śubhānana
āditya uvāca
lalāṭāttvaṃ samutpannaḥ putraḥ putravatāṃ vara
mahādeva uvāca
prayaccha me varaṃ bhāno dehi bhaktiṃ mamācalām devadānavagaṃdharvayakṣarakṣogaṇāṃstathā
nirjityāhaṃ yathā deva yugānte saṃhare prajām
āditya uvāca
etattriśūlaṃ paramaṃ tava śastraṃ bhaviṣyati
īśāne ca tathā bhāge vyomno vāso bhaviṣyati
mahādeva uvāca
evaṃ bhavatu me deva yaḥ prasādastvayā kṛtaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmanirupaṇaṃ nāma pañcapañcāśaduttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
itthaṃ dattvā varaṃ bhānurīśvarāya viśāṃ pate
śālagrāmaṃ jagāmāśu varaṃ dātuṃ harernṛpa
kṛṣṇājinadharaṃ śāntaṃ prajvalantaṃ svatejasā
gandhamālyopahāraiśca nṛtyagītapravāditaiḥ
evaṃ saṃpūjya tadvyoma bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ
jagāma śirasā bhūmiṃ hṛdi dhyāyandivākaram
viṣṇuṃ taṃ praṇataṃ dṛṣṭvā tuṣṭo devo vibhāvasuḥ
uvāca viṣṇumāmaṃtrya paśya māmāgataṃ hare
tadvākyaṃ keśavaḥ śrutvā śirasā ca mahīṃ gataḥ
ādityārka rave bhāno bhaga pūrṇa divākara
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ trāhi deva vṛṣadhvaja
viṣṇorvacanamākarṇya harṣaṃ prāpya divākaraḥ
uvāca kuruśārdūla harṣagadgadayā girā
sādhu kṛṣṇa mahābāho tuṣṭohaṃ tava keśava
niśamya te parāṃ bhaktiṃ śraddhāṃ ca puruṣottama
niśamya vacanaṃ bhānorviṣṇurbhaktyā samanvitaḥ
kṛtāṃjalipuṭo bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt
prayaccha tvacalāṃ bhaktiṃ yathā śatruṃ parājaye
tathā mama varaṃ dehi sarvārāti vināśanam
lokānāṃ pālane yuktiṃ balaṃ vīryaṃ yaśaḥ sukham
sādhu sādhu mahābāho brahmaṇastvaṃ jaghanyajaḥ
bhaktaścāpi mamātyaṃtaṃ brahmaṇyaśca sadānagha
sarvāyudhavaraṃ vīra sarvārātivināśanam
mahāprasādamityuktvā jagāma śirasā mahīm
bhāskaroapi varaṃ dattvā keśavāyāmitaujase
jagāmāśu mahārāja svapuraṃ vibudhādhipaḥ
lokānāṃ pālane śaktiṃ balaṃ vīryaṃ yaśaḥ sukham
dattvā kṛṣṇāya deveśastathānyadapi kāṃkṣitam
evaṃ brahmādayo devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram
śaktimaṃto babhūvuste sargādīnāṃ pravartane
iti te kathitaṃ puṇyamākhyānaṃ pāpanāśanam
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ paṭhetstotratrayaṃ ca yaḥ
soagneyaṃ yānamārūḍho yāti bhānoḥ para padam
vidyārthī labhate vidyāṃ prasādādbhāskarasya tu
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ prabhayā pṛśnisannibhaḥ
modate suciraṃ kālaṃ jñānināmuttamo bhavet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme traisuropākhyānavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭpaṃcāśaduttaraśata tamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūryāvatārakathāprastāvavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
yāsyāmi dvijaśārdūla prapannatimirāpahaḥ
etanme mahadāścaryaṃ śaṃsa bhūmiṃ kathaṃ vrajet
devādīnāṃ praṇetā yo yo bhuvi prasavo vibhuḥ
sa janmani kathaṃ puṇyāṃ buddhiṃ cakre vidāṃvara
gobhiḥ pālayate kṛtsnamātmano yaḥ svayaṃ raviḥ
mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā yaścakāra dadhāra ca
yena gobhiḥ samākrāṃtā vipra lokāścaturdaśa
yoantakāle jagatpītvā kṛtvā vajramayaṃ vapuḥ
lokamekārṇavaṃ cakre dṛśyate svena karmaṇā
yaḥ purāṇe purāṇātmā tejasāṃ rūpamāsthitaḥ
api sṛṣṭvā dvijaśreṣṭha yaḥ sasarja vasuṃdharām
dadau kṛtvā vasumatīṃ surāṇāṃ surasattamaḥ
yaḥ sthito hyanalaṃ pītvā saṃvatsaramayaśca yaḥ
pātālasthorṇavarasaṃ madhyatoyamayaṃ haviḥ
sahasraśirasaṃ devaṃ sahasrākṣaṃ sahasraśaḥ
hariśca vakṣaso yasya lalāṭādyasya śaṃkaraḥ
yena te nihatā daityā maṃdehā nāma nāmataḥ
brahmādīnāṃ durādharṣo yaḥ sadā vighnanāśanaḥ
sarvadevamayaṃ kṛtvā sarvāyudhadharaṃ vapuḥ
ekacakrarathārūḍho garuḍāgrajasārathiḥ
karāṃte yo jagatsarvaṃ saha dānavarākṣasam
prakāśatamamaspṛṣṭaṃ vapuryasya sadā dvija
nāśayedyastu satataṃ tamo lokasya śāṃtaye
nāśayitvā tamo yastu kriyāḥ sarvāḥ pravartayet
yoktrāṇi dakṣiṇādīkṣya musalolūkhalāni ca
gārhapatyena vidhinā tadvaddhāryeṇa karmaṇā
agnimāhavanīṃ caiva vediṃ caiva kuśaṃ srucam
sarvānimāṃśca yaścakre havyabhāgapradānmukhe
havyādāṃśca surānyajñe kavyādāṃśca pitṛrnapi
bhāgārthe madhudhānāya cakre yo yajñakarmaṇi
pūṣaṇaṃ ca sutaṃ somaṃ pavitrāmaraṇīmapi
yajñāni ca dravyāṇi yajñāṃścāpi saṛtvijaḥ
sadasyānyajamānāṃśca medhāvinastathottamān
vibabhāja purā sarvaṃ pārameṣṭhayena karmaṇā
yugānurūpo yaḥ kṛtvā lokānanuvaraṃ kramāt
kṣaṇānkalāśca kāṣṭhāśca kālavaikalyameva ca
muhūrtāstithayo māsāḥ pakṣāḥ saṃvatsarāstathā
ṛtavaḥ kālayogāśca pramāṇaṃ vividhaṃ nṛṣu
āyuḥ kṣetrāṇyapacayopacayāṃścaiva yoakarot
sṛṣṭā lokāstrayonaṃtā yena jñānena vartmanā
sarva bhūtagaṇāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ sarvabhūtātmanā sadā
yo gatāgatipotena trātāsti jagadīśvaraḥ
yo gatirvṛṣayuktānāṃ gatiryoapāpakarmaṇām
dhātuvaidyasya yo vettā caturāśramasaṃśrayaḥ
digaṃbarānubhūtaśca vāyurvāyuvibhāvanaḥ
agnīṣomātmakaṃ jyotiryogīśaḥ kṣaṇadāṃtakaḥ
yaḥ paraṃ śrūyate jyotiryaḥ paraṃ śrūyate tapaḥ
yaṃ paraṃ paramaṃ prāhuḥ paramātmānamacyutam
brahmādibhiḥ stuto devo yaśca daityāṃtakṛdvibhuḥ
yugāṃteṣvataṃko yastu yaśca lokāṃtakottamaḥ
vettā yo vedaviduṣāṃ prabhuryaḥ prabhaviṣṇunām
mānuṣāṇāṃ manobhūtastapobhūtastapasvinām
ākāśaprasavo vāyurvāyuḥ prāṇo hutāśanaḥ
devāhutipradānodyatprāṇāgnistamanāśanaḥ
rasāddhi śoṇitaṃ bhavati śoṇitānmāṃsamucyate
śukrādgarbhaḥ samabhavadrasamūlena karmaṇā
tataḥ kṣmāsaṃbhavo jñeyo dvitīyo rāśirucyate
śukraṃ somātmakaṃ vidyādātmarūpaṃ yadātmakam
bhavo rasātmakasteṣāṃ vīryaṃ ca śaśipāvakam
kaphasya pṛthivī sthānaṃ pittaṃ nābhau pratiṣṭhitam
nābhikoṣṭhāṃtarasthaṃ tu tatra devo divākaraḥ
pittamagniḥ smṛto yasmādagnīṣomātmakaṃ jagat
vāyuḥ praveśaṃ saṃcakre saṃgataḥ paramātmanā
prāṇoapānaḥ samānaśca udāno vyāna eva ca
apānaṃ paścime kāya udānordhvaṃ śarīragaḥ
bhūtāvāptistatastasya jāyatīṃdriyagocarā
pṛthivī vāyurākāśa āpo jyotiśca paṃcamaḥ
tasyeṃdriyāṇi piṣṭāni svaṃsvaṃ yogaṃ pracakramuḥ
pārthivaṃ dehamāhustu prāṇātmānaṃ ca mārutam
nidrā hyākāśayoniśca jalāśraye pravartate
jyotiścakṣuṣi tajjanma tadaṃśastāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ
grāmāśca viṣayāścaiva yasya vīryaṃ pravartitam
evaṃ yaḥ sṛjate lokānsadevāsuramānavān
sa kathaṃ devadeveśo garbhameṣyati cāṃśumān
yathodaramadityāstu yaḥ svayaṃ cāviśatpurā
āścaryaṃ paramaṃ pṛcche tvāmahaṃ bhāskarasya vai
etadāścaryamākhyānaṃ kathayasva mahāmune
samākhyāhi balaṃ vīrya bhānoramitatejasaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryāvatārakathāprastāvavarṇanaṃ nāma saptapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sumaṃturuvāca
praśnabhāro mahāṃstāta tvayokto raśmimālini
yathāśakti tu vakṣyāmi śrūyatāṃ bhānavaṃ yaśaḥ
bhānoḥ prabhāvaśravaṇe yasya te matirutthitā
haṃta bhānoḥ pravṛttiṃ ca śṛṇu divyāṃ mayeritām
sahasrāsyaṃ sahasrākṣaṃ sahasrakiraṇaṃ ca yam
pātrāṇi samatītāni vedadīkṣī caruṃ śubham
śrotriyaṃ śūrpamusalaṃ prokṣaṇaṃ dakṣiṇāyanam
adhvaryuṃ sāmagaṃ vipraṃ sadasyaṃ sadanaṃ tathā
yūpaṃ samitsruvaṃ darvīṃ musalolūkhalāni ca
prāgvaṃśaṃ jayabhūtiṃ ca hotāraṃ cayanaṃ ca yat
rahasyāni pramāṇāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca
pratiṣṭhitāni dārḍhyaṃ ca sthaṃḍilāni kuśāṃstathā
agrebhujī somabhujāṃ yaśca triṣu udāhṛtaḥ
āyurvedavido viprā yajaṃte śāśvataṃ vibhum
tasya bhānoḥ sureśasya vīra caṃdanamālinaḥ
prāhurbhāvasahasrāṇi samatītānyanekaśaḥ
bhūyaścaiva bhaviṣyaṃti vinaśyaṃti dinedine
yatpṛcchasi mahārāja puṇyāṃ divyāṃ kathāṃ śubhām
tāmahaṃ tvaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu sarvamaśeṣataḥ
hitārthaṃ sarvamartyānāṃ lokānāṃ prabhavāya ca
bahuśaḥ sarvabhūtātmā svayaṃ samabhijāyate
tathā samabhavaddevaḥ kaśyapasyāditeḥ sutaḥ
tuṣṭo dattvā varaṃ vīra virañcasya mahātmanaḥ
yaṃ yaṃ janayate putramaditiḥ kaśyapādvibhoḥ
sa sa yāti vināśaṃ vai tatkṣaṇādeva bhārata
dṛṣṭvā sutānnaśyamānānputraśokānvitā aditiḥ
jagāma kaśyapābhyāśe śokavyākulitekṣaṇā
sāpaśyattaṃ ca mārīcaṃ muniṃ dīptaṃ taponidhim
ādyaṃ devaguruṃ vipraṃ divyaṃ triṣavaṇāṃbubhiḥ
tejasā vahnisaṃkāśaṃ sauraṃ vṛkasamaprabham
nyastadaṇḍaśriyā yuktaṃ baddhakṛṣṇājināṃbaram
athāditiśca dṛṣṭvaivaṃ bhartāramamitaujasam
śokagadgadayā vācā idaṃ vacanamabravīt
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ tasyāḥ kaśyapo munisattamaḥ
tadvākya muktaṃ taṃ sarvaṃ yaduktaṃ tasya jāyayā
kaśyapasya vacaḥ śrutvā kañjajo vākyamabravīt
ityuktvā yānamāruhya āgneyaṃ padmalocanaḥ
aditiḥ kaśyapo brahmā jagmurvipulamāśritāḥ
te muhūrtena saṃprāptāḥ sūryalokaṃ suvarcasam
ādityaṃ praṣṭumicchaṃti tejasāṃ rāśimuttamam
gacchantaste ca vistīrṇāmādityasya parāṃ sabhām
ṣaṭpadodgītaninadāṃ sābhagaistu samīritām
kratavo bahvṛcamukhāḥ proktāḥ puṇyavadakṣarāḥ
tuṣṭuvuḥ puruṣavyāghraṃ vitateṣu ca karmasu
yajñasandhau vedavidāṃ padakramavidāṃ tathā
ghoṣeṇa paramarṣīṇāṃ sarvaṃ tatra nināditam
yajñasaṃstavavidbhiśca śikṣāvidbhistathā dvijaiḥ
aṣṭādaśapurāṇajñaiḥ sarvavidyāviśāradaiḥ
mīmāṃsāhetuvādajñaiḥ sarvavādaviśāradaiḥ
lokāyatikamukhyaiśca tuṣṭuvuḥ sūryamīritam
japahomaparānyogyāndadṛśuḥ kaśyapādayaḥ
tasyāṃ sabhāyāmāste sa raśmimālī divākaraḥ
surāsuraguruḥ śrīmāñchuśubhe vīra māyayā
upāsate ca tatraiva prajānāṃ patimīśvaram
dakṣaḥ pracetāḥ pulaho marīciśca dvijottamaḥ
bhṛguratrirvaśiṣṭhaśca gautamo nāradastathā
divyā ātmāṃtarikṣaṃ ca vāyustejobalaṃ mahī
prakṛtiśca vikārāśca yaccānyatkāraṇaṃ mahat
sāṃgopāgāśca catvāro vedā lokapate tathā
lavāśca ṛtavaścaiva saṃkalpapraṇavāstathā
artho dharmaśca kāmaśca mokṣaśca saviśeṣataḥ
vṛko viṣṇusutaḥ putraḥ puṣpajo dhiṣaṇastathā
māruto viśvakarmā ca aśvi nāvanyavāhanau
evamuktaḥ suvacanairbhānunā prabhaviṣṇunā
jagāma kaśyapo vīra sahādityā svamāśramam
bhūtātmānaṃ mahātmānaṃ divyaṃ varṣasahasrakam
surāṇāṃ śaraṇaṃ devaścāsurāṇāṃ vināśanaḥ
prahatya daityasaṃghāṃśca surāṇāṃ nādavardhane
abhavatparamānandaḥ sarveṣāṃ tatra tasthuṣām
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryotpattirnāmāṣṭapañcāśaduttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūryāvatāravarṇanam
sumaṃturuvāca
dakṣaḥ prajāpatiścaiva namaskāraṃ cakāra ha
vidyotamāno vapuṣā sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
upātiṣṭhata deveśaṃ bhānuṃ carṣigaṇaiḥ saha
evaṃ te devagaṃdharvā upāgāyaṃta bhaktitaḥ
utpannaṃ dvādaśātmānaṃ bhāskaraṃ vāritaskaram
indro vivasvānpūṣā ca tvaṣṭā ca savitā tathā
bhargoṃaśumānaryamārkaḥ pṛśnirmārtaṃḍa eva ca
ityekādaśa evaite dvādaśo viṣṇurucyate
evaṃ dvādaśadhā jātamaṃśumaṃtaṃ mahādbhutam
stuvanti devatāḥ sarve gatāśca tarasā mahīm
mṛgavyādhaśca śarvaśca mṛgāṃkāṃko mahāyaśāḥ
ajaikapādahirbudhnyaḥ patiḥ kācaḥ paraṃtapaḥ
damanaśceśvaraścaiva kapālī ca viśāṃpate
aśvinau vasavaścāṣṭau garuḍaśca mahābalaḥ
viśvedevāśca sādhyāśca tasthuḥ prāṃjalayo nṛpa
nāgarājo mahārāja vāsukiḥ prāṃjaliḥ sthitaḥ
anye ca bahavo nāgā rākṣasāśca mahābalāḥ
tārkṣyaścāriṣṭanemiśca garuḍaśca mahābalaḥ
aruṇaścāruṇiścaiva tatra prāṃjalayaḥ sthitāḥ
prāha devaguruḥ śrīmāntsuraiḥ sarvairmaharṣibhiḥ
yasmātprekṣayate sarvaṃ prabhaviṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ
tasmāllokeśvaraḥ śrīmānvivasvāṃśca bhavatviti
devadānavayakṣāṇāṃ gaṃdharvoragarakṣasām
evamuktvā tu bhagavānsārdhaṃ devarṣibhiḥ prabhuḥ
yā gatiryajñaśīlānāṃ yā gatiḥ puṇyakarmaṇām
yā gatiḥ siddhayogānāṃ yā gatiśca mahātmanām
yasyāṣṭaguṇamaiśvaryaṃ samabhūddevasattamam
yaṃ prāpya śāśvataṃ viprā nāvartaṃte bhavārṇave
vālakhilyādayo ye ca sarvāśramanivāsinaḥ
sevaṃte yaṃ yatātmāno duścaraṃ vratamāsthitāḥ
sahasramūrdhā raktākṣaḥ śeṣādibhiranuttamaiḥ
sarve ca yaṃ yataprāṇā dhyāyanti brahmarūpiṇam
yaṃ vedavido gāyaṃti vettāraṃ yajñadāyi nam
taṃ putraṃ dvādaśātmānaṃ kaśyapaḥ prāpya sattamam
madhupiṃgalo mahābāhuḥ kaṃbugrīvo hasanniva
sa uvāca mahātejāḥ kaśyapaṃ carṣisatta mam
dattvā varaṃ purā vipra viraṃcasya mahātmanaḥ
tasmāttvamṛṣiśārdūla kuru sṛṣṭimanaupamām
evamārādhya deveśaṃ brahmā sṛṣṭimavāptavān
ārādhya kaśyapaścāpi bhāskaraṃ sutamāptavān
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ubhayasaptamīmahātmye sūryāvatāravarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūryāvatāravarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
brahmādayoapi yaṃ nityaṃ pūjayaṃti vidhānataḥ
brahmā viṣṇuḥ surā brahmaṃstamārādhya divākaram
dadṛśustasya kiṃbhūtaṃ rūpaṃ yattanmahādbhutam
sumaṃturuvāca
ārādhya devamīśānaṃ bhāskaraṃ sūtivācakam
kaviṣṇū kuruśārdūla jagmatustau himācalam
gopateraṃtikaṃ vīra prahṛṣṭau vibhudarśane
kuṃdeṃdusaṃnibhaṃ draṣṭuṃ kaṃjajaścācyutaśca tau
dadṛśaturmahātmānaṃ caṃdrārdhakṛtaśekharam
pūjayaṃtaṃ vivasvaṃtaṃ bhāskaraṃ vīravannṛpa
ārcyocaturmahātmānaṃ kaviṣṇū taṃ trilocanam
bhobho bhīma suraśreṣṭha paśyāvāmiha cāgatau
praṇamya śirasā bhūmau kṛtvā pūjāṃ vidhānataḥ
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ śikṣākṣarasamanvitam
harṣa gadgadayā vācā diśaḥ sannādayanniva
dṛṣṭavaṃtau paraṃ kiṃcidrūpaṃ devasya śaṃkaram
niśamya vacanaṃ vīra śaṃkarasya mahātmanaḥ
ūcatustau mahātmānau kaviṣṇū devasattamau
ārādhayitumevāpi hyāgatau teṃtikaṃ ca tam
tasmādārādhayāmo hi ekībhūya vibhāvasum
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ vīra kaṃjajācyutayorharaḥ
tathetyāha mahābāho harṣādutphullalocanaḥ
atha te rājaśārdūla vivigogatayo nṛpa
jagmustaṃ parvataśreṣṭhamudayācalamāśu vai
tamāsādya nagaṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṃgaistribhiralaṃkṛtam
nānā dhātupinaddhāṅgaṃ nānādhātuvibhūṣitam
ārādhanāya vidhivadyatnaṃ cakrurvibhāvasoḥ
divyavarṣasahasrāṃte tapaṃtaḥ saṃsthitā nage
sthāṇuvatsaṃsthito bhūmāvūrdhvabāhustrilocanaḥ
paṃcāgniṃ bhajamānastu sthito viṣṇuravākchirāḥ
evaṃ varṣasahasrāṃte tapaścakruḥ sudāruṇam
atha brahmeśaviṣṇūnāṃ kurvatāṃ tapa uttamam
tuṣṭohaṃ bhavatāṃ dātu mihāyāto varaṃ svayam
sumaṃturuvāca
niśamya vacanaṃ bhānoḥ śāṃtaṃ hṛdyaṃ manoramam
praṇamya śirasā keśā idaṃ vacamabruvan
kṛtakṛtyā vayaṃ sarve prasādāttava gopate
tvāmārādhya purā deva tvattaḥ prāpya varaṃ śubham
utpattisthitināśānāṃ vayaṃ sarve divākara
saṃbhūyeha samarthā vai tvatprasādānna saṃśayaḥ
yatte paramakaṃ rūpaṃ durlabhaṃ durdṛśaṃ tathā
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā brahmaviṣṇvīśabhāṣitam
darśayāmāsa tadrūpamadbhutaṃ lokapūjitam
bhūḥ pādau dyauḥ śiraścāpi tatrāgnī locane mate
pādāṃgulyaḥ piśācāśca hastāṃgulyaśca guhyakāḥ
viśve devāḥ smṛtāstasya jaṃghāsaṃghāḥ surottamāḥ
yakṣāḥ kukṣiṣu saṃlīnāḥ keśāścāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ
dṛṣṭidhṛṣṭyaśca vipulāḥ keśā vīrāṃśavaḥ smṛtāḥ
tārakā romarūpāṇi romāṇi ca maharṣayaḥ
bāhavo vidiśastasya diśaḥ śrotre narādhipa
aśvinau śravaṇe cāsya nāsā vāyurmahābalaḥ
satyamasyābhavadvāṇī jihvā devī sarasvatī
grīvāditirmahādevī tālū rudraśca vīryavān
dvāraṃ svargasya nābhirvai mitrastvaṣṭā picaṃḍakaḥ
mukhaṃ vaiśvānaraścāsya vṛṣaṇau ca bhagastadā
hṛdayaṃ bhagavānbrahmā hyudaraṃ kaśyapo muniḥ
pṛṣṭheasya vasavo devā marutaḥ sarvasaṃdhiṣu
sarvacchaṃdāṃsi daśanā jyotīṃṣi vimalā prabhā
prāṇo rudro mahādevaḥ kukṣau cāsya mahārṇavāḥ
udare cāsya gaṃdharvā bhujagāśca mahābalāḥ
lakṣmīrmedhā dhṛtiḥ kāṃtiḥ sarvā vidyāśca vai kaṭau
lalāṭamasya paramaṃ vayaḥsthānaṃ parātmanaḥ
sarvajyotīṃṣi jānīhi tapaścakraśca deva rāṭ
stanau kukṣau ca vedāśca teṣṭau cāsya makhāḥ smṛtāḥ
yaṣṭavyapaśubaṃdhāśca dvijānāṃ veṣṭi tāni ca
sarvadevamayaṃ dṛṣṭvā rūpamarkasya te nṛpa
brahmā haro harirdevāḥ paraṃ vismayamāgatāḥ
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ vepamānā dharāṃ gatāḥ
samīkṣya rūpaṃ te deva bhīmaṃ jvālāsamākulam
digjñānaṃ hṛtamasmākaṃ tatprasīda jagatpate
upasaṃhara viśvātmandraṣṭuṃ śaktā na te vayam
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā devadevo divākaraḥ
āditya uvāca
etanmayā prasannena yuṣmākaṃ śreyaseanaghāḥ
darśitaṃ pūjiteneha yogināṃ yanmahālayam
brahmeśācyutā ucuḥ
tvāmārādhya jagannāthaṃ nāprāpyamiha vidyate
evamuktvāaditeḥ putro jagāmādarśanaṃ raviḥ
evaṃ brahmādayo devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram
gatāste paramāṃ siddhiṃ gaṃdharvā ṛṣayastathā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu brahmādīnāṃ sūryarūpadarśanavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūryapūjāphalapraśnavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
nāstyādityasamo devo nāstyādityasamā gatiḥ
ādityamūlamakhilaṃ trailokyaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ
rudreṃdropeṃdrakeṃdrāṇāṃ vipreṃdra tridivaukasām
sarvātmā sarvalokeśo mahādevaḥ prajāpatiḥ
bhāvābhāvau hi lokanāmādityānniḥsṛtau purā
kṣaṇā muhūrtā divasā rātripakṣāśca kṛtsnaśaḥ
māsāḥ saṃvatsarāścaiva ṛtavaśca yugāni ca
sa eṣa kālaścāgniśca dvādaśātmā prajāpatiḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi sauradharme sūryapūjāphalapraśnavarṇanaṃ nāmaikaṣaṣṭyutaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sumaṃturuvāca
bhānuṃ pratiṣṭhāpya naraḥ sarvadevamayaṃ vibhum
prāpnotyamaratāṃ vīra tejasā ravisannibhaḥ
yo bhānuṃ dveṣṭi saṃmohātsarvadevanama skṛtam
naro narakagāmī syāttasyasaṃbhāṣaṇādapi
bhānumiṣṭaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya sarvayatnairvidhānataḥ
yatpuṇyaphalamāpnoti tadekāgramanāḥ śṛṇu
tatphalaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ sthāpya bhānuṃ labhennaraḥ
yo bhānuṃ sthāpayedbhaktyā vidhipūrvaṃ narādhipa
sarvāṃgamuditaṃ puṇyaṃ labhetkoṭiguṇaṃ naraḥ
mātṛjānpitṛjāṃścaiva yatra codvahate striyam
atha vā rājyamākāṃkṣejjāyate saṃbhavāṃtare
ihaiva dhanavāñcchrīmā nsoṃtearkatvamavāpnuyāt
trisaṃdhyaṃ kīrtayedvyoma kṛtvā biṃbena pārthivam
śataikādaśakaṃ yāvattasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
anena saha dehena bhānuḥ saṃtiṣṭhate kṣitau
pāpahā sarvamartyānāṃ darśanātsparśanādapi
uddhārayecca saṃsthāpya kulānāmekaviṃśatim
gīrvāṇaiḥ sahito nityaṃ modate divi sūravat
bhakṣyalehyarasaiścaiva kṛtadīpairalaṃkṛtaiḥ
nānārasamāyuktaṃ nānāgaṃdhasamanvitam
tasya dakṣiṇapārśve tu vinyasedaguruṃ budhaḥ
dadyādvai paścime bhāge śrīkhaṃḍaṃ caṃdanaṃ śubham
uttare caṃdanaṃ dadyādraktaṃ dadyācca pūrvataḥ
evaṃ vittānusāreṇa kṛtvā vibhavavistaram
kṛṣṇapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ bhāska rasya nivedayet
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ prabhayārkasamaprabhaḥ
pāṃsunā krīḍamāno yaḥ kuryādvyoma hyakāryataḥ
sa rājanbhavate rājā parvateṣu samaṃtataḥ
sarveṣāmeva pātrāṇāṃ paraṃ pātraṃ vibhāvasuḥ
etatsaṃtārayedyasmādatīva narakārṇavāt
tasya pātrasya māhātmyaṃ dhruvamakṣayamādiśet
ravau dattaṃ hutaṃ japtaṃ baliṃ pūjāṃ nivedayet
anaṃtaphalamādiṣṭaṃ brahmādisurasattamaiḥ
bhaktyā vittānusāreṇa yaḥ kuryādālayaṃ raveḥ
vittaśāṭhyena yaḥ kuryādvittavānapi mānavaḥ
na sa phalamavāpnoti pralobhākrāṃtamānasaḥ
bhāgadvayaṃ ca dharmārthe anityaṃ jīvanaṃ yataḥ
yanmayā koṭiguṇitaṃ kṛtaṃ syādiṣṭakāmyayā
dviparārdhaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ śailajeapi vidurbudhāḥ
mṛcchailena samaṃ jñeyaṃ puṇyamāḍhyadaridrayoḥ
śailotthamiṣṭakābhirvā dṛḍhaṃ dārumayaṃ śubham
gairikaṃ yānamāruhya yaḥ kuryāddhṛtabhūṣaṇaḥ
krīḍamānoapi yaḥ kuryādbālabhāvearkamaṃdiram
puṣpamālākulaṃ divyaṃ dhūpagaṃdhādivāsitam
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ sarvakāmamukhapradam
tatra rūḍho mahārāja vatsaraṃ vṛndamuttamam
uṣitvā bhāskarapure pūjyamānastu daivataiḥ
dharmārthakāmasaṃpanno yaśasā ca narādhipa
paśyanpariharañjaṃtūnmārjanyā mṛdusūkṣmayā
śanaiḥ saṃmārjanaṃ kuryāccāṃdrāyaṇaphalaṃ bhavet
putrārthaṃ dehajīrṇāyā vandhyāyāśca viśeṣataḥ
rogārtānāṃ ca bhūtānāmārogyārthaṃ prapūjayet
gṛhītvā gomayaṃ svacchaṃ sthāne ca patitaṃ śubhe
paśyettu sukhitāñjaṃtūṃścāṃdrāyaṇaśataṃ labhet
yaḥ kuryātsarvakāryāṇi vastrapūtena vāriṇā
sa muniḥ sa mahāsādhuḥ sa gacchetparamāṃ gatim
kṣaraṃti sarvadānāni yajñahomabalikriyāḥ
akṣaraṃ tu mahādānaṃ sukhadaṃ sarvadehinām
nairaṃtaryeṇa yaḥ kuryātpakṣaṃ saṃmārjanārcanam
varṣamekaṃ śataṃ divyaṃ suraloke mahīyate
tasyāṃte ca caturveda surūpaḥ priyadarśanaḥ
ādyaḥ sarvaguṇopeto rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
saṃparkeṇāpi yaḥ kuryānnaraḥ karma bhagālaye
sopi saumanasaṃ gatvā puraṃ krīḍati nityaśaḥ
tāvadbhramaṃti saṃsāre duḥkhaśokapariplutāḥ
yaḥ kuryātkuṭṭimāṃ bhūmiṃ darpaṇodarasannibhām
nānāvarṇavicitrāṃ ca vicitra kusumojjvalām
ramyāṃ manoramāṃ saumyāmarkāyatanasaṃsadi
yāvaddaṃḍā bhavedbhūmiḥ samaṃtācca suśobhanā
kārayeccitraśāstrajñaiścitrakarmārkamaṃdire
yāvatsa devarūpāṇi graharūpāṇi lekhayet
bhavedbhūmiḥ samaṃtācca yaḥ kuryādarkamaṃdi ram
ārāmāvasathādīnāṃ labhedāmūlyakaṃ phalam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmavarṇanaṃnāma dviṣaṣṭyu ttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sauradharmeṣu puṣpapūjāvarṇanam
snānakāle prakurvīta jayaśabdādimaṃga lam
hemarūpādipātreṣu kalpitaṃ gomayādibhiḥ
nānāvarṇakasaṃyuktairakṣataistilataṃdulaiḥ
svacchaiśca dadhisaṃmiśrairyathāśobhaṃ prapūritaiḥ
dravyapīṭhapradīpāśca bhūtāśvatthādipallavaiḥ
auṣadhībhiśca medhyābhiḥ sarvabījairyavādibhiḥ
saptamyādiṣu sarveṣu ṣaṣṭhyādiṣu viśeṣataḥ
śaṃkhabheryādibhiḥ kuryādvādyaghoṣaṃ suśobhanam
kuryānnīrājanaṃ caiva śaṃkhavāditramaṃgalaiḥ
yāvannīrājanaṃ kuryātparvāṇi vidhivadravau
snānaṃ daśaguṇaṃ jñeyaṃ mahatpuṇyaṃ narādhipa
ṛbhavo vīramuddiśya dehaśuddhiṃ ca śāśvatīm
varṣakoṭisahasreṇa yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam
ghṛtābhyaṃgena sūryasya dahetsarvaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
saptamyāṃ ca kṛtasnāno yajetsūryaṃ sakṛnnaraḥ
sakṛdāḍhakena payasā yo bhānuṃ snāpa yennaraḥ
snāpya dadhnā sakṛdbhānuṃ sa triloke mahīyate
uddhṛtya śālipiṣṭena vāyulokeṣu pūjyate
snānamikṣuraseneha yaḥ sūrye sakṛdācaret
śrīkhaṃḍavāriṇā snāpya sakṛdbhānuṃ narā dhipa
caṃdrāṃśunirmalaḥ śrīmāṃścaredātreyamaṃdire
sa sarvakāmatṛptātmā rākādhipapuraṃ vrajet
āpo hiṣṭheti japyena gaṃgātoyena bhārata
snāpya bhānuṃ sakṛnmantraiḥ saptamyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ
pitṛnuddiśya yo bhānuṃ snāpayecchītavāriṇā
tṛptāḥ svarga vrajaṃtyāśu pitaro narakādapi
bhānuṃ śītāṃbunā snāpya dhāroṣṇapayasā saha
etatsnānatrayaṃ kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhārata
mṛtkumbhāttāmrakumbhaistu snānaṃ śataguṇaṃ matam
raupyaiḥ pādottaraṃ puṇyaṃ darśanātsparśanaṃ param
sparśanādarcanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ ghṛtasnānamataḥ param
ihāmutra kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ ghṛtasnānena naśyati
saptajanma kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ purāṇaśravaṇena tu
daśāparādhāṃstoyena kṣīreṇa tu śataṃ kṣamet
sahasraṃ kṣamate dadhnā ghṛtenāpyayutaṃ kṣamet
nairantaryeṇa yo māsaṃ ghṛtasnānaṃ samācaret
daśaikādaśa kulānīha nayetsūryasya maṃdiram
snānaṃ palaśataṃ jñeyamabhyaṃgaḥ pañcaviṃśatiḥ
palānāṃ dvisahasreṇa mahāsnānamati śrutiḥ
ghṛtābhyaṃgaṃ ghṛtasnāna bhānoḥ kuryyāddvijottama
yaśca godhūmacūrṇaistu kaṣāyairdarbhasaṃmitaiḥ
gaṃdhatoyena saṃmiśramudakāddvādaśottaram
pañcagavyasamāyuktamarghyaṃ śataguṇaṃ nṛpa
yoṣṭāṃgagarbhamāpūrya bhānormūrdhni nivedayet
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi ramate cārkamaṃdire
āpaḥ kṣīraṃ kuśāgrāṇi ghṛtaṃ dadhi tathā madhu
raktāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktaṃ ca canda nam
aṣṭāṃga eṣa argho vai brahmaṇā parikīrtitaḥ
tasmācchataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ mṛtpātreṇa narādhipa
tāmrārghyapātradānena puṇyaṃ śataguṇaṃ matam
pālāśapadmapatrābhyāṃ tāmrapātre phalaṃ labhet
raupyapātreṇa vijñeyaṃ lakṣārghyaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ
evaṃ snānārghyanaivedyabalidhūpādiṣu kramāt
pātrāṃtaraviśeṣeṇa tatphalaṃ tūttarottaram
tāmrapātrapradānena tasmācchataguṇaṃ ravau
suvarṇapātraṃ yo dadyādbhāskarāya mahīpate
na śakyaṃ tasya tadvaktuṃ puṇyaṃ pātraviśeṣataḥ
tadanaṃtaphalaṃ jñeyaṃ bhaktirevātra kāraṇam
varṣakoṭiśataṃ divyaṃ sūryaloke mahīyate
gaṃdhānulepanaṃ puṇyaṃ dviguṇaṃ candanasya tu
gaṃdhāccaturguṇaṃ jñeyaṃ puṣpamaṣṭaguṇaṃ nṛpa
kṛṣṇāguru viśeṣeṇa dviguṇaṃ phalamādiśeta
tasmācchataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ kuṃkumasya vidhīyate
caṃdanāgurukarpūraiḥ ślakṣṇapiṣṭaiḥ sakuṃkumaiḥ
bhānuṃ paryāptamālipya kalpakoṭiṃ vaseddivi
bhaktyā nivedya arkāya tālavṛṃtaṃ narādhipa
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi vīralokaṃ mahīyate
māyūraṃ vyajanaṃ dattvā sūryāyātīva śobhanam
varṣakoṭiśataṃ pūrṇaṃ prabhaṃjanapure vaset
puṣpairaraṇyasaṃbhūtaiḥ patrairvā girisambhavaiḥ
ātmārāmabhavaiścaiva puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjayedravim
puṣpajātiviśeṣeṇa bhavetpuṇyaṃ tatoadhikam
tapaḥśīlaguṇopeta iti hāsavidi dvije
evaṃ puṣpaviśeṣeṇa phalaṃ tadadhikaṃ bhavet
jñeyaṃ puṇyaṃ rasajñena yathā syāttannibodha me
sadā puṣpasahasrebhyaḥ karavīraṃ viśiṣyate
kuśapuṣpasahasrebhyaḥ śamīpatraṃ viśiṣyate
śamīpuṣpasahasrebhyo nṛpa nīlotpalaṃ param
sarvāsāṃ puṣpajātīnāṃ pravaraṃ nīlamutpalam
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca
vasedarkapure śrīmānsūryatulyaparākramaḥ
śeṣāṇāṃ puṣpajātīnāṃ yatphalaṃ parikīrtitam
śamīpuṣpaṃ bṛhatyāśca kusumaṃ tulyamucyate
karavīrasamā jñeyā jātīvijayapāṭalāḥ
śvetamaṃdārakusumaṃ sitapuṣpaṃ ca tatsamam
nalacaṃpakapunnāgamudgarāṇāṃ samāḥ smṛtāḥ
gaṃdhahīnamapi grāhyaṃ pavitraṃ yatkuśādikam
mudgarāṇi kadaṃbāni rātrau deyāni sūraye
divāśeṣāṇi puṣpāṇi tyajedupahatāni ca
alābhe bata puṣpāṇāṃ patrāṇyapi nivedayet
phalānāmapyalābhena tṛṇagulmauṣadhīrapi
oṣadhīnāmabhāve tu bhaktyā bhavati pūjitaḥ
māghāsiteapi sumanāḥ soanaṃtaphalamaśnute
aśokaśvetamaṃdārakarṇikārāṃdhukaistathā
karavīrārkakahlāraśamītagarakeśaraiḥ
sa tatphalamavāpnoti tadekāgramanāḥ śṛṇu
sūryakoṭipratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sarvakāmibhiḥ
puṣpamālāparikṣiptairgītavāditranāditaiḥ
sūryakanyāsamākīrṇairdevānāṃ ca sudurlabhaiḥ
dodhūyamānaścamaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ
saṃpūjya śraddhayā bhānumarkaloke mahīyate
sūryasyopari yaḥ kuryācchobhanaṃ puṣpamaṃḍalam
śobhitaṃ puṣpasragdāmairāpīṭhāṃtaṃ pralaṃbitaiḥ atyāścaryamahāyānairdivyapuṣpopaśobhitaḥ
sarveṣāmupariṣṭācca vasedarkapure sukhī
puṣpetarapuraṃ divyaṃ śrayate nātra saṃśayaḥ
akṣayaṃ modate kālamatiraskṛtaśāsanaḥ
saurādisarvalokeṣu yatreṣṭaṃ tatra yāti saḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu puṣpapūjāvarṇanaṃ nāma triṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūryaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
sumaṃturuvāca
śṛṇu tvaṃ hi mahārāja sarvadaṃ lokapūjitam
brahmeśopeṃdradevānāṃ trayāṇāmapi bhārata
sukhāsīnaṃ surajyeṣṭhaṃ manovatyāṃ caturmukham
praṇamya śirasā bhūmau viṣṇvīśau vākyamūcatuḥ
sādhu sādhu jagannātha sādhu pṛṣṭoasmi vāmiha
svayamutpādya puṣṇāṇi yaḥ sūryaṃ pūjayetsvayam
tāni sākṣātpragṛhṇāti tadbhaktyā satataṃ raviḥ
yastvārāmaṃ raveḥ kuryādāmrabilvādiśobhitam
jātīvijayarājārkakaravīraiḥ sakuṃkumaiḥ
agastikadalīkhaṃḍaistasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
yāvaddhi patraṃ kusumaṃ bījaṃ sūtaphalāni ca
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate
saghṛtaṃ guggulaṃ dadyādrājanvā kaṃduruṃ tathā
kṛṣṇāguruṃ ca karpūradhūpaṃ dadyāddivākare
nairaṃtaryeṇa yastasya rājanpuṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca
bhuktvā sūryapure bhogāṃstasyāṃte kṣmādhipo bhavet
gugguluṃ ghṛtasaṃyuàktaṃ yakṣo gṛhṇāti śabdakṛt
kṛṣṇāṃśau kṛṣṇa saptamyāṃ yaḥ sājyaṃ gugguluṃ dahet
sa cāsau sauramāsādya varṣāṇāṃ ca daśārbudam
devadāruṃ nameruṃ ca śrīvāsaṃ kuṃduruṃ tathā
śrīphalaṃ cājyasaṃyuktaṃ dagdhvāśrayamavāpnuyāt
evaṃ saugadhikaṃ rūpaṃ ṣaṭsahasraguṇottaram
aguruṃ daśasāhasraṃ saghṛtaṃ dviguṇaṃ bhavet
anaṃtaphaladaṃ devaṃ sadā kuṃdurukāmukam
dvisahasrapalānāṃ tu mahiṣākṣasya gugguloḥ
śodhayetpāpasaṃyuktaṃ puruṣaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ
kṛṣṇāgurubhavaṃ dhūpaṃ tuṣāgniriva kāṃcanam
kapāṭadvārakuḍyāditiryagūrdhvaṃ savedikam
vāsayetpuṣpamālābhirdhūpaiścāpi sugaṃdhibhiḥ
āpūrayandiśaḥ sarvā nānāgaṃdha samanvitaiḥ
kalpakoṭiśataṃ divyaṃ tejasā vahnisannibhaḥ
śatāvṛtaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādevaṃ gandhairbhagālayam
sūryaloke vaseddevo yuvābhyāṃ saṃprapū jitaḥ
tadvacchuklaiśca saṃvītaṃ paṭṭasūtrairvinirmitam
dattvopavītaṃ sūryāya bhavedvedāṃgapāragaḥ
vāsāṃsi suvicitrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate
truṭimātraṃ tu yo dadyādūrṇāvastraṃ sapaṃkajam
bhāskarasyottamāṃgeṣu tasya puṇyaṃ bravīmyaham
indrasyārdhāsane tiṣṭhedyāvadrindrāścaturdaśa
evaṃ vittānusāreṇa sarvaṃ jñeyaṃ samāsataḥ
sarveṣāṃ hemapātrāṇāṃ mukuṭānāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ
arkapatrapuṭaṃ cūrṇaṃ madhuparṇasamanvitam
śālitaṃḍulaprasthasya kuryādannaṃ susaṃskatam
sūryāya ca caruṃ dattvā saptamyāṃ tu viśeṣataḥ
saṃyāvaṃ kṛśaraṃ pūpaṃ pāyasaṃ yāvakaṃ tathā
dadhyodanarasālānnamodakānguḍapūpakān
yāvaṃtastaṇḍulāstasminnaivedye parisaṃkhyayā
tāvadvarṣa sahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate
guḍakhaṃḍakṛtānāṃ ca bhakṣyāṇāṃ vinivedane
ghṛtena plāvitānāṃ ca phalaṃ śataguṇaṃ labhet
rasāla khādyakādyānāṃ bhakṣyāṇāṃ phalamiṣyate
yathākālopalabdhāni bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca
nivedyārkāya paramaṃ sthānaṃ prāpnoti pūjanāt
prajvālya ghṛtadīpaṃ tu bhāskarasyālaye śubham
yaḥ kuryātkārtike māsi śobhanāṃ dīpamālikām
saptamyāmatha ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vāmāvāsyāyāmathāpi vā
bhāskarāyutasaṃkāśastejasā bhāsayandiśaḥ
divyābharaṇasaṃpannaḥ kulamuddhṛtya sarvaśaḥ
yāvatpradīpasaṃkhyānaṃ ghṛtenāpūrya bodhitam
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūryaloke mahīyate
pūrvasmāddviguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ
dīpavṛkṣaṃ samudbodhya bhāskarāyataneṣu bhoḥ
śirasā dhārayeddīpaṃ bhāskarasyāgrato niśi
bhāskarāyutasaṃkāśo vimānairarkasannibhaiḥ
annadātā tu yo vīra vīraloke mahī yate
bhāskarasyāgrato dattvā darpaṇaṃ nirmalaṃ śubham
paryaṃke śobhitaṃ kṛtvā śvetamālyaiḥ sacandanaiḥ
vṛkārkanirmalaḥ śrīmāndivyābharaṇa rūpadhṛk
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ bhaktyā śraddadhāno ravernaraḥ
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ yastu namaskāraṃ prayojayet
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ sakalaṃ vindate phalam
namaskāraḥ smṛto yajñaḥ sarvayajñottamottamaḥ
namaskṛtvā sahasrāṃśumaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet
sa yāṃ gatimavāpnoti na tāṃ kratu śatairapi
abhijñāpyopahāreṇa pūjayā phalamaśnute
śvetaṃ mahādhvajaṃ kṛtvā kṛtvā cāpaṃ ca raṃgakam
kiṃkiṇījālanirghoṣaṃ mayūracchatrabhūṣitam
sa śatena vimānānāṃ sarvadeva namaskṛtaḥ
dhvajamālākulaṃ kuryādyaḥ prāṃteṣu bhagālayam
mahādhvajāṣṭakaṃ cāpi digvidikṣu nivedayet
śatacandrāṃśuvimalaṃ muktādāmopaśobhitam
maṇidaṃḍamayaṃ chatraṃ dadyādvā kāṃcanādikam
sa dhāryamāṇacchatreṇa hemadaṃḍopaśobhinā
yaḥ śṛṃkhalāsamāyuktāṃ mahāghaṇṭāṃ mahāsvanām
kāṃsyalohamayīṃ vāpi nibadhnīyādbhagālaye
śobhanaḥ syānnaraḥ śrīmānbhagasyātīva vallabhaḥ
bherīmṛdaṃgapaṭahajharjharīmardalādikam
daśakāṃsyādivāditraṃ yo bhagāya nivedayet
sa vimānairmahābhāgervaṃśavīṇāyutasvanaiḥ
susaṃgītakadānena savādyena viśeṣataḥ
yatheṣṭaṃ bhāskare loke modate kālamakṣayam
mahāmahāsvanaṃ dattvā śaṃkhayugmaṃ bhagālaye
vimānaṃ bahuvarṇābhaṃ madhye paṃkajabhūṣitam
kiṃkiṇījālasaṃpannaṃ varṇakaiścopaśobhitam
puṣpamālāprabhaṃ vāpi ghaṃṭācāmarabhūṣitam
dukūlapaṭṭadevāṃgairvastrairvā varṇakānvitaiḥ
paṭṭādivastrataṃtūnāṃ parisaṃkhyā tu yā bhavet
bhagāhutyā jagatsarvaṃ sṛṣṭidvāreṇa dhāryate
bhagamuddiśya rājeṃdra sa yāti paramāṃ gatim
puṣpadhūpajalopetaṃ kālekāle viśeṣataḥ
mahāśvetādimātṛrṇāṃ trikalpānāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ
yaḥ kṛtvā sakṛdapyevaṃ sarvadikṣu baliṃ haret
sa naraśca sahasrāṇi śāṃḍileyapure vaset
saurasaṃdhyābaliṃ kṛtvā dināṃte satataṃ raveḥ
varṣāyutaśataṃ sāgraṃ bhagaloke mahīyate
dadhyodanapayobhiryaḥ pūritaṃ pātramāvṛtam
puṣpadhūpārcitaṃ caiva vitānopari śobhitam
śirasā dhārayetpātraṃ śanairgacchetpradakṣiṇam
ravyāyatanaparyaṃte śaṃkhavīṇādinisvanaiḥ
darpaṇairdhūpamālābhirgeyanṛtyādiśobhitam
bhānorhi smṛtiśīlaśca tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ tathā
kṛṣṇāṃ tu ṣaṣṭhīṃ naktena yaśca kṛṣṇāṃ ca saptamīm
devaistu bhuktaṃ madhyāhne pūrvāhṇe ṛṣibhistathā
aparāhṇe tu pitṛbhiḥ saṃdhyāyāṃ guhyakādibhiḥ
sarvā velā hyatikramya saurāṇāṃ bhojanaṃ param
bhuṃjāno naktakāle tu sūryabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ
haviṣyabhojanaṃ snānamāhārasya ca lāghavam
agnikāryamadhaḥśayyāṃ naktabhojī samācaret
kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ prayatnena kṛtvā naktaṃ vidhānataḥ
naro mārgaśire māsi aṃśumāniti pūjayeta
vidhivatprāśya gomūtramanāhāro niśi svapet
puṣyepyevaṃ sahasrāṃśuṃ bhānumaṃtamuśaṃti ca
vājapeyaphalaṃ prāpya ghṛtaṃ prāśya labhennaraḥ
māghe divākaraṃ nāma kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhyāṃ narottama
niśi pītvā tu gokṣīraṃ gomedhaphalamāpnuyāt
mārtaṃḍaṃ phālgune māsi pūjayitvā gavāṃ payaḥ
haviṣyāśī sūryalokeapsarobhiḥ saha modate
vaiśākhe caṇḍakiraṇaṃ pūjayecca payovrataḥ
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sāgraṃ modate sūryasaṃnidhau
jyeṣṭhe divaspatiṃ pūjya gavāṃ śṛṃgodakaṃ pibet
gavāṃ koṭipradānasya nikhilaṃ phalamā pnuyāt
āṣāḍhe tvarkanāmānamiṣṭvā prāśya ca gomayam
prayātyarkasalokaṃ tu varṣāṇāṃ ca śataṃśatam
śrāvaṇearyamanāmānaṃ pūjayitvā payaḥ pibet
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sāgraṃ modate bhāskarālaye
māsi bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhyāṃ bhāskaraṃ nāma pūjayet
māsi cāśvayuje ṣaṣṭhyāṃ bhagākhyaṃ nāma pūjayet
māse tu kārtike ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śakrākhyaṃ nāma pūjayet
dūrvāṃkuraṃ sakṛtprāśya rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet
varṣāṃte bhojayedviprānsūryabhaktiparāyaṇān
śaktyā hiraṇyavāsāṃsi bhaktyā tebhyo nivedayet
nivedayecca sūryāya kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ ca payasvinīm
kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhīvrataṃ bhaktyā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
modate sūryaloke tu sa naraḥ śāśvatīḥ samāḥ
puṇyeṣvahaḥsu sarveṣu viṣuvadgrahaṇādiṣu
dānopavāsahomādyairakṣayaṃ khaga jāyate
sumaṃturuvāca
ityuktavānpurā bhānuraruṇāya viśāṃpate
kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhīvrataṃ puṇyaṃ sarvapāpabhayāpaham
kṛtvedaṃ puruṣo bhaktyā bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ
prayāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ bhānoramitatejasaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhmeparvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamodhyāyaḥ
sumaṃturuvāca
dharmakāmārthamokṣāṇāṃ pratipādanamuttamam
jiteṃdriyaḥ satyavādī śāligodhūmagorasaiḥ
pakṣayoḥ saptamīṃ yatnādupavāsena yāpayet
trisaṃdhyamarcayedbhānuṃ śāṃḍileyaṃ ca suvrata
māsi pūrṇe tu saptamyāṃ ghṛtādibhirariṃdama
kṛtvā snānaṃ mahāpūjāṃ sūryadevasya bhāsta
bhojayecca dvijānaṣṭau bhagārcā śubhalakṣaṇām
gāṃ ca dattvā mahārāja kapilāṃ bhāskarāya tu
sūryakoṭipratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇairmahāvibhavasaṃyutaiḥ
saṃgītanṛtyavādyādyairgaṃdharvagaṇaśobhitaiḥ
dodhūyamānaścamaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ
sahasrakiraṇābhāsaḥ sauraiḥ sūryasamanvitaiḥ
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatrāste raviraṃśumān
romasaṃkhyā tu yā tasyāstatprasūtiḥ kuleṣu ca
yogādduḥkhāṃtamāpnoti jñānayogaṃ pravartate
ityevaṃ te samākhyātaṃ bhavārṇavavyapohanam
sauramokṣakramopāyaṃ sūrāśrayaniṣevaṇam
piṇyākaṃ ghṛtasaṃyuktaṃ bhuṃjānaḥ sa jitendriyaḥ
sopavāsaśca saptamyāṃ bhavedubhayapakṣayoḥ
ghṛtābhiṣekamaṣṭamyāṃ kuryādbhānornarādhipa
gāṃ ca dayāddineśāya taruṇīṃ nīlasaṃnibhām
indranīlapratīkāśairvimānaiḥ śikhisaṃyutaiḥ
śyāmākakṣīranīvārairjitakrodho jitendriyaḥ
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vāpyatha saptamyāmupavāsaparo naraḥ
aṣṭamyāṃ tu mahāsnānaṃ pañcagavyaghṛtādibhiḥ
valmīkajādimṛdbhiśca gomūtraśakṛdādibhiḥ
tvagbhiśca kṣīravṛkṣāṇāṃ snāpayitvā pramārjayet
saurabheyīṃ tato dadyādraktābhāṃ raktamāline
padmarāgapratīkāśairvimānairhastisaṃyutaiḥ
gatvādityapuraṃ ramyaṃ modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ
śālyannaṃ pāyasairyuktaṃ bhuñjānaśca jitendriyaḥ
bhānave pāṭalāṃ dadyādvaiṣṇavīṃ taruṇīṃ nṛpa
puṣparāga prabhairyānairnānāhaṃsādiyāyibhiḥ
gacchetsūryapuraṃ ramyaṃ modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ
vaiśākhe vīramāse tu yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam
sūrye khaṃḍājya saṃmiśraṃ sakṛddadyānnivedanam
gāṃ ca dadyānmahārāja bhāskarāya śubhānana
sāmānyaṃ ca vidhiṃ kuryātprayukto yo mayā tava śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśairyānairbarhiṇavāhanaiḥ
saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam
kṣīraṣaṣṭikabhaktena sarvasattvahite rataḥ
pītavarṇāṃ ca gāṃ dadyādbhāskarāya mahātmane
sāmānyamakhilaṃ kuryādvidhānaṃ yatprakīrtitam
sa vicitrairmahāyānairhaṃsasārasagāmibhiḥ
gatvādityapuraṃ śrīmānpūrvoktaṃ labhate phalam
hutaśeṣahaviṣyāśī vṛkṣamūlamupāśritaḥ
svapyādāyatane rātrau sarvabhūtānukampakaḥ
dadyādgāṃ rohiṇīṃ śreṣṭhāṃ bhāskarāya mahātmane
cakravākasamāyuktairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ
modate sa mahābhāgo yāvadā bhūtasaṃplavam
śrīmānāśvayuje māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam
dadyādgāṃ padmavarṇābhāṃ bhānaveamitatejase
divyābharaṇasaṃpannāṃ taruṇīṃ ca payasvinīm svastimauktikasaṃkāśairiṃdranīlopaśobhitaiḥ
jīvo jīvakasaṃyuktavimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ
divākarāya gāṃ dadyājvalanārkasamaprabhām
mahāsiṃhakṛtāropaiḥ sūryavanmodate sukhī
mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam
yaccānnaṃ payasā yuktaṃ bhuñjānaḥ sa jitendriyaḥ
prayacchedgāṃ tathā raktāṃ nānālaṃkārabhūṣitām
sūryāya kuruśārdūla vidhiṃ cāpi samācaret
sitapadmanibhairyānaiḥ śvetāśvarathasaṃyutaiḥ
ahiṃsāsatyavacanamasteyaṃ kṣāṃtirārjavam
triṣavaṇāgnihavanaṃ bhūśayyā naktabhojanam
etānguṇānsamāśritya kurvāṇo vratamutta mam
ityevamādīnniyamāṃścaretsūryavratī sadā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpa ubhayasaptamīvarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
sumaṃturuvāca
sūryabhaktā tu yā nārī dhruvaṃ sā puruṣo bhavet
strī putramuttamaṃ sā cetkāṃkṣate śṛṇu tadvratam
nikṣubhārkākhyamākhyātaṃ sadā prītivivardhanam
saptamyāmatha ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vā saṃkrāṃtau ca raverdine
haviṣā havirhomaṃ tu sopavāsaḥ samācaret
nikṣubhāṃ kāṃsyaniṣpannāṃ kṛtvā svarṇamayīṃ śubhām
rājatīṃ vātha vā varṣaṃ snāpayecca ghṛtādibhiḥ
gaṃdhamālyairalaṃkṛtya vastrayu gmaiśca śobhanaiḥ
bhakṣyabhojyairaśeṣaiśca vitānadhvajacāmaraiḥ
bhojayetsūryabhaktāṃśca śuklavastrāvaguṇṭhitān
kṛtvā śirasi tatpātraṃ vitānacchatraśobhitam
tatpiṃḍyāṃ sthāpayetpātramupaśobhāsamanvitam
pradakṣiṇīkṛtya raviṃ praṇipatya kṣamāpayet
samāpya tadvrataṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṇuyātpha lamaśnute dvādaśādityasaṃkāśairmahāyānairnagopamaiḥ
yatheṣṭaṃ bhānave loke sauraiḥ sārdhaṃ pramodate
varṣakoṭisahasrāṇi varṣakoṭiśatāni ca
naṃdateasau mahābhāga viṣṇuloke mahīyate
brahmalokaṃ samāsādya paraṃ sukhamavāpnuyāt
brahmalokātparibhraṣṭaḥ śrīmāntsurasupūjitaḥ
yāvannāpnoti maraṇaṃ tāvadbhramati karmaṇā
sunirvedātsavairāgyaṃ vairāgyājjñānasaṃbhavaḥ
jñānātpravartate yogo yogādduḥkhāṃtamāpnuyāt
