mohātkṛtvā homadhenuṃ dattvā śuddhirbhaviṣyati
kṛtvā cākhyāyikāgraṃthasvarūpānsa divaṃ vrajet
prātaḥkāle na kurvīt tathā madhyaṃdine dvijāḥ
pakṣāṃte bhūbhidāhe ca bhuvaḥ kaṃpe dinakṣaye
pūtaṃ syāttatkṣaṇādviprāścatuḥ paṃcākṣareṇa vā
nārasiṃhasya vinyāse pūto bhavati tatkṣaṇāt
muhūrtārdhena pūtatvaṃ prabhoryāṃti parāṃ gatim
striyo vā niṃdito vāpi mleccho yāti parāṃ gatim
yo mūḍho manyate doṣaṃ tasya śaucaṃ samācaret
sa gardabhīṃ kharīṃ yoniṃ praviśennātra saṃśayaḥ
navātmako bhairavaśca daśamaśca janārdanaḥ
rudra ekādaśaścaiva arkārkaścāpi dvādaśaḥ
trayoviṃśe ca bhūtātmā ṣaḍviṃśe manurīritaḥ
tithyātmakaṃ paṃcadaśe ṣoḍaśākhyā kalāparā
aṣṭādaśākṣaro maṃtraḥ purāṇātmaka eva ca
ūnaviṃśaścaṃdramāḥ syādviṃśo nārāyaṇo vapuḥ
jyotirmayaścaikaviṃśo dvāviṃśe keśavārcanam
nakṣatrāṇi trayoviṃśe caturviṃśe ca tānakam
paṃcaviṃśe ca tīrthāni ṣaḍviṃśe ca triyaṃbakaḥ
aṣṭāviṃśe dhaneśaśca ūnatriṃśe sarasvatī
triṃśadyoge śivaḥ proktaḥ pātālamekatriṃśake
ahorātraśca dvātriṃśe catustriṃśe ca jāhnavī
paṃcatriṃśe tadaṃtaḥ syācchate pūrṇe divākaraḥ
lakṣe brahmā tathā koṭyāṃ devo nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ
puṃprakṛtyātmakaṃ cānyacchāradālipimātṛkā
śuddhabrahmamayaṃ nityaṃ jñānarūpaṃ paraṃ mahat
kṣaṇe brahmamayaṃ yāti ityāha bhagavānmanuḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāgeṃakamāhātmyakathanaṃ nāmāṣṭamoadhyāyaḥ cha
pūrtanirṇayavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
aṃtarvediṃ pravakṣyāmi brahmaṇoktaṃ yugāṃtare
devatāsthāpanaṃ pūjā bahiveṃdirudāhṛtā
prapāpūrtādikaṃ caiva brāhmaṇānāṃ ca toṣaṇam
dharmasya kāraṇaṃ rājā dharmametadbhavennṛpaḥ
tasmānnṛpaṃ samāśritya bahirvedī tato bhavet
saptāśītirbahirvedī sārameṣāṃ tṛtīyakam
devatāsthāpanaṃ caiva prāsādakaraṇaṃ tathā
taḍāgakaraṇaṃ caiva tṛtīyaṃ na caturthakam
paṃcamaṃ pitṛpūjā ca gurupūjāpuraḥsarā
adhivāsaḥ pratiṣṭhā ca devatānāmavikriyā
pratimākaraṇaṃ caiva vṛkṣāṇāmatha ropaṇam
trividhā sā vinirdiṣṭā uttamā cātha madhyamā
kaniṣṭhā śeṣakalpaśca sarvakāryeṣvayaṃ vidhiḥ
pūjāhomādibhirdānairmānataśca tribhāgataḥ
tryahasādhyavidhānena aṣṭāviṃśatidevatāḥ
pratyahaṃ pūjayettatra jāpakāstatra ṣoḍaśa
catvāro yājakāstatra trayoviṃśatidevatāḥ
brahadikpāla vāruṇyaṃ pṛthivī ca śivastathā
gaṇeśagrahadikpālānvaruṇaṃ ca śivaṃ tathā
saṃpūjya pūjyate yatra kaniṣṭhoasau vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
ekavṛkṣaścaikarūpaiḥ pratimākṣudradevatāḥ
nalinīdīrghikāgartavāpīmalaprapādikam
eṣāṃ saṃskārakāryeṣu pratimānāṃ pariṣkriyā
gaṇeśagrahadikpālānpūjayedupacārataḥ
vāpyādeḥ puṣkariṇyāśca kṣipedgaṃgājalaṃ tataḥ
ulūkhaladvayenāpi jīrṇānāṃ tu kadācana
setuprāsādavāpīnāṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ naiva kārayet
prāsādaḥ setavaścaiva taḍāgādyāstathaiva ca
tribhirvarṇaiḥ pratiṣṭhārhā jīrṇānāṃ tu samudgatāḥ
munayo mānamicchaṃti amānaṃ na hi dṛśyate
tasmānmānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yanmānaṃ yādṛśaṃ phalam
ṣaṣṭihastapramāṇena taduktaṃ vāraṇoditam
ekaṣaṣṭihastamitaṃ prāsādaṃ cottamaṃ viduḥ
madhyaṃ tadardhaṃ vijñeyaṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ tatparaṃ smṛtam
yastaḍāgaṃ navaṃ kṛtvā jīrṇaṃ vā navatāṃ nayet
vāpīkūpataḍāgāśca udyānapravahāstathā
guṇānāṃ ca pramāṇena pratimānaṃ vibhāgataḥ
dviśatena śatenāpi prāsādasyaiṣa niścayaḥ
sahasrahastavistāraṃ dairghyeṇāṣṭādhikaṃ bhavet
taḍāgaṃ taṃ vijānīyātprathamaṃ mānamīritam
madhyaṃ catuḥśatenāpi prastāve daśahīnakam
kaniṣṭhaṃ triśataṃ caiva prasthe syādviṃśahīnakam
taḍāgamānaṃ vijñeyaṃ trivargaphaladāyakam
atha puṣkariṇīpakṣe dve śate mānamuttamam
taḍāge dviguṇā nemī mānārdhe gartamīritam
tatkṣetraṃ vāruṇaṃ sthānaṃ tryuditaṃ tadbahiḥ smṛtam
caturthaṃ caiva gāṃdharvaṃ paiśācaṃ paṃcamaṃ viduḥ
yakṣasthānamitā bhāge evaṃ sarvakramāṇi hi
pañcahīnaṃ ca prastāve evaṃ mānavido viduḥ
ṣaṣṭihastena nalinī prastāve turyahīnakam
catuḥṣaṣṭihastamitā dīrghikā ca prakīrtitā
agnau rogo baṃdhunāśaśca yāmyāṃ mṛtyuścograḥ prāpyate rākṣase ca
bhītiścogrā prāpyate vāyavīye tasmādetā varjanīyāḥ prayatnāt
viprādīnāṃ devatānāṃ samāje merusthāne yatra tatraiva kuryāt
nadyāstīre varjayedvā smaśāne taḍāgādvai āśramādīñjanānām
yadā pratiṣṭhāṃ na karoti mūḍhaḥ prāsādavāpyādiṣu pāpacetāḥ
yadā tu dīrghāsarasītaḍāgaprāsādakūpādiṣu nirmitāni
yadapratiṣṭheṣu nipānakeṣu prāsādakūpeṣu vanādikeṣu
tasmātpratiṣṭhāṃ vidhinā jalādeḥ kuryādyatheṣṭaṃ prayato manuṣyaḥ
prasāde mṛnmayaṃ puṇyaṃ mayaitatkathitaṃ dvijāḥ
tasmāccaturguṇaṃ proktaṃ tṛṇakāṣṭhamaye tathā
tasmāddaśaguṇaṃ proktaṃ kṛte dārumaye bhavet
tato daśaguṇaṃ proktamiṣṭikāracite śubhe
tataśca śatasāhasraṃ sauvarṇe dvijasattamāḥ
yadatītaṃ bhaviṣyacca kulānāmayutaṃ naraḥ
viṣṇulokaṃ nayatyāśu kārayitvā harergṛham
kaniṣṭhaṃ madhyamaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kārayitvā harergṛham
ardhaṃ ca vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ mokṣaṃ ca labhate kramāt
hastānāṃ poḍaśairyāvatprasthe syātkarahīnakam
tṛṇavaṃśamaye mānaṃ madhyaṃ cārkakaraṃ bhavet
kaniṣṭhaṃ tārahastaṃ syāduttamaṃ paṃcaviṃśatiḥ
sarvottamaṃ ca dvātriṃśaccatuṣkoṇe mahāphalam
aṣṭakoṇaṃ na kartavyaṃ tripuraṃ ca kalau yuge
suraveśmani yāvaṃto dvijendrāḥ paramāṇavaḥ
karturdaśaguṇaṃ proktamāpānaparipālakaḥ
patitaṃ patamānaṃ ca tathārddhasphuṭitaṃ tathā
yaḥ kuryādviṣṇuprāsādaṃ jyotirliṃgasya vā kvacit
sūryasyāpi viriṃceśca durgāyāḥ śrīdharasya ca
svargādbhraṣṭo bhavedrājā dhanī pūjyatamopi vā
devīliṃgeṣu yonau vā kṛtvā devakulaṃ naraḥ
prāvṛṭkāle sthitaṃ toyamagniṣṭomaphalaṃ labhet
śaratkālasthitaṃ toyaṃ yajñatoyādviśiṣyate
nidāghakāle pānīyaṃ yasya tiṣṭhati vāpinaḥ
ekāhaṃ tu sthitaṃ toyaṃ pṛthivyāṃ dvijasattamāḥ
pūrvaṃ pitṛkule sapta tadvanmātṛkule dvijāḥ
caturdaśamidaṃ jñeyaṃ śatalekhaṃ tataḥ śṛṇu
piturūrdhvaṃ kulaṃ viṃśaṃ māturūrdhva kulaṃ tathā
tadvatparaṃ vijānīyādbhāryāyāḥ paṃca eva ca
paṃca vai mātṛtaścāsya piturmātāmahe kule
paṃca paṃca vijānīyānmāturmātāmahasya ca
guroḥ pitṛkule paṃca tasya mātṛkule tathā
ācāryasya kule dvaṃdvaṃ daśarājakulasya ca
rājño mātāmahakule paṃca caiva prakīrtitāḥ
ātmanā saha vipreṃdrā uddhāraḥ saṃmataḥ smṛtaḥ
kuryāddevārcanaṃ tīrthe svavimukte daśārṇave
samuddharetkulaśataṃ śṛṇu viṃśakulaṃ dvija
māturmātāmahasyaiva jātiṃ dvaṃdvamudāhṛtam
guroḥ saṃtānake dvaṃdvaṃ tadvadyādavasāttvatau
parapakṣasya caikaṃ syādekaviṃśaṃ kulaṃ kramāt
pānīyena vinā vṛttirloke nāstīti karhicit
vārasvasthaṃ puṣpakhaṃḍaṃ toye patati yāvati
caṃdraraśmivihīnaṃ yannāmṛtatvāya kalpate
tasmāddaśaguṇaṃ kuṃḍe tasmāddaśaguṇaṃ hrade
devānāṃ sthāpanaṃ kuryādavimuktaphalaṃ śubham
susthitaṃ duḥsthitaṃ vāpi śivaliṃgaṃ na cālayet
punaḥ saṃsāradharmeṇa sthāpayedavicārayan
bāhudaṃtādipratimā viṣṇoścānyasya sattamāḥ
na cālayetsthāpite ca vipravṛkṣaṃ na cālayet
keśavaṃ harivṛkṣaṃ ca madhūkaṃ kiṃśukaṃ tathā
nākāle sthāpayejjātu cālanādbrahmahā bhaveta
devālayasya purataḥ kuryātpuṣkariṇī dvijāḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ samāje ca rājadvāre catuṣpathe
devātheṃ brāhmaṇārthe ca mukhaṃ kuryācca sarvataḥ
paścime puṣṭikāmaṃ tu uttare sarvakāmadam
kuryāddakṣiṇapūrve tu arkahastapramāṇataḥ
taḍāge tu phalāhastaṃ hastikaṃ hrāsayetkramāt
tṛpye hastaṃ nalinyādāvato hīnaṃ na kārayet
gartatṛṇaṃ kalāhastaṃ taḍāgeatra pracakṣyate
hīne hīnataraṃ kuryāddhastamānena hrāsayet
yūpastathā khādira eva kāryaḥ śraiparṇiko dhātrisamudbhavaśca
mānastathā ṣoḍaśahastasammito ratnātsagaṇḍīyugakāmayojitaiḥ
madhyeṃagulaiśca hīnaḥ kāryaḥ śubhadaḥ sarvadā syāt
evaṃvidhaścaiva taḍāgayūpo madhye tathā ṣoḍaśahastasaṃmitaḥ
saṃpūrṇamāne kathitaṃ pramāṇaṃ hīne tu hīnaṃ pravadaṃti tajjñāḥ
hastadvayaṃ prāpitavyaṃ taḍāge hastaḥ sārdhaḥ puṣkariṇyāṃ praropaḥ
prādeśaṃ vai hastamānaṃ kūpayūpasya ropataḥ
taḍāge cāpi ārāme sthāpayecca jalopari
vāpyāṃ garte puṣkariṇyāṃ prakuryājjalasaṃmitam yāvatpratolīgatareṇusaṃgasaṃkhyāgaṇo no jaratāmupaiti
tāvatsureśaḥ suralokavāsī prāsādakṛjjātu na jāyate hi
kiṃ vā vācyaḥ puṣkariṇyā prabhāvaḥ kartā yaḥ syādvāruṇo brahmalokāt
yāvatkālo bāhumātroddhatā syād dṛṣṭiḥproktā na nivartetkadācit lakṣaikamārāmamayottamaḥ syānmadhyaṃ tadardhaṃ ca kaniṣṭhamānam
vinārjunairbadaraiḥ śailukaiśca hīnaṃ kuryācchānalaiḥ pātilaiśca
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge pūrtanirṇayo nāma navamoa dhyāyaḥ
pūrtanirṇayavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
śodhayetprathamaṃ bhūmiṃ mitāṃ kṛtvā tato dvijāḥ
daśahastena daṇḍena pañcahastena vā punaḥ
vāhayetsadā vṛṣabhaistaḍāgārtheapi bhūmikām
devāgārasya yā bhūmiḥ śvetaiśca vṛṣabhairapi
yā bhūmirgrahayāgārthe tanna vāhairapi spṛśet
ārāmārthe kṛṣṇavṛṣaiḥ kṛṣārthakhananairapi
vāhayettridinaṃ viprāḥ pañcavrīhīṃśca vāpayet
devapakṣe saptaguṇa ārāmakaraṇe guṇaḥ
mudgamāṣau dhānya tilāḥ śyāmākaśceti pañcamaḥ
masūraśca kalāyaśca saptavrīhigaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
sarṣapaśca kalāyaśca mudgo māṣaścaturthakaḥ
vrīhitrayaṃ māṣamudgau śyāmāko mahiṣo gaṇaḥ
suvarṇamṛttikā grāhyā varṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ
bilvavṛkṣairiyaṃ kuryādyūpaśūnadhvaje dine
aratnimātraṃ vijñeyaṃ praśastaṃ yaṣṭihastakam
ūrṇāsūtramayīṃ mūrtiṃ kṛtvā kuryāccatuṣṭayam
kṣīradārugartayutaṃ dvādaśāṃgulameva ca
pūrvadikpraṇave siddhiḥ paścimāśāgatiḥ śubhā
maraṇe dakṣiṇāyāṃ ca hāniḥ syāduttare sthite
nārasiṃhena manunā cāgniṃ prajvālya dāpayet
māse ghaṭe tathā māsaṃ kuryādbhūmiparigraham
sūtrayetkīlayetpaścānmahāmāne dvijottamāḥ
īśānābhimukhenaiva kūpapakṣe vidurbudhāḥ
akṛtvā vāstuyāgaṃ ca yastaḍāgaṃ samutsṛjet
prāsāde ca tathārāme mahākūpe tathaiva ca
gṛhāraṃbhe ca vipreṃdrā dadyādvāstu baliṃ tataḥ
śālaiśca khādiraiścaiva palāśaiḥ keśarasya ca
sarpākārastaḍāge ca kūpe kumbhākṛtirbhavet
ārāme padmapuṣpābhaśchatrakārastu maṃḍale
kuryācchunākṛtiṃ setau viṣṇugehe gadākṛtim
aśvākāraṃ cāśvamedhe naramedhe narākṛtim
goyāge ca vṛṣākāraṃ gṛhayāge dhvajākṛtim
śmaśānagopracārārthaṃ caityavṛkṣālayottamāḥ
cakrākāro lakṣahome koṭihome halākṛtiḥ
nakṣatrāṇi tathā mūlaṃ śasyate drumaropaṇe
evaṃ śasyoditāṃ bhūmiṃ śuddhāṃ pūrvaplavānvitām
somaṃ ca nāgarājānaṃ tato bījaṃ suśodhayet
ānayeddhārayetpaścādraudratāpena tāpayet
garbhādhānaṃ tataḥ kuryādviṣṇumaṃtraṃ japaṃstridhā
dehi meti ca maṃtreṇa saṃprokṣya daśavāriṇā
ityagṛhītamanunā pañcadhā parimaṃtritam
tryaṃbakeneti maṃtreṇa bījamāropayettataḥ
bhāryāmṛtumatīṃ snātvā pañcameahani sattamāḥ
tena putratvamāpnoti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā
tulasyā bījamādāya vaiṣṇavarkṣe dvijoahani
kurvaṃti sahakārādiropaṇaṃ ye narādhamāḥ
nadītīre śmaśāne ca svagṛhasya ca dakṣiṇe
tulasīropaṇaṃ kṛtvā yāti kartā yamālayam
patrapuṣpaphalānāṃ ca rajoreṇusamāgamāḥ
yastu vṛkṣaṃ prakurute chāyāpuṣpaphalopagam
pathi devālaye cāpi pāpāttārayate pitṛrn
atītānāgatāścātaḥ pitṛrnsa svargato dvijāḥ
tārayedvṛkṣaropī ca tasmādvṛkṣaṃ praropayeta
yatnenāpi ca vipreṃdrā aśvatthāropaṇaṃ kuru
śataiḥ putrasahasrāṇāmeka eva viśiṣyate
muktihetuḥ sahasrāṇāṃ lakṣakoṭīni yāni ca
dhanī cāśvatthavṛkṣe ca aśokaḥ śokanāśanaḥ
plakṣo bhāryāpradaścaiva bilva āyuṣyadaḥ smṛtaḥ
dhanaprado jaṃbu vṛkṣo brahmadaḥ plakṣavṛkṣakaḥ
tiṃdukātkulavṛddhiḥ syāddāḍimī kāminīpradaḥ
svargapradā dhātakī syādvaṭo mokṣapradāyakaḥ
sahakāraḥ kāmaprado guvākaḥ siddhimādiśet
kadaṃbe vipulā kīrtistiṃtiḍī dharmadūṣikaḥ
jīvaṃtyā rogaśāṃtiḥ syātkeśaraḥ śatrumardanaḥ
dhanapradaścaiva vaṭo vaṭaḥ śvetavaṭastathā
panase maṃdabuddhiḥ syātkali vṛkṣaḥ śriyaṃ haret
kalivṛkṣaṃ ca śākhoṭa udarāvartakaṃ tathā
tathā ca markaṭīnīparopaṇātsaṃtatikṣayaḥ
śiṃśapāṃ cārjunaṃ caiva jayaṃtī haya mārakān
śrīvṛkṣaṃ kiṃśukaṃ caiva ropaṇātsvargamādiśet
na pūrvāṃ ropayejjātu samidhaṃ kaṃṭakīdrumam
kuśaṃ padmaṃ jalajānāṃ ropaṇāddurgatiṃ vrajet
maṃdāre kulahāniḥ syācchālmale śukabuddhimān
niṃbe paśuvināśaḥ syācchatrāke kulapāṃsalaḥ
śatruvṛddhiḥ kākanāde balapūge hataśriyaḥ
sahakārasahasrāttu variṣṭhaṃ dhātakīdvayam
tasmāccaiva sahasrāddhi pāṭalaikā viśiṣyate
pāṭalānāṃ śatātpaścādekaraktavaṭo bhavet
vaṭānāṃ dvisahasrācca paṃcakaṃ nāgakeśaram
tasmādvariṣṭhaḥ śrīvṛkṣo jaṃbūvṛkṣaḥ praśasyate
tasmāddhimavato jñeyaḥ śrīparṇīvṛkṣa uttamaḥ
tiṃdukasya trayaścaiva jaṃbūvṛkṣasya paṃcakam
evamuktvā sa dharmātmā kārayetkīdṛśaṃ balam
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca
janmatrayādikaṃ pāpaṃ vināśya svargamādiśet
śataropī ca brahmatvaṃ viṣṇutvaṃ ca sahasrake
vaiśākhe kīrtimāpnoti jyeṣṭhe tu maraṇaṃ vrajet
āṣāḍhe kīrtimāpnoti śrāvaṇe paramāṃ gatim
bhādre dhanāgamaścaiva āśvine kārtike kṣayaḥ
tulasī trividhā loke kṛte śvetā praśasyate
śrīvṛkṣasya ca vipreṃdrāḥ sa bhavedbrahmaghātakaḥ
vṛkṣacchedī bhavenmūka ādhivyādhiśataṃ bhajet
sāyaṃ prātaśca gharmāṃte śītakāle dināṃtare
phalamāmakulatthaśca māṣo mudgāstilā yavāḥ
avikākasakṛccūrṇaṃ yavacūrṇāni yāni ca
gomāṃsamudakaṃ caiva saptarātraṃ nidhāpayet
tamekaṃ sarvavṛkṣāṇāṃ phalapuṣpādivṛddhidam
tenodakādisekaśca kṛto vai vṛddhimādiśet
tittiḍībījamādāya ikṣudaṃḍena mardayet
tenāśoke prasekaḥ syātsahakārasya vṛddhimān
dohadaṃ sarvavṛkṣāṇāṃ pūgādīnāṃ viśeṣataḥ
daśaśirābījayutādabhiṣekācca jīvati
prākprasūtirgavādīnāṃ chāgādimahiṣasya ca
jarāsu toyaṃ vṛkṣāgre sthāpayedavicārayan
parasya sahakārasya phalaṃ syānnātra saṃśayaḥ
meṣasya ca vitālasya yavāgūṃ ca samāharet
mṛtoapi jīvayecchīghraṃ mriyamāṇoapi jīvati
niṃbapatraṃ yogapatraṃ śatāvaripunarnavām
kṣīrikātāmrakaiḥ patrairdhūmaṃ dadyāddinatrayam
tataḥ prādhānyato vakṣye drumāṇāṃ dohadoanyathā
matsyodakena siktena āmrāṇāṃ vṛddhiriṣyate
pakvāmraṃ rudhiraṃ caiva dāḍimānāṃ praśasyate
yavodakaṃ sagomāṃsaṃ ketakīnāṃ praśasyate
kṣīrake balavṛddhiḥ syāttiṃdukaḥ karamardakaḥ
māṃsapūti rasāmajjā śokatāle guvākake
sapūtimāṃsaṃ saghṛtaṃ nālikerasya rohitam
madhuyaṣṭyudakaiḥ sekātsāmānyaṃ nihitaṃ bhavet
jātīnāṃ mallikānāṃ ca kuṃdānāṃ raṃtikasya ca
kūrmamāṃsamannarasaṃ viḍaṃgasya ca puṣpakam
rathyāvṛkṣe pratiṣṭhāpya phalavāñjāyate tataḥ
dadyāddhūpaṃ dhānyamadhye dhānyavṛddhiśca jāyate
mayūrapatramādāyacchāgaromāṇi sapta vai
eraṃḍatailayogena dadyāddhūpaṃ niśāgame
hiṃgukusumasaṃyogānmūṣikāṇāṃ parinyaset
kariviṣṭhāmṛcchaviṣṭhāṃ kṛttikāyāṃ samāharet
niśātoye prasekaḥ syāttatkṣātramūlakaṃ haret
aśvatthamūle daśahastamātraṃ kṣetraṃ pavitraṃ puruṣottamasya
bāhuviṃśāṃtare ropetsahakāraṃ sa dharmavit
kalāhastāṃtaraṃ dhātrī bakulaṃ vaṃjulaṃ tathā
śraiparṇikaṃ ca punnāgaṃ śrīvṛkṣaṃ dviguṇaṃ tarau
vāpyādīnāṃ tu kūpānāmekavṛkṣādikasya ca
śrīviṣṇorvṛkṣapakṣe ca varuṇeṣṭaṃ ca kūpake
gaṇeśaṃ pūjayetkumbhaṃ dikpālāṃśca viśeṣataḥ
agnikāryaṃ vinā kuryātprakuryācca satāṃ gatim
śrutvā kṛtiṃ vidhānena anyeṣāṃ vā tathodbhavam
anyeṣāṃ caiva vṛkṣe ca tathā ca tulasīvane
vṛkṣānvānena saṃskṛtya vāsobhirabhiveṣṭayet
śucyamānamidaṃ jñeyamanyeṣāṃ vā tathodbhavam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge daśamoadhyāyaḥ
tantrātmakapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
atha taṃtravidhiṃ vakṣye purāṇeṣvapi gīyate
śatavṛkṣakṣudravṛkṣe daśadvādaśa vṛkṣake
dṛṣṭimātrāṃtare setau kūpayāge samutsṛjet
na kūpamutsṛjejjātu vṛkṣayāge kathaṃcana
tulasīvanayāge tu na cānyaṃ yāgamācaret
taḍāgayāge setvādīnna cārāme kadācana
na setuṃ devayāge tu taḍāgaṃ na samutsṛjet
taṃtre śrāddhaṃ pṛthaṅnāsti karturbhede pṛthagbhavet
śivaliṃgasthāpanāyāṃ na cānyaddevasthāpanam
viparīte kṛte cāpi āyuḥkṣaya iti smṛtiḥ
taḍāge puṣkariṇyā vā ārāmeapi dvijottamāḥ
mānahīne mānapūrṇe daśahaste na dūṣaṇam
dvisahasrādhikaṃ yatra tatpratiṣṭhāṃ samācaret
daśa dvādaśavṛkṣe ca ārāme pūrvavaddvijāḥ
pratiṣṭhāṃ bilvavṛkṣe ca anyathā karṇavedhanam
anaṃtaraṃ pradātavyā lājā mūrdhnyakṣatādikam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi pūrvabhāge ekādaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
pratimālakṣaṇavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
pratimālakṣaṇaṃ vakṣye yathāśāstramataṃ dvijāḥ
pratimāṃ lakṣaṇairhīnāṃ gṛhītāṃ naiva pūjayet
śailajā dārujā tāmrī mṛdbhavā sarvakāmadā
ekahastā dvihastā vā sārdhahastā tathāpi vā
prāsādamānamathavā athavā sarvalakṣaṇam
aṣṭāṃgulotsedhakaṃ ca na gehearcayetkṛtī
devāgārasya yaddvāraṃ tasmādaṣṭāṃgulena tu
tribhāgapiṃḍikā kāryā dvau bhāgau pratimā bhavet
aṃgulaṃ vai bhavedvṛddhiraśītiścaturuttarā
vistāramānataḥ kāryaṃ vadanaṃ dvādaśāṃgulam
mukhatribhāge cibukaṃ lalāṭaṃ nāsikāṃ tathā
karṇau nāsikayā grīvātulyau vā niyatau tu yau
nayane dvyaṃgule syātāṃ tribhāgā tārakā bhavet
tṛtīyatārakābhāge śubhadṛṣṭiṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ
pariṇāhastu śiraso bhaveddvātriṃśadaṃgulaḥ
tulyau nāsikayā grīvā mukhena hṛdayāṃtaram
bāhū ca bāhutulyau ca ūrū jaṃghe ca jāghanam
gulphāvasthnastu pādaḥ syāddhāṭitaścaturaṃgulaḥ
ṣaḍaṃgulastu vistārastulyāṃguṣṭhoṃagulatrayam
pradeśinī ca tattulyā hīnā śeṣānnakhānakham
caturdaśāṃgulaḥ pādasyāyāmaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃyuktā sā pūjyā pratimā śubhā
adharoṣṭhastathaivorubhrūlalāṭamanīṣikam
gaṃḍaṃ ca niyataṃ mūrtau kuryādaṃgasamunnateḥ
vatsaproktoatimukuṭaḥ kaṭakāṃgadahāravān
suprabhāmaṃḍalā cāru vicitramaṇikuṇḍalā
karābhyāṃ kāṃcanīṃ mālāṃ prodvahaṃtīṃ śiroruhān
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃpannāṃ kārayedvihitapradām
susnigdhāṃ varadāṃ saumyāṃ dvitīyāśramiṇāmimām
navatālo bhavedviṣṇurvāsudevastritālakaḥ
nṛsiṃhaḥ pañcatālaḥ syāddhayagrīvastu paṃcamaḥ
nārāyaṇaścāṣṭatālo maheśaḥ pañcatālakaḥ
navatālā bhaveddurgā lakṣmīścaiva tritālikā
vāṇīṃ tritālikāṃ vidyātsavitā saptatālakaḥ
dakṣiṇe vāsudevasya kare cakraṃ pratiṣṭhitam
pārśve nalinasiṃhau dvau subhadrāṃ dakṣiṇe nyaset
rukmiṇī vāmabhāge ca tadadhastāddivīṃdrakam
kṛtāṃjalipuṭasthaśca nāradaḥ kapilastathā
yadugraṃ vāsudevasya tathā nārāyaṇasya ca
vaiparītyaṃ vijānīyānmādhavānāṃ tathaiva ca
tīrthe girau taḍāge ca samīpe sthāpayetsudhīḥ
nagaragrāmamadhye vā brāhmaṇānāṃ ca saṃsadi
avimukte viśeṣaṇa siddhakṣetre daśārṇake
trīṇyuttarasahasrāṇi paṃcapaṃcottarāṇi ṣaṭ
kulāni pūrvaṃ vipreṃdrāḥ samuddharati nānyathā
kalau dārumayaḥ kāryo hyaśakto mṛnmayotha vā
caṃdanāgurubhiḥ kuryādbilvaśrīparṇikasya ca
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge dvādaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
kuṇḍanirmāṇavidhivarṇanam
sūta uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kuṃḍānāmatha nirṇayam
tasyoddhāraṃ ca saṃskāraṃ śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijasattamāḥ
caturasraṃ ca vṛttaṃ ca pādārdhaṃ cārdhacaṃdrakam
yonyākāraṃ caṃdrakaṃ ca aṣṭārdhamatha paṃcamam
saptārdhaṃ ca navārdhaṃ ca kuṃḍaṃ daśakamīritam
bhūmiṃ saṃśodhya vidhivattuṣakeśādivarjitām
bhrāmayeccordhvatastasyā bhasmāṃgārāṇi yatnataḥ
aṃkurārpaṇakaṃ kuryātsaptāhādeva buddhimān
aṣṭādaśāṃgake kṣetre nyasedekaṃ bahistataḥ
māpayettena mānena trivṛttaṃ kuṃḍamujjvalam
vṛttāni kālikādīni bahistrīṇi vivarjayet
saṃparipātayetsūtraṃ pāṭayettatpramāṇataḥ
paṃcadhā bhedite kṣetre kāmaṃ vā vibhajetsudhīḥ
nyasetpurastādevāṃgaṃ koṇārdhārdhapramāṇataḥ
yonisthānaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya aśvatthasya dalākṛtiḥ
sūtradvayaṃ tato dadyātkuṃḍaṃ parimitaṃ bhavet
diśaṃ prati yathānyāyaṃ pātayecca dvijottamāḥ
śṛṃgāṭakaṃ yugmapuṭaṃ ṣaḍasraṃ kuṃḍatrayaṃ budhāḥ
jalāśayārāmakūpe nitye gṛhamaye yathā
catusraṃ bhavetkuṃḍaṃ dvijasaṃskārakarmaṇi
devapratiṣṭhāyāge ca gṛhavāstau caturthakam
someaṣṭau paṃkajaṃ proktaṃ naramedhāśvamedhayoḥ
aṃkurārpaṇayāge ca vaiṣṇave yāgakarmaṇi
śivadevyośca janmādāvaṣṭamyāṃ cārdhacaṃdrakam
mārjārapauṣṭike vairaṃ ramye ca śāṃtike tathā
śāṃtipratiṣṭhāyāge tu śāktānāṃ kāmyakarmaṇi
puraścaraṇakāmyeṣu jvarādīnāṃ vimokṣaṇe
evaṃvidheṣu kāryeṣu yonikuṃḍaṃ praśasyate
devatātīrthayātrādau mahāyuddhapraveśane
saure śāṃte pauṣṭike ca ṣaṭpuraṃ kuṃḍamuttamam
māraṇoccāṭane caiva tathā rogopaśāṃtaye
vaiṣṇavānāṃ koṭihome nṛpāṇāmatiśocane
aṣṭāsramabjakuṃḍaṃ ca saptāsraṃ nidhisādhane
rājñā sādhye ca paṃcāsraṃ kanyāprāptau trirasrakam
kuṃḍānurūpataḥ kāryā mekhalā sarvato budhaiḥ
ayutādiṣu homeṣu mekhalāṃ yojayetsudhīḥ
nimna pramāṇe cātrāpi mūle sārdhāṃgulaṃ tyajet
muṣṭihaste samutsedho sārdhāṃgulapariṣkṛtaḥ
aratnimātre kuṃḍe tu triścaikāṃgulataḥ kramāt
ekahastamite kuṃḍe vedāgninayanāṃgulāḥ
paṃcamekhalakaṃ vātha lakṣakoṭyāṃ ca yojayet
ekāṃgulādimānena nemiṃ saṃvardhayetsudhīḥ
caturhastamite kuṃḍe tāvadeva guṇāṃgulāḥ
sārdhāṃgulādimānena nemiṃ saṃvardhayetsudhīḥ
kuṃḍasya rūpaṃ jānīyātparamaṃ prakṛtervapuḥ
ṣaṭacaturdhā guṇāyāmavistāronnatiśālinī
ekāṃgulaṃ tu yonyagraṃ kuryādīṣadadhomukham
ekaikāṃgulato yoniṃ kuṃḍaśūnyeṣu vardhayet
samamadhye mekhalāyāḥ saparyā yā sulakṣaṇā
sthāpayetkuṃḍakoṇeṣu yoniṃ tāṃ dvijasattamāḥ
kuṃḍānāṃ kalpayennābhiṃ sphuṭamaṃbujasannibhām
tattu kuṃḍānurūpaṃ vā suvyaktaṃ sumanoharam
yonikuṃḍe yonimabjaṃ kuṃḍe nābhiṃ ca varjayet
yāvaddvayapramāṇena ardhāṃgulakramādbahiḥ
nābhiṃ pravardhayedekaṃ kuṃḍānāṃ rūpato yathā
tatra tatra bhavetkuṃḍaṃ biṃbaśūnyaṃ na homayet
śivaśaktisamāyogātkāma utpadyate yataḥ
avaṭopi umādevī biṃbaḥ khyātaḥ sadāśivaḥ
na kuryādekayā hīnaṃ maraṇaṃ ca samuddiśet
trayodaśāṃgulaṃ hitvā vahnihastamathāpi vā
tasya dakṣiṇadigbhāge agrato maṃḍalaṃ likhet
tatra pūjā prakartavyā pūrvamānena cāśrayet
arkahastāṃtare kuryācchatordhvāṃte śatena vā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge trayodaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
yajñamānavidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
amānena hato yajñastasmānmānaṃ na hāpayet
śatārdhaṃ prathamaṃ mānaṃ śatasāhasrameva ca
ayutaṃ ca tathā lakṣaṃ koṭihomamataḥ param
ataḥ paraṃ tu vibhave rājā vānyo ddhijottamāḥ
vipākaṃ karmaṇāṃ sarvaṃ naraḥ prāpnoti sarvadā
śubhāśubhaṃ tato nityaṃ prāpnoti manujaḥ kila
yuktāścāpi grahāstatra nityaṃ śāṃtikapauṣṭike
adbhute ca tathā śāṃtiṃ kuryādbhaktisamanvitaḥ
tasmādgrahābhijanitaṃ śubhāśubhaphalaṃ khalu
homaṃ yathābhirucitaṃ pauṣṭike kāmyakarmaṇi
lakṣahomaṃ koṭihomaṃ rājā kuryādyathāvidhi
anyaḥ śatādikaṃ kuryādayutaṃ vibhave sati
grahāṇāṃ lakṣahomastu koṭihomastathā kalau
nidhihomaṃ cābhicāraṃ tanna kuryādgṛhāśramī
mānaṃ naiva ca kartavyaṃ mānādau cāṣṭakaṃ nyaset
lakṣe saptatālasaṃkhyā koṭihome ca viṃśatiḥ
āraṃbhastrisahasraḥ syāddvitīyeaṣṭasahasrakaḥ
tṛtīye tu sahasraṃ syādgrahasādhyaḥ smṛto vidhiḥ
pañcāhe ca samāraṃbhe sahasraṃ juhuyādbudhaḥ
guṇasāhasrakaṃ turye pañcāhe śeṣamīritam
paṃcame ca tathā ṣaṣṭhe kule bhāgadvayādhikam
na nyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ kāryametanmānamudāhṛtam
sa samāje japennityaṃ pañcatāreṇa sviṣṭakṛt
tryahasādhye trirātre ca pūrṇaṃ kṛtvā visarjayet
pañcāhe tu tṛtīyeahni balidānaṃ praśasyate
saptāhe cāṣṭadivase navāhe paṃcameahani
pañcāhe dvādaśāhe tu dvātriṃśatṣoḍaśeahani
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge caturdaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
kuṇḍasaṃskāravarṇanam
sūta uvāca
kuṇḍānāmatha saṃskāre vakṣye śāstramataṃ yathā
asaṃskṛte cārthahānistasmātsaṃskṛtya homayet
aṣṭādaśa syuḥ saṃskārāḥ kuṇḍānāṃ tatra darśitāḥ
tāreṇāvekṣayetsthānaṃ kuśatoyaiḥ prasecayet
trisūtrīkaraṇaṃ paścādvṛttasūtraṃ nipātayet
vāreṇa kīlakaṃ dadyānnārasiṃhena kuḍmalam
jihvāṃ prakalpayetpaścāttasmādagniṃ samāharet
nadīparvataśālābhyaḥ strīhastātparivarjayet
saṃskṛtya parigṛhṇīyāttridhā kṛtvā samuddharet
tamagniṃ pratigṛhṇīyādātmanoabhimukhaṃ yathā
vāgīśvarīmṛtusnātāṃ vāgīśvarasamāgatām
dhyātvā samīraṇaṃ dadyātkāmamutpadyate tataḥ
kālabījena caiśānyāṃ yonāvagniṃ vinikṣipet
paścāddevasya devyāśca dadyādācamanīyakam
sarvajñājñāpaya svāhā mantroyaṃ vahnipūjane
vahnibarhiṣi saṃyuktāḥ sādiyāṃtāḥ sabiṃdavaḥ
vahnimantrāḥ samuddiṣṭā dvijānāṃ maṃtra īritaḥ
jihvāstāstrividhāḥ proktā yajñadattena sattamāḥ
hiraṇyā mājyahomeṣu homayetsaṃyatātmakaḥ
kanakāsyāttu kṛṣṇāsyāddhirṇyā śubhratā tathā
bahurūpātirūpā ca sāttvikā yogakarmasu
viśvamūrtiṃ sphuliṃginyau dhūmravarṇā manojavā lohitāsyātkarālāsyātkālībhāsasya ityapi
etāḥ sapta niyuṃjīta vijñeyāḥ krūrakarmasu
śuddhakṣīreṇa raktāyāṃ naityikeṣu prabhā smṛtā
bahurūpā puṣpahome kṛṣṇā cānnena pāyasaiḥ
dhūminī tilahome ca kāṣṭhahome karālikā
lohitāsyā pitṛhome tato jñeyā manojavā
vaiśvānaraṃ sthitaṃ home samiddhomeṣu sattamāḥ
samānamājyahome ca niṣaṇṇaṃ śeṣavastuṣu
nāsikāyāṃ manaḥpīḍā mastakeadhvā na saṃśayaḥ
sādhāraṇamatho vakṣye vahnerjihvāśca kīrtitāḥ
pravakṣyāmi vidhiṃ kṛtsnaṃ yadviśeṣaṃ punaḥ śṛṇu
ghṛtāhutau hiraṇyākhyā gaganā pāṇihomataḥ
vakrā khyātā mahāhome kṛṣṇābhā sā kratau matā
suprabhā modakavidhau bahurūpātirūpikāḥ
na vā saṃkalpayetkuṇḍe śūdrākāra vibhedataḥ
indrakoṣṭhaṃ mastakaṃ syādīśāgneye ca mastake
hutvā vrīhigaṇaṃ tatra karṇe puṣpāhutiṃ hunet
vāmakarṇe vāmanetre hunedabjādikaṃ budhaḥ
śravaṇe caiva netre ca dakṣiṇe cekṣukhaṃḍakam
vāmapāde vāmakare abhicāreṣu śasyate
māraṇe puṣpadeśe tu na cānyaṃ homayetkvacit
vipatkaraṃ vijānīyāddhvaniḥ sarvavināśakṛt candanāgarukarpūrapāṭalāyūthikānibhaḥ
pāvakasya suto gaṃdhaḥ samaṃtātsumahodayaḥ
pradakṣiṇastyaktakalpā chatrākā śithilā śikhā
śubhadā yajamānasya rājyasyāpi viśeṣataḥ
chinnavṛttāḥ śikhāḥ kuryānmṛtyurdhanaparikṣayaḥ
nirvāpyaṃ maraṇaṃ vidyānmahādhūmākuleapi ca
evaṃvidheṣu doṣeṣu prāyaścittaṃ samācaret
aṣṭāviṃśāhutīstyaktvā brāhmaṇānbhojayettataḥ
mūlenājyena juhuyājjuhuyātpañcaviṃśatim
mahāsnānaṃ prakartavyaṃ trikālaṃ haripūjanam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge pañcadaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
yajñāntapūjāvidhivarṇanam
sūt uvāca
homāvasāne prajapedupacārāṃśca ṣoḍaśa
dadyātsamīraṇaṃ paścātpīṭhapūjāṃ samācarat
gṛhītvā raktapuṣpaṃ ca dhyāyedvahniṃ yathāvidhi
iṣṭaṃ śaktisvastikābhītimuccairdīrghairdorbhirdhārayantaṃ varāṃtam
hemākalpaṃ padmasaṃsthaṃ trinetraṃ dhyāyedvahniṃ baddhamauliṃ jaṭābhiḥ pūrvādidvāradeśeṣu kāmadevaṃ śatakratum
varāhaṃ ṣaṇmukhaṃ caiva gaṃdhādyaiḥ sādhu pūjayet
āvāhya sthāpayetpaścādaṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet
dattvāsanaṃ svāgataṃ ca dadyātpādyādikatrayam
ataḥ pūrvādipātreṣu yāvatā ca hutāśanam
mahodaraṃ mahājihvamākāśatvena pūjayet
tārakādīnsamāpte ca gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
tatraiva jihvāstrividhā dhyāyenmaṃtrapuraḥsarāḥ
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa upacārairanaṃtaram
tvamādiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsārārṇavatārakaḥ
puṭāṃjaliṃ tato baddhvā pṛcchetkuśalapūrvakam
svāgataṃ tu suraśreṣṭha śāṃtiṃ kuru namoastu te
sarvalokahitārthāya pādyaṃ ca pratigṛhyatām
nārāyaṇaparaṃ dhāma jyotīrūpa sanātana
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ viśvarūpa namoastu te
jagadādityarūpeṇa prakāśayati yaḥ sadā
snānīyaṃ te mayā dattaṃ sarvakāmārthasiddhaye
hutāśana mahābāho devadeva sanātana
jyotiṣāṃ jyotīrūpastvamanādinidhanācyuta
devīdevā mudaṃ yāṃti yasya samyaksamāgamāt
sarvadoṣopaśāṃtyartha gandhoayaṃ pratigṛhyatām
tvaṃ viṣṇustvaṃ hi brahmā ca jyotiṣāṃ gatirīśvara
gṛhāṇa puṣpaṃ deveśa sānulepaṃ jagadbhavet
devatānāṃ pitṛrṇāṃ ca sukhamekaṃ sanātanam
dhūpoayaṃ devadeveśa gṛhyatāṃ me dhanaṃjaya
tvamekaḥ sarvabhūteṣu sthāvareṣu careṣu ca
paramātmā parākāraḥ pradīpaḥ pratigṛhyatām
sarvasvaṃ yajñasūtraṃ ca paramānnaṃ samākṣikam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge ṣoḍaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
yajñabhedaṃ tribhedaṃ ca vakṣye śāstramataṃ yathā
yathāvedānusāreṇa yathāgrahaṇa yojanam
śatārdhe vahniruddiṣṭaḥ śatārdhe kāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ
ghṛtapradīpake viṣṇustilayāge vanaspatiḥ
lakṣahome tu vahniḥ syātkoṭihome hutāśanaḥ
varuṇaḥ śāṃtike jñeyo māraṇe hyaruṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
nityahomeanalo nāma prāyaścitte hutāśanaḥ
lohitaścānnayajñe yo grahāṇāṃ pratyanukramāt
devapratiṣṭhāyāge tu lohitaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
prajāpatirvāstuyāge maṃḍape cāpi padmake
prapāyāṃ caiva nāgākhyo mahādāne havirbhujaḥ
tulāpuruṣadāne ca dhātāgniḥ parikīrtitaḥ
vṛṣotsarge bhavetsūyoavasānāṃte raviḥ smṛtaḥ
pāvako vaiśvadeve ca dīkṣāpakṣe janārdanaḥ
trāsane ca bhavetkālaḥ kravyādaḥ śaradāhane
parṇadāhe yamo nāma hyasthidāhe śikhaṃḍikaḥ
garbhādhāne ca marutaḥ sīmaṃte piṃgalaḥ smṛtaḥ
puṃsave tviṃdra ākhyātaḥ praśasto yāgakarmaṇi
niṣkame hāṭakaścaiva prāśane ca śucistathā
ṣaḍānanaśca cūḍāyāṃ vratādeśe samudbhavaḥ
udare jaṭharāgniśca samudre vaḍavānalaḥ
śikhāyāṃ ca vibhurjñeyaḥ svarasyāgniḥ sarīsṛpaḥ
aśvāgnirmaṃtharo nāma rathāgnirjātavedasaḥ
gajāgnirmaṃdaraścaiva sūryāgnirviṃdhyasaṃjñakaḥ
toyāgnirvaruṇonāma brāhmaṇāgnirhavirbhujaḥ
parvatāgniḥ kratubhujo dāvāgniḥ sūrya ucyate
dīpāgniḥ pāvako nāma gṛhyāgnirdharaṇīpatiḥ
ghṛtāgniśca nalo vāyuḥ sūtikāgniśca rākṣasaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāgeagnināmavarṇanaṃnāma saptadaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
athāto homadravyāṇāṃ pramāṇamabhidhīyate
pramāṇe cāpramāṇe ca niṣphalaṃ bhavati dhuvam
karṣamātraṃ ghṛtaṃ home śuktimātraṃ payaḥ smṛtam
muṣṭimānena pṛthukā lājāḥ syurmuṣṭisaṃmitāḥ
śarkarā muṣṭimātrā ca śarkarātolakaṃ viduḥ
ekaikaṃ patrapuṣpāṇi śālūkasya trimuṣṭikam
savṛṃtakaṃ japāpuṣpaṃ keśaraṃ tatsavṛṃtakam
ekaikaśaśca padmānāṃ jalajānāṃ tathaiva ca
jīvaṃtyāḥ phalamānena piṣṭakānāṃ prasaṃkhyayā
vasaṃtakaṃ dhātrimāne modakasya pramāṇataḥ
ekaikaśaḥ phalānāṃ ca mātuliṃgatrikheḍakam
aṣṭadhā nālikerasya panasaṃ daśadhā bhavet
padmabījapramāṇena kūṣmāṃḍaṃ cāṣṭadhā bhavet
urvārukaṃ cāṣṭadhā ca guḍūcī caturaṃgulam
pūgamānaṃ ca māṃsasya saguḍaṃ tatra dṛśyate
anyatra badarīmānaṃ tiṃdukaṃ ca tridhā kṛtam
kāṣṭhaṃ prādeśamātraṃ syāddūrvā yāśca tripatrakam
bhūrjapatraṃ ca gṛhṇīyācchamīṃ prādeśamātrikām
vrīhayo muṣṭimātrāḥ syuḥ śuktimānena sarṣapāḥ
maricāḥ syurvimā nena mṛṇālaṃ cātha mūlakam
saptakhaṃḍaṃ ca vārtākaṃ tripuṣṭaṃ ca tridhoditam
caṃdanāgurukarpūrakastūrīkuṃkumāni ca
tittiḍībījamānena samuddi ṣṭāni deśikaiḥ
daśakaṃ plāvanenaiva sahasrāṇāṃ śataṃ vinā
evaṃ vrīhiplāvane ca kāṣṭhavadi kṣudaṃḍakam
prokṣaṇaṃ mṛdupuṣpāṇāṃ latādīnāṃ tathaiva ca
vṛṃtasaṃplāvanādeva phalaṃ harati rākṣasaḥ
na dvitriplavanaṃ kuryātkṛtvā yāti rasātalam
pūrvāśābhimukho bhūtvā pāvayecca yathākramāt
na nyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ kuryācchāṃtipakṣa udaṅmukhaḥ
kaniṣṭhāṃgulimāsādya prakuryātparvabhūṣaṇam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāgeṣṭādaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
śrīparṇī śiṃśapā kṣīrī bilvaḥ khadira eva ca
sruve praśastāstaravaḥ siddhidā yāgakarmaṇi
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ praśastāstu dhātrīkhadirakeśarāḥ
saṃskāre śaśibhinnau ca dhātrī dhātrā vinirmitā
saṃprāśe yaḥ sruvaḥ proktaḥ saṃskāre yajñasādhane
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ tu kathitāsta danye śāstravedibhiḥ
kāṣṭhaṃ gṛhītvā bilvasya riktāditithivarjite
kāṣṭhaṃ gṛhītvā vibhajedbhāgāṃstriṃśattathā punaḥ
viṃśatyaṃgulamānaṃ tu kuṃḍavedisamodaram
kaṭāhākāranimnaṃ ca sruvaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ
dhātrīphalasamākāraṃ svadhānimnaṃ suśobhanam
vedīṃ śūrpākṛtiṃ kuryātkuṃḍāni parikalpayet
dvitriṃśaṃ syātkuṃḍamānamadaive tasya kīrtitam
caturbhiraṃgairānāhaṃ karṣādyagraṃ tataḥ sruvam
daṃḍamūlāśraye daṃḍī bhavetkaṃkaṇabhūṣitaḥ
sauvarṇasya ca tāmrasya kāryā darvī pramāṇataḥ
kṣīravṛkṣasamudbhūtaṃ dvādaśāṃgulasaṃmitam
dvayaṃgulaṃ maṃḍalaṃ tasya darvī sā yajñasādhane
paṃcāṃgulaṃ maṃḍalaṃ ca aṣṭahastaṃ ca daṃḍakam
daśatolakamānena sā ca darvī udāhṛtā
ājyasaṃśodhanārthaṃ tu sā tu tāmramayasya ca
ṣoḍaśāṃgulamānena sarvābhāve ca paippalīm
ājya sthālīṃ ghṛtamayīṃ mṛnmayīṃ ca samāśrayet
atha tāmramayī kāryā na ca tāṃ tatra yojayet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathamabhāge sruvadarvīnirṇayo nāmaikonaviṃśoadhyāyaḥ cha
pūrṇavidhivarṇanam
sūta uvāca
atha pūrṇavidhiṃ vakṣye yathā caṃdrārthavedinām
yasya samyaganuṣṭhānātsaṃpūrṇaṃ syāditi sthitiḥ
homapūrtau mokṣakalpaḥ pūjāṃtearghyaṃ vidhīyate
atha tasyāmapūrṇāyāṃ hataśrīryajñabhraṃśatā
pūrṇaṃ dattvā savitrearghyaṃ brāhmaṇānbhojayettataḥ
gṛhaṃ praviśya ca tataḥ kulapūjāṃ samācaret
saptate dehi me pūrṇāṃ punātviti ṛcā kramāt
niyojayetpratiṣṭhāyāṃ nityanaimittike śṛṇu
punātviti ṛcā pūrṇā prathamā parikīrtitā
saptateti dvitīyā syāddehimeti tṛtīyikā
pūrṇā darvī caturthī syātkulevasthāpya deśikaḥ
utthāya dadyātpūrṇāṃ tu nopaviśya kadācana
kanakāyāṃ ca jihvāyāṃ raktāyāṃ grahayāgake
grahahome śatāṃte ca pūrṇā ekā vidhīyate
sahasrāṃte yugaṃ dadyādayutāṃte yugadvayam
sahasrāṃte dadedekaṃ puṣpahome ca sattamāḥ
pūrṇā tvekasahasraṃ tu dadyādyajñaphalepsayā
mṛdupuṣpākṛtau tvekā kevale cekṣuhomake
śataṃ dve ca śate caiva garbhādhānānnaprāśane
sīmaṃtonnayane caiva prāyaścittākṛtīṣu ca
vaiśvadeve ca nitye ca pūrṇā tvekā vidhīyate
ṛṣichaṃdādikaṃ śrutvā pratimaṃtrasya sattamāḥ
saptateti brāhmaṇasya ṛṣiḥ kauṃḍinya īritaḥ
dehi meti ca maṃtrasya prajāpatirṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ
anuṣṭup ca bhavecchaṃdo devatāsya prajāpatiḥ
pūrṇā darvīti mantrasya śatakraturṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ
chaṃdonuṣṭupsamākhyātaṃ vahniścaivātra devatā
punātviti ca mantrasya ṛṣiḥ syātpavanaḥ smṛtaḥ
chaṃdoapi jagatī khyātaṃ devatāgniśca kīrtitaḥ
turyapūrṇā yajñamadhye nakule dvijasattamāḥ
na cāśiṣaṃ yajñamadhye abhiṣekaṃ ca tarpaṇam
ṛtvikchaṃdaḥ spṛśansamyagdakṣiṇāṃgamathāpi vā
viśvāmitroayutaṃ tatra homaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ
nāgaraṃgaṃ dhātakīṃ ca pūrṇāyāṃ ca vivarjayet
japyahānirasaṃkhyāte homabhraṃśaśca jāyate
tasmātprāgeva satilāngaṇitvā sthāpayetpṛthak
dhātakyāśca phalaiḥ saṃkhyā kartavyā phalamicchatā
karpūracaṃdanaiḥ kuryāddholikāṃ yajñasiddhaye
gaṃgāmṛttikayā yuktaḥ śunikāmatha vā dvijāḥ
raktaguṃjāphalaiḥ saṃkhyāṃ puṣṭikāmeṣu yojayet
hotā syādayutenāpi ekāhe vedasaṃkhyayā
ṛṇasādhye bhaveddhotā traya eva dvijottamāḥ
lakṣahome tu hotāraḥ ṣaḍeva parikīrtitāḥ
koṭihome tu viprāḥ syuḥ praśastāḥ paṃktisaṃkhyayā
nava paṃca daśadaśakaṃ paṃcaviṃśamathāpi vā
kāmakrodha vihīnāḥ syurṛtvijaḥ śāṃtacetasaḥ
athavā ṛtvijau śāṃtau dvāveva parikīrtitau
tadvatsadaśadhā cāṣṭau navahome tu ṛtvijaḥ
yataḥ sarvamavāpnoti kuryātkāmavidhānataḥ
yāvatkalpaśatānyaṣṭāvaṃte mokṣamavāpnuyāt
akāmo yastvimaṃ kuryāllakṣahomaṃ yathāvidhi
śatakāmamavāpnoti padaṃ cānaṃtyamaśnute
bhāryāthīṃ labhate bhāryāṃ kumārī ca śubhaṃ patim
bhraṣṭarājyastathā rājyaṃ śrīkāmaḥ śriyamāpnuyāt
yaṃ yaṃ kāmayate kāmaṃ sarvaṃ prāpnoti puṣkalam
tasmācchataguṇaḥ proktaḥ koṭihomaḥ svayaṃbhuvā
ācārya eva hotā syādbrāhmaṇānāmasaṃbhave
pāṣāṇe mṛttikāyāṃ ca na ca vastrāsane kvacit
tatra dārumayaṃ kuryādāgamaṃ bhajate dvijaḥ
dānaṃ dadyācca homāṃte pūrṇādau ca yathā bhavet
dvijasaṃskārakāryeṣu pūrṇādau cāpi dakṣiṇā
maṃtropāsanakāryeṣu somayāgāśvamedhake
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge viṃśoadhyāyaḥ cha
maṇḍalavidhivarṇanam
sūta uvāca
athāto maṃḍalaṃ vakṣye purāṇeṣu yathoditam
devāḥ padmāsanasthāśca bhaviṣyaṃti vasaṃti ca
vinābjaṃ nārcayeddevīmarcite yakṣiṇī haret
ato maṃḍalavicchedaṃ yasmāddaśaguṇaṃ bhavet
rajaḥsādhye śataguṇaṃ kevale dviguṇaṃ phalam
triśataṃ vaṃdane sādhye sahasraṃ ca rajoaṣṭakam
rajobhiḥ ṣoḍaśairbiṃbaṃ śataṃśatamanaṃtakam
yantre maṇau śālagrāme pratimāyāṃ viśeṣataḥ
caturasraṃ navaṃ vyūhaṃ krauṃcaprāṇaṃ catu rvidham
kāmabījaṃ vajranābhaṃ vighnarājaṃ gajāhvayam
pārijātaṃ caṃdrabiṃbaṃ sūryakāṃtaṃ ca śekharam
śatapatraṃ sahasrāraṃ navanābhaṃ ca muṣṭikam
paṃcābjaṃ caiva mainākaṃ kāmarājaṃ ca puṣkaram
aṣṭāsraṃ caiva śrībiṃbaṃ ṣaḍasraṃ tryasrameva tu
catvāriṃśattathā paṃcasvādhikaṃ parisaṃkhyayā
caturasraṃ navavyūḍhaṃ vaiṣṇave yāgakarmaṇi
praśastaṃ cāpi gomedhe krauṃcaṃ ghrāṇaṃ caturvidham
kāmarājaṃ tathā tryasramaṣṭāsraṃ ca ṣaḍasrakam
śaktānāṃ kāmapakṣe ca paṃcasiṃhāsanaṃ mahat
dhyānācale merupṛṣṭhaṃ maṇimuktācaleṣvapi
harivallabhaṃ rājasūye somayāgeṣu śasyate
jalāśayapratiṣṭhāyāṃ vighnarājaṃ praśasyate
caturaṃgulocchrāyamitā ṣaḍaṃgulā hyathāpi vā
ṣaḍaṃgulā navavyūhe vardhayedyajñakovidaḥ
krauṃcaprāṇe turyahastaṃ muṣṭihastaṃ samucchritam
madhyadvaye hīnakaraṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ tryaṃgulādhikam
pārijātaṃ caṃdrabiṃbaṃ sūryakāṃtaṃ ca śekharam
grahāṇāṃ pauṣṭike pakṣe bāhyagrāmādisādhane
prathame muṣṭihastaḥ syātsaṃpūrṇe śeṣamānakaiḥ
navalābhe ca paṃcābjaṃ karatrayamudāhṛtam
śeṣā caiva variṣṭhā ca lavalī bhitti vedikā
vijñeyā dvijaśārdūlā yathākāmyeṣu yojayet
daśahaste cāṣṭahaste aṣṭahaste ca ṣoḍaśam
muṣṭibāhuñca prādeśaṃ vardhayetṣoḍaśāṃśake
darpaṇākārakaṃ kuryādyāgake śāṃti karmaṇi
hīnaṃ kuryātprayatnena vaprākāraṃ paristave
niśāraṇairgomayaiśca vedikāṃ ca pralepayet
hīnavīryagavānāṃ ca purīṣaṃ dhenukaṃ tathā
kapilāyāśca yatnena kuṃḍamaṃḍalalepane
vinā sūtraiḥ kīlake na maṃḍale naiva sūtrayet
tasmātprayatnataḥ kāryaṃ yatsūtraṃ yacca kīlakam
arkahastamitaṃ sūtraṃ mṛdu lākṣāmayaṃ tathā
raupyatāmramayaṃ kuryādvaiṣṇave yāgakarmaṇi
gaṇanāyake supraśastaṃ śaiṣepāmārgameva ca
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathama bhāge ekaviṃśatitamoadhyāyaḥ cha
viṣayānukramaṇikā
maṇḍaladevaracanāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
guṇāṃgulaṃ pratidiśaṃ vardhayetsuvicakṣaṇaḥ
caturasraṃ samaṃ kuyādiṣṭeraṣṭādaśāṃgulam
evaṃ poḍaśahastāṃtaṃ vardhayetkramataḥ svayam
haste vinirṇayaṃ viprā racayenmaṃḍala sudhīḥ
dvādaśāṃgulakalpābhyāṃ madhuhaste ca maṃḍale
padmamānaṃ caturddhā tu vṛttaṃ kuryātsamaṃtataḥ
prathame karṇikā kāryyā keśarāṇi dvitīyake
tṛtīye dalasaṃdhīṃśca dalāgrāṇi caturthake
karṇikāṃ pītavarṇena śuddhena paṃkajaṃ likhet
keśarāstrividhāḥ proktā mūlamadhyāgradeśataḥ
mūle śuklāruṇā madhye pītāścāgre pratiṣṭhitāḥ
aṣṭāṃgulapramāṇaṃ yadyathāvarṇaṃ vināditaḥ
śaṃbhurgaurī tathā brahmā rāmakṛṣṇetyanukramāt
śivaviṣṇvormahāyāge śaṃbhumārabhya dāpayet
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ ca rāmāṃtaṃ kṛṣṇāṃtaṃ ca jalāśaye
durgāyāge ca śrīpakṣe brahmādīnparikalpayet
grahayāge ca pītādīnkuryācca na tadanyathā
sarvaṃ ca pūrvavatkāryaṃ paṃkajaṃ sulikhetsudhīḥ
tāvatsaṃkhyāharaṇayorveṣṭayetprakramādapi
śuklāruṇaistathā pītaiḥ pītāruṇasitairapi
pītāruṇasitairevaṃ svabhāve pratibhāgake
kalāyaṃtraṃ tadaṃte ca guhyapatrā grakeṇa tu
ṣoḍaśairviṃśamāne tu saliṅgaṃ cāṣṭapatrake
evaṃ maṃḍalamaṃtrāṇāṃ varjayetparamārthataḥ
tadvanmūleṣu koṇeṣu keśarāṇi prakalpayet
daśadaṃḍasamākāraṃ trivarṇaṃ pratiraṃjitam
araṃ dadyāddaśāgre tu sarvāṃgulapramāṇataḥ
pītenāraṃ ca sarvatra tanmadhye śoṇatuṃḍakam
na śūdro maṃḍalaṃ kuryānna kuryādbrāhmaṇabruvaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge prathamoadhyāyaḥ cha
krauñcamānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
krauñcamānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāvedārthavādinām
saṃmataṃ sarvataṃtreṣu gopanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ
catuṣṭayaṃ nyasedvṛttaṃ madhyamādhamabhāvataḥ
tṛtīye padmapatrāṇi caturthe ṣoḍaśacchadāḥ
taddakṣiṇāgraṃ sulikhetpārśvayoḥ pakṣakadvayam
śuklaṃ pītaṃ tathā raktaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ lohitasannibham
saṃkhyātaṃ tāmraparṇaṃ ca śyāmalaṃ cāṣṭakaṃ rajaḥ
śuklaṃ taṃḍulacūrṇotthaṃ pītaṃ tu niśayā smṛtam
raktaṃ tu niśayā yogācchaṃkhacūrṇādibhāvitam
kṛṣṇaṃ pulakādidagdhaṃ raktaṃ pītāsyayogataḥ
kuṃkumābhaṃ pāṃḍuraṃ ca raktaśvetairvinirmitam
tāmravarṇaṃ kusuṃbhena śyāmalaṃ bilvapatrajam
yavagodhūmacūrṇādiyogena tu rajaḥ smṛtam
karṇikāyāṃ keśareṣu śubhrameva nipātayet
tataḥ ṣoḍaśapatreṣu pūrvādikramato bhavet
śuklaṃ pītaṃ tathā tāmraṃ tataḥ saṃkhyātameva ca
śyāmalaṃ kuṃkumābhaṃ ca raktaṃ śuklaṃ ca kṛṣṇakam
pītaṃ tāmraṃ ca saṃkhyātaṃ śyāmaṃ kuṃkumaraktakam
evaṃ dadyādvijaḥ pūrve īśānāṃtaṃ vibhāvayet
tuṃḍabhāge bhavetpītaṃ grīvāyāṃ śuklameva ca
pucche viṃśatipatrāṇi ādau paṃca rajaḥkramāt
ṣaḍaṃguleṣvaṃḍabhāge pītena parikalpayet
grīvāyāṃ śuklarajasā bhāvitāyāṃ viśeṣataḥ
tatra pītādikaṃ lekhyaṃ pūrvoktaṃ ca yathā bhavet
śuklādikaṃ pradadyānu pātreṣvekaikaśaḥ pṛthak
pade śuddhaṃ cāṃgulīṣu raktaṃ śyāmena bhāvayet
pūrvapaścimadigbhāge śuklaṃ syādvāradeśataḥ
mahākrauṃcamidaṃ jñeyaṃ madhyakraucamidaṃ śṛṇu
kaniṣṭhaṃ sarvayajñeṣu vidyānāṃ saptamuttamam
athāparaṃ pravakṣyāmi sarvataṃtramataṃ kramāt
raktapītaṃ raktapītaiḥ kuryātpucchacatuṣṭayam
pūrvādikramayoge tu patrāṃte dharaṇītale
sulikhenmūlasaṃlagnaṃ bahiṣkoṇacatuṣṭayam
kaniṣṭheaṣṭakulaṃ kuryātpucchaṃ kuryāccaturvidham
trivṛttaṃ veṣṭayetpaścātsitaraktāsitaiḥ kramāt
dṛṣṭaṃ janmaśatodbhūtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayate dhuvam
pītaṃ vā vilikhedviprā naśyaṃti sakalāpadaḥ
tasya kalpaśatodbhūtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayate dhuvam
mayūraṃ vṛṣabhaṃ caiva siṃhaṃ krauṃcaṃ ca vai kapim
pramādādvā gṛhe kṣetre vṛkṣāgre cāpi bho dvijāḥ
utthāya vaṃdanaṃ kuryādbrahmahatyāśataṃ dahet
poṣaṇātkīrtimāpnoti darśanātpāpavicyutiḥ
darśanādvardhate lakṣmīrāyurvṛddhiśca jāyate
mayūro brahmaṇo mṛrtirvṛṣabhaśca sadāśivaḥ
krauṃco nārāyaṇo devo vyāghrastripurasuṃdarī
kālikā kṛṣṇavyāghraśca lakṣmīścitrakapotakaḥ
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi maṃḍale maṃḍaleṣvapi
taṃḍulotthaṃ yavotthaṃ vā varjyaṃ makararopaṇam
yadbālyaśrāvaṇe jātaṃ hiṃgulaṃ gaṃdhakaṃ tathā
haimaṃtikodbhavaṃ yacca sitapāṣāṇameva ca
kāṃcanyāśca prabhedaṃ yacchastaṃ śuklaguṇaṃ dvijāḥ
śephālivṛttaṃ niśayā atasīkusumāni ca
kiṃśukasya ca puṣpāṇi śastaṃ pītaṃ guṇaṃ bhavet
kuśītaṃ guḍakaṃ caiva maṃjiṣṭhāṃ paṃcaraṃgakam
kṛṣṇapāṣāṇakaṃ caiva kṛṣṇābhraṃ samayūthakam
nāgapāṣāṇakaṃ caiva punnāgaṃ dagdhapaṃcakam
śaṃkhacūrṇaṃ lohaviṣṭhāṃ nāgaviṣṭhāṃ ca varjayet
karpūraṃ kuṃkumaṃ caiva rocanārocanāṃ śrayet
yavaśālīyakairbhinnaṃ śuklaṃ ca kārayetsudhīḥ
lākṣāṃ ca yadi gṛhṇīyāttadbharjitvā pradāpayet
ākāśaṃ pṛthivīṃ caiva bhaumaṃ rāmaṃ tathā śanī
dharaṇīṃ sadanasthāne pañcadhā vibhajedbahiḥ
tarjanyaṃguṣṭhayogairvā tṛṇamārabhya yadbhavet
tṛṇamārabhya sāmānye śakto vā madhyamāditaḥ
rākṣasādipratiṣṭhāyāṃ grahapakṣeagnimāditaḥ
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ grahamakhe kāmyeṣu parivarjayet
subhadraṃ maṇḍalaṃ vakṣye śubhadaṃ śubhamādiśet
caturviśāṃgulaiḥ pūrṇaṃ sarvatra hastamādiśet
madhyamā dīrghamānena mānāṃgulamiti smṛtam
rekhādvayāṃtaraṃ yacca mūlarekhāṃ na cāśrayet
vaddhāṃguṣṭhanakhadvaṃdvaṃ mānāṃgulamathāpi vā
madhye nibadhya śaṃkuṃ ca muṣṭibāhupramāṇataḥ
prakalpya karṇikādīni madhye cāṣṭadalaṃ likhet
bahiścārkadalaṃ kuryādvarṇānāṃ kramakeṇa tu
paṃcamaṃ śvetavarṇena bahiḥ kuryāttriveṣṭanam
sitapītāruṇaṃ kuryātpaścādvedāṃgulāṃtare
subhadraṃ maṇḍalātpūrvaṃ sarvatobhadrakaṃ śṛṇu
sarvakāryeṣu yajñeṣu sarvakalyāṇamāpnuyāt
maṃḍalaṃ sarvatobhadraṃ sarvayajñeṣu puṣṭidam
sādhakānāṃ hitārthāya īśvareṇaiva bhāṣitam
koṇe sūtradvayaṃ dadyānmadhye sūtradvayaṃ punaḥ
tato matsyānviracayetkarṇe sūtrāṇi sādhakaḥ
catuḥ sūtraṃ pātayecca pūrvāparavibhāgataḥ
punardadyāccatuḥsūtraṃ karṇasūtraṃ punardadet
śatadvayapadaṃ yāvatṣaṭpaṃcāśādhikaṃ tathā
pātayecca tathā sūtramevaṃ saptadaśaṃ bhavet
ūrdhvapaṃktyā padayugaṃ cādye padacatuṣṭayam
dvārapārśve bhavedyāvaddaṃtapaṃktyā padatrayam
paṅkajaṃ śuklavarṇena vaiṣṇavo yāgakarmaṇi
pratiṣṭhāsu ca sarvāsu śuklameva praśasyate
pītena karṇikā kāryā caturbhāgena mānataḥ
śubhaṃ cakorāvasthāne tāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ
karṇikāmūlamārabhya rekhāḥ ṣoḍaśa kalpayet
agre pītaṃ bhavedevaṃ kṛtvā paṃkajaveṣṭanam
koṇeṣu raktaṃ dadyācca padmaṃ kṣetreṣu nirdiśet
śuklena pīṭhagātrāṇi pīṭhakoṇe padatraye
śuddhena racayetpādau punaḥ pītādivarṇakaiḥ
citraṃ suśobhanaṃ kāryaṃ tatra kalpalatāṃ nyaset
mānaṃ kalpalatāyāstu dvyaṅgulaṃ parikīrtitam
dvedve śastaṃ ca bhramaṇaṃ śaṃkhāvartakramāttrayam
graṃthaugraṃthau puṣpaphale nānāvarṇena bhāvayet
nānāpaśugaṇairyuktaṃ nānāpakṣigaṇairyutam
vaiṣṇave gāruḍaṃ śastaṃ śaive kīśavṛṣaṃ likhet
śākte vyāghraṃ tathaiśe ca śarabhaṃ harimālikhet
śobhāṃ pītena racayedupaśobhāṃ ca pītakaiḥ
koṇeṣu kṛṣṇavarṇena bahiḥ syādveṣṭanatrayam
śuklapītāruṇaiḥ kāryaṃ maṇḍalaṃ syānmanoramam
sarvajñānamayaṃ śuddhaṃ dharmakāmārthadāyakam
caturasraṃ samaṃ kṛtvā digbhyo dvādaśadhā dvijāḥ
pātayettatra sūtrāṇi koṣṭhānāṃ dṛśyate śatam
catuścatvāriṃśadādyaṃ paścātṣaṭtriṃśadaṃbujam
koṣṭhaṃ prakalpayetpīṭhaṃ paṃktyā caivātra vīthikām
dvāraśobhe yathāpūrvamupaśobhaṃ ca dṛśyate
avaśiṣṭaiḥ padaiḥ kuryātsadbhistaṃtrāṇi mantravit
vidadhyātpūrvavaccheṣamevaṃ vā maṇḍalaṃ bhavet
pūrvoktamaṇḍale vidvandharaṇīsadanaṃ bahiḥ
madhye kalpalatā kāryā bahiṣkoṇeṣu sattamāḥ
gulālītūryavarṇena mahāmatta iti smṛtaḥ
śobhopaśobhe śobhāgrāṃ kuryādvai maṇḍalaṃ bhavet
śatapatraṃ vajranābhaṃ biṃbanābhaṃ sahasrakam
gajāhvaṃ ca gajākāraṃ madhye tu samalaṅkṛtam
bahirdvādaśabhiḥ sūryaiḥ sūryākrāṃtaṃ prakīrtitam
śekharī tripuṭaṃ caiva śatapatraṃ ca prakramāt
cintāmaṇiṃ kuṃkumāṃśaṃ khātaṃ ca harivallabham
pañcasiṃhāsanasthaṃ ca pañcasiṃhāsanaṃ viduḥ
tadvadvṛṣāsanaṃ jñeyaṃ śikhirūpaṃ śikhidhvajam
nārasiṃhaṃ padmagarbhaṃ kapotāsyaṃ tathā bhavet
gāruḍaṃ merugarbhaṃ ca nīlakaṇṭhaṃ narākṛtim
śatakratugajārūḍhaṃ śrībiṃbanavasūtrakam
aṣṭāsramaṣṭakoṇādyaṃ bahiḥ padmavanaṃ kṛtam
kāmadvayena puṭitaṃ sahasraṃ padmaveṣṭitam
aṣṭa patrāṇi vai meruṃ sumeruṃ tadviparyaye
mahāmahāmerupṛṣṭhaṃ śatatrayacchadairvṛtam
chidravyaktiṃ pravakṣyāmi yathā mānena bho dvijāḥ
vasu dig viṃśakaiścaiva catvāriṃśat śatārdhakam
daṃḍiśravaṇasaṃpanna mākāśaṃ vasusaṃmitam
śataviṃśādhikaṃ caiva dalāni tadanantaram
śuklaraktaṃ cāṣṭavaṇairbiṃboṣṭhaṃ paripūrayet
śuklena paṅkajaṃ tatra paścātkuryāttriveṣṭanam
sthaṃḍile kuśahaste ca pūrvavadveṣṭayetkramāt
vasu pañcakalā pañcaviṃśakaṃ tannapatrakāt
catvāriṃśattataḥ paścā daṣṭottaraśataṃ bhavet
śuklaṃ śoṇaṃ tathā pītaṃ śyāmaśuklairanaṃtaram
vilome dalasandhīni śākte śaive tu ṣaṭpuram
veṣṭayetpaṃcavarṇena śuklādīni samaṃtataḥ
raktapītaiḥ samāstīrya koṇāñchuklena pūrayet
maṃḍalaṃ biṃbarājasya aṣṭottaradalairvṛtam
vasupañcaśaktiviṃśaccatvāriṃśacchatārddhakam
tryṛtupatraṃ suvṛttaṃ syādvṛttayuktaṃ sabilvakam
catvāriṃśaddvayaṃ caiva gaganena samāvṛtam
śataṃ viṃśādhikaśataṃ dviśataṃ viṃśamuttamam
veṣṭanāṃse ca triśataṃ prakramādatha vardhayet
navaviṃśaṃ kalpayettu catuḥsūtrāṇi pātayet
pītena retapuḥṭitā madhye śuklaṃ vibhāvyate
sarvā rekhāśca śuklena pauṣṭike pītamādiśet
saśāṃtike na yoktavyaṃ kāme raktaṃ vinirdiśet
aiśānyāṃ cottare bhāge guroḥ pītaṃ tu paṅkajam
pūrvasyāṃ diśi śukrasya paṅkajaṃ śubhravarṇakam
vāruṇe tu śanaiḥ kṛṣṇaṃ nairṛtyāṃ dhūmravarṇakam
vāyavyāṃ diśi saṃyojya paṅkajaṃ vilikhettataḥ
bahiḥ pañcarajaiḥ kāryaṃ yuvadurgavibhūṣitam
pūrvapaścimadigbhāge śuklaṃ syāddvāradeśataḥ
pañcābjamaṇḍalaṃ jñeyaṃ catuḥsvastikabhūṣitam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge dvitīyoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
na kuryāddakṣiṇāhīnaṃ mānahīnaṃ na kārayet
amānena hato yajñastasmānmānaṃ praśasyate
ācāryahotṛbrahmāṇo vidhijñaḥ sahakartṛkaḥ
yasya yajñe pāpakaśca jātihīnaḥ praveśayet
aśītibhirvarāṭaiśca paṇa ityabhidhīyate
taistu ṣoḍaśabhirjñeyaṃ purāṇaṃ saptabhistu taiḥ
rājataiścāṣṭabhiḥ svarṇaṃ yajñādau dakṣiṇā smṛtā
mahārāme dvisauvarṇaṃ kūpe svarṇārdhameva ca
tulasyāmalakīyāge suvarṇaikaṃ pracakṣate
yakṛlloke ca sauvarṇaṃ lakṣe svarṇaṃ catuṣṭayam
prāsādasya samutsarge aṣṭādaśa suvarṇakāḥ
taḍāge puṣkariṇyāṃ ca ardhārdhaṃ pari kīrtitam
mahādāne ca dīkṣāyāṃ vṛṣotsarge ca sattamāḥ
jīvataśca vṛṣotsarge gayāśrāddhe tathaiva ca
daṃpatyośca vṛṣotsarge mānamekamudāhṛtam
rājñaḥ karagrahe caiva dīkṣāyāṃ dāna karmaṇi
aśītirattikaṃ svarṇaṃ śravaṇe bhāratasya ca
grahayāge pratiṣṭhāyāṃ suvarṇaśatarattikaḥ
devānāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca dānaṃ yasya prakalpitam
tasyaiva deyaṃ taddānaṃ sāṃgopāṃgaṃ sadakṣiṇam
nānāsya kiñciddātavyaṃ saṃgabhaṃgo bhavedyataḥ
gṛhī tu kṛtvā yaddānaṃ tadā tasya ṛṇī bhavet
yajñeṣu home yaddravyaṃ kāṣṭhamājyādikaṃ ca yat
tannāyakasya pūjāyāṃ dravyamāhurvinirmitam
anādidevatārcāyāṃ pūjāsnānādikarmaṇi
pratyakṣaṃ dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādyajñadānavratādike
adakṣiṇaṃ naiva kāryaṃ prakuryādbhūridakṣiṇam
ato dattaṃ purā dattaṃ dātavyaṃ caiva saṃprati
parasvodārabuddhīnāṃ sā sā hi dakṣiṇā bhavet
dattāni vidhivatpuṃsāṃ devadānāni yāni hi
dāsīdāsagavādīni manasā yāni karhi cit
ekasyānekadānaṃ ca dadetkaścitpṛthakpṛthak
varaṇaṃ ca kadā kuryāttantre kuryācca dakṣiṇām
ratnasya dakṣiṇā deyā kāṃcanaṃ samudāhṛtam
bhūmerbhūmirdakṣiṇā syādvastrasya vastradakṣiṇā
pānīyasya tu pānīyaṃ vrīhīṇāṃ vrīhidakṣiṇā
gajasya dakṣiṇā chāgo hyaśvasya meṣa īritaḥ
paśūnāṃ ca catuṣpādā devasya devadakṣiṇā
yajño mānasya ṣaḍbhāgo dviguṇaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
ācāryasyaiva bhāgaikaṃ yajamānaḥ pradāsyati
pāpakaistu kalatrāṇāṃ bhāgaikaṃ tadanaṃtaram
pātrāṇāmṛtvigādīnāṃ bhāgatrayamudāhṛtam
ācāryādyaṃśataḥ kaścitkṣīṇavittaṃ samāharet
amūlyaṃ vargamūlyaṃ yadbhavedvai dakṣiṇottamā
mānāśaktau tu yajñānāṃ yaddeyaṃ yajñasiddhaye
devatā pustakaṃ ratnaṃ gāvo dhānyaṃ tilāstathā
nameruphalapuṣpāṇi deyānyetāni sarvataḥ
catuścakrāṃkito yastu sāṃdro vṛtto janārdanaḥ
śvetaliṃgaṃ ratnaliṃgamindranīlādikaṃ ca yat
dakṣiṇāvartaśaṃkhaṃ ca harivaṃśastathā khilaḥ
kapilo nīlavṛṣabhaḥ somadhānyaṃ tathaiva ca
amūlyānyāhuretāni dattvānantaphalāni ca
svarṇapādo bhavenmūlyaṃ śālagrāmasya dakṣiṇā
kṣudraliṃge svarṇamūlyaṃ pādārdhaṃ śrīdharepi ca
anantonantamityuktaṃ pādārdhaṃ bāṇaliṅgake
yathā pustakamātreṇa svarṇa pādārdhamiṣyate
jyotiṣerdhaṃ suvarṇasya rajatārdhaṃ vṛṣe tathā
harivaṃśe ślokaśate svarṇamekaṃ prakīrtitam
kapilāyāṃ suvarṇārdhaṃ dhenumātre purāṇakam
prāyaścittavidhau jñeyaṃ dhenumātraṃ purāṇakam
purāṇatritayaṃ cānye vīryahīne dvayaṃ bhavet
kṛṣṇe vṛṣe ṣaṭpurāṇaṃ śvete navapurāṇakam
dvātriṃśacca purāṇaṃ syādvṛṣe nīle tathaiva ca
nameroḥ praticakre ca dvādaśa svarṇarattikāḥ
mūlyaṃ śrīphalamātreapi purāṇatritayaṃ bhavet
etānyāhuḥ praśastāni mūlayoge paraṃ viduḥ
iti śrībhaviṣpe mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge mūlyakathane tṛtīyoa dhyāyaḥ
mūlyadānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
pūrṇapātramatho vakṣye yajñe sādhāraṇeapi ca
kāmahome bhavenmuṣṭirmuṣṭayoṣṭau tu kuñcikā
ekaika kuñcimānena kuryātpātrāṇi vai sadā
pātrāṇi ca pṛthakkṛtvā sthāpayeddvāradeśataḥ
siddhānāṃ khaḍgadhārāṇāṃ pratyekasya dinakramāt
kuṇḍānāṃ kuḍmalānāṃ ca vedanaṃ yādṛśaṃ śṛṇu
mahāsiṃhāsane pañca daśapātre tadardhakam
sahasrāre merupṛṣṭhe turyaraupyavṛṣādhikam
vṛṣe gale ca vṛṣabhaṃ śeṣe raupyasahasrakam
mahākuṇḍe tu dviguṇaṃ vṛtte raupyaṃ nivedayet
yonikuṇḍe dadeddhenumaṣṭārdhasvarṇamāṣakam
ṣaḍasre tu tadardhaṃ syādyāge māṣadvayaṃ bhavet
dāraṇe hastamātraṃ syātsvarṇakṛṣṇakalaṃ bhavet
iṣṭikākaraṇe caiva pratyahnā syātpaṇadvayam
khaṇḍe daśavarāṭaṃ syādbṛ hanmāne tu kākiṇī
taḍāge puṣkariṇyāṃ ca khanane prathamāṃgake
saptahastamite kuṇḍe niṣṭhe ābaddhamātrakam
purāṇasya ca ekāṃśaṃ vetanaṃ parikīrtitam
bṛhatkūpasya nirmāṇe pratyahaṃ ca paṇadvayam
śaile jñeyaṃ kāñcanasya rattikā gṛhakarmaṇi
koṣṭhe jñeyaṃ sārddhapaṇaṃ raṃgādiracite paṇam
vṛkṣāṇāṃ ropaṇe dadyātpratyahnā sārdhamāṣakam
setubaṃdhe ca paṃkile ca paṇadvayaṃ ca kākiṇī
paṇepaṇe tu tāmrasya dadyātpaṇacatuṣṭayam
ghaṭane kāṃsyasīsānāṃ paṇatrayamudāhṛtam
atha vā dinasaṃkhyānaṃ paṇaikaṃ ca sakākiṇi
suvarṇasya paṇaike tu purāṇaṃ ratnakuṭṭime
dinasaṃkhyāpaṇadvaṃdvaṃ ratnānāmatha kuḍmalam
maṇivedhe maṇau jñeyaṃ kākiṇī parikīrtitā
caturvarāṭamadhikaṃ sphāṭike maṇivedhane
kāṃsyatālasya nirmāṇe dhamane tu paṇatrayam
lākṣānirmāṇake kārye tadardhamapi kīrtitam
avivastrasya nirmāṇe syaṃdanaṃ daśakākiṇī
pidhānavastranirmāṇe tripaṇaṃ parikīrtitam
daśa kākiṇī ūrdhvādhastadvyaye paṇyavetanam
vaṃśājīvasya pratyahnā paṇasyārdhe sakākiṇi
śirasā tasya vapane vijñeyā daśa kākiṇī
saśmaśrunakhamāne tu pradadyātkākiṇīdvayam
nārīṇāmatha saṃskāre nakhacitrādirañjane
paṇānāṃ turyakaṃ dadyātsīmaṃtasyālake tathā
padacitre tu sārddhaṃ syādgrīvāṇāṃ guhyadhāraṇe
dhānyānāṃ ropaṇe caiva dinaike paṇa vetanam
lavaṇe tu tathā deyā guvākānāṃ ca ropaṇe
daṇḍapatrasya saṃskāre maricānāṃ tathaiva ca
paṇadvayaṃ varāṭānāmadhikaṃ daśameva tu
paṇatrayaṃ cakrapaṇe mahiṣāṇāṃ paṇādhikam
narāṇāṃ vāhane caiva paṇaikaṃ daśa kākiṇī
dāsīnāṃ gardabhānāṃ ca adhikaṃ kākiṇīdvayāt
sadyaḥ prakṣālaneapyardhaṃ dinādāvadhikaṃ bhaved
mṛttikānāṃ samuddhāraṃ kuddāle cekṣupīḍane
vetanaṃ puṣpasaṃskāre sahasraṃ daśakākiṇī
kākiṇī sraṅnibaddhe ca dviguṇaṃ kaṇṭhamālikā
abaddhe dvyaṃgulaṃ yāvanmuṇḍamālā prakīrtitā
hastatraye kaṇṭhamālā ānābhi kamalāvadhi
kākiṇīkatrayaṃ caiva nirmāṇe dvijasattamāḥ
mālatyāśca tulasyāśca jātiyūthyośca sattamāḥ
yāmeyāme raupyamāṣaṃ snehe caiva tu kākiṇī
sārdhāṃgulapramāṇena vastravartiṃ vidurbudhāḥ
ṣaḍaṃgulena dairghyaṃ ca na nyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ bhavet
pañcaviṃśatibhiḥ saṃkhyā taṃtubhirdvijasattamāḥ
pañcāṅgulena mānena kartavyaḥ susamāhitaḥ
svarṇadhāre hato rājā rajate sarvakāmadaḥ
tāmre cāyuḥkṣayakaramāyase durgatipradaḥ
dīpādhāraṃ kāṃsyamayaṃ tathārītimayasya ca
daśāṅgadhūpake mūlyaṃ viṃśake tu paṇatrayam
dvādaśakāṃguleapyardhavartiṃ dhūpāya vartayet
haste paṃcapramāṇaṃ ca vastraiḥ kuryācca vartikām
pañcaviṃśatibhirvā yaḥ sa mahāvartirucyate
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge caturthoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kalaśānāṃ vinirṇayam
yasyārpite ca māṃgalye yātrāsiddhiśca jāyate
saptāṅgaṃ kalaśe jñeyaṃ pañcāṅgamatha vā punaḥ
vārimātreṇa saṃpūrṇe na sā siddhiḥ prajāyate
atha vākṣatapuṣpeṣu devamāvāhya pūjayet
vaṭasyāśvatthavṛkṣasya dhātakībilvakasya ca
sauvarṇā rājatā vāpi tāmrādyā mṛnmayāstathā
kalaśāḥ kramaśaḥ proktā yathāvittānusārataḥ
abhedyāḥ suṣamāḥ plakṣāḥ sarve ādyāḥ supūritāḥ
niśchidrā ṛjavaścaiva secanānyekakarṣakaḥ
eka triṃśāṅgulaṃ kuryātkālāhe dviguṇaṃ śatam
mukhaṃ cāṣṭāṃgulaṃ tasya dvyaṃgule ca varārthite
taijasaiḥ kārayenmānaṃ mṛnmaye mānamucyate
kalaśasthāpanaṃ vakṣye yatra sannihitāḥ surāḥ
yajñe sādhāraṇaṃ vakṣye yadvidhānaṃ yathāmatam
svastikopari vinyāse saṃpūrṇasyārdhamānake
turyasūtrāṇi matimānpañca pūrvāyatanāni ca
mārjayetsvastikākāraṃ turyamātraṃ yathā bhavet
svastikaṃ jāyate tatra kalaśānāṃ tathāsanam
syonā pṛthivīti maṃtreṇa kuryādbhūbhiparigraham
madhyamānānikābhyāṃ ca nyasyetpātālasaṃmukham
ṛṣirnārāyaṇoasya syādgāyatrī devatā raviḥ
ājighraṃ kalaśaṃ mahyāṃ sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tataḥ
kaniṣṭhāṃguṣṭhakaṃ tyaktvā kumbhāgre udareapi ca
ājighrasya ca mantrasya ṛṣirbharga udāhṛtaḥ
paṃktiśchandaśca uddiṣṭo devatā viṣṇuravyayaḥ
paṃcanadyetimantreṇa kṣipedgaṅgājalaṃ tataḥ
devatā paramā triṣṭubdevatā somabhāvitaḥ
yāḥ phalinīti maṃtreṇa pradadyātsaphalākṣatam
yāḥ phalinīti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ kamalasaṃjñakaḥ
triṣṭupchando gaṇapatirdevatā parikīrtitā
jīvaṃtī pīvaraṃ caiva phalānyetāni varjayet
hiraṇyagarbheti ṛcā pañcaratnāni nikṣipet
ṛṣirhiraṇyagarbhosya chandastriṣṭubudāhṛtam
amṛtīkaraṇaṃ kuryāddaivaśulbanameva ca
varuṇasya tveti ṛṣirvaruṇāṃtare yojayet
śrīśca te iti mantreṇa dadyātpuṣpaṃ sacandanam
kāṇḍāditi ca mantreṇa dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ punaḥ
vrīhayaśceti mantreṇa pañca vrīhīṃśca nikṣipet
tilāśca māṣā mudgāśca śyāmākāḥ śālayaḥ smṛtāḥ
pañca dhānyagaṇaḥ proktaḥ sarvāriṣṭaniṣūdanaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīyabhāge pañcamoadhyāyaḥ cha
māsavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
atha māsāśrayaṃ karma kartuṃ māsanirūpaṇam
cāndraḥ sauraḥ sāvanaśca nākṣatraśca tathāparaḥ
triṃśatā divasairmāsaḥ sāvanaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
nākṣatramāsoaśvinyādirevatyanto hi viśrutaḥ
rāśestriṃśadbhāgakālaḥ kālastvekasya bhāsvataḥ
ahorātraṃ tu tannaivaṃ saureapi bhāgamānataḥ
saure cāndre tūpagaṇau triṃśadbhāge tvadarśanāt
sāvanā divasā grāhyā ṛṣīṇāṃ samaye gṛhe
atibhāgavyavasthāyāṃ prāyaścittakriyāsu ca
mantropāsanakārye ca annasya prāśane śiśoḥ
karasya grahaṇe rājño vyavahāreṣu māḥsu ca
yajñeṣu dinasaṃ khyāyāṃ grāhyo māsastu sāvanaḥ
sauramāso vivāhādau yadādyaiḥ supragṛhyate
cāndrastu pārvaṇe grāhyo vārṣikeṣvaṣṭakāsu ca
śrāddheṣu tithikāryeṣu tithyukteṣu vrateṣu ca
nākṣatraḥ somapādīnāmāryabhāgavicāraṇe
karagrahavidhau rājñāṃ nāyaṃ sarvajanākṛtiḥ
citrānakṣatrayogena caitrī sā pūrṇimā smṛtā
sa ca tithyātmako māsaścāndraḥ śravaṇabhāskaraḥ
cāndraścaitryaṃtiko māso mukhyaścaitrādisaṃjñakaḥ
mukhyaḥ śuklādidarśāṃto māso lākṣaṇiko mataḥ
caitrādyāścāndramāsā ye dvādaśāpi tu yogataḥ
viśākhayādyeṣu yā vā tathā bhādrapadena vā
yatra na pūrṇimāyogo māsaḥ sa syādvināśakaḥ
tathā ca māsasāmānye yogenāyaṃ bhavetkvacit
yadi varṣasahasrānte tadakṣeṇaiva pūrṇimā
daṇḍadvaye bhuktaśeṣe na bhuñjīta kadācana
atikramyāparāṃ bhoktuṃ tithiṃ yatra ubhāvapi
sa cādhiko yato māsastataḥ syādadhimāsakaḥ
samarātriṃ divaṃ kṛtvā vaivasvatapurīgatim
gaśe rāśyaṃtare sūryo yāvadgacchati bhānumān
vardhate tithayo yāvattulāṃ yāti divā karaḥ
tulādirāśiṣaṭke tu na varddhate kadācana
svabhāvātsamagatyā tu yataḥ saṃkramate raviḥ
saṃcayamānātvekaikā pratimāsaṃ vivarddhate
sa cāndro malino māsaḥ koṇapādyaiḥ samīhitaḥ
bhuktocchiṣṭā tu tanmāsādasaṃspṛṣṭadivākaraḥ
yadā saṃkramate laṃghya tadā jñeyo malimlucaḥ
sārdhavarṣadvaye pūrṇe patatyevaṃ niśākaraḥ
parityaktāśca yāvaṃtyo vyutkramiṇyaśca yāḥ punaḥ
nirmamaṃ malinaṃ māsaṃ pretānāṃ ca hitāya ca
ataḥ pretakriyāḥ sarvāḥ kāryā malimluceapi ca
tadidānīṃ pravakṣyāmi kathitaṃ ca prasaṃgataḥ
yacchrāddhaṃ pretasaṃbaṃdhi sarpiḍīkaraṇāvadhi
malamāseapi tatkāryaṃ viśi naṣṭi sapiṃḍanam
tadā trayodaśe māsi kartavyaṃ tatsapiṃḍanam
varjyaṃ māsikayā śrāddhamekaṃ tasmiṃstrayodaśe
triṃśatā ghaṭikaiḥ śrāddhaṃ vardhateadyāpi saṃmitam
upavāsādikaṃ karma sīmantonnayanaṃ tathā
ārtavarjaṃ puṃsavanaṃ putrādimukhadarśanam
malamāsepi kurvīta nṛpāṇāmabhiṣecanam
vratāraṃbhaṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ ca cūḍākarma ca mekhalām
maṃtropāsāṃ rahasyaṃ ca mahādānaṃ sumaṅgalam
vivāhaṃ ca gṛhāraṃbhaṃ praveśaṃ navaveśmanaḥ
upagrahaṃ gavādīnāmāśramāṃtarasaṃkramam
dīrghamātrāsu nejyaṃ vai tīrthayātrāvasecanam
varṣavṛddhivṛṣotsargakanyā dvirnayanādi ca
yajñaṃ ca kāmikaṃ vidvānmalamāse vivarjayet
pādāstaṃ ca mahāstaṃ ca dvividhaṃ cāstamasya tu
pṛthivyāmeva pādāstaṃ bhaveddvādaśa vatsarān
ūnapañcāśadadhikaṃ divasānāṃ śatadvayam
pratīcyāmuditaḥ kāvyo dṛśyo bhavati sarvadā
ekarkṣe guruṇā yukto yāvattiṣṭhati bhārgavaḥ
malamāsavatkarmāṇi prāhustyājyāni sarvaśaḥ
ṛkṣabhede tvekarāśau saṃparke yadi vānayoḥ
guro rāhorapi tathā tyajedvidvānna saṃśayaḥ
siṃhe rāśau sthite sūrye jīve cāstamupāgate
heyāni yāni karmāṇi niṣiddhāni malimluce
dvirāṣāḍha iti khyāto gauṇe śabdavivartanāt
āṣāḍhakīrtanaṃ kāryamevaṃ varṣāṃtareapi ca
āṣāḍhadvayasaṃyuktapūrṇamāsīdvayaṃ tathā
yugmakarkaṭayo rāśyo dvirāṣāḍhastadā bhavet
bhavedgauṇo dvirāṣāḍho rāśistatraiva saṃyute
karkaṭe śayanaṃ kuryādāgamiṣyaṃ paratrake
durgotthānaṃ tulāyāṃ tu viṣṇurnidrāṃ jahātyasau
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ṣaṣṭhoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
daivaṃ vā paitṛkaṃ karma kālamāśritya vartate
kāle tānyeva karmāṇi phalaṃ yacchaṃti kurvatām
vyayo vā mukhyabhāvena phaladaḥ karmaśālinām
kālastu guṇabhāvena sarvakālāśritā kriyā
na kālena vinā kiñcittriṣu lokeṣu jāyate
ataḥ kālaṃ pravakṣyāmi nimittaṃ karmaṇāmiha
teapi kālāḥ pakṣamāsarāśivarṣāṃtareapi ca
tithyādikālabhāveṣu niṣiddhaṃ nihitaṃ hi tat
kālabhāgo niḥsahāyo yeapi syuḥ karmasādhanāḥ
tithau pūrvāhṇavyāpinyāṃ kurvīta karma vaidikam
ekoddiṣṭaṃ tu madhyāhnavyāpinyāṃ hi samācaret
parāhṇavyāpinīṃ prāpya tithiṃ kuryāttu pārvaṇam
na tu pūrvāhṇamadhyāhnaparāhṇeṣu yathocitam
eko hi kālaḥ prātastu vṛddhiśrāddhādisādhane
nāpekṣate sāhāyyaṃ tattithyādiviṣuvādiṣu
devebhyo brahmaṇā dattaḥ pūrvāhṇastithibhiḥ saha
pitṛbhyo hyaparāhṇastu pārvaṇaṃ tu paraṃ vinā
pūrvāhṇamātrasaṃprāptau tato devānprapūjayet
pūrvāhṇasparśamātreapi tithikhaṇḍena cārpayet
kharvā darpā tathā hiṃsrā tithiśca trividhā bhavet
hiṃsrā tu kṣayajā jñeyā kālabhedena gṛhyate
kharvā darpā pare grāhyā hiṃsrā grāhyā tu pūrvataḥ
śuklapakṣe parā grāhyā kṛṣṇe pūrvā praśasyate
yathāvāste ravirbhāti ghaṭikā daśa vāpi vā
sā tithistadahorātraṃ vyapadeśyā na cetarā
śukle vā yadi vā kṛṣṇe kharvā darpā tithiśca yā
yayāstaṃ savitā yāti pitṛkārye ca sā tithiḥ
śrāddhakālādikaṃ yatra tatra śrāddhaṃ vidhīyate
amāvāsyapārvaṇe ca sā tithiḥ pitṛpūjane
amāvasyāmṛtasyaiva pārvaṇaṃ yatra kutracit
śuklapakṣe ca kṛṣṇe ca yo yogaḥ parapūrvayoḥ
pūrvedyurvā paredyurvā trisaṃdhyavyāpinī tithiḥ
sā pūjyā ca svakṛtyeṣu pakṣayorubhayorapi
pūjyā hi vyastaṃ saṃtyajya pūrvaṃ caikādaśīyugam
dvitīyā vahninā yuktā caturthī paṃcamīyutā
etā upoṣyāstithayaḥ puṇyāḥ syurdharmavedibhiḥ
etadvyastāstu puṇyāni ghnaṃti pūrvakṛtānyapi
bāṇena viddhā yā ṣaṣṭhī munividdhā tathāṣṭamī
daśamyekādaśīviddhā trayodaśyā caturdaśī
amāvāsyā bhūtaviddhā nopoṣyā munināpi ca
haṃti putrakalatrāṇi dhanāni samupoṣitā
viddhā ye nābhinindyāḥ syuryuktāstenābhinanditāḥ
tāmastāṃ tu tithiṃ prāpya yugmānyapūjyatāmiyuḥ
yugmāni ca divāyoge grāhyāṇi vyastaniṃdanam
rātriyogaṃ vināpi syādekādaśyādikaṃ vratam
naktaṃ jāgaraṇaṃ caiva vināyogeapi śasyate
ekādaśyupavāsaṃ tu dvādaśīyogataścaret
divāyoge tu saṃpūrṇāṃ tyajedubhayapūrvataḥ
rātriyoge tu saṃpūrṇā sopāsyaikādaśī sadā
saptamī śukla pakṣeapi pūjyā ṣaṣṭhyā samanvitā
niśi tu syādyadā ṣaṣṭhī saptamī navamī divā
upoṣya kevalāṃ ṣaṣṭhīṃ toṣayedbhāskaraṃ naraḥ
evaṃ trayodaśīṃ kṛṣṇāṃ vidhiprāptāṃ vinā dvijāḥ
upoṣya pārvatīnāthaṃ toṣayedyaśca kevalam
divā trayodaśīyuktā kṛṣṇopoṣyā caturdaśī
pareṇāpi caturdaśyā na tu kuryādamātithau
trisaṃdhyavyāpinī prāpya yadi kuryādupauṣaṇam
pāraṇaṃ tu sinīvālyāṃ caturdaśyāmupoṣayet
caturdaśīmatikramya sinīvālyāṃ tu pāraṇāt
vratāni tasya naśyaṃti prākṛtāni caturdaśīm
saptamī lalitā bhādre śaktotthānaṃ ca vāruṇī
pūjyāścaitāḥ parāḥ kuryāttrisaṃdhyavyāpinīṣvapi
saṛkṣā ṛkṣayoge tu ṛkṣābhāve parā yutā
ṛkṣābhāve parā grāhyā trisaṃdhyavyāpinīṣvapi
śrāvaṇe cādyapāde tu praśastā śakrapūjane
abhāve cottarāṣāḍhā dhaniṣṭhā ca viśiṣyate
daṇḍārdhaṃ daṇḍamekaṃ vā tadardhaṃ palameva vā
udaye saṃyutā grāhyā sā tithiścottamā bhavet
trisaṃdhyavyāpinīṃ hitvā pūjyā śuklāṣṭamī parā
śuklaikādaśyamāvāsyāsaṃkrāntyāṃ śrāddhavāsare
narāśvagogajādīnāṃ vāhanātpātakī bhavet
karturgomahiṣādīnāṃ gardabhoṣṭrakharasya ca
na vāhayeddāsa dāsī vāhanenāsti dūṣaṇam
grāmāṃtare na doṣaḥ syāddivi nadyaṃtareapi ca
tatra gomahiṣādīnāṃ vāhane nāsti dūṣaṇam
kuryādaṃbughaṭaśrāddhaṃ na kālaniyamaṃ kvacit
na cānnaniyamaṃ kuryādaśmapātraṃ ca varjayet
na yojayenmṛnmayaṃ ca śūdrāṇāṃ mṛnmaye vidhiḥ
nivedayecca māsāṃte mṛnmayaṃ vṛkṣamūlake
parvaśrāddhe daivalakaṃ tathā raṇḍāśramaṃ tyajet
mātāpitṛparityāgī tailahavyādivikrayī
catvāriṃśadutsavānāṃ sāṣṭānāṃ ca caredyadi
striyā vimucyate kaścitsa tu raṇḍāśramī mataḥ
aṣṭacatvāriṃśadabdaṃ vayo yāvanna pūryate
putrabhāryāviyuktasya nāsti yajñādhikāritā
yāṃ tithiṃ samanuprāpya samudeti divākaraḥ
snānādhyayanadāneṣu sā tithiḥ sakalā smṛtā
yayāstaṃ savitā yāti kṛṣṇapakṣe tu sā tithiḥ
pitṛrṇāṃ sakalā jñeyā snānadānādikarmasu
saptamī śuklapakṣe yā yāvadicchecca khaṇḍitā
ādyabhāge raveḥ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ parādau yāṣṭamīyutā
yadyakhaṇḍā bhavetsaiva tadā jñeyā bhavātmikā
māghamāsena sāpyevaṃ pūrveṇa ravitoṣiṇī
manvaṃtarā pareṇaiva snānapānādikarmasu
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge saptamodhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
tithīnāṃ pravarā yasmādbrahmaṇā samudāhṛtā
kārtikāśvayujoścaitre māghe cāpi viśeṣataḥ
snānaṃ dānaṃ daśaguṇaṃ śivaviṣṇvośca pūjanam
agnimiṣṭvā ca kṛtvā ca pratipadyāmiti smṛtam
haviṣā sarvadhānyāni prāpnuyādīpsitaṃ dhanam
bṛhaspatau dvitīyāyāṃ śuklāyāṃ vidhipūjanam
kṛtvā naktaṃ samaśnīyāllabhate bhūtimīpsitām
dvitīyā yā tu vipreṃdāstāmupoṣya hariṃ yajet
yāmupoṣya na vaidhavyaṃ prayāti strī na saṃśayaḥ
amūlyaśayanaṃ māsaṃ daṃpatī pratipūjayet
vāsobhirgandhapuṣpaiśca nānābhakṣyaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
vaiśākhe śuklapakṣe tu tṛtīyāyāṃ tathaiva ca
gaṃgātoye naraḥ snātvā mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ
svātiyuktatṛtīyāyāṃ vaiśākhe tu viśeṣataḥ
māghe tu rohiṇīyuktā vṛṣe cāśvayuje tathā
tasyāṃ yaddīyate kiñcittadakṣayamudāhṛtam
viśeṣato haviṣyānnaṃ modakādisamāyutam
toyadānaṃ viśeṣeṇa praśaṃsaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ
budhaśravaṇasaṃyuktā tṛtīyā yadi labhyate
tasyāṃ snānopavāsādyamakṣayaṃ parikīrtitam
śivā śāṃtā sukhā caiva caturthī trividhā smṛtā
sāpi bhādrapade śuklā śivaloke supūjitā
tasyāṃ snānaṃ tapo dānamupavāso japastathā
bhavetsahasraguṇitaṃ śrāddhaṃ bhavati cākṣayam
gaṇeśe kārayetpūjāṃ modakādibhirādarāt
śrāvaṇe māsi pañcamyāṃ śuklapakṣe viśeṣataḥ
snāpayennavanāgāṃśca gaṃdhatoyaiḥ sugaṃdhibhiḥ
teṣāṃ kule prayacchaṃti abhayaṃ prāṇarakṣaṇam
supte janārdane kṛṣṇapañcamyāṃ bhavanāṃgaṇe
pūjayenmanasādevīṃ vāmāṃ snuhīti saṃśrayām
pūjayitvā naro devīṃ na sarpabhayamāpnu yāt
yeyaṃ bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhī ṣaṣṭhī ca dvijasattama
snānadānādikaṃ tasyāṃ sarvamakṣayamucyate
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ phalāśano viprā viśeṣānmāghakārtike
śuddhe pakṣe ca saptamyāṃ yadā saṃkramate raviḥ
mahājayā tadā syādvai saptamī bhāskarapriyā
aparājitā tu bhādrasya mahāpātakanāśinī
śuklā vā yadi vā kṛṣṇā ṣaṣṭhī vā saptamī tu vā
ravivāreṇa saṃyuktā tithiḥ puṇyatamā smṛtā
āśvinasya sitāṣṭamyāmaṣṭādaśabhujāṃ yajet
kārttike śuklapakṣe vā mahāvibhavavistaraiḥ
āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi śuklāṣṭamyāṃ ca caṃḍikām
prātaḥ snātvārcayedbhaktyā rātrau saṃsnāpayeddvijāḥ
caitramāsi sitāṣṭamyāmaśokakusumairdvijāḥ
arcayenmṛnmayīṃ devīmaśokārthaṃ ca sarvadā
satyaṣṭamamuhūrte vā rohiṇīsahitāṣṭamī
śrāvaṇe māsi siṃhārke kvacitsāpi ca śasyate
ekādaśīnāṃ koṭīnāṃ vrataiśca labhate phalam
ato daśaguṇaṃ proktaṃ kṛtvaitatphalamāpnuyāta
kṛtvā vimucyate pāpātsaptakṛtyakṛtāṃ varaḥ
nāpi nakṣatradoṣoasti vāradoṣo na gaṇyate
trikālaṃ pūjayeddevaṃ divā rātrau viśeṣataḥ
ardharātre viśeṣeṇa puṣpairnānāvidhairapi
rātrisparśe yadi paraṃ rajanyāmapi cāṣṭamī
saptamī sārdhayāmaṃ ca rohiṇī vā na saṃspṛśet
prāgāraṃbhaṃ prakurvīta adhimātrādhike vratī
viśvanāthādidevānāṃ darśanaṃ prāgvivarjayet
yatra tatropavāsī syādyāmāṣṭakavrataṃ caret
yāmārdhaṃ tatparaṃ yāme pāraṇaṃ vicaredvratī
tatpare cāannajanyaṃ vā na kuryātpāraṇaṃ gṛhī
divāṣṭamyāṃ muhūrte vā prājāpatyena saṃyutam
tathāpi ca divākṛtyaṃ samāpya ca vrataṃ caret
muhūrtāṃte ca māsāṃte aṣṭamyāmapi rohiṇī
upavāse ca yo doṣaḥ pūjāhomaḥ praśasyate
navamyāṃ ca sadā pūjyāḥ pratimāseayutaṃ dvijāḥ
kārtikasya tu māsasya daśamī śuklapakṣikā
tasyāṃ yuktāśanā viprā brahmalokamavāpnuyuḥ
daśamī jyeṣṭhamāsasya sā ceddaśaharā smṛtā
āśvinasya mahāpuṇyā kārtike vijayā smṛtā
ekādaśī vrataparā sarvapāpapraṇāśinī
sarvapāpavinirmuktā yathā kurvaṃti mānavāḥ
ekādaśyāmupoṣyātha dvādaśyāṃ pāraṇaṃ caret
dvādaśa dvādaśīrhanti tasmāttathācaredbudhaḥ
pūrvedyurekādaśī pūrṇā parehani ca vardhate
vanavāsī parāṃ kuryātpūrvāṃ kuryādgṛhāśramī
ekādaśī dvādaśī tu tadopoṣyā parā tithiḥ
yadā tu pāraṇā yogyā dvādaśī nopatiṣṭhate
tadā pūrvaiva saṃgrāhyā tyājyā vṛddhā pareahani
ekādaśī kalāyuktā sakalā dvādaśī yadi
tatra kratusamaṃ puṇyaṃ trayodaśyāṃ tu pāraṇam
ekādaśī dvādaśī ca pareahani na labhyate
nopoṣyā sā mahādoṣā putrapautradhanakṣayāt
ekādaśī daśāviddhā dvādaśyāṃ liptikā yadā
dvādaśī pāraṇāyogyā vardhate cāpareahani
tadā dinadvaye tyājyā pāraṇaṃ ca niyogataḥ
ṣoḍaśīgrahaṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā dvādaśī luptapāraṇā
caṇḍātithau vrataṃ caiva haṃti puṇyaṃ purā kṛtam
trayodaśyāṃ yadvihitaṃ pāraṇaṃ na tu puṇyadam
gṛhāśramī na kuryādvā daśamīdvādaśīkṣayāt
tathāpi saṃparityajya dvādaśyāṃ samupāvaset
vajrālokanamātraṃ tu daśamī saṃviśedyadi
ekādaśī na bhoktavyā parā hyekādaśī tadā
tadā ceddaśamīviddhā samupoṣyā na dūṣaṇam
dvādaśyāmupavāsaṃ tu yaḥ karoti narottamaḥ
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra viṣṇuranāmayaḥ
upoṣya daśamīmitrāṃ mohādekādaśīṃ naraḥ
ravivāre śukravāre saṃkrāntyāṃ tu dinakṣaye
upavāsaṃ prakurvīta pāraṇaṃ tu vivarjayet
śuklāṃ vā yadi vā kṛṣṇāṃ pūrvasaṃkalpitāmapi
ekādaśīṃ sadā kuryānna vai kṛṣṇettarāṃ kvacit
naktena vartayetkṛṣṇāmiti śāstraviniścayaḥ
māse caikādaśī yatra labhyate śuklapakṣake
tatra kuryātkṛṣṇapakṣe parā tithirna gṛhyate
śrāvaṇī dvādaśī śuklā cāṃdrabhadre yadā harau
tatropoṣya hṛṣīkeśaṃ pūjayedvidhivannaraḥ
śrāvaṇe cāśvine caiva labhyate dvādaśīdine
śravaṇena samāyuktā mahatī sā prakīrtitā
puṣyeṇa drādaśīyuktā phālgune vijayā smṛtā
kārtike cetparityājyā māghe tu nārakī bhavet
yā bhādre vijayā proktā śravaṇena samāyutā
ekādaśyāmuttarato dvādaśī ca divānvitā
niśipūrṇā dvādaśī ca śravaṇenāpi saṃyutā
saphalā dvādaśī jñeyā upoṣyaiṣā mahāphalā
dvādaśyāṃ viṣṇuviddhāyāṃ vāsudevaṃ prapūjayet
kṛṣṇāyāṃ tu vrataṃ kuryādbahuduḥkhaṃ samācareta
dvādaśī kāmaviddhā cenmanyate nāpyupoṣaṇam
hanyātpurākṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ trayodaśyāmupoṣaṇam
prahareprahare snānaṃ śarvaryāṃ ca vidhīyate
pūjanaṃ cāgnikāryaṃ ca ṣaṭsu kāryaṃ vratī caret
ekādaśīṃ dvādaśīṃ ca prāpnoti śravaṇe yadi
ekādaśyāmupoṣyātha dvādaśyāmapyupāvaset
pāraṇaṃ tu trayodaśyāṃ dvādaśī cenna labhyate
āmiṣānnaṃ na bhuñjīta haviṣyānnena pāraṇam
yadā tu pāraṇāyogyā labhyate dvādaśī tadā
tasyāṃ nātikramo yuktastadabhāve trayodaśī
ekādaśī dvādaśī ca śravaṇarkṣeṇa saṃyutā
viṣṇuśṛṃkhalako nāma budhavāre viśiṣyate
daśamyāṃ saṃyato bhūtvā prātarekādaśīdine
kṛtvā tu saṅgame snānaṃ prahareprahare dvijāḥ
anena vidhinā kṛtvā vijayāyāṃ vratottamam
sarvapāpaṃ kṣayaṃ nītvā viṣṇuloke vasennaraḥ
caturyugānāṃ divyānāṃ yāvatsyādviṣṇurūpadhṛka
tretāyāṃ daśajanmāni madhyadeśeṣu bho dvijāḥ
tataśca bhārate varṣe vedavedāṃtasāravit
jāyate daśa janmāni tretāyāṃ brāhmaṇottamaḥ
bhādre māsi site pakṣe dvādaśyāṃ pṛthivīpatim
śatrumutthāpayetprāhṇe śubhalagne śubhakṣaṇe
śalyaśālmalikasyāpi saptaparṇīyakasya ca
eṣāmanyatamaṃ vṛkṣaṃ caṃpakasyārjunasya vā
bṛhatkadaṃbavṛkṣasya dvicatvāriṃśadaṃgulaiḥ
dvātriṃśadaṃgulairvāpi mānadvayamathāpi vā
trivyāyāmaṃ ca prathamaṃ dvāviṃśahastameva vā
hastaḥ ṣoḍaśavārasya gṛhasthasya viśiṣyate
aṣṭahastaṃ tu vaiśyasya śūdrasya pañcahastakam
ghanasārasamāyuktāṃ karpūramaṃḍanānvitām
raktavastraparicchannāṃ puṣpamālyairalaṃkṛtām
mañcasthāṃ kārayetpūjāṃ bhaktyā ca sudṛḍho naraḥ
kākādīnna spṛśejjātu vairapakṣe viśeṣataḥ
patākāyā nipāte tu rāṣṭrahāniṃ samādiśet
patāke nissṛte bhagne mahiṣāṇāṃ vināśanam
sthūṇāpāte ca bhagne vā cāśvahāniṃ samādiśet
grahāṇāṃ ca tribhāgena cāyutaṃ juhuyādbudhaḥ
ādityasyādbhutamidaṃ dvijapāte tu bho dvijāḥ
kapotapāte śukrasya kākādau bhaumamādiśet
bhūkaṃpe jāyate viṣṭaṃ guroradbhutamādiśet
kīṭaviddhe kṛte viprāścandrasyādbhutamādiśet
śivā ruvaṃti cāndrasya vānaro vā spṛśetkvacit
ketoradbhutamuddiṣṭaṃ bhūmikaṃpe tu te dvijāḥ
trayodaśīṃ sitāṃ prāpya puṣpairnānāvidhairapi
caitre māsi sitāṣṭamyāṃ śanau śatabhiṣā yadi
gaṃgāyā yadi labhyeta sūryagrahaśataiḥ samā
seyaṃ mahāvāruṇīti khyātā kṛṣṇatrayodaśī
asyāṃ snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca śrāddhaṃ vākṣayamucyate
madhumāse site pakṣe dambhabhañjī caturdaśī
tasyāṃ madanamūle ca akṣaraṃ kāmamarcayet
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ madanasya prabhāvataḥ
anantasya vrataṃ vakṣye sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
dvādaśyāṃ pūjite śakre dhvajake vāstuyaṣṭiṣu
kṛtvā darbhamayānantaṃ vāridhānyānvitaṃ tathā
yavagodhūmaśālīnāṃ cūrṇairnaikatamasya ca
kṛtvā pūpāhvayaṃ tasmai dadyādekaṃ śrutekṣitam
caturdaśasūtramayaṃ sūtraṃ kārpāsameva ca
ataḥ preta caturdaśyāṃ bhojayitvā tapodhanān
tataḥ pretakathāṃ śrutvā śākairnaktaṃ samācaret
caturdaśaṃ dvādaśaṃ vā saptamaṃ vāpi pañcamam
mānamātrādikaṃ kṛtvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
māghe māsi vaṭāpāyaḥ kasya pāpaṃ punīmahe
snātvā tatra caturdaśyāṃ samaye tārakāmaye
saṃbhavetphālgune māsi yā ca kṛṣṇā caturdaśī
śivarātririti khyātā sā jagatsarvakāmadā
tithiyoge ca śarvaryāṃ saṃpūrṇe vratamācaret
kāmaviddhā sā ca pūjyā rātriyoge caredvratī
atha vakṣyāmi caitrādimāse tu pūrṇimā yathā
mahācaitrīti sā jñeyā pūrṇimākṣayapuṇyadā
viśākhādiṣu bhedeṣu pūrṇacandro guruścaret
mahāvaiśākhikādyāstu pūrṇimā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ
mahājyaiṣṭhī viśeṣoayaṃ prājāpatye yathā raviḥ
gurupūrṇacandro jyeṣṭhāyāṃ mahājyaiṣṭhīti sā smṛtā
vināpi guruṇā candraḥ kṛttikā pūrṇimā tathā
tathā mahākārttikī sā tithiḥ puṇyatamā bhavet
rohiṇyāṃ tu sthitaścandraḥ paurṇamāsyāṃ tu kārttike
citrā vā yadi vā pūrṇā yadā syātpūrṇimātithiḥ
mahācaitrī tathāpi syādaśvamedhaphalapradā
raviṇā kṛttikāyogādravivāre ca pūrṇimā
mahācaitrī tathāpi syāddattasyākṣayakārikā
sarvamakṣayatāṃ yāti phalaṃ caivāśvamedhikam
pitarastarpitā yāṃti vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamakṣayam
bharaṇyāṃ kārttike māsi yadi syātpūrṇimā tithiḥ
gaṃgādvāre tu mahatī vaiśākhī puṇyadā smṛtā
śālagrāme mahācaitrī kṛtapuṇyā mahātithiḥ
gaṃgādvāre tu mahatī vaiśākhī puṇyadā smṛtā
puruṣottame mahājyaiṣṭhī mahāṣāḍhī tu śṛṃkhale
mahāśrāvaṇī kedāre mahāpuṇyatamā matā
mahābhādrī badaryāṃ ca kujoapi syānnarastathā
mahatī mārgaśīrṣe syādayodhyāyāṃ tathottare
mahāpauṣī puṇyatamā mahāmāghī prayāgataḥ
mahāphālgunī naimiṣe ca nirdiṣṭāḥ syurmahāphalāḥ
atra sma vihitaṃ karma śubhaṃ vā yadi vāśubham
āśvine paurṇamāsī tu kaumudīti prakīrtitā
asyāṃ candrodaye lakṣmīṃ pūjayedvidhivannaraḥ
nirvatayenna yaḥ śrāddhaṃ prabhāte paitṛkaṃ dvijaḥ
indukṣaye māsimāsi prāyaścittīyate tu saḥ
candrāśvine tu kṛṣṇāyāṃ pañcadaśyāṃ yathāvidhi
kṛtvā snānādikaṃ karma sopavāso dinaṃ nayet
pradoṣasamaye lakṣmīṃ pūjayitvā yathāvidhi
dīpavṛkṣānyathā vṛkṣāmllakṣmīprītyai samutsṛjet
nadītīre girau goṣṭhe śmaśāne vṛkṣamūlataḥ
dvirbhojanamamāvāsyāṃ na kartavyaṃ kadācana
śarvaryāṃ ca viśeṣeṇa māghaphālgunayornaraiḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāgeaṣṭamoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
vakṣye pravarasaṃtānaṃ yathākramamiti dvijāḥ
yadvinā vyatyayo yasmāttasmācchāstrānusārataḥ
pravaratrayaṃ kāśyapasya kāśyapāśāvanairdhruvam
mokunyāṃgirasabhāsyājjāmadagnyāplavāyanam
śāṃḍilyāsitadaivalāḥ pravaratrayameva ca
parāśarasya ca tathā svayaṃ śāṃbavaśiṣṭhakam
ātreyamācāryaṇasyābālapravarameva hi
arthakṣīramitrāvaruṇaṃ pañcamaṃ parikīrtitam
autathyasya ca vāśiṣṭhamaindre cakraṃ ca krauñcāyanaṃ tathā
autathyeti samākhyātaṃ māhiṣyaṃ cyavanaṃ tathā
urukaṃṭatrayaṃ vidyātkauśikasya trayaṃ tathā
yadgālo devarāṭ khyātaḥ kuśikādyāśca bho dvijāḥ
ghṛtakauśikasya kuśikā viśvāmitrāghamarṣaṇam
caṇḍakauśikasya ca tathā devarāṭ devarātakam
taruṃkaśākaṭāyanaḥ svayameva pravaratrayam
bhramadvayaṃ jaimineśca svayaṃ vāśiṣṭhameva ca
śaṃkhamāṃgirasacyavanaṃ śaṃkhabhasya trayaṃ matam
āplavāyaneti pāṭhīne eka eva tu sattamāḥ
kṛṣṇājinasya kṛṣṇājinaṃ viśvāmitrasya jaiminam
kātyāyanasya kātyāyanagārgyāyaṇatrayaṃ tathā
vātsyāyaneti vikhyātaṃ kuśikasya ca paṃcamam
amuṃ ca viśvāmitraṃ ca jāmadagnyāplavāyanam
gārgyasya gārgyasāmuṃca tathāṃgirasa eva ca
vaśiṣṭhasya ca vāsiṣṭhaṃ ca tathāṃgirasa eva ca
ye noktā ye apyavijñātāste proktāḥ kāśyapājjagat
iti śrībhaviṇye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīyabhāge navamoadhyāyaḥ cha
vāstuyāgavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
vāstuyāgamatho vakṣye balimaṇḍalapūrvakam
aṃkurārpaṇakaṃ kṛtvā madhye kuryācca maṃḍalam
trihastā piṃḍikā kāryā caturasrā udakplavā
madhye saṃmārjayedvidvānpādānnava yathākramāt
koṇe catuṣpadaṃ jñeyaṃ dikṣu tripadakaṃ kramāt
koṇe catuṣpadaṃ sthāpyaṃ catuṣkoṇe vibhāvayet
catuṣkoṇaṃ bahiḥ kuryātkoṇe cāpi catuṣṭayam
dvātriṃśacca bhavedbāhye cātaścāpi trayodaśa
catvāriṃśatpañcayutā militvā vāstudevatāḥ
śikhī caivātha parjanyo jayaṃtaḥ kuliśāyudhaḥ
sūryaḥ satyo vṛṣaścaiva ākāśaṃ vāyureva ca
pūṣā ca vitathaścaiva guhānyaśca yamastathā
gandharvo mṛgarājastu mṛgāḥ pitṛgaṇāstathā
asuraḥ paśupāśau ca rogo hi mokṣa eva ca
bahirdvādaśa ityetānīśānādīnyathākramam
īśānādicatuṣkoṇaṃ saṃsthitānpūjayedbudhaḥ
mitroatha rājayakṣmā ca saptamaḥ pṛthivīdharaḥ
aṣṭamastvāpavatsastu paridhau brahmaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
pūrvādiṣu tathā pūjyā gandhapuṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
militvā ūnapañcāśaduttamā vāstudevatāḥ
nānyatra yojayedviprāḥ prāsāde ca viśeṣataḥ
bahiḥ koṇe carakyādi carakaṃ ca vidārikām
pūtanāṃ ca tataḥ paścādvāyavye pāparākṣasīm
svaiḥsvairmaṃtraiśca gaṃdhādyaiḥ pūjayetkusumādinā
yathoktena baliṃ dadyātpāyasānnena vā punaḥ
devavarṇānatho vakṣye yathāvadanuvarṇitāḥ
pītaḥ śuklaśca dharmaśca pūṣā raktaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
śyāmaḥ śukraśca kṛṣṇaśca pītaḥ śuklo yathākramam
pīto bhṛṃgaḥ punaḥ śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śuklastathaiva ca
raktaḥ śuklaśca śoṇaśca kṛṣṇaraktastathaiva ca
dhūmrapīto raktapītaḥ śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaśca śyāmakaḥ
raktavarṇena dvātriṃśaddaśa varṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
śuklaśoṇaṃ punaḥ śvetaṃ siṃdūrābhaṃ prakīrtitam
pāṃḍurakuṃkumābhaṃ ca raktaṃ jñeyaṃ ca pītakam
śuklapītaṃ ca śvetaṃ ca gauraṃ cetyaṣṭavarṇakam
pītaṃ raktaṃ ca śyāmaṃ ca gauraṃ ceti catuṣṭayam
dharaṇīmadanaṃ vādye śaṃbhuvarṇādiprakramāt
madhyeṃte ūnapañcāśatsarvaṃ ca vāstukarmaṇi
catvāriṃśaddvārayutaṃ gṛhadevakuleapi ca
mahākūpe tathā śveto anyatrāpi praśasyate
sulipte ca śucau deśe sārdhahastapramāṇataḥ
daśa pūrvāyatā rekhā daśa caivottarāyatāḥ
ekādaśīpadaṃ kuryādrekhābhiḥ padakena tu
padasthānpūjayeddevāṃstriṃśatpañcādaśadeva tu
dvātriṃśadbāhyataḥ pūjyāḥ pūjyāgāre trayodaśa
madhye nava pade brahmā tasyāpyaṣṭau samīpagāḥ
caturdikṣu ṣaṭpadaṃ tu tripadaṃ tu catuṣpadam
padaikaṃ tu catuṣkoṇe eṣa vāstuvinirṇayaḥ
carakyādi tato hitvā catvāriṃśacca paṃcakam
aparaṃ maṇḍalaṃ vakṣye yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ
dvicatuṣkoṣṭhakairdikṣu yajetāryamaṇaṃ tataḥ
koṇeṣu koṣṭhadvaṃdveṣu bāhyādiparikīrtitam
sāvitraṃ savitāraṃ ca śakramindraṃ jayaṃ punaḥ
rudraṃ rudrajayaṃ caiva vāyuṃ jṛṃbhakameva ca
pilipicchaṃ ca medhāvī vidārī pūtanā tathā
kramādīśānaparyaṃtāṃ jayaṃtaḥ śakrabhāskarau
satyovṛṣāṃtarikṣau ca diśi prācyāmavasthitāḥ
agniḥ pūṣā ca vitadho yamaśca gṛharakṣakaḥ gaṃ
dharvo bhṛṃgarājaśca mṛgo dakṣiṇamāśritāḥ
nirṛtirdauvārikaśca sugrīvavaruṇau tataḥ
puṣpadaṃtasvarau śoṣarogau pratyagdiśi sthitāḥ
prāṇavāyuśca nāgaśca somo bhallāṭa eva ca
militvā ca tripañcāśattebhyaḥ pūrve baliṃ haret
piṇyākaiḥ paramānnairvā pūrvoktairvā yathā kramāt
śvetāśvavāhanaṃ divyaṃ kirīṭaiḥ svairvibhūṣitam
ākṛṣṇeneti mantrasya svarṇa ṛṣijagatīchandaḥ savitraryamaprītaye viniyogaḥ vivasvaṃtaṃ pītavarṇaṃ pītāmbaradharaṃ śubham
etātaviṣaṃtīti maṃtrasya kardama ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ kamalādevatāvivasvatprītaye viniyogaḥ
trinetraṃ tribhujaṃ caiva śvetāṃbaradharaṃ śubham
kayānaścīti maṃtrasya jayaṃta ṛṣirgāyatrī chandaḥ śaṅkaro devatā mitraprītaye viniyogaḥ
prītaṃ mahīdharaṃ dhyāyedvṛṣabhopari saṃsthim
sāvitrīṃ śvetavarṇāṃ ca sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutām
dvibhujāṃ pītavastrāṃ ca śvetasiṃhāsane sthitām
raktāmbaradharāṃ raktāṃ raktamālopaśobhitām
tadvarṣaṃ iti maṃtrasya gautama ṛṣirvirāṭ chandaḥ sūryo devatā savitṛprītaye viniyogaḥ
śakraṃ dhyāyetpītavarṇaṃ śuklakairāvatasthitam
sarvadevaiḥ stūyamānaṃ dvibhujaṃ pītavāsasam
rudraṃ dhyāyecchvetavarṇaṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhavigraham
nāgayajñopavītaṃ ca sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam
raktaśyāmāṃbaradharaṃ dvibhujaṃ raktavāsasam
īśāna iti maṃtrasya marīcirṛṣiḥ paṃkticchando vāyurdevatā apāṃ prītaye viniyogaḥ āpavatsaṃ pītavarṇaṃ meṣārūḍhaṃ caturbhujam
padmaśaṃkhadharaṃ vāme varābhayakaraṃ param
koṇasūtrasyobhayataḥ śvetakoṣṭhadvaye punaḥ
śarvaṃ dhyāyedraktavarṇaṃ vṛṣabhopari saṃsthitam
mālā svāheti maṃtrasya bhārgava ṛṣirgāyatrīchando mahādevo devatā śarvaprītaye viniyogaḥ
guhaṃ dhyāyetpītavarṇaṃ pītapadmāsanasthitama
nānābharaṇaśobhāḍhyaṃ kuṇḍalādyairalaṅkṛtam
vāto vāreti maṃtrasya kāśyapa ṛṣiranuṣṭupchando vāyurdevatā aryamaprītaye viniyogaḥ
dhyāyecca jambhakaṃ śvetaṃ dvibhujaṃ kuṭilānanam
devasya heti mantrasya paṃktiśchaṃdaḥ śacī devatā pilapicchaprītaye viniyogaḥ pītāṃ ca carakīṃ dhyāyedraktamālyairalaṃkṛtām
sucāruvadanāṃ bhavyāṃ guñjāhāropaśobhitām
śyāmāṃ vidārikāṃ dhyāyettrinetrāṃ ca caturbhujām
nānāgaṇayutāṃ devīṃ paṅkajadvayadhāriṇīm
śrīśca te iti mantrasya varuṇa ṛṣirnṛsiṃho devatā vidārikāprītaye viniyogaḥ
raktāṃ ca pūtanāṃ dhyāyetpaṅkajasthāṃ suśobhanām
sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāṃ sarvālaṃkāraśobhitām
mayi gṛhṇāmīti maṃtrasya vivasvānṛṣirnārāyaṇo devatā pūtanāprītaye viniyogaḥ
pūrvādidikṣu sarvāsu sārdhādyaṃtapadeṣu ca
īśānaṃ jaṭilaṃ śvetaṃ śūlahastaṃ mahābhujam
trinetraṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ nāgahāro paśobhitam
āyuḥśīrṣāṇa iti maṃtrasya vāmadeva ṛṣirbṛhatī chando dharaṇīdharo devatā īśānaprītaye viniyogaḥ
dakṣiṇe paraśuṃ dhyāyedoṃkāraṃ ca tathāpare
jayantaṃ śvetaṃ śvetavṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ dhyātvā
mānastoketi mantrasya śaktyṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ śaṅkaro devatā jayaṃtaprītaye viniyogaḥ
śuklaṃ pītaṃ dvibhujamairāvatasthaṃ vajradharaṃ dhyātvā mūlabījena sthāpayet
bhāskaraṃ raktadvibhujaṃ raktāśvasthaṃ dhyātvā māyābījena pūjayet
satyaṃ ca dvibhujaṃ śvetaṃ trinetraṃ pītavāsasaṃ mandakuṃdabījena pūjayet
vṛṣaṃ pītaṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhamākāśabījena pūjayet
ṛkṣaṃ nīlaṃ caturbhujaṃ mahiṣārūḍham
ācchīma iti mantrasya hotā yakṣa ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ śaṃkaro devatā ṛkṣaprītaye viniyogaḥ
agniṃ raktaṃ saptajihvaṃ raktavāsasaṃ piṅgākṣaṃ dhyātvā
agnidūtamiti maṃtrasya bharadvāja ṛṣistriṣṭucchandaḥ śaṃkaro devatā agniprītaye vini yogaḥ
vitathaṃ raktamajavāhanaṃ dvibhujaṃ dhyātvā gāyatryā pūjayet
gāyatryā viśvāmitra ṛṣirgāyatrīchandaḥ savitā devatā vitathaprītaye viniyogaḥ
yamaṃ kṛṣṇamahiṣārūḍhaṃ daṇḍahastaṃ dhyāyet
gṛhe kṣetraṃ raktamūrdhvakeśaṃ mahābhujaṃ raktavāsasaṃ dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet gandharvaṃ śvetaṃ dvibhujaṃ padmāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā yamabījena pūjayet
bhṛṅgarājaṃ raktasiṃhāsanārūḍhaṃ divyayajñopavītinaṃ dhyāyet
hotā yasketi mantrasya bhārgava ṛṣirgāyatrīchando yaśo devatā bhṛṃgarājaprītaye viniyogaḥ
mṛgaṃ pītaṃ mṛgārūḍhaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā
nairṛtārddhapadeṣu ca
nirṛtiṃ pītaṃ śvetaṃ padmāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā
kaidācaneti mantrasya paṃktiśchandaḥ savitā devatā nirṛtiprītaye viniyogaḥ nairṛtārddhapadeṣu ca dauvārikaṃ śvetaśarabhārūḍhaṃ trinetraṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaṃ dhyātvā
śyāmaṃ sugrīvaṃ kṛṣṇameṣārūḍhaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā
puṣpadaṃtaṃ pītaṃ meṣārūḍhaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā
asuraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ kṛṣṇamālyairalaṃkṛtaṃ kṛtvā
ākṛṣṇeti mantrasya hiraṇyavarṇa ṛṣirjagatī chandaḥ savitā devatā asuraprītaye viniyogaḥ
asuraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ nāgahārānvitaṃ padmāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā
rogaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ nīlendīvaradharaṃ śvetavṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ dhyātvā
namaste rudra iti mantrasya nārada ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ śrīrdevatā rogaprītaye viniyogaḥ
vāyukoṇādārabhya pūjayet
vāyuṃ dhūmravarṇaṃ dhvajahastaṃ mṛgārūḍhaṃ dhyātvā
śvetaṃ somaṃ śvetavarṇāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā bhadrabījena pūjayet
raktaṃ bhallāṭaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet
pītavāsasamajavāhanaṃ hārakeyūrānvitaṃ vāyubījena maṃdarādyaiḥ pūjayet raktāṃ ditiṃ nāgahārānvitāṃ raktapadmāsanasthāṃ dhyātvā
māno tvā iti maṃtrasya bhārgava ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ pṛthivī devatā ditiprītaye viniyogaḥ
aditiṃ pītavarṇāṃ siṃhārūḍhāṃ pītāṃbaradharāṃ dhyātvā
evaṃ yathā vidhāyātha homaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi
homāṃte dakṣiṇāṃ dadyātkāñcanaṃ hemasaṃyutam
taḍāgayāgapakṣe tu suvarṇaṃ cārdhameva vā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge daśamoadhyāyaḥ cha
pūjākramavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
atha pūjākramaṃ vakṣye purāṇasmṛticoditam
nadītīre nemiprāṃte daśadvādaśasaṃkhyayā
maṃḍalaṃ racayedviprāścarukadvayasaṃyutam
uttarāśe dakṣiṇe cāratnihastāṃtareapi ca
trimekhalāṃ hastamātrāṃ guṇavedīsamanvitām
mūle sārdhaṃ ca śuklāṃ ca mekhalāṃ tu tathaiva ca
ṣaṭsaptāṃgulikāṃ yoniṃ paścime mekhalopari
śrāddhaṃ vṛddhyātmakaṃ kuryātsaṃkalpaṃ mānasaṃ caret
śrāddhārthaṃ naiva saṃkalpettathā vai devadarśane
gayāśrāddhārthakaṃ cāṣṭatīrthaśrāddhārthameva ca
aiśānyāṃ kalaśe devaṃ pūjayedgaṇanāyakam
madhye kuṇḍe mahāṃścaiva viṣṇudevaṃ digīśvarān
brahmāṇaṃ cāgnikuṇḍe tu svaiḥ svairmantraiḥ prapūjayet
prāṇāyāmaṃ vidhāyātha bhūtaśuddhiṃ samācaret
dhyāyedvāṭavīśapuruṣaṃ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam
śvetaṃ caturbhujaṃ śāṃtaṃ kuṇḍalādyairalaṃkṛtam
pustakaṃ cākṣamālāṃ ca varābhayakaraṃ param
pitṛvaiśvānaropetaṃ kuṭilabhrūpaśobhitam
mūrdhanyagniṃ samāviśya mukhe vāyuḥ samāhitaḥ
pṛthvīdharoryamā caiva tathāṣṭavaneṣṭitau
vakṣasthale aparāṃ saṃdhyāṃ yajeccaiva yathāvidhi
pārśve tu dakṣiṇe tadvadvirathaśca maharkṣakaḥ
jaṃghayorbhṛṃgasugrīvau sphicordauvāriko gaṇaḥ
evaṃ dhyātvā nyasetpuṣpaṃ some naivaṃ viciṃtayet
mandaraṃ dīrghayuktena ṣaḍaṅgāni samācaret
tāvadvīryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praṇavaṃ brahmaṇeti ca
vāstvīśāya vidmaheti tanno viṣṇuḥ pracodayāt
anena snapanaṃ kuryātpūjādravyāṇi prokṣayet
āsanaṃ pūjayetpūrvaṃ dharmeṇāpi svaśaktitaḥ
ādau tu bhāskaraṃ sūryaṃ śacīnāthaṃ gaṇādhipam
ādhāraśaktiṃ pṛthivīṃ pūjayettatra paṅkajam
baṃdīśāsanamityuktaṃ pūjayedāsanaṃ tataḥ
harerdhyānaṃ tataḥ kuryātsthāpayenmadhyamaṇḍale
āvāhya cāsanaṃ dadyāttataḥ pādyādikatrayam
maṃdaraṃ vijayaṃ somaṃ mahādevaṃ ca mādhavam
rudraṃ haraṃ jayaṃ bhaṃ ca pūrvādidalamūlake
jayā ca vijayā caiva satyā māyā śivāṃbikā
hāsinī kāminī caitā dalamūleṣu bhāvayet
puṣpāñjalitrayaṃ dadyādvāstoṣpataya ityapi
arghyamaṃtreṇa gaṃdhādyaiḥ pūjayedbhūtimicchatā
vāstoṣpate bhava mate iti dhyātvā ṛtaṃ ceti maṃtreṇa pūjayet
ṛṣirnārāyaṇaśchando gāyatrī parikīrtitam
sūryaśca devatā khyātaḥ prīṇitaḥ kuliśāyudhaḥ
sūryaṃ raktāsanārūḍhaṃ dvibhujaṃ raktavāsasam
evaṃ dhyātvā tu matimānhaṃsaṃ samaṃtramīśvaram
haṃsasya iti maṃtrasya ṛṣirautathya īritaḥ
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā vastrālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ
uddharṣaṇa iti maṃtreṇa kṛṣṇapuṣpairathārcayet
satyavrata ṛṣiścāsya triṣṭupchandoasya devatā
savitā caiva vijñeyaḥ prītaye ca vṛṣasya ca
śulkavarṇaṃ tathākāśamṛṣṭisaṃghaiśca saṃstutam
ghaṭasthaṃ dvibhujaṃ dhyāyedgadāpadmavidhāriṇam
ṛṣiḥ syātkardamo viprāśchando jāgatikā tathā
devatā ca bhaveccāgnirākāśaprītaye nyaset
dvibhujaṃ dhūmravarṇaṃ ca vāyuṃ dhyātvā prapūjayet
rājāna iti mantreṇa pūjayetsitataṃḍulaiḥ
ṛṣirnārāyaṇacchando gāyatrī devatā dvijāḥ
