rājāna iti ca ṛcā pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ
gobhilosya ṛṣiḥ paṅktiśchandoatha jagatī smṛtam
vitathaṃ śyāmavarṇaṃ ca caturbhirbāhubhirvṛtam
mṛgākṣapāśakhaṭvāṅga śūlaṃ ca dadhataṃ karaiḥ
meṣārūḍhaṃ viśālākṣaṃ rājāno mahyamīrayan
gṛhakṣataṃ tathā śuklaṃ caturbhirgardabhairvṛtam
śūlaṃ daṃḍaṃ ca khaḍvāṃgaṃ dadhataṃ vṛṣavāhanam
pītavastradharaṃ devaṃ jaṭāmukuṭasaṃyutam
āśuḥ śiśāna iti mantreṇa pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ
puṣpadaṃta ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaśca parikīrtitam
yamaṃ dhyāyetkṛṣṇavarṇaṃ mahiṣasthaṃ dvibāhukam
daṇḍapāśadharaṃ caiva keyūrādyairvibhūṣitam
īśāneti ca mantreṇa pūjayetkusumādinā
vāmadeva ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ kālosya devatā
ṣaḍānanaṃ ca gandharvaṃ pītaṃ dhyāyeccaturbhujam
pītāṃbaradharaṃ caiva nānābharaṇabhūṣitam
hārītosya ṛṣiḥ prokto jagatīchanda īritam
bhṛṅgarājaṃ jaṭārūḍhaṃ svacchaṃ pītāṃbaraṃ śubham
cakṣuḥ pīteti mantreṇa pūjayedgandhacaṃdanaiḥ
ṛṣiścāgastirākhyātastriṣṭupchandaḥ prakīrtitam
viśvedevā devatā ca bhṛṅgarājasya prītaye
pītaṃ mṛgaṃ mṛgārūḍhaṃ jaṭāmukuṭamaṃḍitam
paro devā iti maṃtreṇa pūjayedbalipāyasaiḥ
kapilaśca ṛṣiḥ prokto gāyatrī chanda īritam
dhyāyetpitṛgaṇaṃ śukraṃ caturbhirbāhubhirvṛtam
śunaḥśepa ṛṣiścāsya triṣṭupchandaśca devatā
viśvedevāḥ samākhyātāḥ pitṛmedhena pūjayet
dauvārikaṃ cāṣṭabhujaṃ kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ vicintayet
raktavastrapiṃgalākṣaṃ kṛṣṇavyāghropari sthitam
vaiśvānara ṛṣiścāsya gāyatrī chanda īritam
śaṃkhābhaṃ caiva sugrīvaṃ dvibhujaṃ cakradhāriṇam
haṃsārūḍhaṃ mahākāyaṃ balivijñānakāraṇam
sa iṣu hasteti maṃtreṇa pūjayedraktabhūṣaṇaiḥ
ṛṣiḥ śaṃkhastathācchandaḥ paṅktiḥ somoatha devatā
śvetaṃ jalādhipaṃ dhyāyedgandharvādyaiśca veṣṭitam
bṛhaspate paridīyā iti maṃtreṇa bhaktitaḥ
tryaṃbakoasya ṛṣistriṣṭupchando devo jalādhipaḥ
dhyāyecca asuraṃ raktaṃ karālaṃ naravāhanam
daśabhirbāhubhiryuktaṃ kṛṣṇavastrānulepanam
śanno devīti maṃtreṇa kṛṣṇapuṣpaiḥ prapūjayet
ṛṣirvaiśvānaraśchando virāḍityabhidhīyate
śeṣaṃ ṣaḍānanaṃ dhyāyetkṛṣṇaṃ ca madhupiṃgalam
meṣasthaṃ kuṇḍalopetaṃ nāgayajñopavītinam
siddho vīreti mantreṇa kṛṣṇapuṣpairathārcayet
yamaṃ ca kṛkarākṣaṃ ca ākuñcanmūrdhaje dvijāḥ
devatā ca yaśaḥ khyātaṃ prītaye viniyojayet
yamaṃ ca kṛkarākṣaṃ ca kṣamākuñcitamūrdhajam
vāsukiḥ syādṛṣiścāsya paṃktiśchandaśca devatā
ardhapītaṃ ca dvibhujaṃ raktākṣaṃ dhūmrameva vā
devatābhiśca saṃpannaṃ vāto vāretireva ca
ṛṣirvāyuśca gāyatrī chando vāyuśca devatā
pītavastraṃ pannagasthaṃ hārakeyūramaṃḍitam
avasṛṣṭā parāpata iti mantreṇa pūjayet
agniścāsya ṛṣiḥ proktacchandaḥ somaśca devatā
pītaṃ bhallāṭakaṃ dhyāyetpadmasthaṃ raktabhūṣaṇam
yanmāturiti mantreṇa pūjayetsitataṃḍulaiḥ
jambhakoasya ṛṣiśchando gāyatrī samudāhṛtā
somaṃ dhyāyecchyāmarūpaṃ padmāsanagataṃ param
nānābharaṇasampannaṃ kirīṭavaradhāriṇam
ṛṣiḥ svārtho vedaśchando jagatītyabhidhīyate
darpaṃ dhyāyetkṛṣṇavarṇaṃ kṛṣṇāṃbaradharaṃ tathā
nāgayajñopavītiṃ ca śikhistaṃbhaṃ dvijottamāḥ
paścadīśeti mantreṇa gandhādyaiḥ paripūjayet
mantraścāsya ṛṣiścāsya pañcāyata namīritam
paṃktiśchandastathā proktaṃ devaḥ pañcānanaḥ smṛtaḥ
śyāmavarṇāṃ ditiṃ dhyāyeddvibhujāṃ pītavigrahām
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannāṃ sarvālaṃkāraśobhitām
suparṇoasīti mantreṇa pūjayetpītacandanaiḥ
ṛṣirnārāyaṇaśchando jagatī parikīrtyate
bhaveddevo bhārgavaśca iṣṭārthe paripūjayet
raktābhāmaditiṃ dhyāyetsarvālaṃkārabhūṣitām
śukrāṃbhāritimantreṇa gandhādyairabhipūjayet
vāmadeva ṛṣiścāsya gandhādyairabhipūjayet
devaḥ śukraḥ samākhyātaḥ stutau ca viniyojayet īśānādikoṇagatānpūjayetsusamāhitaḥ
āpaṃ dhyāyecchuklavarṇaṃ kuṇḍalādyairvibhūṣitam
ṛṣiḥ syātkardamaśchando virāḍityabhidhīyate
devaḥ somaḥ samākhyātaḥ prītaye viniyojayet
saritaṃ dvibhujaṃ raktaṃ raktaśvetāṃbarānvitam
payasā śukla iti mantreṇa pūjayetkamalādinā
nārāyaṇa ṛṣiścāsya paṃktiśchandaḥ prakīrtyate
nārāyaṇaḥ svayaṃ devaḥ prītaye viniyojayet
devaṃ kirīṭasampannaṃ sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitam
dṛṣṭvā pariśruta iti mantreṇānena pūjayet
ṛṣirnārāyaṇaśchandaḥ paṃktiḥ somoatha devatā
rudraṃ dhyāyedraktavarṇaṃ śītāṃśukṛtaśekharam
dvibhujaṃ śūlahastaṃ ca ḍamaruṃ ca parābhavet
divo mūrdhanniti mantreṇa ṛṣayaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ
ṛṣiḥ syātkāśyapaśchando virāḍityabhidhīyate
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā ṛṣirnīla udāhṛtaḥ
triṣṭuàpchando devatā syāddhradopi parikīrtitaḥ
nānābharaṇaśobhāḍhyaṃ saptāśvarathamaṃḍitam
ṛṣirautathya ākhyātaḥ prītaye viniyojayet
ṛṣirgandhaḥ samākhyātastriṣṭupchandaśca īritam
vibudhādhipaṃ tato dhyāyetpītaṃ vṛṣabhavāhanam
ṛṣirhārīta ityukto jagatīcchanda īritam
meṣasthaṃ ca trinetraṃ ca kirīṭavaramaṃḍitam
pītāsyaṃ rājayakṣyāṇaṃ karālaṃ ca viciṃtayet
dadhyaṅṅātharvaṇa ṛṣirgāyatrī chanda īritam
śuklāṃbaradharaṃ dhyāyeddvibhujaṃ śikhivāhanam
ṛṣiḥ syānnāradaḥ proktaśchandonuṣṭupprakīrtitam
evaṃ dhyātvā vivasvaṃtaṃ mahākāyaṃ mahodaram
kāśyaposya ṛṣiśchandastriṣṭubdevaḥ śacīpatiḥ
bahirīśānakoṇeṣu devādīnparipūjayet
kūṣmāṇḍairvaraṇāpuṣpaiḥ śaurakairvā samarcayet
pītāṃ karālikāṃ dhyāyeccarakīṃ varavarṇinīm
svabjasthāṃ dvibhujāṃ caiva guñjāhāropaśobhitām
pītinyarūpamantreṇa pūjayedbhūtimicchukaḥ
baladeva ṛṣiścāsya chando gaurī ca devatā
dhyāyedvidārikāṃ raktāṃ navayauvanasaṃyutām
pavitreṇa punīhīti maṃtreṇānena pūjayet
ṛṣirgargaḥ samākhyātastriṣṭupchandosya devatā
pāpādirākṣasīṃ dhyāyetsaurabheyoparisthitām
ṛṣiḥ suvarṇa ākhyātaḥ paṅktiśchandaḥ prakīrtitam
parvatāgramṛdaṃ caiva gajadaṃtamṛdaṃ tathā
valmīke saṃgame caiva rājadvāracatuṣpathāt
kuśamūlamṛdaṃ caiva yajñiyasya vanaspateḥ
indravallī tathākrāṃta amṛtī trapuṣasya ca
mālatī caṃpakaṃ caiva tathā urvārukasya ca
śrīphalaṃ bījapūraṃ ca nālikeraṃ ca dāḍimam
dhātrīṃ jaṃbuphalaṃ caiva anyayā doṣamādiśet
pañcaraktaṃ suvarṇaṃ ca nikṣipedvaruṇaṃ yajet
asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣirviṣṇuśchanda udāhṛtam
gāyatrī devatā pāśī prītaye viniyojayet
pañcagaṃdhānvinikṣipya hastaṃ dattvā paṭhettataḥ
sarve samudrāḥ saritaḥ sarāṃsi ca mahāhradāḥ
āyāṃtu sarvapāpaghnāḥ sarvalokasukhāvahāḥ
gaṃgādyāḥ saritaḥ sarvāstīrthāni jaladāḥ nadāḥ
āyāṃtu yajamānasya duritakṣayakārakāḥ
aghorājyaṣṭakakṛtā vāstoṣpataya ityapi
śataṃ vā cāṣṭasaṃyuktaṃ sahasraṃ vā viśeṣataḥ
śatārdhaṃ vā hunedviprastilairvā taṃḍulaiḥ saha
aṣṭāviṃśatibhiścānyairaṣṭāṣṭau paṃcapaṃca vā
carakyādīṃścāsanaiśca piṣṭakairvaṭakena vā
vāstoṣpate dṛḍhaṃ japtvā yajedvāstupatiṃ yadā
paṃcopacārairvidhivatsāṃgopāṃgairanaṃtaram
balimāsādayetpaścāddadyādekaikaśaḥ kramāt
brāhmaṇaiścaiva dadyācca sadā ājyaṃ samākṣikam
śālyannaṃ śikhine dadyāttathā nīlotpalāni ca
odanaṃ sotpalaṃ dadyātparjanyāya vicakṣaṇaḥ
jayāya piṣṭakaṃ kāryamindrāya ghṛtamodakaḥ
sūryāya piṣṭakānnaṃ ca satyāya yavapūlikām
bhramāya matsyamāṃsānnaṃ śaṣkulīmatha piṣṭakam
vāyavye ca tathā saktūnpūṣṇe cāpūpameva hi
vitathāya kalāyānnaṃ gṛharkṣāya samākṣikam
pūṣṇetha kṛśarānnaṃ ca śālyannaṃ ca nivedayet
gandharvāya kastūrikānnaṃ kṛśaraṃ bhṛṃgarājake
mṛgāya yāvakānnaṃ ca pitṛbhyo mudgapāyasam
dauvārikāya kṛśarānanaḍuṃhe ca pūpakam
pāyasaṃ puṣpadaṃtāya varuṇāya ca piṣṭakam
asurāya modakāṃścaiva dadyādāpikṣaye surām
ghṛtodanaṃ ca somāya kaṇānnaṃ yakṣmaṇe dadet
rogāya ghṛtalaḍḍūkaṃ sapāyasaguḍaudanam
akṣāya vividhānnaṃ ca bhallāṭāya tathaiva ca
somāya madhuśālyannaṃ nāgāya guḍapiṣṭakam
dityai dadyāttathā kṣīraṃ sitaśarkarayā saha
kṣīrānnaṃ caiva pūṣṇe ca āpavatsāya vai dadhi
jayāya ghṛtamannaṃ ca miṣṭānnaṃ ca vivasvate
ghṛtaudanaṃ ca citrāya rudrāya ghṛtapāyasam
māṃsaudanaṃ yakṣmaṇe ca kṛśaraṃ varuṇāya ca
aryamṇe śarkarāpūpaṃ bahirdadyāccatuṣṭayam
citraudanaṃ samāṃsaṃ ca matsyānnaṃ guḍapiṣṭakam
pratidevopari kṣīraṃ ghṛtakṣīrasamanvitam
patākā devavarṇena dadyādbrahmādiṣu kramāt
maṃtraṃ japetsvasāmarthyātsvasāmarthyātstutiṃ paṭhet
puruṣastavasya sūrya ṛṣirjagatī chandaḥ
śaṃkara uvāca
viṣṇurjiṣṇurvibhuryajño yajñiyo yajñapālakaḥ
nārāyaṇo naro haṃso viṣvakseno hutāśanaḥ
yajñeśaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sūryaḥ surārcitaḥ
ādidevo jagatkartā maṇḍaleśo mahīdharaḥ
padmanābho hṛṣīkeśo dātā dāmodaro hariḥ
saṃnyāsī śāstratattvajñastripaṃcāśadguṇātmakaḥ
vidārī vinayaḥ śāṃtastapasvī vaidyutaprabhaḥ
yajñastvaṃ hi vaṣaṭkārastvamoṃkārastvamagnayaḥ
tvaṃ svadhā tvaṃ hi svāhā tvaṃ sudhā ca puruṣottamaḥ
namo devādidevāya viṣṇave śāsvatāya ca
upāsakānāṃ prabhumekamīśvaraṃ te yāṃti siddhiṃ paramāṃ tu vaiṣṇavīm
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ekādaśodhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
tato bheryādighoṣeṇa yajamāna udaṅmukhaḥ
aiśānyāṃ madhyabhāge vā yajedvā susamāhitaḥ
ṛṣiḥ kaṃṭhotha gāyatrī chanda ityabhidhīyate
agratoaṣṭadalaṃ lekhyaṃ sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tataḥ
śuktiśaṃkhasamaṃ vāpi viśvāmitrasamudbhavam
pūjayettīrthatoyena gandhapuṣpākṣatādinā
viṣṇukrāṃtā vacākuṣṭhacandanena viloḍitam
kṣīraṃ ca mātuliṃgaṃ ca sāvitraṃ ca sadūrvayā
avraṇaṃ kalaśaṃ kṛtvā pañcavarṇasamanvitam
āvāhayettoyanidhiṃ maṃtreṇānena bhaktitaḥ
hṛdvarṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ paritoṣāya te namaḥ
gṛhebhyaścaiva somāya tvaṣṭre caiva ca śūline
tatorghyadānaṃ vidhivatkṣīreṇa haviṣā madhu
yajamānaḥ sapatnīkaḥ kuṃbhaṃ kukṣau nidhāya ca
hiraṇyagarbheti maṃtrasya bharadvājaṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ
chandaśca jagatī khyātaṃ devatā ca jalādhipaḥ
asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣirnāradaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
virāṭchandaśca īśāno devatā samudāhṛtā
saṃbhave pakṣiyugmaṃ ca āḍīṃ vā cakravākakam
dikṣu jīvaṃtikāṃ dadyādrākṣasebhyo baliṃ haret
kṣātrako lakṣmaṇaścaiva maṇibhadro gaṇeśvaraḥ
ye bhavā bhāvino bhūtā ye ca teṣu mayāsinaḥ
āharaṃ tu baliṃ tuṣṭyā prayacchaṃtu śubhaṃ mama
dadyātpayasvinīṃ gāṃ ca ācāryāya viśeṣataḥ
anyeṣāṃ hi hiraṇyaṃ ca gāṃ ca dadyāddvijanmane
vyāhṛtidvitayaṃ caiva tato vāruṇapaṃcakam
prājāpatyaṃ sviṣṭakṛcca juhuyāttadanaṃtaram
ghṛtaiḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ nāsti tathā rasavisārakaiḥ
madhūkairviśvapuṣpaiśca tathāmrātakakāśakaiḥ
dadyātpūrṇāṃ ca vidhivatsūryāyārghyaṃ nivedayet
pañcadoṣaṃ puraskṛtya brāhmaṇānumatena ca
gṛhaṃ praviśya ca tato brāhmaṇānatha bhojayet
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇe caiva dadyādvittānusārataḥ
jñātibhiḥ saha bhuñjīta dadhikṣīrāmiṣaṃ vinā
na kṣīraṃ ca kaṣāyaṃ ca bharjitaṃ śākameva ca
na kāṇḍaṃ ca na puṣpaṃ ca karīraṃ ca kadācana
śālyannaṃ mūlakaṃ caiva panasāmraphalāni ca
mastaṃ madhughṛtaguḍaṃ mātuliṃgaṃ sasaiṃdhavam
etatpraśastaṃ jānīyānmarīcāni viśeṣataḥ
pañcāṃgakaṃ tataḥ kuryātsthāpa yenneti yugmakam
prathamā cārkahastena dvitīyā daśahastikā
śatārdhaṃ tataḥ paścātṣaṣṭihastamanaṃtaram
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāgearghyadānavidhau dvādaśoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
svagṛhyāgnividhiṃ vakṣye yogabhedeṣu sattamāḥ
putrā eva ca kanyāśca janiṣyāścāpare sutāḥ
gṛhyā iti samākhyātā yajamānasya dāyadāḥ
teṣāṃ saṃskārayāgeṣu śāntikarmakriyāsu ca
ācāryavihitaḥ kalpastasmāccakṣa iti smṛtaḥ
trikuśaṃ parigṛhṇāti tataśca kurute dṛḍham
ṛṣirdakṣaśca jagatī chando viṣṇuśca devatā
kaśyapastṛpyatāmiti bhūrasīti ca śodhanam
ṛṣiḥ suvarṇa gāyatrī jagatī chanda iṣyate
devatā ca bhavetsūryaḥ pṛthivīśodhane nyaset
aiśānyādikrameṇaiva prādakṣiṇyena yatnataḥ
kuśagarbhatrayeṇāpi bhrāmayedvalayākṛti
parisamūhanamityuktaṃ snapanaṃ śṛṇu sattama
īśānādeśca saṃskāraṃ kuryātparisamūhanam
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ caretyādinairṛtyādigrahaṃ makhe
paṃkticchandaḥ samuddiṣṭamindrāṇī cāsya devatā
gomayaṃ ca trigaṃdhaṃ ca paṃcamūrtikayāpi ca
mānastokeneti ṛcā viśvedevaśca pūjyatām
ṛṣiḥ syātkāśyapacchando viśvadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ yojayellepayedvidvānghaṭamābaddhya sattamāḥ
madhyamātarjanībhyāṃ ca kuśamārabhya dakṣiṇam
caturastrīkṛte kṣetraṃ hastamānaṃ tathānanam
yajvabhiriti mantreṇa sūryaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ
dakṣe sārdhāṃgulaṃ tyaktvā paścimena parityajet
uttarāgrāṃ likhedrekhāmanyathāamaṃgalaṃ bhavet
āpyāyasveti mantrasya dhanvatari ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ
triṣṭupchandaḥ samākhyātaṃ savitā cātra devatā
tallagnaṃ dakṣiṇe caikaṃ pūrvārddhadvādaśāṅgulam
anyāṃgulāṃtaraṃ caikaṃ tataḥ saptāṃgulaṃ bhavet
kuśamūlena svarṇena pratiṣṭhāyāṃ ca rājate
aṃguṣṭhānāmikābhyāṃ ca saṃjyotīti ca saṃjapan
saṃsmarenmitrā varuṇau ṛṣirautathyasaṃjñakaḥ
bhāsvarāya kṣipedagnau tata ūrdhvaṃ raṇaṃ smṛtam
sadasaṃpadṛṣiḥ karṇo virāḍiti udāhṛtaḥ
kuśapuṣpodakenāpi devatīrthena sattamāḥ
chandoatha devī gāyatrī devatā gaṇanāyakaḥ
kīśādagniṃ samādāya me gṛhṇāmīti saṃpaṭhan
me gṛhṇāmīti maṃtrasya ṛṣirgautama īritaḥ
chandonuṣṭupsamākhyātaṃ vāmadevoatha devatā
mantreṇānena matimāndakṣiṇasyāṃ vinikṣipet
asya mantrasya hārīta ṛṣiḥ syācchanda iṣyate
āvāhanaṃ tataḥ kuryātsaṃsarakṣeti saṃjapan
saṃsarakṣeti maṃtrasya ṛṣirnīla udāhṛtaḥ
virāṭ chandoatha vijñeyo devatā ca śatakratuḥ
vaiśvānara iti ṛcā agnisthāpanamīritam
maṃtramācāti prīṇāti ṛṣiḥ syātkāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ
badhnāsīti ca maṃtreṇa agniṃ kuryātpradakṣiṇam
ṛṣiḥ svayaṃbhūrākhyāto virāṭchanda udāhṛtam
brahmayajñānṛcā dogdhrī dhenuriti tvṛcā
śakroasya trāyatāmeti śṛṇu ṛgbhyāmṛṣīdvijāḥ
prajāpatirṛṣiśchandastriṣṭubdevoatha śaṃkaraḥ
nāradaśca ṛṣiśchandastriṣṭubdevaḥ śacīpatiḥ
praṇītā sthāpanaṃ kuryāddina ehīti saṃjapan
mantrasya ca ṛṣiśchando vāmadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
śrīparṇīsahakārotthaṃ varuṇasya viśeṣataḥ
ṣaḍaṃgulena vistāraṃ viṃśatyaṃgulakena ca
dairghyeṇa ca catuḥkhyātakāṃgulaṃ ca pramāṇataḥ
dvyaṃgule carakākāyāmāsāsandevakarmaṇi
abhicāre bhavetkāṃsyaṃ tāmraṃ syācchāṃtikarmaṇi
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ mṛnmayaṃ ca aṣṭāṃgulamathāpi vā
dvādaśāṃgulaprastāraṃ taijasaṃ mānavarjitam
imaṃ me varuṇenarcā praṇītāmatha pūrayet
sāgarā atha prīyaṃtāmitthamādhyānamācaret
kayā naścitra ityṛcā nāgaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ
asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣirbharadvāja udāhṛtaḥ
chandoanuṣṭubdevatā ca īśānaḥ parikīrtitaḥ
prayojanādikaṃ dravyaṃ tata āsādayetkramāt
dakṣiṇādi uttarāṃtaṃ dhuvāsa ityṛcāpi ca
ṛṣiḥ syānnāradaśchandonuṣṭupcaivātha devatā
śatakratuśca prīṇāti yojayedatha sādarāt
kāṣṭhaṃ ca paścime kuryātprayacchanpaścimena tu
puratoannaṃ pañcavrīhīstilāśca sahasarṣapān
dakṣiṇe caiva āpūpaṃ bhṛṃgarājaṃ tathaiva ca
panasaṃ nārikelaṃ ca modakaṃ laḍḍukaṃ tathā
praṇītāṃ ca digvidikṣu sthāpayedavicārayan
praṇītāṃ na spṛśejjātu homakāle kathaṃcana
snānakuṃbhaṃ ca bho viprā yāvadyāgaḥ pravartate
uccīrakaṃ mātuliṃgaṃ dūrvāṃ dhātrīphalāni ca
tulasīmālatījātī jalajāni viśeṣataḥ
aiśānyāṃ sthāpayetsarvaṃ yacca vai kaṃkatīmayam
nairṛtyeti viśeṣoyaṃ yacca vaikaṃkatī śamī
kṣīrapāke tu kṣīrāṃte carusthālīmathānayet
pavivacchedanakuśaiśchiṃdyātprādeśikaṃ punaḥ
chittvā pavitraṃ prokṣaṇyāṃ sthāpayedbalabhidāmrakam
viṣṇo rarāṭamaṃtreṇa chedayedagrabhāgataḥ
pāyasena kāṭhinena pramathnīyātkadācana
na rasena na kārṣṇena na dṛḍhena kadācana
tāmreṇa bhasmanā cātha śuktiśaṃkhena vāgyataḥ
chedayetpiñjulīṃ cāpi pavitramatha deśikaḥ
viṣṇo rarāṭamaṃtrasya hārītaśca ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ
praṇītābhājanaṃ gṛhya prokṣaṇīṃ pūrayettribhiḥ
vāmahastatale paścātsthāpayetprokṣaṇīyakam
madhyamāmadhyamāṃguṣṭha apāmārgeṇa maṃtribhiḥ
ṛṣiḥ syādgautamaśchando dharmarājoatha devatā
sakṛddravye tribhiḥ kāṣṭhaistrivāraṃ maṃtrapuṣpakaiḥ
sthirasthāne tu saṃprāptapraṇītāyāśca dakṣiṇe
prādeśāṃtarataścaiva ājyasthālīmathārpayet
agrato maṇḍalaṃ kṛtvā vahniṃ vipre tu sthāpayet
dyūtaṃ niḥsārayettattu nirūpyāśu krameṇa tu
īśāneti ca maṃtreṇa adhiśrapaṇamīritam
ṛṣirnārāyaṇaśchandaḥ paṃktirīśoatha devatā
avekṣya īśamārabhya dakṣiṇāvartakena tu
kulāyanīti maṃtreṇa ṛṣicchandādikaṃ smaran
pariveṣyājyasthālīṃ ca triḥ sakṛdvā samāhitaḥ
pitarastṛpyatāmiti saṃskāre mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ
ṛṣiḥ syājjamadagniśca gāyatrī chanda īritam
devatā ca pinākī syādagniṣṭome ca yojayet
ṣaḍaṃgulaṃ sruvaṃ paścādgṛhītvāgnau pratapya ca
trirātraṃ tu mahāyoge sakṛdanyatra sattamāḥ
saṃmārjayetkuśenāpi mūlādagraṃ tu secayet
agrānmūlaṃ punaḥ kuryātsaṃpūjya ca punaḥ punaḥ
ājyapātraṃ puraskṛtya pavitraṃ ca samāharet
aṃguṣṭhe dve anāme tu gṛhṇīyāttatpavitrakam
aṣṭāṃgulaṃ madhyakṛtvo ghṛtaṃ triḥ pavanaṃ caret
pātāle tristathākāśe avekṣyājyaṃ tatastribhiḥ
prokṣaṇyāṃ ca tathā kuryādadhaḥ saṃprokṣya deśikaḥ
tūṣṇīṃ dadyāttathā cāgnau sanniveśena tattvataḥ
sapavitraṃ dakṣakare gṛhītvā prokṣaṇīyakam
aṣṭāṃgule mūlabhāge tajjalena īśāditaḥ
agniṃ paryukṣayetpaścāddakṣiṇāvartakena ca
pavitraṃ ca praṇītāyāṃ nidhāya prokṣaṇīyakam
saṃyāvārthaṃ ca bho viprā agnivattatra deśikaḥ
sruvaṃ gṛhītvā juhuyāttūṣṇīmeva samāhitaḥ
aṃte ca devatoddeśaṃ prājāpatyaṃ samīrayan
praṇavāṃtena juhuyātsarvatra dvijasattamāḥ
vāyukoṇaṃ samārabhya vahnikoṇāntakena tu
agnīṣomātmakaṃ caiva juhuyādrākṣasāditaḥ
aiśānakoṇaparyaṃtaṃ tato naimittikaṃ caret
paścātsviṣṭaṃ tato dadyāddadyācca matibhistathā
vāruṇaṃ pañcakaṃ caiva kṛtvā pūrṇāṃ tato labhet
udvāha iti maṃtra sya atharvaṇa ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ
chaṃdo devī ca gāyatrī devataṃ cāpi vāruṇam
tvannogna iti maṃtrasya ṛṣirvāśiṣṭhasaṃjñakaḥ
chaṃdaśca bṛhatī khyātaṃ tadevāgniḥ prakīrtitaḥ
iḍo gatamiti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ ko guhyasaṃjñakaḥ
chandaśca jagatī khyātaṃ devo viṣṇuḥ prakīrtitaḥ
udvartana iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ ko nu prakīrtitaḥ
chando devī ca gāyatrī varuṇaścādhidevatā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge trayodaśoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
kuśakaṇḍīṃ svagṛhyena kṛtvāgniṃ cārcayettataḥ
āghārājyabhāgau tu mahāvyāhṛtayastrayaḥ
sarvaṃ prāyaścittasaṃjñakaṃ prājāpatyaṃ ca sviṣṭakṛt
prājāpatye ca indrāya etāvāghārasaṃjñakau
bhūrbhuvaḥsvastrayaścaiva mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ
sarvaprāyaścittasaṃjñā ete vai pañca maṃtrakāḥ
prājāpatyāhutiścaikā sviṣṭakṛccāparā smṛtā
caturdaśaitāḥ kṛtayo hotavyā nityasaṃjñakāḥ
kṛtvā sakṛddevatoddeśaṃ homaṃ paścātsamācaret
naimittikaṃ vinā nityaṃ viphalaṃ yāti nānyathā
hasādhyādiyāgeṣu yannideśaṃ śṛṇu dvijāḥ
ekāhe vāghārārajyau kṛtvā naimittikīṃ kṛtīḥ
samā sviṣṭakṛtaṃ vidyādākṛtyādyāstataḥ param
viśeṣatastryahādau tu aghārāvājyapūrvakam
āghārārājyapūrveṇa tato naimittikaṃ caret
sviṣṭakṛdvyāhṛtiścaiva vāruṇādyāstathā hi ṣaṭ
dvijātīnāṃ vivāhe tu naityikaṃ prathamaṃ bhavet
dadyādekaṃ ca nityaṃ ca pṛthaṅ nityaṃ na cācaret
paryagnikaraṇe caiva udvāhe mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ
candrādityau cotpavane vīkṣaṇe ca diśastathā
prokṣaṇyāṃ sthāpane durgā ime lakṣmī pratiṣṭhitā
homaṃ kuryāddvijaśreṣṭhā vidhiṃ kuryātsamāhitaḥ
eteṣu devatāḥ proktā dvijātīnāṃ hitāya ca
devatāḥ sarvā jñātavyā etā yajñe samāhitaiḥ
adhidaivena jānīyātkaravalyāṃ paṃcaphalaṃ yataḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge caturdaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
atha vakṣyāmi saccaiṣāṃ devānāṃ dhyānamuttamam
asya yajñe parijñānājjihvā samyakphalapradā
hiraṇyavarṇāṃ prathamāṃ vahnijihvāṃ mahādyutim
kanakāḍhyakarāṃ devīṃ hiraṇyākhyeṣṭasiddhaye
kanakāṃ dvibhujāṃ śuklāṃ hastābhyāṃ darbhasaṃyutām
kamaṃḍaluṃ ca bibhrāṇāṃ numaḥ sādhakasiddhidām
śaṃkhacakrābhayavarāndadhatīṃ praṇamāmyaham
bhinnāṃjanacayaprakhyāṃ svarṇakuṃbhaṃ tu vāmataḥ
dakṣiṇena varāraktāṃ dhārayaṃtīṃ namāmyaham
suprabhāmaṇḍalābhā ca karābhyāṃ tatkṛtāñjaliḥ
japākusumasaṃkāśā bahurūpā sakhe mama
śubhadā syādbhujaiḥ śubhrā sahasraṃ dadhatī parān
japāpuṣpadhare nityaṃ satīrūpe prasīda me
mūlena vīkṣayetsthānaṃ maṃtreṇa khananaṃ matam
trisūtrīkaraṇaṃ kuryāccatuḥsūtraṃ nipātayet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīyabhāge pañcadaśoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
pratiṣṭhāyāḥ pūrvadine kuryāddevādhivāsanam
dhānyapratiṣṭhāṃ tasyaiva yūpaṃ cāpi yathāvidhi
rātrau mūlāgre ca ghaṭe sthāpayedgaṇanāyakam
saṃpūjya ca vidhānena digīśāṃśca tathā grahān
brahmāṇaṃ ca taḍāgeṣu varuṇaṃ śāntiyāgake
somaṃ ca maṃḍale sūryaṃ pāde viṣṇuṃ tathaiva ca
śaive śaivaṃ tathā proktaṃ prapāyāmatha vāruṇam
ārāme caiva brahmāṇaṃ pādyādyairapi cārcayet
sunābheti ca maṃtreṇa dvābhyāmeva viśiṣyate
kāṃḍāditi ca maṃtreṇa dadyāddūrvāśataṃ tataḥ
siṃdoriveti siṃdūraṃ viśvāmiti ca mārjanam
samicchetyañjanaṃ dadyādduḥsthaṃ surāsurā japan
adyaiva tena maṃtreṇa sthāpayedatha vāriṇā
yogaṃ yogadṛḍhaṃ japtvā pavitraṃ vinyasettataḥ
dvābhyāṃ tailagaṃdhayutaṃ śrīsūktenāpi puṣpakam
anumīmahatāti dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ tataḥ
viśvāmīti ca nimnyaṃtakāṃḍāditi tathākṣatam
tato yamagṛhādbāhye maṇḍapāṃtaramāśritaḥ
sunātīti vaco dadyāttataścāvāhayetprabhum
tatrādhivāsanaṃ kuryādrakṣayecca surakṣibhiḥ
ācāryo yajamānaśca ṛtvigbhojanamācaret
akṣāralavaṇānyāsī dadhi viśvaṃ tilāṃstyajet
ādhāraṇaṃ cādhivāsaṃ vakṣye tatrānusārataḥ
pañcabhirbrāhmaṇaiḥ sārdhaṃ gandharvā iti vismaran
dadyādgandhaṃ tailayutaṃ gandhadvāretyṛcā punaḥ
yāḥ phalinīti ca phalaṃ pūgatānāmavarjanam
kauśikīruttamosīti dadyātkhaḍgaṃ sutīkṣṇakam
śrīśca te iti kusumaṃ viśvānīti ca saṃpaṭhan
nirmathanaṃ tataḥ kāryamiti sādhāraṇo vidhiḥ
vinādhivāsanaṃ viprāḥ pratiṣṭhānaṃ samācaret
na tatphalamavāpnoti vivāhe śaraṇaṃ diśet
tataḥ prayatnataḥ kāryaṃ pūrvāhne rātriyogataḥ
nitye naimittike kāmye kārayetkuṇḍamaṇḍapam
sthaṃḍile hasta mātreṇa vālukānirmiteapi ca
ekaikāṃgulako viprāḥ pīṭhe nāsti vicāraṇā
navapañcaka kuṇḍe ca lakṣādāvapi śaṃkayā
tato daśāṃgule pakṣe daśāṃgaṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ
kāṣṭhaṃ pattraṃ ca puṣpaṃ ca modakaṃ piṣṭakaṃ tathā
etadvai gṛhapakṣe ca viṣṇupakṣe tilāditaḥ
śaive yavāditaḥ kāryā śākte puṣpādito bhavet
sūrye pakṣe piṣṭakādi gopāle kṛśarāditaḥ
kṛṣṇe ca karavīrādi śrīphalāni ca traipure
sārasvate ca śrīvṛkṣe mokṣakāme nigadyate
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ṣoḍaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
aṣṭau hotāro dvārapālāthāṣṭau aṣṭau kāryā brāhmaṇā yājakāśca
sarve śuddhā lakṣitā lakṣaṇādyairekaḥ kāryo jāpakosminmahātmā
divyairgadhai rgaṃdhamālyaiḥ suvarṇaistailaṃ kāryaṃ brāhmaṇāḥ pañcaviṃśāḥ
āvāpyaistu dviguṇairvai balīyo divyairvastrairarhaṇādakṣiṇābhiḥ
pratiṣṭhādiṣu sarveṣu samyagviprānathārhayet
pradadyādarhaṇaṃ samyakpaścātpātraṃ nivedayet
pratyekaṃ brāhmaṇā yajñe vedamantreṣu pāragāḥ
ācāryo yadi kāryeṣu varayeddaśa govrajān
viśiṣṭānāmabhāveapi kuryātkuśamayāndvijān
kuśapratikṛtau cāpi svagotraṃ svaṃ dvijaṃ vinā
na kuryāccaraṇoddeśaṃ tathā praharasaṃhatim
gotrādikīrtanāṃteṣu svanāmoddeśamīrayan
tulāpuruṣadāne ca tathā ca hāṭakācale
na pātraṃ pratikṛtyarthaṃ na cālaṃ sodakaṃ tathā
śūdrasaṃskārakaścaiva kṛpaṇo gaṇayājakaḥ
prāyaścittagṛhītaśca rājayājakapaiśunau
śūdragehanivāsī ca śūdrapreraka eva ca
svalpakaṇṭho vāmanaśca vṛṣalīpatireva ca
bandhudveṣī gurudveṣī bhāryādveṣī tathaiva ca
hīnāṃgaścaiva vṛddhāṃgo bhagnadaṃtaśca dāṃbhikaḥ
śvitrī kuṣṭhī kulodbhūto nidrālurvyasanārthakaḥ
adīkṣitaḥ kadaryaśca caṃḍarogī galadvraṇaḥ
mahāvraṇī ca udarī yajñapātraṃ na kārayet
varaṇāṃte tu pātrāṇāṃ pūjāmantrāñchṛṇu dvija
brahmamūrtistvamācāryaḥ saṃsārātpāhi māṃ vibho
ciraṃ me śāśvatī kīrtiryāvallokāścarācarāḥ
prasīda tvaṃ maheśāna pratiṣṭhākarmasiddhaye
tvamādiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsārārṇava tārakaḥ
jñānāmṛtapradācāryo yajurveda namoastu te
praphullakanakābhāsa bhāsvarāsurabhūṣita
ṣaḍaṃgavedavedajña ṛtviṅgamokṣaprado bhava
praviśya maṇḍalaṃ viprā svasthāne sthāpayetkramāt
vedyāḥ paścimabhāge tu ācāryaṃ sthāpayedbudhaḥ
kuṇḍasyāgre tu brahmāṇaṃ maṇḍalasyaiva paścime
dvāridvāri prayatnena dvārapālānanukramāt
nārāyaṇasvarūpeṇa yajñaṃ me saphalaṃ kuru
yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu yajurvedārthatattvavit
makhaśreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena maṃtrāḥ suvistṛtāḥ
makhaśreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu eṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
māṃgalyaṃ karmaṇāṃ nityaṃ sarvajñaṃ jñānarūpi ṇam
pālaya tvaṃ diśaḥ sarvā vidiśaśca tathā imam
dikpālarūpiṇaṃ vipraṃ yajñasiddhau namā myaham
na saṃkalpaṃ caredyāgaṃ vrataṃ devārcanaṃ tathā
saṃkalpamūlaḥ kāmo vai yajñāḥ saṃkalpasaṃbhavāḥ
kāmātparo naiva bhavenniṣkā moapi na śobhanaḥ
tasmātkāmamayaṃ dharmaṃ vinā mokṣaṃ na cācaret
na kuryātsthāpane caiva kuryādvai maṃḍalāṃtare
gṛhītvauduṃbaraṃ pātraṃ vāripūrṇaṃ guṇānvitam
jalāśayārāmakūpa saṃkalpe pūrvadiṅmukhaḥ
sādhāraṇe cottarāsyo grahayajñe tu saṃmukhaḥ
mahāvrate pratiṣṭhāyāṃ pātraṃ tāmraṃ hiraṇmayam
rājatāśmamayaṃ sāṃgaṃ yadyajñeṣu praśasyate
yajñīyapātrapuṭakaṃ hastasthāne prakīrtitam
aiśyānyāṃ nikṣipettoyaṃ pratiṣṭhāyāṃ ca pūrvataḥ
ākāśe nikṣipedyāge vrate īśepi nityake
śuktikāṃsyādihastaiśca tāmraraupyādibhistathā
praṇavaṃ pūrvamuccārya yajedyajñeśvaraṃ smaret
gaṅgā cādityacaṃdrau ca dyaurbhūmī rātrivāsarau
sūryaḥ somo yamaḥ kālo mahābhūtāni paṃca ca
ete śubhāśubhāsyeha karmaṇo nava sākṣiṇaḥ
ityuccārya nyaseddharmaṃ dhyātvā puṣpāñjaliṃ sṛjet
amṛtaṃ kṛtyapātre ca oṃ tatsaditi nirdiśet
dharmaḥ śubhravapuḥ sitāṃbaradharaḥ kāryordhvadeśe vṛṣo hastābhyāmabhayaṃ varaṃ ca satataṃ rūpaṃ paraṃ yo dadhat
sarvaprāṇisukhāvahaḥ kṛta dhiyāṃ mokṣaikahetuḥ sadā soyaṃ pātu jagaṃti caiva satataṃ bhūyātsatāṃ bhūtaye
yajñasaṃbaṃdhiviprāṃśca ekāhenaiva yojayet
havirdravyāṇi yāni syuraṣṭayāgāṃtarepi ca
punaḥpunarniyojyāni brāhmaṇā haviragnayaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāgesaptadaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
sūta uvāca
māghādimāseṣvapi ṣaṭsu kāryā yogapratiṣṭhā ṛṣibhiḥ praṇītā
lagne śubhasthe śubhavīkṣite vā kāryā pratiṣṭhā ca jalāśayānām
śuddhā dvitīyā ca tathā tṛtīyā trayodaśī cāpi tathaiva viprāḥ
prāṇapratiṣṭhā ca jalāśayāderetāḥ praśastāstithayo bhavaṃti
aprāpya caitāni śubhāni yāni kāryā pratiṣṭhā viṣuvadvaye ca
ṣaḍaśītilokāpyayanadvayena yugādike puṇyādine śubhe ca
kāryā taḍāgādijalāśayasya prācyāṃ pratiṣṭhā atha cottare vā
sucāru īṣatpravaṇe ca deśe suvartulaḥ ṣoḍaśahastamaṃḍapaḥ
pūrvādidvāreṣu catuṣṭayeṣu plakṣādibhistoraṇakaiḥ sureśaḥ
ūrdhve ca hastānamitāni yāni vicitramālyāṃbarabhūṣitāni
bhūmau yathā prīti ca hastakāni bhavaṃti caitānyapi toraṇāni
sarvatra yāgepi hi maṃḍapasya kāryā dhvajā dikṣu vidikṣu śubhrāḥ dikpālavarṇābhapatākayuktā madhye ca vai nīlapatākayuktāḥ
dhvajāśca yasmindaśahastasammitāstasminpatākā api pañcahastāḥ
aratnimātrā yadi mūlabhāge paṃcāṃgu lāgre vinibaddhagūḍhāḥ
dvāre ca tasmiṃśca nirūpitā vā raṃbhā supuṣpā sukhaśāḍvalāśca vacābhivṛkṣottarapaṃcahastāḥ sapaṃcaśākhā api tora ṇāni
puṣṭadvaye sūtritaṃ veṣṭayecca tathekṣukāṇḍairatha yāgamaṇḍapam
vedistathā maṃḍapa madhyabhāge kāryā ca koṇesthituṣādihīnā
vedyāṃ parityajya daśāṃgulāni aiśānyata strīṇi tathā parāṇi
prāsāde ca taḍāge ca mahārāme tathaiva ca
kuṃḍāni kuryānnava kuṃḍapakṣe vedyāstathoccairavidikṣu caiva
sarvāṇi sarvatra ca mekhalāni ṣaḍasrapaṃcāsrasamekhalāni
aṣṭāsrajānyabjatrikoṇakāni tathārddhacandraṃ caturasrakaṃ ca
kuṇḍasya pūrvottaradigvibhāge sthāpyo ghaṭaścandanacāruliptaḥ mālyāmbarācchāditapūrṇapāthāḥ savṛttapatraśca suvarṇagarbhaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge aṣṭādaśoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
gato yāgagṛhādanyanmaṇḍalāṃtaramāśritaḥ
yajamānastathā nityaṃ karma kṛtvā yathāvidhi
paṃca devānnamaskṛtya tathā yajñeśvaraṃ harim
saṃkalpaṃ ca tataḥ kṛtvā brāhmaṇā nāmanujñathā
vedavyāsādipraṇītaṃ yathāśāstranidarśanam
yathāyathā svatantroktaṃ puṇyā raṇyābhidhāyakam
jalāśayapratiṣṭhāyāṃ karidhye vidhivaddvijāḥ
yathāyathā ca kalpoktaṃ yathākuṇḍaṃ vidhānataḥ
sādhivāsaṃ yathaivaikaḥ puṇyā raṇyavidhāyakaḥ
jalāśayapratiṣṭhāṃ ca kariṣye vidhivaddvijāḥ
saṃkalpamevaṃ kṛtvā tu vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ samācaret
mātṛyāgaṃ puraskṛtya vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ samāpayet
bheryādighoṣeṇa sumaṃgalena padyaṃ likhedatra saṣoḍaśākṣaram
brahmeśānvarayetsarvānācāryaṃ tu viśeṣataḥ
svarṇakuṃḍalayugmena tathā tāmrādibhājanaiḥ
nānāratnaiśca vastraiśca ācāryaṃ varayedbudhaḥ
yathāmānaṃ yathāśakti yathābhivṛṇuyādbudhaḥ
tataḥ sarvauṣadhībhiśca yajamānaḥ sapatnikaḥ
āpohiṣṭhetimantreṇa snāpayāmāsuraprajāḥ
yavagodhūmanīvāratilaśyāmākaśālayaḥ
priyaṃguvrīhaya ścāṣṭau sarvauṣadhigaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
tataḥ śuklāmbaradharaḥ śuklamālyānulepanaḥ
brāhmaṇairabhyanujñātaḥ purohitapuraḥsaraḥ
nānāmaṃgalaghoṣeṇa bherīpaṭahanisvanaiḥ
paścimaṃ dvāramāsādya praviśed yāgamaṇḍapam
carake pūjayedvighnaṃ gaṃgāṃ ca yamunāṃ tathā
pārśvayoścārdhato lakṣmīṃ pratihāramanukramāt
vediṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya namaskuryādyathāvidhi
svasti vācyaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā paṃca devānprapūjayet
bhūtotsādaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā vikirānvikiredbhuvi
apakrāmaṃtu ye bhūtā ye cāsminviprakārakāḥ
yasmānno nāmni vartaṃte yajñamātraṃ pravartatām
pūjayedāsanaṃ paścātsvakīyaṃ puṣpacaṃdanaiḥ
namonaṃtāsanāyeti tathā padmāsanāya ca
vimalāsanāya ca namo namaḥ sārāsanāya ca
tato bhūmitale vāmahastaṃ dattvā paṭhennaraḥ
pṛthvi tvayā dhṛtā lokā devi tvaṃ viṣṇunā dhṛtā
tvaṃ ca dhāraya māṃ nityaṃ pavitramāsanaṃ kuru
sūryāyārghyaṃ tato dattvā guruṃ natvā kṛtāñjaliḥ
devaṃ hṛtpadmake nītvā prāṇāyāmatrayaṃ caret
gaṇānāṃ tveti maṃtreṇa vrahmāṇaṃ tadanaṃtaram
ābrahmanniti ṛcā tadviṣṇoriti saṃsmaran
vāsudevaṃ tataḥ paścādbalibhirgandhacaṃdanaiḥ
tato devaśarīraṃ tu navamāsādya triṃśatam
tato rājādhirājena bhūtaśuddhiṃ samācaret
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ śaṃkhakundendusaprabham
kirīṭakuṇḍalayutaṃ sitaṃ paṃkajadhāriṇam
śuklamālyāṃbaraṃ śuklaṃ śuklagaṃghānulepanam
ahituṇḍāsanasthaṃ ca pāśahastaṃ mahābalam
rājīvalocanaṃ nityaṃ nāgalokopaśobhitam
makaragrāhakūrmādyairnānājalacarairvṛtam
jalāśayagataṃ devaṃ ciṃtayejjalaśāyinam
tato nyāsaṃ prakurvīta pacāṃgatvāvaśobhitam
arghyapātraṃ tataḥ kṛtvā tribhāgajalapūritam
aṣṭadhā mūlamaṃtraṃ ca japtvā tenodakena ca
āsanaṃ yāgavastūni prokṣayettena vāriṇā
tanno aruṇaḥ pracodayāditi snānaṃ samācaret
tato gaṇeśamaiśānyāmāgneyyāṃ gurupādukām
dharmādharmādikānsarvāntsattvādīnatha cārcayet
sūryasomajalādīnāṃ maṇḍalāni yathākramam
madhye śaktiṃ ca kṣīrodamanaṃtaṃ pṛthivīṃ tathā
kūrmaṃ cādhāraśaktiṃ ca sumeruṃ mandaraṃ tathā
tataḥ śvetaṃ ca kusumaṃ sākṣataṃ yogamāyayā
gṛhītvā pūrvavaddeśe sthāpayetkalaśopari
āvāhanaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā mantreṇānena maṃtravit
yajñabhāgaṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ tvāmevāvāhayāmyaham
evamāvāhya lokeśamaṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet
gāyatryā snāpayitvā tu dadyātpādyādikatrayam
puṣpāñjaliṃ tato dattvā mūlamaṃtreṇa deśikaḥ
pūrvādipatramūleṣu dharmādīnpūjayedbudhaḥ
sattvādyāḥ pūjayettatra teṣāmeva varāṃganāḥ
jñānaṃ dharmaṃ ca somaṃ ca rajaḥ sattvaṃ tamastathā
patrāgre lokapālānāmagnyāgryādīnāyudhāṃstathā
karṇikādakṣiṇe pūrvaṃ vāme cāpi śacīpatim
pūrvapatre tu brahmāṇaṃ pūjayetsitapaṅkajaiḥ
pīṭhamantreṣu pūrvādibrahmāṇaṃ ca śivaṃ tathā
viṣṇuṃ cāpi gaṇeśaṃ ca pṛthivīṃ gaṃdhacandanaiḥ
japenmantraṃ sāṣṭaśataṃ sahasraṃ vijapedbudhaḥ
jānubhyāmavanīṃ gatvā vijayākhyastavaṃ paṭhet
īśānādipīṭhakoṇeṣu kamalāmaṃbikāṃ tathā
nairṛtyāṃ viśva karmāṇaṃ vāyavye tu sarasvatīm
pūrvādidvāradeśe tu marutaṃ cāvahādikam
āgneyādiṣu koṇeṣu bahiṣpīṭhaṃ tato jayet
piśācānrākṣasānbhūtānvetā lāṃśca tathā kramāt
hastikarṇo viśālākhyaḥ saptarakṣogaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
vivasvaṃtaḥ sudaṃtaśca ete bhūtagaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ
aṃgado nīlakarṇoasau vasaṃto yāvakastathā
ghorarūpā mahākāyaḥ vetālāśca prakīrtitāḥ
gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatairbhaktaṃ sarve devā grahādayaḥ
dhyānavarṇānurūpeṇa pūjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ
yavavidrumasaṃkāśaṃ siṃdūrāruṇasaprabham
ākṛṣṇeneti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetkalaśopari
ihāgaccheti cāvāhya pādyārghyaiśca pṛthagvidhaiḥ
gaṃdhapuṣpādibhirbhaktyā pūjayettaṃ yathāvidhi
baliṃ ca lohitaṃ dadyātpāyasaṃ dadhikhaṃḍakam
ghṛtaliptaṃ ca śālyannaṃ patākāṃ raktavarṇikām
śvetāṃbaradharaṃ śvetaṃ śuklagaṃdhānu lepanam
dvibhujaṃ varadaṃ devaṃ gadāhastaṃ mahābalam
śuklapadmāsanasthaṃ cāśvaṃ dadyācchvetabhūṣitam
imaṃ devā iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetpūrvadigdale
sitavastraiśca puṣpaiśca śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ
raktamālyāṃbaraṃ devaṃ raktābharaṇabhūṣitam
kirīṭakuṃḍaladharaṃ meṣakaṃṭhaṃ caturbhujam
varadaṃ yajñanāśaṃ ca śūlaśaktigadādharam
ciṃtayetparayā bhaktyā maṃgalaṃ dharaṇīsutam
atasīpuṣpasaṃkāśaṃ karṇikārasamaprabham
rauhiṇeyaṃ mahākāyaṃ nīlanīrajalocanam
praśāṃtavadanaṃ devaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam
nānābharaṇasaṃpūrṇaṃ mṛgendravaravāhanam
pūjayedgandhapuṣpādyaiḥ pītagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ
vastraiḥ pītapatākābhirbalibhiḥ kṛśarānvitaiḥ
pītavarṇaṃ guruṃ dhyāyetpītapadmāsanasthitam
pītābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam
varadaṃ daṃḍahastaṃ ca sākṣasūtrakamaṃḍalum
bṛhaspataya iti maṃtreṇa nairṛtyāṃ diśi saṃsthitam
pītacandanagaṃdhaiśca pītavastrādibhūṣaṇaiḥ
dhūpaiḥ pītapatākābhiḥ pītodakanivedanaiḥ
caturbhujaṃ mahākāyaṃ varadaṃ daṃḍadhāriṇam
mahābāhuṃ viśālākṣaṃ sākṣasūtrakamaṃḍalum
stūyamānaṃ muniśreṣṭhaiḥ sevitaṃ daityapuṅgavaiḥ
siṃhāsanagataṃ devaṃ nīlendīvaralocanam
vilasatpuṇḍarīkasya mālābhirupaśobhitam
nānādaityendraputrāṃśca pāṭhayantaṃ muhurmuhuḥ
nānāśastrāstracaturaṃ nānāśāstraviśāradam
evaṃ dhyātvā bhṛguśreṣṭhaṃ japannannātparisrutam
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ saktubhiḥ kṣīrasaṃyutaiḥ
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā puṃḍarīkākṣatairapi
dhyāyetsauriṃ caturbāhuṃ śūlahastaṃ varapradam
indranīlanibhaṃ śyāmaṃ divya bāṇadhanurdharam
nīlāṃbaradharaṃ nīlapadmamālopaśobhitam
ghorarūpaṃ mahākāyaṃ chāyāhṛdayananda nam
śannodevīti maṃtreṇa vāyavyāṃ diśi vinyaset
kṛṣṇacaṃdanavastraiśca kṛṣṇamālyānulepanaiḥ
dhūpairnīlapatākābhirbalibhirmāṣamiśritaiḥ
dhūmravarṇaṃ sadā ketuṃ gadāhastaṃ varapradam
dvibhujaṃ bhīmakāyaṃ ca dhūmrākṣaṃ dhūmravāsasam
ketuṃ kṛṇvanniti mantreṇa aiśā nyāṃ sthāpayeddiśi
dhūmravarṇaiśca mālyaiśca dhūmragaṃdhānulepanaiḥ
dhūmradhūmrapatākābhirbalibhirmāṣamiśritaiḥ
lokapālānahaṃ vakṣye sarvasiddhipradāyakān
yeṣu pūjitamātreṣu nālabhyaṃ vidyate kvacit
devarājaṃ tato dhyāyetpuṣpabāṇacayaprabham
dvibhujaṃ pītasaṃkāśaṃ nīlendīvaralocanam
indrāṇīṃ ciṃtayedvāme utpaladvayadhāriṇīm
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā dhṛpagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ
nānāvidhopahāraiśca patākābhirdhvajairapi
baliṃ kṣīrānvitaṃ dadyānmodakaṃ sitaśarkarām
uttaptasvarṇasaṃkāśaṃ vītihotraṃ caturbhujam
jvālāvitānasaṃraktaṃ mūrdhni saptaśikhānvitam
varadaṃ vibhayaṃ mālāṃ dakṣe sūtraṃ kamaṇḍalum
trinetraṃ raktanayanaṃ jaṭāmukuṭamaṃḍitam
nīlāñjanacayaprakhyaṃ nīlasiṃhāsanasthitam
mahāmahiṣamārūḍhaṃ daṃḍapāśadhara vibhum
karālavadanaṃ bhīmaṃ jvālā ghūrṇitalocanam
ghoradaṃṣṭrākarālaiśca kiṃkarāṇāṃ gaṇairvṛtam
mahiṣaṃ ciṃtayedvāme citraguptaṃ ca dakṣiṇe
rākṣasendraṃ mahākāyaṃ kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ dvibāhukam
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ khaṅgahastaṃ mahāba lam
varamuktāvimānasthaṃ ghorarūpaṃ jaleśvaram
eṣa ta iti maṃtreṇa nairṛtyāṃ sthāpayeddiśi
kṛṣṇacandanavastraiśca kṛṣṇamālyānulepanaiḥ
dhūpaiḥ kṛṣṇapatākābhirbalibhirmāṣamiśritaiḥ
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ śaṃkhakundendusaprabham
dvibhujaṃ pāśahastaṃ ca sundarāṅgaṃ varapradam
samīraṇaṃ kuñjaravarṇasannibhaṃ mṛgādhirūḍhaṃ dvibhujaṃ dvinetram
dhvajāṃbaraṃ cāpi dadhānamekaṃ nīlāṃbaraṃ meghagaṇairvṛtaṃ ca
nīlacandanavastraiśca nīlamālyānulepanaiḥ
dhūpairnīlapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasairapi
dhyāyeddvinetraṃ dvibhujaṃ dhaneśaṃ pītāṃbaraṃ vai naravāhanaṃ ca
dhūpaiḥ pītapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasairapi
snigdhakarpūrasaṃkāśaṃ tuṣārakiraṇaprabham
uttaṃgavṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ trinetraṃ bhasmabhūṣitam
kapālamālinaṃ tadvatkhaṇḍeṃdukṛtaśekharam
evaṃ dhyātvā maheśānaṃ sthāpayedīśadigdale
sitadhvajapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasādibhiḥ
tvamīśāna iti maṃtreṇa ṛṣiṃ chandaḥ samīrayan
brahmāṇaṃ raktagaurāgaṃ śoṇa padmasamaprabham
rājahaṃsasamāyuktaṃ vimānavarasaṃsthitam
sruksruvau dakṣiṇe haste vāme daṃḍaṃ kamaṇḍalum
ājyasthālīṃ tathaivāgre kuśāṃśca samidhaṃ tathā
vāmapārśve tu sāvitrīṃ dakṣiṇe tu sarasvatīm
nānābhakṣyopacāraiśca pūjayedgaṃdhacandanaiḥ
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhirbalibhiścājyapāyasaiḥ
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmadhāriṇaṃ jagadīśvaram
ādhārabhūtaṃ jagatāṃ svarṇayajñopavītinam
nānābharaṇasampannaṃ phaṇāśatasamanvitam
oṃ namostviti maṃtreṇa sthāpayedvaruṇāṃtare
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhirbalibhiścaiva nirmitaiḥ
tato maṇḍalapūrve tu brahmāṇaṃ pītavāsasam
bibhrataṃ ca śrutaṃ tadvattathā daṃḍakamaṇḍalū
dakṣiṇe tryaṃbakaṃ dhyāyecchūlakhaṭvāṃdhāriṇam
varadaṃ ḍamarudharaṃ nāgayajñopavītinam
kapālamālinaṃ devaṃ bhujaṃgābharaṇānvitam
trinetraṃ kundasaṃkāśaṃ bhūtapretagaṇairvṛtam
atasīpuṣpasaṃkāśaṃ hārakeyūrabhūṣitam
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam
dakṣiṇe ca gadāṃ cakraṃ vāme śaṃkhaṃ sapadmakam
śriyā dakṣiṇato vāme sarasvatyā samanvitam
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetpaścime tataḥ
pūjayedgandhapuṣpādyaiḥ pāyasena ghṛtena ca
gaṇeśaṃ tu caturbāhuṃ vyālayajñopavītinam
paraśuṃ laguḍaṃ vāme dakṣiṇe daṃḍamutpalam
mūṣakasthaṃ mahākāyaṃ śaṅkhakundeṃdusaprabham
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ sarvāpattivināśanam
uttaptajāṃbūnadahemasannibhāṃ lakṣmīṃ sarojāsanasaṃsthitāṃ śubhām
vāme sarojaṃ dadhatīṃ tathaiva haste ca dakṣe dhṛtacāmarāṃ ca
śrīśca teti ca mantreṇa aiśānyāṃ maṃḍalādbahiḥ
modakaṃ paramānnaṃ ca yavakṣīraṃ nivedayet
tato devīmaṃbikāṃ divyarūpāṃ brahmeṃdrādyaiḥ stūyamānāṃ trinetrām
siṃheśasthāṃ taptajāṃbūnadābhāṃ candrārddhenābaddhamauliṃ jaṭābhiḥ
brahmeṃdrādyairdurjayāṃ māhiṣāsyaṃ tīkṣṇairastrairdānavaṃ mardayaṃtīm
śūlaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ bāṇaśaktī ca tīkṣṇe khaḍgaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ bibhratīṃ dakṣiṇena
cāpaṃ pāśaṃ kheṭakaṃ cāṃkuśaṃ ca ghaṇṭāṃ vāme bibhratīṃ vai kuṭhāram śiraśchedādardhajātaṃ kabandhaṃ khaḍgaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ bibhratīṃ daityarājam
nāgaiḥ pāśairveṣṭayitvā samaṃ tācchūlenainaṃ nighnatīṃ dehamadhye
sendrairdevaiḥ stūyamānāṃ suveṇīṃ gaṃdharvādyaiḥ siddhasaṃghaiśca sevyām nānāvastrairbhūṣaṇairdīpyamānāṃ dhyāyeddevīmaṃbikāmujvalaṃtīm vastrairmālyairyakṣadhūpairvitānairbhakṣyairbhojyairmodakaiḥ pāyasaiśca
māṃsaiḥ piṣṭaiśchāgalāḍhyairaśeṣaiḥ pūjyā devī caṃḍikāabhīṣṭadā ca
śyāmāṃ ca pṛthivīṃ dhyāyetpaṃkajadvayadhāriṇīm
maṇḍūkasthāṃ dvibhujāṃ syonā pṛthivīti cārcayet
nairṛtyāṃ viśvakarmāṇaṃ dvibhujaṃ ṭaṃkadhāriṇam
utpalaṃ dakṣiṇe haste padmasthaṃ pītavāsasam
svasthāṃ sarasvatīṃ dhyāyedvaradābhayadāyinīm
pītavastrāṃ sumukuṭāṃ devagandharvasevitām
yāmadhā iti mantreṇa pūjayetsitacaṃdanaiḥ
baliṃ śveta caruṃ dadyātkṛśaraṃ yāvakaṃ tathā
sthāpayedvāmadigbhāge kuṃdapuṣpaiḥ prapūjayet
pūrvādidvāradeśe tu pūjayecca marudgaṇaiḥ
agnyādiṣu ca koṇeṣu bahirbhūtānsamācaret
piśācā rākṣasā bhūtā vetālakapijātayaḥ
nirṇāsāścaiva te sarve raudrā vikṛtarūpiṇaḥ
tato maṇḍala madhye tu vāruṇaṃ pūrvavartmanā
kūrmaṃ kūrmākṛtiṃ kuryācchuddhasvarṇena sattamāḥ
pādaṃ pādena mānena aṃgulaṃ parimaṇḍalam
prauṣṭhīmatsyaṃ tathā kuryātkulīraṃ tāmranirmitam
tenaikasya vinirmāṇaṃ dvyaṃgulāyāmavistṛtam
tathā mānena maṇḍūkaṃ tāṃ bhūmiṃ munisattamāḥ
sitacandanavastraiśca pūjanīyāḥ samaṃtataḥ
yāvakaiśca viśeṣeṇa bahumaṃtraviśāradān
pañcāṃgaṃ śivasūktaṃ ca yathā viṣṇorharasya ca
jayāgrataḥ puruṣasūktamadbhyaḥ saṃbhūtameva ca
āśuḥ śiśānamārabhya vayaṃ moṣāṃgarudrake
yajjāgrataścāgneśca viṣṇorarāṭameva ca
samastādhyāyarudreṇa śatarudrākhyamīritam
saptāṃgarudrasya puṣpadaṃtaṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchaṃdaḥ
tryaṃbakamiti aṃguṣṭhābhyāṃ namaḥ
tripādūrdhvamiti tarjanībhyāṃ svāhā
vedāhamiti madhyamābhyāṃ vaṣaṭ
amīṣāṃ citramiti anāmikābhyāṃ hum
yavāgūṃ soma iti kaniṣṭhikābhyāṃ vauṣaṭ
yajjāgrata iti hṛdayāya namaḥ
sahasraśīrṣeti śirase svāhā
adbhyaḥ saṃbhūta iti śikhāyai vaṣaṭ
āśuḥ śiśāna iti kavacābhyāṃ huṃ namaste rudra iti netratrayāya vauṣaṭ
rūḍhaṃ brahmanniti astrāya phaṭ
caturdikṣu choṭikāṃdānam iti sarvāṃgeṣu
home pravartamāne tu sūktānanyāṃśca vai japet
prajapedvāruṇaṃ sūktaṃ tathā ca pālasūktakam
rātrisūktaṃ ca raudraṃ ca pāvamānaṃ samujjvalam
śāktaṃ raudraṃ ca saumyaṃ ca kūṣmāṇḍaṃ jātavedasam
vairājaṃ pauruṣaṃ sūktaṃ sauvarṇaṃ rudrasaṃhitām
śaiśavaṃ pañcanirayaṃ gāyatryaṃ jyeṣṭhasāma ca
vāmadevyaṃ bṛhatsāma tathā caiva rathaṃtaram
govrataṃ ca vikarṇaṃ ca rakṣoghnaṃ pāvanaṃ smṛtam
gāyaṃtaṃ brāhmaṇā ye ca pūrvādidvāradeśataḥ
rudrādhyāyaṃ ca pañcāṃgaṃ raudra ityabhidhīyate
āpyāyasveti ca catuḥ saumyaṃ sūktaṃ pracakṣate
īśāvetyādi svāṃgaṃ ca kauṣmāṃḍaṃ daśamaṃ smṛtam
ṣoḍaśaṃ tu vibhrāḍ vṛhatsauraṃ sūktaṃ prakīrtitam
saurasūktaṃ dhruvosīti iṣavo maṃgalaṃ smṛtam
rātrisūktaṃ hi yajvāgne rakṣoghnaṃ śaivasūktakam
gaṇānāntveti pañca āpohiṣṭheti ca trayam
pavamānaṃ tu tadviddhi pāvamānaṃ tu ṣoḍaśa
tadarddhārddhaṃ ca ārāme kūpe tvekaṛcaṃ japet
saṃskuryādīkṣaṇādyaiśca saṃpūjya ca parasparam
vāgīśvaraṃ samabhyarcya vāgīśvaryā samanvitam
prāgeva tasya juhuyātsahasraṃ ca śataṃ tathā
tilājyaiḥ pāyasairvātha patrapuṣpākṣatena ca
ūrjena samidhā kuryādaṣṭāṣṭau svagṛheṣvapi
indreśvaramārutānāṃ tilājyena ghṛtena vā
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsvairmaṃtrairyathākramāt
digīśānāṃ ca pratyekamaṣṭāṣṭau ca viśeṣataḥ
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādājyena ca viśeṣataḥ
śivaṃ prajā patiṃ viṣṇuṃ durgāṃ ca kamalāmapi
sarasvatīṃ ca vidhivatpṛthivyā iti pāvakaiḥ
bhūtebhyoapyāhutiṃ dadyādevaṃ māsadvayaṃ kramāt
anyeṣāṃ madhurāktena tilalājairyayākramam
viṣṇuṃ caiva tu vāyavye durgāyāśca tathottare
kamalāyāśca īśāne īśānasya sabhūtakam
pakṣe vai pañcakuṇḍe tu pūrvādīnāṃ krameṇa tu
ekakuṃḍe grahānkṛtvā kṛtvā balabhidā saha
paścime yasya yāgasya durgāyāścottare diśi
īśāne bhūtayakṣmā ca juhuyāddeśikottamaḥ
viṣṇvādidevatānāṃ ca agrakuṃḍe vidhīyate
dvitīye pūjanaṃ kuryāddhomaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi
balidānaṃ tṛtīye tu caturthīkaṃ caturthake
nīrājanaṃ pañcame tu pañcāhasādhyako vidhiḥ
udaṅmukhaḥ prāṅmukho vāpyaiśānyādi krameṇa tu
prādakṣiṇyena yajñaṃ tu mantraiḥ parisamūhanam
mantrapūrvaṃ sāgnikānāṃ niragnestuṣṭikena tu
digvidikṣu paristīrya mahāyāgeṣu sarvadā
prāyaścitte vaiśvadeve sāyaṃprātaḥ pratīṣu ca
māraṇoccāṭahomeṣu tathā saṃkalpitākṛtī
pratyavāyakule kvāpi tatra nityākṛtiṃ vinā
tūryahomaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā tūṣṇīmeva jitendriyaḥ
ante sviṣṭakṛtaṃ dadyādvidhānaṃ tasya bhoḥ śṛṇu
ghṛtāhutiṃ sviṣṭakṛcca dvijasaṃskārakarmasu
ghṛtaiḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ dadyādyāgādau parivarjayet
sarvauṣadhyudakasnānaṃ karidaṃtotthamuṣṇayā
trigandhaṃ ca triśītaṃ ca kuśamūlasya mṛttikāḥ
nikṣipetsnānakumbheṣu ācāryādīṃstu sthāpayet
yajamānaḥ puraḥ kṛtvā daṃtakāṣṭhapuraḥsaram
rātrau ca bhakṣyabhojyādyaiḥ paritoṣya yavākṣatam
kṛtvā yathoktakālena pūjayettailadhārayā
vāruṇena ca sūktena surāstvādi yathākramam
surāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu brahmanna viṣṇumaheśvarāḥ
vāsudevo jagannāthastathā saṃkarṣaṇaḥ prabhuḥ
ākhaṃḍalognirbhagavānyamo vai nirṛtistathā
varuṇaḥ pavanaścaiva dhanāyakṣastathā śivaḥ
brahmaṇā sahitaḥ śeṣo dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā
kīrtirlakṣmīrdhṛtirmedhā puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ
buddhirlajjā vapuḥ śāṃtistuṣṭiḥ kāṃtiśca mātaraḥ
etāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu devapantyaḥ samāhitāḥ
ādityaścandramā bhaumo budhajīvasitārkajāḥ
grahāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu rāhuḥ ketuśca tarpitāḥ
devadānavagaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ
devapatnyo drumā nāgā daityāścāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ
astrāṇi sarvaśastrāṇi rājāno vāhanāni ca
auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasyāvayavāśca ye
saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāstīrthāni jaladā nadāḥ
ete tvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu sarvakāmārthasiddhaye
gavāmaṣṭottaraśataṃ tadardhaṃ cātha viṃśatim
ācāryāyābhirūpāya pradadiyādabhipūjayan
śuddhāṃ ca kapilāṃ dogdhrīṃ ghaṭācāmaravarjitām
sāmagāya tato dadyātsuvarṇadakṣiṇānvitām
yūpamādāya saṃsthāpya snāpayedvāruṇaṃ japan
parvatāgramṛdā toyanāgavalmīkajātayā
gajadaṃtamṛdā caiva kūlamūlatamṛdā tathāta
dāpayetkāṃsyamūlaṃ ca dadyāllohamayaṃ ca vā
īśāvā iti maṃtreṇa dadyātpuṣpāñjalitrayam
punastvāditi maṃtreṇa punaḥ puṣpaṃ samutsṛjet
prādeśamātravistāraṃ madhye vṛttaṃ ṣaḍaṃgulam
kāṃsyacakrasya mānaṃ tu ūrdhvaṃ yaddvādaśāṃgulam
aṃguṣṭhahīne lohasya tatra śūlaṃ na kārayet
tato maṃgalapūrve tu dvijātīnāṃ matena ca
samutsṛjecca prāsādaṃ taḍāgaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ
caturdarbhaṃ gṛhītvā tu īśānābhimukhena tu
samutsṛjettataḥ paścādvākyametadurīyet omityādiśrīkṛṣṇadvaipāyanābhidhāna vedavyāsapraṇīta bhaviṣyapurāṇokta phalapraptikāmaścatuṣkoṇādyavacchinnamatkāritapuṣkariṇījalametadūrjitaṃ gaṃdhapuṣpādyarcitaṃ varuṇadaivataṃ sarvasattvebhyaḥ snānāvagāhanārthamahamutsṛje tato varuṇasūktena varuṇaṃ nāgasaṃyutam
pūjayedvaruṇaṃ devamarghyaṃ dadyādviśeṣataḥ
śvetāśvasurasaṃbhūtaṃ śrīśca teti ca saṃjapan
āpyāyasveti maṃtreṇa mṛdaṃ catuṣpathodbhavām
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa kuśamūlena sthāpayet
tīrthatoyena gaṃdhena tathā pañcāmṛtena ca
gāyatryā snāpayeddevaṃ ratnatoyena sādhakaḥ
āpyāyasveti maṃtreṇa kṣīreṇa tadanaṃtaram
sarasvatyāṃteti jātīpuṣpatoyena snāpayet
śrīśca te iti maṃtrasya kardama ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchaṃdaḥ sariddevatā aśvakhuramṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ
āpyāyasveti maṃtrasya parvata ṛṣiḥ uṣṇikchandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇaprītaye catuṣpathamṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtrasya maināka ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇaprītaye kuśamṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ
kayā na iti maṃtrasya vasiṣṭha ṛṣiranuṣṭupchandaḥ somo devatā varuṇaprītaye nāgagaṃdhasnāne viniyogaḥ
tejosīti maṃtrasya garga ṛṣistriṣṭupchanda vāsavo devatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ sarasvatyai bhaiṣajyeneti maṃtrasya vāmadeva ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchaṃdo viṣṇurdevatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ
agna āyāhīti maṃtrasya janārdana ṛṣiḥ jagatīchanda aindrī devatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ
prakṣipetpañca vrīhīṃśca iyañceti ca saṃpaṭhan
paścānnīrājanaṃ kuryātpañcaghoṣapuraḥsaram
śirīṣapuṣpasaṃbhūtaṃ darpaṇaṃ kāsyasaṃbhavam
gopīcandanasaṃbhūtaṃ gaṃgāmṛttikayātha vā
kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ gomayaṃ vāpi svastikaṃ śaṃkhameva ca
utpannasvargasaṃbhūtaṃ kalaśaṃ māṣasaṃbhavam
śrīrasaṃ puṣpasaṃbhūtaṃ darpaṇaṃ kāṃsyasaṃbhavam
pūrvākṣataṃ māṣabhaktabaliṃ dadyādvidhānataḥ
tato nārāyaṇasūktena devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ vrajet
anyeṣāṃ caiva devānāṃ pradadyāttriṃśataṃ balim
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa krameṇāpi vidhānataḥ
pṛthakpṛthaktato dadyāttāvaṃtyenāpi bho dvijāḥ
śarīraṃ te na jānāmi ceṣṭāṃ naiva ca naiva ca
aṣṭottaraśatāndīpānparitaḥ sthāpayetkramāt
tadardhaṃ vā pañcaviṃśaṃ maṃtreṇa prayajetsudhīḥ
tvaṃ sūryyacandrajyotīṃṣi viṣādastvaṃ tathaiva ca
tvameva sarvajyotīṃṣi dīpoayaṃ pratigṛhyatām
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kuryātpañcadhā saptadhātha vā
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa dadyāddhūpaṃ daśāṃgakam
vanaspatiraso divyo gaṃdhāḍhyaḥ surabhiḥ śuciḥ
dūrvākṣatena mālyena yuktaṃ puṣpeṇa pūjayet
dadyātpañcāñjaliṃ paścādviṣṇusūktaṃ punarjapet
tataḥ suśobhane sthāne vedīṃ nirmāya deśikaḥ
varuṇaṃ vinyasettatra tathā puṣkariṇīmapi
gaṃdhapuṣpaṃ tato dadyādgāṃ ca dadyātsadakṣiṇām
cāmaraṃ vyajanaṃ chatraṃ kāṃsyaṃ lohaṃ tathaiva ca
kuryātpuṣkariṇīṃ ramyāṃ rājatīṃ ca tripādikām
catuṣkoṇāṃ ca suṣamāṃ dvyaṃguṣṭhaparimaṃḍalām
suvarṇapratimāṃ kuryādbhālenaikena bho drijāḥ
bāṇaśaktipramāṇena svarṇapatraṃ tu dvyaṃgulam
nīrājanāṃte vipreṃdrāḥ saṃsmaredamṛtaṃ taret
prāṇapratiṣṭhāṃ kuryāttu varuṇāya nivedayet
aśokaḥ khadiraḥ śālo hyaśvattho bilvakastathā
dhātrī kurubakaścaiva bakulo nāgakeśaraḥ
eṣāmeva kāṣṭhayūpaṃ yajamānapramāṇakam
samādāya ca saṃsthāpya vastrādyaiḥ pratigṛhya ca
yūpa rakṣeti maṃtreṇa khanitvā ca pradāpayet
taḍāgasya tathaiśānyāṃ tathā prāsādakasya ca
prāpayeddakṣiṇe bhāge āvāsasya ca madhyake
naukā gatvā tataḥ paścādyūpamādāya vāgyataḥ
caturasraṃ samākīrṇaṃ caturdikṣvadhṛtairjanaiḥ
cakraṃ sadarpaṇaṃ dadyānnāgadaṃḍaśiro gataḥ
evaṃ cakraṃ pūjayitvā śūlaṃ nāgāṃśca pūjayet
uccairdhvajaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā na nāgeti ca saṃpaṭhet
gāyatrasveti maṃtreṇa paṭheddvāradvayaṃ tataḥ
dikpālebhyo baliṃ dadyānmāṣabhaktaṃ guḍaudanam
raktapuṣpānvitaṃ kṛtvā praṇipatya prasādayet
sahasraṃ vā dhanaṃ dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine
ikṣusvastītikāṃ dadyājjale mātṛrśca pūjayet
maṃtharāṃ vasutāṃ kāṃtāṃ rākṣasīṃ ca piśācikām
nāginīrnāgaputrāṃśca madhye saṃpūjayettataḥ
pūrṇāṃte ca pṛthagdadyāllājādyairguḍamiśritaiḥ
bṛhatpakṣāviśaṣoayaṃ madhyame ca kanīyake
svāheti juhuyātpaścātpraṇītāṃ cālayettataḥ
kaniṣṭha pakṣe prāsāde tathā caiva jalāśaye
ārāme ca tathā setau viśeṣaḥ pañcamo dvijāḥ
iti paṭhitvā puṣkariṇījalaṃ haste gṛhītvā jale kṣipet
trailokye yāni sthānāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca teṣāmāpyāyanāyaitajjalamutsṛjyate mayā
śivāya sarvabhūtānāṃ sadā pāhi jalāśayam
pibaṃto hyavagāhaṃtaḥ sukhinaḥ sarvajaṃtavaḥ
jalaṃ viśvopakārāya kṛtametanmayā sadā
kīrtistiṣṭhatu me devāścirāya dharaṇītale
tvatprasādānmahābhāga nāgarāja namoastu te
teṣāṃ doṣairna lipyeahaṃ svaṃsvaṃ gamamavāpnuyāt
nārāyaṇo jagatprāṇaḥ sarvakāmapradāyakaḥ
āpeyā mātaraḥ saṃtu jagatāṃ vṛkṣayonayaḥ
apāṃpate rasāyātra yādasāmīśvara prabho
varuṇāsyāsane kīrtiṃ sanātana namostu te
suvarṇaṃrajataṃ dadyādanaḍvāhaṃ payasvinīm
dadyāddhenudvayaṃ paścātkuryādbrāhmaṇatarpaṇam
vahnipūjāṃ puraskṛtya mantreṇa prāśayettataḥ
pitṛrṇāṃ dāpayedarghyaṃ tato devaṃ prasādayet
biṃbamudrāṃ padmamudrāṃ nāgamudrāṃ pradarśayet
vaiśvānarā iti ṛcā pūjāṃ kṛtvā vivarjayet
yaste prāṇāñjapanpaścātprakuryādatha candanam
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ paścāttaḍāgasya śṛṇu dvijāḥ
brāhmaṇānpurataḥ kṛtvā vedaghoṣaṃ samuccaran
mahāmaṅgalapūrveṇa praviśedbhavanaṃ sudhīḥ
tato gṛhārcanaṃ kuryādbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca bhojanam
dīnānāṃ kṛpaṇānāṃ ca savitrearghyaṃ nivedayet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ūnaviṃśoadhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
adhunā madhyamaṃ vakṣye vidhiṃ śāstrānusārataḥ
muhūrte kalaśaṃ sthāpya saṃgṛhya gaṇanāyakam
sthāpayetprathamaṃ yūpamā pohiṣṭhetimantrakaiḥ
śanno devyāstataḥ paścādgandhadvāreti gaṃdhakam
śrīsūktena tato dadyātpuṣpaṃ dūrvākṣataṃ tataḥ
kāṇḍāditi ca mantreṇa tato dhūpaṃ nivedayet
ye gṛhṇāmīti ca ṛcā pūjāyāṃ sthāpayettataḥ
vivāhavidhinā sarvaṃ kāryaṃ caivādhivāsanam
sarvameva prayuṃjīta taḍāgādiṣu paṇḍitaḥ
adhivāsya taḍāgādīnācāryādīṃśca sarvaśaḥ
saṃgṛhya gaṃdhapuṣpādyairdhūpairdīpaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ
vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ tataḥ kuryānmātṛpūjāpuraḥsaram
alaṃkṛtya yathāśakti ācāryādīṃścaredbudhaḥ
śṛṇuyātpaścime bhāge maṃḍapasya samīpataḥ
madhyadeśe samudbhūtaṃ yajñapātraṃ praśasyate
atha vā tatra deśīyaṃ guruṃ vā śrotriyodbhavam
yajñe pradhānadvitīyamṛtvigācāryameva hi
vaitānakalpe saṃpannaṃ śaktikalpaparāyaṇam
nigamajñānasaṃpannaṃ yajñe pātraṃ praśasyate
patnīhīnamaputraṃ ca śyāvadaṃtamadaṃtakam
gaṇānāṃ yājakaṃ ṣaṃḍhaṃ svagotraṃ parivarjayet
apradhāneṣu yajñeṣu dānayajñeṣu sattamāḥ
dhanamādau ca saṃśodhya tato yajñaṃ samācaret
ayājyayājanodbhūtaṃ pallavaṃ vyavahārake
kūṭasākṣyeṇa pallave sthāpyahārakameva ca
havirvikrayaṇaṃ kṛtvā putrabhāryā divikrayī
niṃditāni purāṇeṣu yatkṛtaṃ tatra tatphalam
yajñasadmani viprāṃśca na śrāddhānbhojayetkvacit
brahmannācāryamukhyosi saṃsārāttrāhi māṃ vibho
tvatprasādādguro yajñe prāpnuyāṃ mānasepsitam
ciraṃ me śāśvatī kīrtiryāvallokāścarācarāḥ
prasīda tvaṃ maheśāna pratiṣṭhākarmasiddhaye
tvamādiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsārārṇavatāraka
jñānāmṛtapradācārya viṣṇu rūpa namoastu te
brahmāsanasamudbhūtaṃ prakāśitadigaṃtaram
prakīrṇaśāstrasaṃbhāra vidhijña praṇatosmi te
jvaladvaiśvānaraprakhya dhūmaśyāmālitānana
ṣaḍaṃgavedatattvajña ṛtviṅ mokṣaṃ samācara
tatastūryādighoṣeṇa puraskṛtya dvijottamān
yajamānaḥ sapatnīkaḥ praviśedyāgamaṇḍapam
pūjayedgandhamālyādyairgaṃdhādyaiḥ sumanoharaiḥ
nārāyaṇasvarūposau yajñaṃ me saphalaṃ kuru
makhaśreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena maṃtrāḥ suvistṛtāḥ
yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu vedavedārthatattvavit
ṛgvedajña mahāprājña viśvarūpa namostu te
māṃgalyaṃ karmaṇāṃ nityaṃ śāśvataṃ brahmarūpiṇam
pālayaṃti diśaḥ sarvā vidiśaśca tathā imāḥ
dikpālarūpiṇaṃ vipraṃ yajñasiddhyai namāmyaham
pātayeddakṣiṇaṃ jānu vikirānvikirettataḥ
trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca
brahmaviṣṇuśivāḥ sarve rakṣāṃ kurvaṃtu tāni vai
vedyāvedīti maṃtreṇa paṭhedvediṃ praṇamya ca
saṃpūjya gandhapuṣpādyairimaṃ maṃtramudā haret
yājanaṃ yajamānaśca śreyasā tatra yājakaḥ
idamarghyamidaṃ pādyaṃ dhūpoyaṃ pratigṛhyatām
aiśānyāṃ kalaśe devaṃ saṃpūjya gaṇa nāyakam
brahmāṇaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca dvitīyakalaśe yajet
maṃḍalaṃ caiva viṣṇurvai dvārakārūpamāsthitaḥ
tena tvāṃ pūjayāmyadya svargaprāptiṃ kuruṣva me
pūrvādidikṣu kalaśānsaṃsthāpya ca trayaṃtrayam
ardhapādasavarṇena nirmitaṃ tāraṇaṃ budhaḥ
maṃdaraṃ kalpayitvā tu gopīnāṃ ca kulena vā
kalaśopari saṃsthāpya maṃdaraṃ saṃprapūjayet
syonā pṛthivīti maṃtreṇa gaṃdhapuṣpaiḥ pṛthigvidhaiḥ
prādeśamātralohaṃ tu raupyeṇa gaṃdhamādanam
mṛdā saṃghaṭanaiḥ paścātkadācana ṛcā yajet
kadācaneti maṃtrasya sūrya ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ sūryo devatā gaṃdhamādanaprītaye viniyogaḥ
tolakadvayamānena yavānāṃ piṣṭakopari
pūjayetpārśvakalaśe dhātrādīnpūrvadikkramāt
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatādinā
aṃbāaṃbiketi maṃtrasya nalina ṛṣirgāyatrī chandaḥ śaṃbhurdevatā jaya prītaye viniyogaḥ gāyatryā pūjayeddakṣe paścimaṃ kalaśadvayam
bhūtaśuddhiṃ tataḥ kṛtvā nyāsaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ
vidhāyārghyādikaṃ caiva dharmādimaṃḍale yajet
madhye ādhāraśaktyādīnvaruṇaṃ madhyato yajet
pūrvādikramataścaiva indrādīnkuladevatāḥ
pārśvadvaye karṇikāyā brahmāṇaṃ cāpyanantakam
indrābhiṣekamaṃtrasya vādyaṃ gāṃdhārarāgakam
agnestejosīti vādyaṃ rāgaṃ caiva varāṭakam
ghanakaṃṭakamasyāpi vācyaṃ rāgaṃ tu gurjaram
rakṣodhipasya saṃgrāmaṃ vaitālaṃ vādyamucyate
nāṭakākhyaṃ tathā rāgaṃ varuṇasyāpi me śṛṇu
vādyaṃ rājyābhiṣekākhyaṃ rāgo vasaṃtasaṃjñakaḥ
īśasya naṃdighoṣākhyaṃ vādyaṃ rāgotha kāmadaḥ
suvarṇaṃ duṃdubhirvādyaṃ brahmaṇaḥ kathito budhaiḥ
vādyaṃ gāṃdhāratārākhyaṃ rāgaścāṅgāravātakaḥ
some ghoṣe bhavedvādyaṃ jaleśasya mahātmanaḥ
mālavākhyo bhavedrāgaḥ patrāgreṣu mahānapi
svaiḥ svairdharmaiśca saṃgṛhya dakṣiṇe pṛthivīṃ yajet
syonā pṛthivīti maṃtreṇa upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
maṇḍapasyottare bhāge mahādevaṃ prapūjayet
vetālāśca piśācāśca rākṣasāśca sarī sṛpāḥ
asmātprayāṃtu me sthānādye cānye vighnakārakāḥ
madhuyuktaṃ pāyasānnaṃ varuṇāya nivedayet
pītaṃ cālohitaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ śuddhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ ca dhūmrakam
pītaṃ śuklaṃ tathā citraṃ śvetamannaṃ yathākramam
balayastu digīśānāṃ grahāṇāmapi tāñchṛṇu
kṣīraudanaṃ graheśāya śuklānnaṃ śaśine smṛtam
lohitānnaṃ ca bhaumāya budhāya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam
māṃsaudanaṃ śanerjñeyaṃ rāhośca kṛṣṇa bhaktakam
dhūmravarṇaṃ tu tāmraṃ tu bhaumasya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam
piṣṭakānnaṃ śivasyoktaṃ bhūtānāṃ māṣabhaktakam
evaṃ baliṃ vidhāyātha agre kuṃbhaṃ niveśayet
pradeśadvyaṅgulaṃ nāma aṣṭottarasahasrakam
niśāvāṃchtisūtraiśca saṃveṣṭya pihitaṃ tathā
śarāvaṃ ca punardadyādvardhanīṃ pratipūjayet
astrāya phaḍiti maṃtreṇa dhyātvā devaṃ jaleśvaram
sūktaṃ yajedyathāśakti śatamaṣṭottaraṃ japet
kuṃḍeṣu vinyasennāgānaṣṭau pūrvādiṣu kramāt
anaṃtaṃ pūjayetpūrvaṃ mānenāṃgulamātrakam
nirmitaṃ kāṃcanenaiva saptavartikayā sudhīḥ
rājataṃ vāsukiṃ nāgaṃ yajetpatrāṃtare punaḥ
pādamātrepi cāṃguṣṭhamātraṃ tāmrasya bhakṣyakam
paṃcāṃgulaṃ tolikayā lohaṃ karkoṭakaṃ punaḥ
vartikābhiḥ ṣoḍaśabhirbṛhatparvapramāṇakam
śaṃkhapālaṃ kuśamayamardhapādena nirmitam
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ raktena nāgaṃ tālakamātrakam
aṃguṣṭhe tolakaṃ paścātpadmanāgaṃ punaryajet
tolakārdhapramāṇena aṃgulaṃ parimāṇataḥ
dhyātvānaṃtaṃ caturbāhuṃ śuklasaptaphaṇānvitam
dakṣiṇordhvakare śaṃkhamadhicakraṃ pratiṣṭhitam
sarvālaṃkārasaṃyuktamevaṃ dhyātvā yathāvidhi
sahasraśīrṣeti maṃtreṇa pūjayitvā baliṃ haret
lājaiśca tilasaṃmiśraiḥ kṣīrayuktaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
caturvidhaṃ tathā śvetaṃ sarvālaṃkārasaṃyutam
svakīyaṃ prajapettatra āpyāyasveti vai ṛcā
piṇyākaṃ nāgajihvāṃ ca tathā sarjarasaṃ dadhi
padmaṃ ṭaṃkaṃ dadhānaṃ ca bhujābhyāṃ nāgasattamam
manonnā iti maṃtreṇa ājyaṃ somo baliṃ haret
pañca nadya iti ṛcā viṣṇukrāṃtā balirbhavet
śarkarā kuṣṭhakaṃ caiva balistasya prakī rtitaḥ
dvibhujaṃ śaṃkhapālaṃ ca śaṃkhābhaṃ śaṃkhadhāriṇam
padmāsanasthaṃ padmābhyāṃ hastābhyāṃ ca varaṃ vibhum
dhruvakṣitidhruvosīti maṃtrābhyāṃ pūjayetpṛthak
ghaṭaudanaṃ bhṛṃgarājaṃ padmaṃ ca valayastayoḥ
svagṛhyoktena vidhinā saṃsthāpyāgniṃ kuśaṃḍikām
kṛtvā ājyasya saṃskāraṃ vāruṇaṃ śrapayeccarum
juhuyādaṣṭa bilvāni digīśānāṃ ghṛtena vai
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādgrahāṇāṃ ca trayaṃtrayam
palāśasamidhaṃ paścātpratiṣṭhāmāhutitrayam
śivasya paramānnena juhuyādaṣṭasaṃkhyayā
madhvājyaguḍamiśrābhirlājābhirjuhuyātpṛthak
lājānyathoktaṃ vitaredekaikāmāhutiṃ kramāt
sthālīpākasya juhuyādekaikāmāhutiṃ punaḥ
varuṇaṃ ca samuddiśya rudraṃ sarvaṃ pṛthakpṛthak
syonāpṛthivīti maṃtreṇa vrīhimṛttikayā punaḥ
vṛṣānna iti maṃtreṇa kayā na iti vai punaḥ
kuśamūlamṛdā caiva catuṣpathamṛdā tathā
imā rudreti maṃtreṇa śrīśceti ṛcā punaḥ
padmakhaṇḍasya ca mṛdā snāpayetsusamāhitaḥ
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa tathā puṣpodakena ca
tīrthodakena kṛṣṇena triraktena triśītakaiḥ
pañcaraktena raktānāṃ mṛdā kaiśca kuśodakaiḥ
svarṇatoyaiśca kalaśairaṣṭottaraśatena tu
taijasairmārttikaiścāpi aṣṭāviṃśatibhistathā
dhūrasīti tato dhūpaṃ hotre cāhutidīpakam
siṃdhosīti ca siṃdūraṃ svabhāve raktakaṃ tathā
mālatīkusumaiḥ kṛtyairnāgānsaṃsthāpayettataḥ
dhārābhiḥ śatapuṣpābhirgandhatoyādibhistathā
athavāśvatthapatreṣu vaṭapatreṣu vā sudhīḥ
maṃḍapasyottaredeśe śayyāṃ nirmāya śobhanām
rājataṃ vāruṇaṃ tasyāṃ pādamātreṇa nirmitām
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ saṃsthāpya tataḥ puṣkariṇīmapi
svarṇapādena ghaṭitāṃ caturasrāṃ suśobhanām
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ sampūjya varuṇāya nivedayet
yathāśakti tato gāṃ ca saṃbhave pañcaviṃśatiḥ
suvarṇaṃ rājataṃ caiva dhānyaṃ vāso varāṭakam
nāgayaṣṭiṃ samādāya kiṃciduttaragāṃ tathā
tatokṣatāya bhaumāya kṛtvā cājyāhutitrayam
lājāndadhisamāyuktaṃ ghṛtaṃ madhu guḍaṃ tathā
kṣīraṃ ca piṣṭakaṃ caiva śaṣkulīgandhapuṣpakam
paṃcāmṛtaṃ pañcaratnaṃ garbhe dadyātsamāhitaḥ
gaṃgājaleśayormadhye paṃcaghoṣapuraḥsaram
dhruvaṃ dhruveti maṃtreṇa yaṣṭimā maṃtrayettataḥ
yajñapriyāsi devi tvaṃ sarvavighnavināśinī
pāhi māṃ sarvapāpebhya ātmanā tvaṃ sthirībhava
ityāmaṃtrya yajeccaiva gāyatrīṃ ca paṭhettataḥ
tathā puṣkariṇīṃ caiva vardhanīṃ kalaśodaraiḥ
aniṣṭaṃ mārjayennāgānuddhṛtya kalaśaṃ tathā
pāṣāṇābhyaṃtaraṃ kṛtvā gomayaiḥ parilipya ca
varuṇaṃ puṣkariṇyāṃ ca jalamadhye vinikṣipet
atra svāmī bhavānnāga rakṣaṇīyastvayā janaḥ
gāyatreṇa tvā chaṃdasāmīmantraṃ saṃśrāvayetpunaḥ
saṃpūjya gaṃdhapuṣpādyaiḥ purato nikṣipeddiśi
pidhāya nāgarājānamṛcābhyāṃ parisūtrakaiḥ
sanniruddhyāśu saṃsthāpya baliṃ dadyā dvidhānataḥ
pūrvabhāge puṣkariṇyāṃ haritābhaṃ savajrakam
halagrahīta maṃtreṇa nyasya lājāhutiṃ kule
manaḥśilāṃ pravālaṃ ca agnimīḍeti saṃpaṭhet
vaiśvānareṇa mantreṇa paṭhallāmjāhutiṃ punaḥ
dadyādye te śatamantreṇa paścime kāṭikaṃ nyaset
śālibījena sahitaṃ kayā na iti maṃtrakam
varuṇasyo iti maṃtreṇa dadyādaṣṭādaśāhutīḥ
kuṃkumena samāyuktaṃ kuvidaṃḍamṛcā paṭhan
vinyasya tena maṃtreṇa pradadyādāhutiṃ punaḥ
aiśānyāṃ maṃdrakaṃ raṃgamī śāvā iti saṃpaṭhan
saṃsthāpyājyāhutiṃ dadyāttamīśāna ṛcā punaḥ
āsadyairmaṃtrasaṃyuktairdevaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ yajet
varuṇātmakaṃ tato dhyātvā tato nīrājanaṃ paṭhet
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā paṭhejjñānāmṛtaṃ stavam
dharmo vaṃśaṃ tataḥ kuryādutsargāṃte vidhīyate
tato devīṃ punaḥ kṛtvā dattvā puṣpāñjalitrayam
utsṛṣṭaṃ sarvasattvebhyo dṛśyate jalamūrjitam
ramaṃtīṃ sarvabhūtāni snānapānāvagāhanaiḥ
varuṇaṃ ca tato devaṃ puṣkariṇyāṃ ca nikṣipet
pakṣiṇaśca śubhāṃstatra bhekaṃ kūrmaṃ ca kardamam
śaivālaṃ prakṣipeccaiva dakṣiṇāṃ tadanaṃtaram
suvarṇaṃ dhānyaratnaṃ ca ācāryāya pṛthagdadet
ṛtvigbhyaśca pṛthagdadyādyathāvittānusārataḥ
nityaṃ samāpya vidhivaddadyātpūrṇāhutiṃ punaḥ
dadyādarghyaṃ ca sūryāya hastāsa iti saṃjapan
tataḥ pradakṣiṇāvartaṃ saṃveṣṭya kṣīradhārayā
prāsādapakṣe prāsādamārāme atha maṃḍapam
śatādhidhārayā śaktyā trivāraṃ brāhmaṇaiḥ saha
vikīrya lājakusumaṃ vrīhīścaiva kapardakān
yajamānaḥ sapatnīkaḥ praviśetsvagṛhaṃ punaḥ
tato gṛhārcanaṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇānatha bhojayet
kumārīśca kumārāṃśca dīnāndhakṛpaṇānapi
nārāyaṇaṃ tato dadyādvipramuddiśya bhaktitaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāga viṃśoadhyāyaḥ cha iti madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāgaḥ samāptaḥ
viṣayānukramaṇikā
upavanādipratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
ārāmādau viśeṣo yo vakṣyateatra mayādhunā
maṃḍalaṃ kārayitvā tu caturasraṃ samaṃ śubham
aiśānyāṃ kalaśe devaṃ tatra nāthaṃ prapūjayet
madhyame kalaśe pūjā grahāṇāṃ ca tataḥ param
svadikṣu dvāradeśe tu paścimadvāradeśayoḥ
brahmāṇaṃ cāpyanantaṃ ca madhyato varuṇaṃ yajet
varuṇaṃ codakumbhasthaṃ bhūtaśākhāsu śobhanam
tena cāvāhayāmi tvāṃ vibho svargāya vai bhava
pūrvagaṃ mandaraṃ sthāpya toraṇopari sattamāḥ
karṇikāyāṃ vāsudevaṃ śuddhasphaṭikasannibham
śrīvatsakaustubhoraskaṃ mukuṭādyairalaṃkṛtam
dakṣiṇe kamalā tasya vāme puṣṭivyavasthitiḥ
siddhakinnarayakṣādyaiḥ stūyamānaṃ surāsuraiḥ
saṃpūjya vidhivadbhaktyā viṣṇorarāṭa ityṛcā
dale saṃkarṣaṇādīṃśca vimalādyāśca nāyikāḥ
saṃpūjya dhūpadīpādyairupahārairanuttamaiḥ
dhūpo devabaliḥ kṣīraṃ paramānnaṃ ghṛtaplutam
dhyāyetsomaṃ karṇikāyāṃ dakṣiṇe padmasaṃsthitam
śuklābhaṃ dvibhujaṃ śāntaṃ keyūrādyupaśobhitam
praśasyaṃ devayakṣāṇāṃ varadābhayahastakam
imaṃ devā iti ṛcā upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
pūjayecca niśānāthaṃ ghṛtabhaktaṃ nivedayet
indraṃ jayantamākāśaṃ varuṇaṃ cāgnimeva ca
īśānaṃ tatpuruṣaṃ caiva vāyuṃ pūrvādidikṣvapi
karṇikāyā vāmabhāge varadābhayahastakam
dvibhujaṃ śuklavarṇaṃ ca mahādevaṃ prapūjayet
tryaṃbakeṇa ca maṃtreṇa dadyācca ghṛtapiṣṭakam
vāsudevāya devāya juhuyādaṣṭa āhutīḥ
paramānnena saumyasya juhuyādaṣṭaviṃśatim
gaṇeśasya tathājyena dadedekāhutiṃ budhaḥ
brahmaṇo varuṇasyātha ekaikāmāhutiṃ tathā
grahāṇāṃ svoktasamidhā digīśānāṃ pṛthakpṛthak
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādājyena ca yathākram
karālī dhūmalī śvetā lohitā kanakaprabhā
atiraktā padmarāgā vahnijihvā prakīrtitāḥ
tāsāṃ maṃtrāḥ krameṇaiva sādivāsāṃta bindavaḥ
yakārasthāśca vijñeyā aṣṭasvaravibhūṣitāḥ
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyāddattvā caiva samāhitaḥ
agnīṣomaṃ tathendraṃ ca pṛthivīmantarikṣakam
sthālīpākena juhuyānmadhukṣīrayavānvitam
ekaikāmāhutiṃ teṣāṃ samuddiśya pṛthakpṛthak
japasva tvaṃ mahābhāga śraddhayā caiva vāgyataḥ
maṅgalaṃ paramānnaṃ ca saurasūktaṃ tathā japet
tataḥ saṃmṛjya vidhinā snāpayitvā yathāvidhi
yūpaṃ garbhe vinikṣipya tatra kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ
dhvajānāropya prāṃteṣu dadyātsomaṃ vanaspatim
koadāditi paṭhitvā ca vṛkṣāṇāṃ karṇavedhanam
sūcyā sutīkṣṇayā kāryaṃ dvipātre vāmadakṣiṇe
navagrahāṇāṃ tṛptyarthaṃ yāvakaṃ laḍḍukaṃ tathā
piṣṭakaṃ ca pṛthagdadyātkumārībālakeṣu ca
niśāraṃjitasūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya ca sacūrṇakam
pradadyāddohakaṃ caiva vṛkṣāṇāṃ vidhipūrvakam
prāśayeccaiva tānvṛkṣānimaṃ mantramudāharet
vṛkṣāgrātpatitasyāpi ārohātpatitasya ca
maraṇe vāsthibhaṅge vā kartā pāpairna lipyate
dhenuṃ suvarṇaṃ dhānyaṃ ca ācāryāya pradakṣiṇam
dattvā ca ṛtvije dadyātsuvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā
dhānyaṃ ca brahmaṇe dadyādghṛtabhojyaṃ saśarkaram
iṣṭāṃ ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyātsadasyāya tathaiva ca
adhikalaśaṃ samānīya snānaṃ kuryādvidhānataḥ
kṛtvā caivāniśaṃ kuryāddadyātpūrṇāhutiṃ tathā
sarvauṣadhyudakaṃ prokṣya trivāraṃ kṣīradhārayā
saṃveṣṭya triścaturvāraṃ brahmaghoṣapuraḥsaram
taṃtau viśeṣaṃ vakṣyāmi varā evedamityṛcā
balaṃ kāmaṃ hayagrīvaṃ mādhavaṃ puruṣottamam
vāsudevaṃ dhanādhyakṣaṃ tato nārāyaṇaṃ yajet
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhinā dakṣiṇe pṛthivīṃ yajet
śuddhakāṃñcanavarṇābhāṃ varābhayakarāṃ śubhām
maṃḍūkasthāṃ ca dvibhujāṃ sarvālaṅkārasundarīm
syonā pṛthivīti mantreṇa pūjayitvā yathāvidhi
pāyasaṃ madhusaṃyuktaṃ baliṃ dadyātsaśarkaram
vāmato viśvakarmāṇaṃ śuddhasphaṭikasaṃnibham
śūlaṭaṃkadharaṃ śāṃtaṃ saṃyajedupacārakaiḥ
viśvanniti ṛcā taṃ ca baliṃ ca madhu piṣṭakam
dadyājjapecca kauṣmāṇḍaṃ sūktaṃ pauruṣameva ca
ekaikaṃ homayetpaścā tpṛthivīhomakarmaṇi
picchile patitānāṃ ca ucchritenāṃgasaṃgataḥ
ye cātra prāṇinaḥ saṃti rakṣāṃ kurvati setavaḥ
gartaṃ kṛtvā pañcaratnaṃ saṃsthāpyaṃ tadanantaram
saṃsthāpya ca tato yūpaṃ saṃpūjya ca yathāvidhi
ācāryāya tato dadyādiṣṭāṃ ca varadakṣiṇām
pūjayeddvijadāṃpatyaṃ lājābhiḥ paripūjitam
poṭikāṃ ca tataḥ śayyāṃ dadyādiṣṭārthasiddhaye
setau vṛkṣa sthitā ye syū ropayetkadalīṃ śubhām
teṣāṃ pārśvadvayepyevamārāme ca pṛthakpṛthak
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhya maparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge prathamoadhyāyaḥ cha
gopracāravaiśiṣṭyavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
gopracāraṃ punarvakṣye viśeṣaṃ tatra me śṛṇu
yajedviṣṇuṃ sala kṣmīkamupacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ
upacāraiśca brahmāṇaṃ rudraṃ caiva karālikām
varāhaṃ somasūrye ca mahādevaṃ yathākramam
homaṃ caiva yathā viṣṇoḥ kamalāyāstrayaṃtrayam
ājyena kṣetrapālānāmanyeṣāṃ madhumiśritaiḥ
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyāllājādiṣu pṛthakpṛthak
samutsṛjya vidhānena yūpaṃ saṃsthāpya pūjayet
trihastamāttraṃ racitaṃ kuryānnāgaphaṇānvitam
lājāsaṃyuktavidhinā viśveṣāmiti sañjapan
mayi gṛbhṇāmīti sampūjya yūpaṃ ca rudradaivatama
saṃpūjya rudraṃ pañcāṃgaṃ dhānyaṃ vastraṃ ca dakṣiṇām
ācāryāya tathā hotre anyeṣāmiṣṭadakṣiṇām
gopracāre ca śaileyaṃ yūpaṃ hastadvayānvitam
pañcaśīrṣānvitaṃ kuryāddhastamātraṃ praropayet
yūpaṃ ca caitravṛkṣaṃ ca kuṇḍalīmaṭhapīṭhikām
saṃspṛśyācamya vai viprāḥ prāṇāyāmena śudhyati
caturhastapramāṇena śatakuṇḍena saṃmitam
tadardhaṃ ca kaniṣṭhena aṣṭakāṣṭādhikaṃ bhavet
śivalokastathā gāvaḥ sarvadevasupūjitāḥ
gobhya eṣā mayā bhūmiḥ sampradattā śubhārthinā
yāvaṃti tṛṇagulmāni saṃti bhūmau śubhāni ca
pūrve sīmāṃ nibadhnīyātkṛtvā vṛkṣasya ropaṇam
setuṃ kṛtvā dakṣiṇataḥ paścimeṃgāraropaṇam
uttare khānayetkūpaṃ tasya sīmāṃ na laṃghayeta
tataḥ sahasradhārāṃ ca śasyena paripūritām
na kuryādagnidigbhāge dakṣiṇāṃ vā tataḥ śubhām
kulāni pātayatyāśu brahmahatyāśca viṃdati
yāvattṛṇāni tadbhūmau saptasaṃkhyāni saṃkhyayā
tāvatkālaṃ vasetsvarge viṣṇulokānna taccyutiḥ
vṛṣotsargā vasāne tu pradadyādyo mahīṃ dvijāḥ
na yāti viprāḥ pretatvaṃ tasmādviprādamatsarāḥ
tatra mānaṃ pṛthakcaiva śṛṇutātra samāgatāḥ
gavāṃ śataṃ vṛṣaścaiko yatra tiṣṭhatyayaṃtritaḥ
yāvatkālāvadhe sīmā atīte nāsti pātakam
maṇḍapaṃ pūjayetsūryaṃ vāsudevasamanvitam
homastila guḍābhyāṃ ca aṣṭāvaṣṭau pṛthakpṛthak
yatnasiddhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā śulkaghaṭacatuṣṭayam
samutsṛjejjapetpaścātsauraṃ sūktaṃ ca vaiṣṇavam
vaṭapatre tu saṃlikhya citraṃ nirmāya vā punaḥ
dikpālānsaṃnyasetsvāsu svāsu dikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ
baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhenmaṃtrāniṃdrādīnāṃ yathākramam
dharmasaṃsthāpanārthāya ātmano vibhavāya ca
bho vahne meṣavāhastvaṃ catuḥśṛṃgavirājita
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi
yama tvaṃ dakṣiṇāśeśa mahāmahiṣavāhana
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi
mañcastho rākṣasendrastvaṃ khaḍgapāṇirmahābalaḥ
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi
vārirāṭ dhvajahastoasi pavano mṛgavāhanaḥ
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi
dhanādhyakṣo gadāhastaḥ piṃgākṣo naravāhanaḥ
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi
ādidevosi devānāṃ kartā hartā maheśvaraḥ
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi
anaṃto nāgarājo yo dharāmuddhṛtya tiṣṭhati
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatasrātumarhasi
caturṇāmeva varṇānāṃ sthityarthaṃ mṛgapakṣiṇām
prītaye vāsudevasya evaṃ maṇḍapamutsṛjet
bhagne stambhe tṛṇe jīrṇe punastṛṇapradāpane
sthāpane ca tathaivāsya pratiṣṭhā syādyathākṣayā
ghātāpāyādidoṣeṇa mriyaṃte yadi jantavaḥ
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ kṛtāyāṃ tu dharmo me syānna pātakam
mānuṣāḥ paśavo ye ca nivasantīha maṇḍape
svasti cāstu sadā teṣāṃ tvatprasādātkila prabho
tatastriguṇasūtreṇa sutrāmāṇeti vai ṛcā
saptadhā veṣṭayitvā tu dakṣiṇāṃ saṃprakāśya ca
maṇḍape bhojayedviprāṃsteṣāṃ dadyādyathepsitān
dīnebhyaśca pṛthagdadyādgṛhaṃ viprapuraḥsaram
praviśettūryaghoṣeṇa prakuryācca gṛhārcanam
evaṃ prapāyāṃ vijñeyo viśeṣo varuṇaṃ vrajet
vāsudevena sahitaṃ sāṃgopāṃgaṃ sadakṣiṇam
sthālīpākavidhānena prakuryāddeśikottamaḥ
ācāryāya gṛhaṃ dadyātparicchedasamanvitam
ṛtvije tāmrapātraṃ ca jalapūrṇaṃ ca dhānyakam
dikpālāndvāradeśe tu kūpayāge viśeṣataḥ
brahmāṇaṃ nāgarājānaṃ dvārapālau ca paścime
balidānaṃ vidhānena kṛtvā dadyādyathāvidhi
patākānāmatastattvaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathākramam
vajrī ca dhūmalī kṛṣṇā pītā caivātha vāruṇī
śīghrā gaurī umā caiva pītā śuklā prakīrtitā
kuṃbheṣu pūjayeddevānmaheśaṃ prathamaṃ budhaḥ
grahāṃśca madhyakalaśe brahmāṇaṃ ca tataḥ param
dakṣiṇe kalaśe viṣṇuṃ karṇikāyāṃ jaleśvaram
saṃpūjya vaṭapatre ca nāgānsaṃlikhya nāgajaiḥ
yo nāgāstānpravakṣyāmi anaṃto vāsukistathā
puṃḍarīkadalābhāsa śubhakarṇāṃtalocana
phaṇāsahasrasaṃyukta śaṃkhābjakṛtalocana
sarvanāgasya śūrasya kṛtasvastikalāṃchana
śaṃkhapāla iti khyāta jalādhārapratīkṣaka
atipīta suvarṇābha candrārdhāṃkitamastaka
dīptabhogakṛtāṭopa śubhalakṣaṇalakṣita
yaḥ suvarṇena varṇena padmapatrāyatekṣaṇaḥ
paṃcabiṃdukṛtābhogo grīvāyāmekaśekharaḥ
nāginyo nāgakanyāśca tathā nāgakumārakāḥ
sarve te prītamanasaḥ pūjāṃ gṛhṇaṃtu me sadā
svagṛhyoktena vidhinā kṛtvāgnisthāpanaṃ budhaḥ
ājyaṃ saṃskṛtya juhuyāddigīśānāṃ yathākramam
ādityādigrahāṃścaiva brahmāṇaṃ kṛṣṇameva ca
madhupiṣṭena ca śivaṃ varuṇaṃ juhuyāttataḥ
prādeśamātraṃ saṃprokṣya yūpaṃ cāsya pramāṇakam
caturasraṃ śūlayuktaṃ gaṇānānīya pūjayet
kūpe nikṣipya tānnāgānpañcaratnaṃ kṣipettataḥ
sutrāmāṇeti maṃtreṇa tridhā saṃveṣṭya sūtrakaiḥ
rañjitaḥ kadalīvṛkṣaṃ varuṇāya samutsṛjet
trātāramiti maṃtreṇa vastramālyena bhūṣayet
karṇavedhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā utsṛjedvākyamuccaran
oṃ adyetyādi sarvabhūtebhyaḥ phalapuṣpapatracchāyāvṛtamukhyanānātaruviracitamārāmaṃ vanaspatidevataṃ supūjitaṃ vedavyāsādyuktaphalāvāptaye amukaṛṣisagotraḥ amukadeva śarmāhamutsṛje
mahotsavaṃ tataḥ kuryātkṛtvā baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet
vṛkṣāgrātpatitasyāpi ārohātpatitasya vā
maraṇe cāsthibhaṃge vā kartā pāpairna lipyate
vajrāghātādidoṣeṇa mriyaṃte taravo yadā
taddośamanārthāya tasyāpyetatpratiṣṭhitam
madhye yūpaṃ samāropya catuṣko ṇepi yatnataḥ
madhulājākṣataṃ dadyādañjanaṃ mālyameva ca
niśāsūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya kadalīviṭapaṃ nyaset
veṣṭayetkṣīradhārāṃ ca pātayedghṛtadhārayā
toyānvitaṃ gucchayuktaṃ veṣṭayetsvagṛhaṃ vrajet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge dvitīyoadhyāyaḥ cha
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye vai dvijasattamāḥ
sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tatra viṣṇuṃ somaṃ samarcayet
ācāryamātraṃ varayenniśāsūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet
vṛkṣānmālyairalaṃkṛtya bhūṣayedbhūṣaṇādinā
karṇavedhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā utsṛjedvākyapūrvakam
dadyādyūpaṃ madhyadeśe ropayetkadalīṃ tataḥ
raṃbhāśca ropayeddikṣu sthālīpākavidhānataḥ
aṣṭāvaṣṭau ca juhuyādanyeṣāṃ ca ghṛtena tu
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsviṣṭakṛttadanaṃtaram
dakṣiṇāṃ ca tato dadyātpūrṇāṃ dattvāhutiṃ vrajet
ekādivṛkṣaṃ vṛkṣāṇāṃ vidhiṃ vakṣye dvijottamāḥ
vṛkṣamūle yajeddharmaṃ pṛthivī ca viśaṃ tathā
digīśāṃśca tathā yakṣānācāryaṃ toṣayettataḥ
dhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyāddohadaṃ vṛkṣapūjanam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge tṛtīyoa dhyāyaḥ
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
athāśvatthapratiṣṭhāyāṃ mūle bāhupramāṇake
sthaṃḍilaṃ kārayettatra caṃdanenokṣitaṃ tathā
pūrvedyu rātrisamaye tadviṣṇoriti vai ṛcā
sthāpayedvāriṇā pūrṇaṃ kayā neti ca gandhakam
dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ kalpe brāhmaṇatrayabhojanama
kārayetsitasūtraiśca veṣṭayeccandanokṣitaiḥ
kuṃbhe vināyakaṃ pūjya brahmāṇaṃ ca pare ghaṭam
svadikṣu dikpatīṃścaiva vṛkṣamūle navagrahān
maṃḍale śivamabhyarcya pīṭhapūjāpuraḥsaram
atha dhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi śvetaṃ vṛṣabhameva ca
dvibhujaṃ śūlahastaṃ ca sarvābharaṇasaṃyutam
āropayetsvasāmarthyādbhūtaśuddhiṃ samācaret
tatorghyapātraṃ kṛtvā tu pīṭhapūjāṃ samācaret
gaṇeśaṃ gurupādaṃ ca jayaṃ bhadraṃ samāhitaḥ
madhye ādhāraśaktiṃ ca kūrmānaṃtau sapadmakau
candrasūryāgnikādīnāṃ maṃḍalāni kramādyajet
punaḥ pātrāṃtarasthaṃ ca gṛhītvā kusumaṃ budhaḥ
pāṇikacchapikāṃ kṛtvā dhyāyedvai varuṇaṃ tathā
madhuparkaṃ cāsanaṃ ca pṛcchecca svāgataṃ punaḥ
mudrāṃ pradarśya vidhivadaṃgapūjāṃ samācaret
pūrvādipatre indrādīnbrahmāṇaṃ madhyato yajet
anaṃtaṃ purataścaiva teṣāmastrāṇi tadbahiḥ
madhye toyādhipaṃ rudraṃ śāṃtaṃ caiva praśāṃtakam
kāmaṃ dharmamadharmaṃ ca dikṣu nārā yaṇaṃ śivam
nairṛte ca yajeddurgāṃ pārśvayośca śatakratum
vināyakaṃ ca viṣṇuṃ ca gaṅgāṃ pṛthiviṣaṣṭikam
ṣoḍaśenopacāreṇa pūjayecca viśeṣataḥ
maṃḍalasyottare bhāge nāgarūpamanaṃtakam
paṃcakṛṣṇālakaiḥ kuryādbṛhatparvapramāṇakam
āropayeccākṣatādyaiḥ śvetacandanapuṣpakaiḥ
varuṇaṃ juhuyātpūrvaṃ madhunā pāyasena vā
tilākṣatairvā ājyairvā trimadhvaktairathāpi vā
aṣṭottaraśataṃ kuryāddigīśānāṃ ghṛtena tu
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātpuṣpaistilaghṛtena ca
nārāyaṇaṃ śivaṃ durgāṃ gaṇeśaṃ ca grahānniśi
aṣṭāvaṣṭau ca juhuyādghṛtairekāhutirbhaveta
brahmāyudhvānamiti maṃtreṇa brahmāṇaṃ pāyasena tu
ekāhutiṃ tato dadyādāpohiṣṭheti vā tribhiḥ
imaṃ varuṇa iti vā tadvaromā ṛcā punaḥ
vātasyayamiti punaḥ pañcavarṇaṃ yathākramāt
tataḥ sviṣṭakṛte dadyādbaliṃ dadyādanukramāt
madhvājyapāyasaṃ dadyādvaruṇāya viśeṣataḥ
yavakṣīraṃ digīśebhyo hyanyebhyaḥ pāyasena tu
nāgāya piṣṭakaṃ dadyāllājāhomāṣṭakaṃ punaḥ
aṣṭāṣṭāpadamānena varuṇaṃ rājatena tu
kuryātpūrvadvayenāpi bāṇarattisuvarṇakaiḥ
kuryātpuṣkariṇīṃ tatra pūrvārdhe caturasrake
varuṇaṃ vinyasettatra tathā puṣkariṇīmapi
oṃ adyetyādi viṣṇurūpāya karuṇāya śrutiratyādyuktavedavyāsasapraṇītāgniṣṭomaphalaprāptaye puṣkariṇīpratiṣṭhākarmaṇi imāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ suvarṇarājatāṃ svagṛhyoditāṃ sālaṃkārāṃ supūjitāmamukagotraḥ amukadevaśarmā tubhyamahaṃ saṃpradade ityutsargavākyam oṃ adyetyādi brāhmaṇamukhyebhyaḥ mamāgniṣṭomādyanekaphalaprāptaye imaṃ jalāśayaṃ varuṇadaivataṃ supūjitaṃ caturmukhasahitaṃ catuḥsattvāvacchinnasnānapānādyupabhogāya amukasagotraḥ amukadevaśarmāhamutsṛje
pūrvāvasthāyinīṃ yaṣṭiṃ samāropya vidhānataḥ
puṣkariṇyāsamaṃ tena nāgayaṣṭyaṃtare kṣipet
tatraivānaṃtanāgaṃ ca maṃtrametadudīrayed
puṃḍarīkadalābhāsa śubharaktāṃtalocana
dakṣiṇāṃ ca tato dadyāttataḥ pūrṇāṃ vidhāya ca
mocayenmakarāngrāhānmīnakūrmāñjalecarān
puṣkariṇyāṃ ca triḥ kuryātkhātaṃ sarvapradakṣiṇām
ādityādhyāyakaṃ japtvā kṣipellājakapardakān
pātayetkṣīradhārāṃ ca sahasreṇa śatena ca
sūtreṇa veṣṭayetprājño raktena ca catuṣkramāt
pathi saṃtoṣayeddīnānsaṃtoṣya ca gṛhaṃ vrajet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge caturthoadhyāyaḥ cha
sarovarādipratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
nalinyāśca tathā vāpyā hradasya dvijasattamāḥ
vidhiṃ vakṣye sahāṅgena vidhānaṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ
āpohiṣṭheti mantreṇa tathā astraiḥ śatairapi
svamaṇḍale śubhe sthāne viśetpūrvamukhena tu
gaṇeśaṃ varuṇaṃ caiva ghaṭe saṃpūjayecchivam
vāgīśaṃ ca tathā viṣṇuṃ sūrye kuṃbhe samarcayet
pāyasenāhutiṃ dadyādvaruṇāya ghṛtena ca
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādanyeṣāṃ ca sruveṇa ca
yūpaṃ niveśayetpaścāddadyāddhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇām
pūrṇaṃ dadyātsavitrearghyaṃ dattvā tu svagṛhaṃ vrajet
ārāmasya vidhiṃ vakṣye pratiṣṭhāvidhivistaram
hīnārāmasya ca tathā eka vṛkṣasya ca dvijāḥ
araṇyamadhye pāścātye uttare vā viśeṣataḥ
maṃḍapaṃ vartulaṃ kuryādarghyahastapramāṇakam
taddakṣiṇe bhavetkuṃḍaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃ śubham
maṃdarādikamāvāhya tataḥ saṃpūjayetkramāt
bhṛguṃ karṇasamārūḍhaṃ sarvabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam
viṣvaksenasya maṃtroyaṃ pūjāyāṃ caiva sarvataḥ
dvārapālaṃ ca saṃpūrṇaṃ gauryādīnkalaśeṣu ca
svāsu dikṣu digīśānāṃ balipuṣpākṣatādi nā
vedipārśve tato gatvā vedimāvāhya pūjayet
āsanaṃ kalpayitvā tu sāmānyārghyaṃ vidhāya ca
aiśāne kalaśe vidyudbrahmāṇaṃ ca tathā grahān
maḍaleśaṃ vāsudevaṃ sāsanaṃ ca bṛhaspatim
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā pāyasānnaṃ baliṃ haret
dhyātvā āropayedevaṃ bālādīnatha nāyakān
vimalādyā nāyikāśca digīśāṃśca yathāvidhi
ṣoḍaśoccaiḥ pṛthagrūpaiḥ pratipuṣpāṃjalikramāt
paritaḥ pūjayedviṣṇuṃ śivaṃ durgāṃ sarasvatīm
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ dhyāyetsomaṃ caturmukham
aśvārūḍhaṃ divya rūpaṃ padmākṣaṃ dhṛtapuṣpakam
śvetaṃ vanaspatiṃ dhyāyeddvibhujaṃ pītavāsasam
svarathasthaṃ mahābāhuṃ śaṃkhāṃkuśasakheṭakam
daśasvarānvitaṃ toyaṃ svabhāvaṃ tamasānvitam
maṃtroayaṃ devadevasya pūjāyāṃ viniyojayet
nīlaṃ jayaṃ bhṛṃgiṇaṃ ca paritaśca yathākramāt
tataḥ kuśakaṃḍikāṃ kṛtvā sthālīpākaṃ vidhānataḥ
aṣṭottaraśataṃ caiva somāya dvādaśāhutīḥ
vānaspatestathāṣṭau ca ājyeanyeṣāṃ vidhīyatām
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsaptajihvāmanaṃtaram
vāstoṣpataya iti maṃtreṇa sthālīpākadvayaṃ nayet
vṛkṣādīnsthāpayetpūrve gāyatryā prathamaṃ budhaḥ
abjairagraṃ kāṃsyavastraṃ ratnaṃ dikṣu yathākramam
brīhayaśceti maṃtreṇa tathā ca saritaśca me
mitratrayaśceti tathā pūṣā ca ma ṛcā tathā
saṃsthāpya vrīhīnsaṃvāpya tatraiva vidhipūrvakam
saṃsthāpya yajamānaṃ ca surāstvāmiti mantrakaiḥ
ācāryamātmane tatra saṃsthitaṃ dvijapuṃgavaiḥ
samāpya nityavidhinācāryāyātha ca dakṣiṇām
dhenuṃ ca lohapātraṃ ca dattvā iṣṭāṃ ca dakṣiṇām
brāhmaṇebhyo yathāśakti dadyātpūrṇāṃ gṛhaṃ vrajet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge paṃcamoadhyāyaḥ
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye ca dvijasattama
amaṃḍale śubhe sthāne dvihastama yasthaṃḍile
sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tatra somaṃ viṣṇuṃ samarcayet
ācāryamātraṃ varayenniśāsūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet
vṛkṣānmālyairalaṃkṛtya bhūṣayedbhūṣaṇādinā
bhojayetpaṃcaviprāṃśca puratoṃate viśeṣataḥ
karṇavedhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā utsṛjedvāsyapūrvakam
dadyādyūpaṃ madhyadeśe ropayetkadalīṃ tataḥ
raṃbhāṃ ca ropayeddikṣu sthālīpākavidhānataḥ
aṣṭāvaṣṭau ca juhuyādanyeṣāṃ ca ghṛtena tu
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsviṣṭakṛttadanaṃtaram
dakṣiṇāṃ ca tato dadyātpūrṇāṃ dadyādgṛhaṃ vrajet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge ṣaṣṭhoadhyāyaḥ
śreṣṭhavṛkṣapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
ekādivaravṛkṣāṇāṃ vidhiṃ vakṣye dvijottamāḥ
vṛkṣasya paścime bhāge sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tataḥ
vṛkṣaṃ saṃsthāpayetpūrvaṃ sūtreṇa pariveṣṭayet
brahmāṇaṃ kalaśebhyaśca somaṃ viṣṇuṃ vanaspatim
vṛkṣamūle yajeddharmaṃ pṛthivīṃ ca viśaṃ tathā
digīśāṃśca tathā yakṣānnācāryaṃ toṣayettataḥ
dhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyāddohadaṃ vṛkṣapūjanam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge saptamoadhyāyaḥ
aśvatthapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
athāśvatthapratiṣṭhāyāṃ mūle bāhupramāṇakam
sthaṇḍilaṃ kārayettatra caṃdanenāṅkitaṃ yathā
pūrvedyu rātrisamaye tadviṣṇoriti vai ṛcā
sthāpayedvāriṇā pūrṇaṃ kayā neti ca gaṃdhakam
gaṃdhadvāreti tailena śrīśca teti ca caṃdanam
dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ kalye brāhmaṇatrayabhojanam
kārayetsitasūtraiśca veṣṭayeccaṃdanasya ca
kumbhe vināyakaṃ pūjya brahmāṇaṃ ca pare ghaṭe
svadikṣu dikpatīṃścāpi vṛkṣamūle navagrahān
maṃḍale śivamabhyarcyaṃ pīṭhapūjā puraḥsaram
pūrve caṃḍaṃ pracaṃḍaṃ ca dakṣiṇe naṃdibhṛṃgiṇau
anaṃtaṃ paścime kāmamuttare gaṇanāyakam
kārtikeyaṃ madhyadeśa ādhāraśaktipūrvakam
anaṃtaṃ pṛthivīṃ caiva trivṛttaṃ ca trimaṃḍalam
atha dhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi śvetaṃ vṛṣabhameva ca
dvibhujaṃ śūlahastaṃ ca sarvābharaṇasaṃyutam
āropayetsvataṃtreṇa mūle viṣṇuṃ samarcayet
śaṃkaraṃ ca tathā madhye agre brahmāṇakaṃ yajet
baliṃ ca piṣṭakānnaṃ ca dattvā ca śrapayeccarum
anyeṣāṃ ca sruveṇaiva homaṃ dadyātprayatnataḥ
ropayetkadalīvṛkṣamācāryaṃ paritoṣayet
kṛtvā pūrṇāṃ paṃcadhārāṃ kṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇām
kṣīradhārāṃ ca saṃpādya arghyaṃ dattvā gṛhaṃ vrajet
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāgeaṣṭamoadhyāyaḥ cha
vaṭapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
vaṭasthānamatho vakṣye tasya mūle tu dakṣiṇe
gaṇeśaṃ ca śivaṃ viṣṇuṃ pūjayitvā huneccarum
yavakṣīrabaliṃ dadyādutsṛjedvākyamuccaran
yūpamāropayetpaścādvaṭamūlaiḥ samarpayet
yakṣānnāgāṃśca gaṃdharvānsiddhāṃścaiva marudgaṇān
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge navamoadhyāyaḥ cha
bilvapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
vakṣye bilvapratiṣṭhāṃ ca pūrvedyuradhivāsayet
tryaṃbakaṃ ceti maṃtreṇa sthāpayedgaṃdhavāriṇā
sunābheti ca maṃtreṇa me gṛhṇāmīti cākṣatam
kayāneti tato dhūpaṃ vastraṃ mālyaṃ nivedayet
niśāraktena vā kuryādaṣṭapatraṃ suśobhanam
niveṣṭanaṃ tataḥ kuryādvṛkṣasya dvijasattamāḥ
vrīhīṃśca vāpayettatra uttarābhimukhastathā
śivaṃ viṣṇuṃ ca brahmāṇaṃ pūjayedbhūtimicchatā
śivaṃ ca nāyakaṃ kuryādādityānpatramūlake
śeṣaṃ ca tarumūle tu madhyeanaṃtaṃ śatakratum
vanapālaṃ ca somaṃ ca sūryaṃ pṛdhvīmanukramāt
homastilākṣataiḥ kāryo baliṃ dadyādghṛtaudanaiḥ
yakṣebhyo māṣabhaktaṃ ca vāyanāni ca dvādaśa
grahāṇāṃ prītaye dadyātkṣīreṇāveṣṭya dakṣiṇām
kāṃcanaṃ kāṃsyapātraṃ ca tāṃbūlaṃ tāmrapātrakam
atha rātripratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye śāstrānusārataḥ
yakṣaikavṛkṣasaṃskāre na punarjāyate bhuvi
pūrvedyurupavāhe tu vṛkṣamūle ghaṭaṃ nyaset
viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ gaṇeśaṃ ca pūjayitvā tu sthāpayet
kalaśānpañca vā sapta gaṃdhatailairalaṃkṛtān
sūtraiḥ saṃveṣṭanaṃ kṛtvā vastramālyairanaṃtaram
kāṃḍāditi ca maṃtreṇa dadyāddūrvā kṣataṃ tataḥ
viṣṇusūktena ca punaḥ siṃdūrāṃjanacaṃdanam
hunetpaṃcāhutīstatra yūpaṃ dadyātsamutsṛjet
veṣṭayetkṣīratoyena dhānyaṃ dhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇām
dadyādarghyaṃ hunetpūrṇaṃ bhojayeddvijadaṃpatī
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge daśamoadhyāyaḥ
sadvṛkṣapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
śatahastamitāṃ muṣṭiṃ nānātaruvibhūṣitām
pūgāmrādiphalairyuktaṃ vāstuṃ kṛtvā yajettu yaḥ
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke vasecciram
tadvidhānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāśāstrānusārataḥ
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāga ekādaśoadhyāyaḥ
maṇḍapapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
pratiṣṭhāṃ maṃḍapasyaiva śailadārumayasya ca
tṛṇakāṣṭhasya ca vibho tṛṇavattasya ca dvijāḥ
sūryaṃ somaṃ tathā viṣṇuṃ kalaśe tu samarcayet
prokṣayetkuśatoyena āpohiṣṭheti vai ṛcā
ākṛṣṇeneti tailena śrīśca te iti caṃdanam
siṃdūrālaktakaṃ dadyādaṃjanaṃ pūrvayā saha
tataḥ prabhāte vimale śrāddhaṃ vṛddhyātmakaṃ caret
dikpālāṃścaiva vinyasya maṃḍape śubhalakṣaṇe
sūryamāvāhayettatra somaṃ viṣṇuṃ ca pārśvayoḥ
gaṇeśaṃ ca grahāṃścaiva dikpālāṃśca ghaṭearcayet
pāyasaṃ juhuyādagnāvaṣṭottaraśataṃ tathā
ādityasya tathā viṣṇoḥ somasya dvādaśāhutīḥ
baliṃ ca pāyasaṃ dadyāttailaṃ kṣīramathāpi vā
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā śanairoṣṭhaṃ na cālayet
tataḥ śvetaghaṭaṃ dadyānmaṇḍapopari sattamāḥ
triguṇena niśāktairvā veṣṭayedvāridhārayā
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyātsūryāyārghyaṃ nivedayet
tṛṇaveśmani vai sūryaṃ vāsudevasamanvitam
ghaṭe gaṇeśaṃ varadaṃ varaṃ kṛtvā samutsṛjet
aiśānyāṃ dāpayedyūpaṃ dhvajāndikṣu prakalpayet
prapāyāṃ varuṇaḥ pūjyo viśvakarmā prayatnataḥ
pṛthivīṃ ca gaṇeśaṃ ca pūjayitvā hunedghṛtam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge dvādaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
mahāyūpanirmāṇapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
sūta uvāca
caturhastaṃ mahāyūpaṃ hastaṣoḍaśanirmitam
vakṣye taṃ ca pratiṣṭhāṃ ca rātrau trairātrikaṃ yajet
varuṇaṃ sitakuṃbhe ca prapākūpasya paścime
gāyatryā snāpayetpūrva māpohiṣṭheti vai kramāt
gaṃdhadvāreti gandhaṃ ca aṃśunā ceti tailakam
ādau śrāddhaṃ na kartavyaṃ pratiṣṭhāṃte vidhīyate
daṃpatībhojanaṃ kuryādvarayedekabrāhmaṇam
maṃḍape cāṣṭahaste ca kalaśaṃ tatra vinyaset
pūjayedvaruṇaṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇasamanvitam
śivaṃ ca pṛthivīṃ caiva svaiḥ svairmantrairyathākramāt
tataḥ kuśakaṃḍikāṃ kṛtvā sthālīpākavidhānataḥ
varuṇaṃ ca samabhyarcya juhuyādāhutīrdaśa
anyeṣāṃ ca sruveṇaiva dadyādekāhutiṃ kramāt
varuṇasyoktavaruṇaṃ tattvā yāmi tataḥ param
varuṇasyottaṃbhanamasīti ca ābhyāṃ devāṃstathaiva ca
yenāpāvakacakṣasā paṃcamaṃ samudāhṛtam
tataḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ kṛtvā saptajihvaṃ caruṃ nayet
iha vetyādikaṃ paṃca tataḥ paṃcāhutiṃ hunet
śaṃbhave ca pṛthivyai ca mahārājāya ca kramāt
śaṃkarāya ca rudrāya śarvāya paśupataye iti ca
mahādevāya ca punarīśānāyeti ca kramāt
vākyapūrvaṃ sṛjettoyaṃ tatra vākkaraṇaṃ śṛṇu
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyādgāṃ ca dadyātpayasvinīm
maṃḍape kṣudrakūpe ca pratiṣṭhāṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ
gaṇeśaṃ varuṇaṃ kuṃbhe vidhivatpūjayetsudhīḥ
veṣṭayedraktasūtraiśca dadyādyūpaṃ samutsṛjet
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyādviprānsaṃpūjayettataḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge trayodaśoadhyāyaḥ
puṣpavāṭikāpratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
puṣpārāmapratiṣṭhāṃ tu vakṣye śṛṇvaṃtu vai dvijāḥ
madhye vediṃ trihastāṃ ca kṛtvā saṃsthāpayedghaṭam
kṛtvā ghaṭe gaṇeśaṃ ca sūryaṃ somaṃ hutāśanam
nārāyaṇaṃ sthaṃḍile ca juhuyānmadhupāyasam
veṣṭayedraktasūtraiśca pradadyācceti dakṣiṇām
etaddhārājalenaiva yavānnaṃ saguḍaṃ payaḥ
aiśānyāṃ yūpamāropya vidhivaddvijasattamāḥ
karṇavedhaṃ samāropya snāpayetkuśavāriṇā
dhānyaṃ yavaṃ ca godhūmaṃ dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām
śatadhārajalenaiva veṣṭayetparito dvijāḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge caturdaśoadhyāyaḥ cha
tulasīpratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
jyeṣṭhāṣāḍhe tulasyāśca pratiṣṭhāṃ vidhivaccaret
yajamānaḥ śuddhadine ekādaśyāmathāpi vā
nārāyaṇaṃ śivaṃ somaṃ brahmāṇaṃ ceṃdrameva ca
tvāṃ gaṃdharveti ca punaḥ puṣpaṃ maṃḍeśaneti ca
mānastoketi kusumaṃ śrīścateti ca caṃdanam
vaiśvadevīti ca punarmaṃtreṇānena caṃdanam
dūrvāmaṃtreṇa dūrvāśca rūpeṇeti ca darppaṇam
sakuśaiḥ pītasūtrādyairveṣṭayetkṣīradhārayā
śatadhārājalenaiva veṣṭayetsvagṛhaṃ vrajet
vastreṇāvṛtya vidhivadbudhaḥ kāle ghaṭaṃ nyaset
saptapaṃcatribhirvātha tadviṣṇoriti vai ṛcā
snāpayedatha sādhvībhiḥ kṛtamaṃgalapūrvakam
tataḥ śrāddhaṃ samāpyaiva mātṛpūjāpuraḥsaram
ācāryaṃ varayetpūrvaṃ gaṃdhādyaiḥ kusumairapi
ācārya eva hotā syādbrahmāṇaṃ ca sadasyakam
maṃḍape daśahasteapi vartule sthaṃḍileṣu ca
sahasraṃ maṃḍalaṃ kuryāttatra nārāyaṇaṃ yajet
grahāmllokeśvarānmadhye ādityāṃśca marudgaṇān
rudrānvasūṃśca kalaśe paritaśca samarcayet
tataḥ kuśakaṃḍikāṃ kṛtvā homaṃ tilayavena tu
aṣṭottaraśataṃ kuryādanyeṣāṃ śaktito hunet
