dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca ratnānyābharaṇāni ca
sarvadānāni rājeṃdra dadāti vasudhāṃ dadat
sāgarānsaritaḥ śailānsamāni viṣamāṇi ca
oṣadhīḥ kṣīrasaṃpannā nānāpuṣpaphalopagāḥ
kamalotpalakhaṃḍāṃśca dadāti vasudhāṃ dadat
agniṣṭomādibhiryajñairye yajaṃti sadakṣiṇaiḥ
prāpnuvaṃti ca tatpuṇyaṃ bhūmidānādyadāpyate
śrotriyāya mahīṃ dattvā ye haraṃti na mānavāḥ
tāvatteṣāṃ bhavetsvargo yāvallokā pratiṣṭhitāḥ
sasyapūrṇāṃ mahīṃ yastu śrotriyāya prayacchati
pitarastasya tuṣyaṃti yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam
yatkiṃcitkurute pāpaṃ puruṣo vṛttikarśitaḥ
suvarṇānāṃ sahasreṇa yatpuṇyaṃ samudāhṛtam
bhūmi gocarmamātreṇa tatphalaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ
triṃśaddaṃḍāṃśca gocarma dattvā svarge mahīyate
kiṃkarā mṛtyudaṃḍāśca asipatravanādayaḥ
ghorāśca vāruṇāḥ pāśā nopasarpaṃti bhūmidam
nirayā rauravādyāśca kuṃbhīpākaḥ suduḥsahaḥ
tathā ca yātanāḥ kaṣṭā nopasarpaṃti bhūmidam
citraguptaśca kālaśca kṛtāṃto mṛtyureva ca
yamaścāpi svayaṃ rājā saṃpūjayati bhūmidam
rudraḥ prajāpatiḥ śakro devāsuragaṇāstathā
ahaṃ ca paramaprītyā pūjayāmīha bhūmidam
ṣaṭkarmakṛtsuvṛttāya kṛśāya ca priyārthine
sīdamānakuṭuṃbāya śrotriyāyāhitāgnaye
vṛttasthāya daridrāya bhūmirdeyā nareśvara
yathā janitrī kṣīreṇa putraṃ saṃvarddhayetsadā
yathā gaurbharate vatsa kṣīreṇa kṣīramutsṛjet
yathā bījāni rohaṃti jalasiktāni bhūtale
tathā kāmāḥ prarohaṃti bhūmidasya dinedine
tathā bhūmipradānaṃ tu sarvapāpaṃ vyapohati
sa baddho vāruṇaiḥ pāśaiḥ kṣipyate pūyaśoṇite
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā yo hareta vasuṃdharām
rudatāṃ vṛttināśena ye pataṃtyaśrubiṃdavaḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ hṛte kṣetre hartustripuruṣaṃ kulam in app
dattvā bhūmiṃ tu viprāya upahiṃsedyadā punaḥ
adhomukhaśca duṣṭātmā kuṃbhīpāke sa pacyate
divyavarṣasahasrāṃte kuṃbhīpākādviniḥsṛtaḥ
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā yatnād rakṣed yudhiṣṭhira
mahīṃ mahībhṛtāṃ śreṣṭha dānāc chreyo nupālanam
toyahīneṣv araṇyeṣu śuṣkakoṭaravāsinaḥ
kṛṣṇāhvayo bhijāyaṃ te narā brahmasvahāriṇaḥ
evaṃ dattvā mahīṃ rājanprahṛṣṭenāṃtarātmanā
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti manasā ciṃtitānnaraḥ
bhūmidānātparaṃ nāsti sukhaṃ vāmuṣmikaṃ mahat
yacchaṃti ye dvijavarāya mahīṃ sukṛṣṭāṃ te yāṃti śakrasadanaṃ suviśuddhadehāḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhūmidānamāhātmyavarṇanaṃnāma catuḥṣaṣṭyu ttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
pṛthivīdānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
bhūmidānaṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ nānyeṣāmupapadyate
te hyupārjayituṃ śaktā dātuṃ pālayituṃ yathā
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
sauvarṇāṃ vidhivatkṛtvā sādridrumavatīṃ śubhām
mahīṃ prayaccha viprāṇāṃ tattulyā sā nigadyate
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā bhūtvā mahādānaṃ narottama
caṃdrasūryoparāge ca janmarkṣe viṣuve tathā
pāpakṣayāya dātavyaṃ yaśoarthe vā narairbhuvi
hemnaḥ palaśatenoktā tadardhenāpi śaktitaḥ
kārayetpṛthivīṃ haimīṃ jaṃbudvīpānukāriṇīm
lokapālāṣṭakopetāṃ brahmaviśveśasaṃyutām
nānāparvatapūrṇāṃ ca ratnābharaṇabhūṣitām
sarvasasyavicitrāṃgīṃ sarvagaṃdhādhivāsitām
īdṛśīṃ tu mahīṃ kṛtvā kārayenmaṃḍapaṃ tataḥ
madhye ca vedikāṃ kuryāddhanurhastāṃ pramāṇataḥ
aiśānyāṃ surasaṃsthānamāgneyyāṃ kuṃḍameva ca
patākābhiralaṃkṛtya devatāyatanānyatha
lokapālā grahāścaiva pūjyā mālyavilepanaiḥ
homaṃ kuryurdvijāḥ śāṃtāścātuścaraṇikāḥ śubhāḥ
sālaṃkārā savastrāśca mālyacaṃdanabhūṣitāḥ
agnisaṃsthāpanaṃ tatra kṛtvā pūrvaṃ tato mahīm
śaṃkhatūryaninādaiśca geyamaṃgalanisvanaiḥ
tilaiḥ pracchāditāṃ vediṃ kṛtvā tatrādhivāsayet
athāṣṭādaśadhānyāni rasāṃśca lavaṇādikān
tathāṣṭau pūrṇakalaśānsamaṃtātsthāpayecchubhān
vitānakaṃ ca kauśeyaṃ phalāni vividhāni ca
aṃśukāni vicitrāṇi śrīkhaṃḍaśakalāni ca
tato homāvasāneṣu niṣpanne sarvaśāṃtike
śuklamālyāṃbaradharo yajamānaḥ svayaṃ tataḥ
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ pṛthvīṃ gṛhītvā kusumāṃjalim
puṇyakālamathāsādya maṃtrānetānudīrayet
dhātrī tvamasi bhūtānāmataḥ pāhi vasuṃdhare
vasuṃdharā tato jātā tasmātpāhi bhayādalam
anaṃtāyai namastubhyaṃ pāhi saṃsārakardamāt
tvameva lakṣmīrgovide śive gaurīti saṃsthitā
gāyatrī brahmaṇaḥ pārśve jyotsnā caṃdre ravau prabhā
buddhirbṛhaspatau khyātā medhā muniṣu saṃsthitā
viśvaṃ prāpya sthitā yasmāttato viśvaṃbharā matā
dhṛtiḥ kṣitiḥ kṣamā kṣoṇī pṛthivī vasudhā mahī
etābhirmūrtibhiḥ pāhi devi saṃsārasāgarāt
evamuccārya tāṃ devīṃ brāhmaṇebhyo niveda yet
anena vidhinā yastu dadyāddevīṃ dharāṃ budhaḥ
puṇyakāle ca saṃprāpte sa padaṃ yāti vaiṣṇavam
vimānenārkavarṇena kiṃkiṇījāla mālinā
nārāyaṇapuraṃ gatvā kalpatrayamathāvaset
kṣīṇapuṇya ihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
śatakoṭyadhipaḥ śūraścakravartī mahābalaḥ
sapta janmāni dānasya māhātmyādrājyamāpnuyāt
dvīpāvikarṣaviṣamāṃ vidhivadvidhāya haimīṃ mahīṃ suramahīmiva vindhyamadhyām lokeśaśaṃbhuśivakeśavasaṃyutāṃ ca prāyaccha pārtha tava kiṃ bahunoditena
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pṛthivīdānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi dānamatyadbhutaṃ tava
sāradārumayānyāhurhalāni daśa paṃḍitāḥ
sauvarṇapaṭṭasaṃnaddha ratnavaṃti śubhāni ca
yūnaśca balino bhavyānvyaṃgahīnānsvalaṃkṛtān
abhagnānyojayetteṣu lāṃgaleṣu vṛṣāñchubhān
yoktrāṇi yugalagnāni savṛṣāṇi ca kārayet
pratodakīlakābaṃdhasarvopakaraṇānvitām
evaṃvidha halaiḥ kuryāttaṃ yuktāṃ halapaṃktikām
karkaṭaṃ kheṭakaṃ cāpi grāmaṃ vā sasyamālinam
evaṃvidhāṃ parvakāle dadyātprayatamānasaḥ
kārtikyāṃ cātha vaiśākhyāmuttare vāayane tathā
janmarkṣe grahaṇe vāpi viṣuve vā pradāpayet
brāhmaṇānvedasaṃpannānvyaṃgahīnānalaṃkṛtān
śrotriyāṃśca vinītāṃśca halasaṃkhyānnimaṃtrayet
daśahastapramāṇena maṃḍapaṃ kārayedbudhaḥ
pūrve dvikuḍamekaṃ vā hastamātraṃ suśobhanam
pālāśyaḥ samidhastatra sājyaṃ kṛṣṇāstilāstathā
adhivāsya ca tāṃ paṃktiṃ dhānyamadhyagatāṃ śubhām
tataḥ sarvasamīpe tu snātaḥ śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ
halapaṃktiṃ yojayitvā yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ
tūryaśaṃkhaninādaiśca brahmaghoṣaiḥ supuṣkalaiḥ
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
yasmāddevagaṇāḥ sarve hale tiṣṭhaṃti sarvadā
vṛṣaskaṃdhe saṃnihitāstasmādbhaktiḥ śivestu me
yasmācca bhūmidānasya kalāṃ nārhaṃti ṣoḍaśīm
dānānyanyāni me bhaktirdharme cāstu dṛḍhā sadā
bījāni sarvaratnāni suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā viprāṇāṃ pratipādya ca
sadakṣiṇāṃ vidhānena praṇipatya visarjayet
dṛṣṭvā taddīyamānaṃ tu dānametadyudhiṣṭhira
ājanmanaḥ kṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ
teadyāpi divi modaṃte dānasyāsya prabhāvataḥ
dātavyaṃ bhaktiyuktena striyā vā puruṣeṇa vā
ekamapyuktavidhinā halaṃ deyaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ
ye saṃti lāṃgalamukhottharajovikārā yāvaṃti tadgatadhuraṃdhara romakāṇi
tāvaṃti śaṃkarapure triyugāni tiṣṭhetpaṃktipradānamiha yatkurute manuṣyaḥ
yacchaṃti ye sukṛtino vasudhāsametāṃ te bhūbhujo bhuvamupetya bhavaṃti bhavyāḥ iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde halapaṃktidānavidhivarṇanaṃnāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
āpākadānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
purā bhārata vaṃśesminrājāsīddhavyavāhanaḥ havyavāhanaḥ
pitṛpaitāmahaṃ tena prāptaṃ rājya makaṃṭakam
śarīrotthamahāvyādhirna caivāṃtaradāyakaḥ
tasyaivaṃ kurvato rājyaṃ pūrvakarmārjitāśubhāt
nāsti bhṛtyo bhārasahaḥ sarvarājyadhuraṃdharaḥ
na putraḥ priyakṛtkaścinna maṃtrī madhurākṣaraḥ
na pūgaphalasaṃyuktaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ vasanaṃ na ca
ājagāma mahāyogī rājñaḥ pārśvaṃ mahādyutiḥ
tamāgataṃ muniṃ dṛṣṭvā rājapatnī śubhāvatī
pādyārghyāsanadānena sarvathā tamapūjayat
tataḥ kathāṃte kasmiṃścittamuvāca śubhāvatī
kasmānna bhṛtyāḥ putrā vā maṃtrimitrādikaṃ dvija
bhogāvāptirna ca tathā sarvalokātiśāyinī
karmabhūmiriyaṃ rājñi nātaḥ śocitumarhasi
na tatkurvaṃti rājāno na dāyādā na śatravaḥ
na bāṃdhavā na mitrāṇi yadyena na purā kṛtam
bhṛtyamitrādisaṃbaṃdho na dattaḥ prāpyate kutaḥ
śubhāvatyuvāca
maṃtro vā siddhayogo vā vrataṃ dānamupoṣitam
āpākākhyaṃ mahādānaṃ sarvasaṃpatpradāyakam
śraddhayā kuruśārdūla nārī vāpyatha vā pumān
yena dattena bhāgyānāṃ bahūnāṃ bhājanaṃ bhavet
tacchrutvā sa dadau rājāaapākākhyaṃ dānamuttamam
lebhe putrānpaśūnbhṛtyānmaṃtrimitrasuhṛjjanān
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
āpākākhyaṃ mahādānaṃ kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira
dattena yena kāmānāṃ pumānbhavati bhājanam
grahatārābalaṃ labdhvā bhārgavaṃ pūjayecchubham
vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaiścaiva puṣpairagarucaṃdanaiḥ
kuryāttathaiva sammānaṃ yathā tuṣṭoabhijāyate
kuruṣva tvaṃ me bhāṃḍāni gurūṇi ca laghūni ca
maṇikādīni śubhrāṇi sthālyaśca sumanoharāḥ
ghaṭakāḥ karakāścaiva galaṃtyaḥ kuṃḍalāni ca
śarāvādīni pātrāṇi bhāṃḍamuccāvacaṃ bahu
saṃpādaya mahābhāga viśvakarmā tvameva hi
bhārgavoapi prayatnena nānā bhāṃḍānvitaṃ śubham
āpākaṃ kalpayeddivyaṃ vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā
sahasramekaṃ bhāṃḍānāṃ sthāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ
saṃdhyākāle jvalitvā tu dadyāccāpi hutāśanam
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kuryādgītamaṅgalanisvanaiḥ
tataḥ prabhāte vimale jñātvā nirvāpitaṃ śanaiḥ
yajamānastataḥ snātvā śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ
hemaraupyāṇi bhāṃḍāni tāmralohamayāni ca
paritaḥ sthāpayitvā ca svaśaktyā tāni ṣoḍaśa
pūjayitvā prayatnena kṛtvā cāru pradakṣiṇām
brāhmaṇānpūjayitvā ca bhārgavaṃ pūjya yatnataḥ
nāryaścāvidhavāstatra samānīya prapūjya ca
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā maṃtreṇānena pūjayet
āpākabrahmarūposi bhāṃḍānīmāni jaṃtavaḥ
pradānātte prajāpuṣṭiḥ svargaścāstu mamākṣayaḥ
bhāṃḍarūpāṇi yānyatra kalpitāni mayā kila
bhūtvā satpātrarūpāṇi upatiṣṭhaṃtu tāni me iti dānamaṃtraḥ
yā ca yadbhāṃḍamādatte tasyaitaddāpayettataḥ
svecchayā caiva gṛhṇātu na nivāryāstu kāścana
aviyogaṃ sadā bhartrā rūpaṃ cānuttamaṃ labhet
bhūdānametannirdiṣṭaṃ prakāreṇa tavānagha
niṣpādya bhāṃḍanicayoccataraṃ prayatnādāpākadānamiha yā kurute varastrī
sā putrapautrapaśuvṛddhimukhāni bhuktvā pretya svabhartṛsahitā sukhinī sadāste iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda āpākadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
sarvaśāstrārthatattvajña jñānavijñānapāraga
gṛhadānasya māhātmyaṃ vidhiṃ vada vidāṃvara
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
na gārhasthayātparo dharmo nāsti dānaṃ gṛhātparam
nānṛtādadhikaṃ pāpaṃ na pūjyo brāhmaṇātparaḥ
gogajāśvagaṇākīrṇaṃ gṛhaṃ svargādviśiṣyate
yathā mātaramāśritya sarve jīvaṃti jaṃtavaḥ
evaṃ gṛhasthamāśritya vartayaṃtītarāśramāḥ
dharmaścārthaśca kāmaśca mitrāṇi prathitaṃ yaśaḥ
prāptakāmairnaraiḥ pārtha sadā sevyo gṛhāśramaḥ
na gṛheṇa vinā dharmo nārthakāmau sukhaṃ na ca
dināni nāsya gaṇyaṃte nainamāhurmahāśanam
api śākaṃ pacānasya svagṛhe paramaṃ sukham
iti matvā mahārāja kārayitvā suśobhanam
bhavanaṃ brāhmaṇe deyaṃ bhavyabhūtimabhīpsatā
kārayitvā dṛḍhastaṃbhaṃ śubhapakveṣṭakāmayam
śubhaṃ kamaṭhapṛṣṭhābhaṃ bhābhāsitadigaṃtaram
sudhānuliptaṃ guptaṃ ca sukhaśālāvirājitam
dadyādanaṃtaphaladaṃ śaivavaiṣṇavayoginām
dīnānāthajalārthāya kṛtaṃ kiṃ na kṛtaṃ bhavet
kārayitvā gṛhānpaścādṛtvigrudrārkasaṃkhyayā kuḍhyastaṃbhagavākṣāḍhayānvicitrānbahubhūmikān
saprākārapratolīkānkapāṭārgalayaṃtritān sudhādhavalitānramyānvistīrṇāṃgaṇavāṭikān
praveśanirgamayutānsamāsannajalāśayān
lohopaskarasaṃpūrṇāṃstā mropaskarasaṃyutān
svarṇopaskaraśobhāḍhyānraupyopaskarasaṃkulān ratnopaskarasaṃyuktānkāṃsyopaskaramaṃḍitān
ārakūṭatrapusīsadā nopaskaravarjitān
vaṃśopaskarasaṃkīrṇānkāṣṭhopaskara bṛṃhitān mṛnmayopaskarākīrṇānvastropakaraṇānvitān
dharmopaskarasaṃbhāraśaṇavalkalarājitān
rājitāṃstṛṇapāṣāṇaiḥ sarvopaskarabhūṣitān
carmakāṣṭhamahābhāṃḍaṃ navavastumayaṃ tathā gomahiṣyaśvavṛṣabhapreṣyaveśyāgaṇānvitān kṣetrārāmajalāsannānkāmyānharmyavarāñchubhān
saṃpūrṇānsarvadhānyaistu ghṛtatailaguḍādibhiḥ
tilataṃdulaśālīkṣumudgagodhūmasarṣapaiḥ
niṣpāvāḍhakyacaṇakakulatthāṇumasūrakaiḥ
kaṃgumāṣayavādyāḍhyāñchākavṛṃtākapūritān
lavaṇārdrakakharjūradrākṣājīrakadhānyakaiḥ
hiṃgukuṃkumakarpūrasnānadravyaiḥ sacaṃdanaiḥ
dhūpopaskaraparyuptatūlīgaṇḍopadhānakaiḥ
piṭharolūkhalasthālīśūrpadarpaṇapatrakaiḥ
muśalāsikṛpāṇīṣudaṃḍakodaṃḍamudgaraiḥ
gṛhāṭavāṭakādarvīdṛṣalloṣṭakahastakaiḥ
cātrakāṃśukalohādi dīptamaṃthanikādibhiḥ
kaṃḍaṇī peṣaṇī cullī udakumbhī pramārjanī
maṃjūṣākoṣṭhakāsaṃdī kaṃbalaistanurāṃkavaiḥ
ityevamādibhiḥ pūrṇāngṛhāndadyāddvijātiṣu
evaṃ saṃbhṛtasaṃbhāro yajamānaḥ svayaṃ dvijān kulaśīlasamāyuktāngṛhasaṃkhyānnimaṃtrayet
adhītavedāñchāstrajñānpurāṇasmṛtipāragān gṛhasthadharmaniratāñchāṃtāndāṃtāñjiteṃdriyān
alaṃkṛtya sapatnīkānvāsobhiratha pūjayet
sugaṃdhisragdharānkṛtvā śāṃtikarmaṇi yojayet
gṛhāṃgaṇe kārayitvā kuṃḍamekaṃ samekhalam
grahayajñaḥ prakartavyastuṣṭipuṣṭikaraḥ sadā
rākṣoghnāni ca sūktāni paṭheyurbrāhmaṇāstataḥ
vāstupūjā prakartavyā dikṣu bhūtabaliṃ kṣipet
tataḥ puṇyāhaghoṣeṇa brāhmaṇāṃsteṣu veśmasu
praveśayitvā śayyāsu sabhāryānupaveśayet
yajamānastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ
idaṃ gṛhaṃ gṛhāṇa tvaṃ sarvopaskarasaṃyutam
svastīti brāhmaṇairvācyaṃ kodāditi ca pūjitaiḥ
gṛhopakaraṇaistulyā dakṣiṇā bhavanaṃ vinā
upadeṣṭāramāpṛcchettanmūlatvānmaharṣayaḥ
na saṃkhyāniyamaḥ kāryaḥ śaktiratra niyāmikā
śītavātātapaharaṃ dattvā tṛṇakuṭīrakam
iṣṭānkāmānavāpnoti pretya svarge mahīyate
gobhūhiraṇyadānāni yamāḥ saniyamāstathā
gṛhadānasya kauṃteya kalāṃ nārhaṃti ṣoḍaśīm
yaḥ kārayetsudṛḍhaharmyavatī mahārhā satsevitāṃ dvijapurīṃ sujanopabhogyām divyāpsarobhirabhi naṃditacittavṛttiḥ prāpnotyasāvanavamaṃ padamiṃdumauleḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde gṛhadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
annadānamāhātmyavarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
annadānasya māhātmyaṃ kathayāmi tavānagha
yatproktamṛṣibhiḥ pūrvaṃ tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu
dadasvānnaṃ dadasvānnaṃ dadasvānnaṃ yudhiṣṭhira
rāmeṇa daśarathinā vanasthena nijānujaḥ
pṛthivyāmannapūrṇāyāṃ vayamannasya kāṃkṣiṇaḥ
yaducyate karmabījaṃ tasyāvaśyaṃ phalaṃ naraiḥ
prāpyate lakṣmaṇāsmābhirnānnaṃ vipramukhe hutam
yatra prāpyaṃ tadaprāpyaṃ vidyayā pauruṣeṇa vā
prakārāṃtarabhojyāni dānānyanyāni bhārata
annameva paraṃ dānaṃ satyavākyaṃ paraṃ padam
buddhiścārthātparo lobhaḥ santoṣaḥ paramaṃ sukham
snātānāmanuliptānāṃ bhūṣitānāṃ ca bhūṣaṇaiḥ
na sukhaṃ na ca santoṣo bhavedannādṛte nṛṇām
śveto nāma mahīpālaḥ sārvabhaumoabhavatpurā
teneṣṭaṃ bahubhiryajñaiḥ saṃgrāmā bahavo jitāḥ
dānāni ca pradattāni dharmataḥ pālitā mahī
bhuktā bhogāḥ suvipulā śatrūṇāṃ mūrdhani sthitam
vānaprasthena vidhinā tyaktvā rājaśriyaṃ nṛpa
svargaṃ jagāma bhuktvā tu pūjyamāno marudgaṇaiḥ
tatrāste ramamāṇoasau sākaṃ vidyādharaiḥ sukham
gaṃdharvairgīyate hṛṣṭaiḥ śakreṇāpyanugamyate
divyamālyāṃbaradharo divyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
sa ca nityaṃ vitānāgryādavatīrya mahītalam
svamāṃsānyatti kauṃteya pūrvaṃ tyaktvā kalevaram
taccharīraṃ tathaivāste rakṣitaṃ pūrvakarmabhiḥ
sa kadācitsureśānaṃ brahmāṇaṃ samupasthitaḥ
praṇamya prāṃjalirbhūtvā nirvedādidamabravīt
sarveṣāmapi saṃpūjyaḥ surāṇāṃ surapuṃgava
yayā māṃsānyahaṃ svasya bhakṣyayāmyaśanaṃ vinā
śvetābhijanasaṃpanna śveta śṛṇu vaco mama
tvayādhītaṃ hutaṃ dattaṃ guravaḥ paritoṣitāḥ
nānyadannādṛte puṃsāṃ kiñcitsañjīvanauṣadham
mahīṃ gatvā mahārāja kuruṣva vacanaṃ mama
tapaḥ svādhyāyasaṃpanne śāstrajñe saṃjitendriye
yena saṃpadyate tṛptirakṣayā kṣmāṃpate tava
bhojayitvā tataḥ prādāddakṣiṇāṃ kṣīṇakalmaṣaḥ
ekāvaliṃ svakātkaṇṭhātsamuttārya samujjvalām
śvetastṛpto gataḥ svargaṃ dattvānnaṃ dakṣiṇāyutam
rāmāyaikāvaliṃ prādādagastyaḥ parayā mudā
annaṃ vai prāṇināṃ prāṇā annamojo balaṃ sukham
etasmātkāraṇātsadbhirannadaḥ prāṇadaḥ smṛtaḥ
sudūrādāśayā yasya gṛhaṃ prāptā bubhukṣitāḥ
tṛptāḥ pratinivartaṃte koanyastatsadṛśaḥ pumān
dīkṣitaḥ kapilā satrī rājā bhikṣurmahodadhiḥ
dṛṣṭamātrā punaṃtyete tasmātpaśyaṃti nityaśaḥ
ekasyāpyatitherannaṃ yaḥ pradātumaśaktimān
tasyāaarambhaiḥ parikleśairvasataḥ kiṃ phalaṃ gṛhe
na tvāhāravihīnena śakyaṃ vartayituṃ ciram
yasyānnaṃ tasya te putrā iti prāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
duṣkṛtaṃ hi manuṣyāṇāmannamāśritya tiṣṭhati
yo yasyānnaṃ samaśnāti sa tasyāśnāti duṣkṛtam
tasya māsakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ dātāramupagacchati
kasmānna dīyate nityaṃ kasmādannaṃ na dīyate
yasyedṛśī phalāvāptiḥ kathitā pūrvasūribhiḥ
bhikṣāṃ vā puṣkalāṃ vāpi haṃtakāraṃ dvijātaye
bhojanaṃ vā yathālābhamadattvāśnāti kilbiṣam
yenāyutaṃ sahasraṃ vā bhojitaṃ syāddvijanmanām
tena brahmagṛhāsannaṃ nūnaṃ baddhaṃ kuṭīrakam
vārāṇasyāṃ purā pārtha vaṇigāpaṇajīvanaḥ
dhaneśvara iti khyāto devabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ
tasyāpaṇaikadeśe tu muktvāṃḍaṃ pāṃḍuracchavi
sasarpa sarpastaddeśādvaṇigdṛṣṭvā viśaṃkitaḥ
tadaṃḍaṃ vaṇijā tena dṛṣṭaṃ kāruṇyabuddhinā
tataḥ prabhṛtyanudinaṃ rarakṣa ca puṣoṣa ca
nirjagāma dinaiḥ kaiścidbhitvāṃḍaṃ sarpapotakaḥ
taṃ vaṇikkṣīrapānādyairupacārairavardhayat
lilihe ghṛtabhāṃḍāni jighre ca gaṃdhasaṃcayān
luloṭha pāṃsuprakare cacāra vārimadhyagaḥ
vaṇijā rakṣyamāṇaḥ sa snehāccāharahaḥ punaḥ
jagāma sumahānkāloabhavadeṣa bhayaṃkaraḥ
athaikasmindine gaṃgāṃ gataḥ snātuṃ trilokagām
vaṇigāpaṇe paṇyavidaṃ sthāpayitvā sutaṃ matam
vyavahartuṃ samārabdhaṃ vaṇikputreṇa dhīmatā
dadāti pratigṛhṇāti ghṛtatailayavaikṣavam
vyavahārākulatayā pādayoraṃtareṇa saḥ
sarpaścacāla cāpalyādvaṇigvikṣepamabhyagāt
jānannapi tadvṛttāṃtaṃ nidāne niyatervaśāt
trāsātsaṃtarjayāmāsa balena padacāriṇam
uvāca dāruṇataraṃ vacanaṃ pannagādhamaḥ
śaraṇāgataṃ poṣitaṃ ca tava pitrā priyaṃkaram
kasmānmāṃ haṃsi duṣṭātmankathaṃ jīvanvimokṣyase
anaṃtaraṃ kalakalaḥ saṃjāto rodatāṃ nṛṇām
dhaneśvarasuto daṣṭaḥ sarpeṇāpi bhṛśākulaḥ
acyutānaṃta goviṃda kṛṣṇakṛṣṇetyudīrayan
dhaneśvaropyanuprāptaḥ provācākulayā girā
yadayaṃ bhavatā mūrdhni svabhogenābhiveṣṭitaḥ
mūrkha mitraṃ susaṃbaṃdhaṃ hīnajātijano hi yaḥ
niraparādho bhavataḥ putreṇāhaṃ samāhataḥ
tadahaṃ paśyatasteadya daśāmyenaṃ narādhipa
yathā na bhūyo bhūtānāṃ bhavedasmātkvacidbhayam
satāṃ mārgamapākramya prayātaḥ kena vāryate
kṣaṇamātraṃ pratīkṣasva yāvadeva śiśurmama
evamuktā gṛhaṃ gatvā yatīnāṃ brahmacāriṇām
sahasraṃ bhojayāmāsa ghṛtapāyasabhojanaiḥ
samutthāya tataḥ sarve brāhmaṇā hṛṣṭamānasāḥ
vaṇikputrasyottamāṃge cikṣipuḥ kusumākṣatān
vaṇikputra ciraṃ jīva naśyaṃtu tava śatravaḥ
abhīṣṭaphalasaṃsiddhirastu te brāhmaṇājñayā
tataḥ sa duṣṭaprakṛtirvipra vāgvajratāḍitaḥ
pannago nagasaṃkāśaḥ papāta ca mamāra ca
vipannaṃ pannagaṃ dṛṣṭvā trastacakṣurdhaneśvaraḥ
poṣitoayaṃ mayā bālaḥ pālito lālitastathā
mamāpacārātpaṃcatvamāpannaḥ pavanāśanaḥ
upakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sādhutve tasya ko guṇaḥ
apakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sa sādhuḥ sadbhiriṣyate
ityevamavadhāryāsau duḥkhasaṃtaptamānasaḥ
bubhuje nākulatayā na ca suṣvāpa tāṃ niśām
tataḥ prabhāte gaṃgāyāṃ snātvā saṃtarpya devatāḥ
vaṇikprāha mamābhīṣṭaṃ saṃjīvatveṣa pannagaḥ
udatiṣṭhadahīnāṃgaḥ sahasā hi mahākulaḥ
praharṣamatulaṃ lebhe dṛṣṭvā taṃ purataḥ sthitam
pratyagrāvayavaṃ dṛṣṭvā sṛkkiṇīparileliham
sādhuvādo mahāñjātaḥ praśaśaṃsurdhaneśvaram
yacchaṃti yeanudivasaṃ dvijapuṃgavānāmannaṃ viśuddhamanaso bhṛśamāgatānām
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde annadānamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonasaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
sthālīdānavarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
tatteahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi śrutaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ ca yanmayā
akṣadyūtena bhagavandhanaṃ rājyaṃ ca no hṛtam
āhūya niṣkṛtiprājñaiḥ kitavairakṣakovidaiḥ
vanaṃ prasthāpitāḥ sarve valkalājinavāsasaḥ
draupadyā sahitāḥ kṛṣṇa karṇaduryo dhanādibhiḥ
jñātvā vanagatānasmānbrāhmaṇāḥ saṃjiteṃdriyāḥ
draṣṭumabhyāyayuḥ sarve paurāścāpyanujagmire
asmānsnehātkliśyamānā dṛṣṭvā brāhmaṇasattamāḥ
jīvato yasya jīvaṃti viprā mitrāṇi bāṃdhavāḥ
abhyāgataṃ suhṛdvargaṃ kuṭuṃbamapahāya ca
jīvannapi mṛtaḥ pāpaḥ kevalaṃ svodaraṃbhariḥ
ityevamavadhāryāhaṃ tānṛṣīnpunarabruvam
bhavaṃtaḥ sarva evātra trikālajñā maharṣayaḥ
samāgatā matpriyārthaṃ jñānavijñānapāragāḥ
brūta kaṃcidupāyaṃ me bhavaṃtobhijanaṃ prati
nirgaccheyaṃ vane śūnye dvādaśemāḥ samā yathā
māmuvācātha maitreyaḥ śṛṇu kauṃteya madvacaḥ
pūrvavṛttaṃ pravakṣyāmi dṛṣṭaṃ divyena cakṣuṣā
āsīttapovane kācidbrāhmaṇī brahmacāriṇī
durbhagā durgatā duḥkhādārādhayati sā dvijān
śaucena tuṣṭā munayaḥ praśrayeṇa damena ca
sā tānuvāca kiṃ tanme vrataṃ dānamathāpi vā
ādhārabhūtā bhūtānāṃ bahvapatyā patipriyā
spṛhaṇīyā trijagatāṃ trivargaphalabhāginī
vasiṣṭhastāmuvācātha śṛṇuṣva kathayāmi te
dānaṃ mānakaraṃ puṃsāṃ sarvakāmapradāyakam
kṛtvā tāmramayīṃ sthālīṃ palānāṃ pañcabhiḥ śataiḥ
aśaktastu tadarddhena caturthāṃśena vā punaḥ
sugaṃbhīrodaradarīdṛḍhadaṇḍakuṭuṃbakām mudgataṃdulaniṣpannasusvinnakṣiprapūritām
upadaṃśodakayutāṃ ghṛtapātrasamanvitām
dhautapārśvāṃ dhautakarṇāṃ carcitāṃ candanena ca
sthāpya maṃḍalake vastraiḥ puṣpadhūpairathārcayet
ādityeahani saṃkrāṃtau caturdaśyaṣṭamīṣu vā
ekādaśyāṃ tṛtīyāyāṃ viprāya pratipādayet
na bhavedbhojyasaṃsiddhirbhūtānāṃ piṭharīṃ vinā
tvaṃ siddhiḥ siddhikāmānāṃ tvaṃ puṣṭiḥ puṣṭimicchatām
atastvāṃ praṇamāmyāśu satyaṃ kuru vaco mama
abhuktavati nāśnīyāttathā bhava varapradā
ityuccārya pradātavyā haṃḍikā dvijapuṃgave
tuṣṭipuṣṭipradā puṃsāṃ sarvānkāmānabhīpsatā
vasiṣṭhavacanaṃ śrutvā sā cakāra tathaiva tu
prādātsthālīṃ brāhmaṇāya bahūnāṃ bahudakṣiṇām
sā caiṣā draupadī pārtha bhavadbhāryāabhavatpriyā
tena dānaprabhāveṇa bhavitāaśūnyapāṇikā
eṣā satī śacī svāhā sāvitrī bhūraruṃdhatī
anayā yā bhṛtā sthālī tayā sarvamidaṃ jagat
bhojayiṣyasi kauṃteya kimato brāhmaṇā amī
maitreyāttadupaśrutya tatra saṃhṛṣṭamānasaḥ
annadānaprasaṃgena sthālīdānamidaṃ mayā
kathitaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa kṣaṃtavyamanasūyayā
sthālīṃ viśālavadanāṃ ca sataṃḍulāṃ ca yacchaṃti ye madhuraśulbamayīṃ dvijebhyaḥ
teṣāṃ suhṛtsvajanaviprajanena bhojyaṃ saṃbhujyamānamapi kṛṣṇa na yāti nāśam iti śrībhaviṣye mahā purāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sthālīdānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
dāsīdānavidhivarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
dāsīdānamahaṃ teadya pravakṣyāmyarisūdana
caturṇāmāśramāṇāṃ hi gṛhasthaḥ śreṣṭha ucyate
gṛhasthācca gṛhaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ gṛhācchreṣṭhā varāḥ striyaḥ
pūrṇeṃdubiṃbavadanāḥ pīnonnatapayodharāḥ
tadgṛhaṃ yatra dṛśyaṃte yoṣitaḥ śīlamaṃḍanāḥ
yatraitāstu na pūjyaṃte vinaṃkṣyatyāśu tadgṛham
jāmayo yāni gehāni śapaṃtyapratipūjitāḥ
tāni kṛtyāhatānīva sadyo yāṃti parābhavam
amṛtasyeva kuṇḍāni sukhānāmiva rāśayaḥ
rateriva nidhānāni yoṣitaḥ kena nirmitāḥ
śyāmā maṃtharagāminyaḥ pīnonnatapayodharāḥ
mahiṣyo varanāryaśca na bhavaṃti gṛhegṛhe
gṛhaṃ kṛpaṇavṛttīnāṃ narakasyāparo vidhiḥ
adaṇḍapāśikaṃ grāmamadāsīkaṃ ca yadgṛham
anājyaṃ bhojanaṃ yacca vṛthā taditi me matiḥ
vibhavābharaṇā dāsyo yadgṛhaṃ samupāsate
tatrāste paṃkajakarā lakṣmīḥ kṣīrodavāsinī
na yatrāsti gṛhe śaucaṃ na sukhaṃ vyavahārajam
na tacchataṃ kiṃkarāṇāṃ karoti śubhatāmapi
yadekā kurute dāsī gṛhasthena bhṛtā hi sā
bahulokākulo grāmo dāsīdāsākulaṃ gṛham
yatra bhāryāgṛhe dakṣā dāsyakarmaṇyanuvratāḥ
etadvicārya hṛdaye deyā dāsī dvijātaye
dānakālaṃ praśaṃsaṃti saṃtaḥ parvaṇi vā punaḥ
alaṃkṛtya yathāśaktyā vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyā maṃtreṇānena kaurava
iyaṃ dāsī mayā tubhyaṃ bhagavanpratipāditā
dattvā kṣamāpayetpaścādbrāhmaṇaṃ kāṃcanena tam
anuvrajya gṛhadvāraṃ yāvatpaścādvisarjayet
sarvakarmakarī dattvā taruṇīṃ rūpaśālinīm
dāsīṃ samīkṣya bahuśo gṛhakarmadakṣāṃ yo brahmaṇāya kulaśīlavate dadāti vidyādharādhipaśatairapi pūjitoasau lokaṃ trilokaramayāpsarasāṃ prayāti
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dāsīdānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikasaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
prapādānasya māhātmyaṃ vada devakinaṃdana
kathaṃ deyā kadā deyā dāne tasyāśca kiṃ phalam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
maṃḍapaṃ kārayedvidvānghanacchāyaṃ manoramam
suśītalaṃ ca ramyaṃ ca vicitrāsanasaṃyutam
kārayenmaṃḍapaṃ bhavyaṃ śītavātasahaṃ dṛḍham
tanmadhye sthāpayedbhaktyā maṇīnkuṃbhāṃśca śobhanān akālamūlānkarakānvastrairāveṣṭitānatha
brāhmaṇaḥ śīlasaṃpanno vṛttiṃ dattvā yathocitām
pānīyapānenāśrāṃtānyaḥ kārayati mānavān
evaṃvidhāṃ prapāṃ kṛtvā śubheahni vidhipūrvakam
yathāśaktyā naraśreṣṭha prāraṃbhe bhojayeddvijān
tataścotsarjayedviprānmaṃtreṇānena mānavaḥ
prapeyaṃ sarvasāmānyā bhūtebhyaḥ pratipāditā
asyāḥ pradānātpitarastṛpyaṃtu ca pitāmahāḥ
anivāryaṃ tato deyaṃ jalaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam
tripakṣaṃ vā mahārāja jīvānāṃ jīvanaṃ param
gaṃdhāḍhyaṃ surasaṃ śītaṃ śobhane bhājane sthitam
anena vidhinā yastu grīṣmoṣmaśoṣanāśanam
pānīyamuttamaṃ dadyāttasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
pūrṇacaṃdrapratīkāśaṃ vimānaṃ sodhiruhya ca
viṃśatkoṭyo hi varṣāṇāṃ yakṣagandharvasevitaḥ
tataḥ paraṃ padaṃ yāti punarāvṛttidurlabham
prapādānāsamarthena viśeṣāddharmamīpsatā
pratyahaṃ dharmaghaṭakaḥ karpaṭāveṣṭitānanaḥ
brāhmaṇasya gṛhe neyaḥ śītāmalajalaḥ śuciḥ
tasyaivodyāpanaṃ kāryaṃ māsimāsi narottama
maṃḍakāveṣṭikābhiśca pakvānnaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ
uddiśya śaṃkaraṃ viṣṇuṃ brahmāṇaṃ kurunandana
salilaṃ prokṣayitvā tu maṃtreṇānena mānavaḥ
eṣa dharmaghaṭo datto brahmaviṣṇuśivātmakaḥ
asya pradānātsaphalā mama saṃtu manorathāḥ iti dharmaghaṭadānamaṃtraḥ
prapādānaphalaṃ soapi prāpnotīha na saṃśayaḥ
tenāśvatthatarormūlaṃ secyaṃ nityaṃ jitātmanā
aśvattharūpī bhagavānprīyatāṃ me janārdanaḥ
ityuccārya namaskṛtya pratyahaṃ pāpanāśanam
yaḥ karoti tarormūle sekaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam
sopi tatphalamāpnoti śrutireṣā sanātanī
susvāduśītasalilā klamanāśinī ca prāṃte purasya pathi pāṃthasamājabhūmau
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde prapādānavidhivarṇanaṃnāma dvisaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
agnīṣṭikādānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
agnīṣṭikā kathaṃ deyā śiśire śītabhīrubhiḥ
sarvasattvopakārāya karuṇīkṛtamānasaiḥ
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
agnīṣṭikāmahaṃ pārtha kathayāmi nibodha tām
ādau mārgaśire māsi śobhane divase śubhām
agnīṣṭikāṃ kārayitvā sukhāsanavatīṃ śubhām
devāṃgaṇe pathe gehe vistīrṇe catvaretha vā
ubhayoḥ saṃdhyayoḥ kṛtvā saṃśuṣkaṃ kāṣṭhasaṃcayam
tataḥ prajvālayedagniṃ hutvā vyāhṛtibhiḥ kramāt
yaḥ karoti kathāḥ pārtha na tāḥ śakyā mayoditum
rājavārtā janavārtā yadi kaścinnijecchayā
anena vidhinā yastu dadyādagnīṣṭikāṃ naraḥ
vimāne cārkasaṃkāśe samārūḍho mahādhane
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭivarṣaśatāni ca
nīrujaḥ satrayājī ca agnivattejasānvitaḥ
caitye surāṃgaṇasabhāvasathe subhavyāṃ yeagnīṣṭikāṃ pracurakāṣṭhavatīṃ pradadyuḥ hemaṃtaśaiśiraṛtau sukhadā janānāṃ kāyāgnidīpanamalaṃ punarāpnuvaṃti
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde agnīṣṭikādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma trisaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
bahupradānaṃ godānaṃ tvatto vidvañchrutaṃ mayā
bhūmidānasya māhātmyaṃ vidhiścaivāvadhāritaḥ
sāṃprataṃ yaduśārdūla vidyādānasya yo vidhiḥ
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
vidyādānavidhiṃ vakṣye yāthātathyena teadhunā
kārayenmaṃḍalaṃ divyaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃtataḥ
sauvarṇīṃ lekhanī kāryā raupyaṃ ca maṣibhājanam
lekhakaṃ pūjayitvā tu āraṃbhaṃ kārayetsudhīḥ
vinītaścāpramattaśca tataḥ prabhṛti lekhakaḥ
samāni samaśīrṣāṇi vartulāni dhanāni ca
lekhayedakṣarāṇīha tadgatenāṃtarātmanā
niṣpādayitvā tacchāstraṃ śaivaṃ vāpyatha vaiṣṇavam
niṣpādite tataḥ pūjyo lekhako vastrabhūṣaṇaiḥ
saṃpūjayitvā tacchāstraṃ deyaṃ guṇavate tadā
śāstrasadbhāvaviduṣe vācake ca priyaṃvade
sāmanyaṃ sarvalokānāṃ sthāpayedatha vā maṭhe
yatpuṇyaṃ tīrthayātrāyāṃ yatpuṇyaṃ yajvanāṃ tathā
tatpuṇyaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ vidyādānāllabhennaraḥ
purāṇaṃ bhārataṃ vāpi rāmāyaṇamathāpi vā
prātarutthāya yaḥ śiṣyānadhyāpayati yatnataḥ
vedaśāstraṃ nṛtyagītaṃ kastena sadṛśaḥ kṛtī
upādhyāyasya yo vṛttiṃ dattvāadhyāpayate janaḥ
chātrāṇāṃ bhojanābhyaṃgaṃ vastraṃ bhikṣāmathāpi vā
dattvā prāpnoti puruṣaḥ sarvakāmānna saṃśayaḥ
viveko jīvitaṃ dīrghaṃ dharmakāmārthasaṃpadaḥ
sarvaṃ tena bhaveddattaṃ chātrāṇāṃ poṣaṇe kṛte
śāstraṃ śastrakalāśilpaṃ yo yadicchedupārjitum
tasyopakārakaraṇe pārtha kāryaṃ sadā manaḥ
tatphalaṃ samavāpnoti vidyādānānna saṃśayaḥ
śivālaye viṣṇugṛhe sūryasya bhavaneatha vā
yaḥ kārayati dharmātmā sadā pustakavācanam
gobhūhiraṇyavāsāṃsi śayanānyāsanāni ca
dharmādharmaṃ na jānāti vidyayā rahitaḥ pumān
trailokyaṃ caturo varṇāścatvāraścāśramāḥ pṛthak
brahmādyā devatāḥ sarvā vidyādāne pratiṣṭhitāḥ
kalpaṃ viṣṇupure tiṣṭhetpūjyamānaḥ surottamaiḥ
kṣitiṃ vopetya kālāṃte rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
hastyaśvarathadānāḍhyo dātā bhoktā vimatsarī
putraiḥ pautre parivṛto jīvecca śaradāṃ śatam
dānaṃ viśeṣaphaladaṃ jagatīha nānyādvidyāṃ vihāya vadanābjakṛtādhivāsām gobhūhiraṇyagajavājirathādisarvaṃ tāṃ yacchatāṃ kimiha pārtha bhavenna dattam iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vidyādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥsaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
purā priyavrato rājā putraḥ svāyaṃbhuvasya tu
pālayāmāsa vasudhāṃ prajāpatirivāparaḥ
triṃśadvarṣasahasrāṇi pālayitvā mahīmimām
rājye nikṣipya tanayānsaptadvīpeṣu sapta saḥ
tapovanagataṃ śrutvā rājānaṃ paramadyutim
samājagmurmahātmāna ṛṣayastaṃ didṛkṣavaḥ
tānāgatānṛṣīndṛṣṭvā taponirdhūtakalmaṣān
pūjayāmāsa medhāvī vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā
pādyārghyācamanīyena priyapraśnottareṇa ca
atha teṣūpaviṣṭeṣu brāhmaṇeṣu mahātmasu
ājagāma mahātejāḥ pulastyo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ
dīpyamāno mahātejā dvitīya iva bhāskaraḥpāvakaḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvā munayaḥ sarve sa ca rājā mahārathaḥ
kṛtvā tu saṃvidaṃ tena yathāyogyaṃ vidhānataḥ
viṣṭaraṃ ca dadustasmai pādyārghyācamanādikam
cakruḥ kathā mudāyuktā vedoktavividhāśrayāḥ
tataḥ kathāṃte kasmiṃścinmunayaste sarājakāḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
icchāmaḥ śrotumetatte rājā cāyaṃ yatavrataḥ
śṛṇudhvaṃ munayaḥ sarve rahasyaṃ pāpanārānam
uttamaṃ sarva dānānāṃ samavāyaṃ vadāmi vaḥ
kṛtaghnaḥ kūṭasākṣī ca mucyate pātakānnaraḥ
kṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇādyaiśca tulāpuruṣasaṃjñitaiḥ
vrataiśca pācayeddehamākāṃkṣanbrahmaṇaḥ padam
kṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇādīni vratāni munisattamāḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ vanasthānāṃ bhikṣo raṃḍājanasya ca
mahādhanāśca ye lokā rājāno ratnabhāginaḥ
na teṣāṃ kṛcchrasādhyoapi kvaciddharmaḥ praśasyate
yadetaddraviṇaṃ nāma prāṇāścaite bahiścarāḥ
tasmādbahiścaraiḥ prāṇairātmā yojyaḥ sadā budhaiḥ
dravyāṇāmuttamaṃ loke kāṃcanaṃ sārvakāmikam
apatyaṃ suramukhyasya jyeṣṭhaṃ caivaṃ vibhā vasoḥ
etatpulastyamuninā ṛṣīṇāṃ pārthi vasva ca
samākhyātaṃ nṛpaśreṣṭha tebhyaśca tanmayā śrutam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
tulāpuruṣadānasya vidhānaṃ parameśvara
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
śṛṇuṣvāvahito rājanvidhānaṃ gadato mama
tulāpuruṣasaṃjñasya dānasyeha nṛpottama
vyatīpāteayane caiva kārtikyāṃ viṣuve tathā
candrasūryagrahe yadvā māghyāṃ vā nṛpasattama
janmarkṣe grahapīḍāsu tathā duḥsvapnadarśane
yadā vā jāyate vittaṃ tadā deyamidaṃ bhavet
anityaṃ jīvitaṃ yasmādvapuścātīva cañcalam
keśeṣu ca gṛhītaḥ sanmṛtyunā dharmamācaret
tadaiva dānakālaḥ syātkāraṇaṃ hi yato mama
tīrthe vāyatane goṣṭheṣvatha vā bhava nāṃgaṇe
maṇḍapaṃ kārayedvidvāṃścaturbhadrānanaṃ budhaḥ
ārdraśākhānvitaṃ divyaṃ prāgudakpravaṇaṃ dṛḍham
ṣoḍaśāratnimātraṃ ca patākābhiralaṃkṛ tam
tanmadhye kārayedvediṃ hastamātrocchritāṃ śubhām
caturasrāṃ samaṃtācca saptahastāṃ suśobhanām
tasyā madhye tulāṃ divyāṃ sthāpa yedvidhipūrvakam
staṃbhadvayaṃ mahārāja sthāpayetsudṛḍhaṃ navam
caṃdanaḥ khadiro bilvaḥ śākaścaiveṃguda stathā
tiṃduko devadāruśca śrīparṇaścāṣṭamaḥ smṛtaḥ
ityaṣṭau vṛkṣajātīyāḥ staṃbhāste parikīrtitāḥ
anyathāpi bhavedvṛkṣaḥ sārajño yājñikastathā
suniścalaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā tiryakkāṣṭhamathopari
nyasettadvṛkṣajātīyaṃ caturhastaṃ pramāṇataḥ
samānajātiṃ tu tulāṃ tanmadhye yojayeddṛḍham
ṣaṇṇavatyaṃgulā divyā samagrā lohapāśikā
kṛṣṇalohamayau tasyāṃ karṇau cāpi prakalpayet
tulāpuruṣasaṃjñastu madhye kāryaḥ pumānbha vet
evaṃvidhāṃ tulāṃ kṛtvā nānāratnairvibhūṣitām
caṃdanenānuliptāṃgīṃ vastrālaṃkāravigrahām
caṃdanenānuliptāṃgau nānātnairalaṃkṛtau
kuṇḍāni cātra catvāri yoniyuktāni kārayet
hastamātrapramāṇāni mekhalātrayavaṃti ca
pūrvottare hastamitā vediḥ kāryā suśobhanā
lokapālagrahāṇāṃ ca pūjā tatra vidhīyate
śaṃkarasya bhavetkāryaṃ mālyavastraphalākṣataiḥ
toraṇāni ca kāryāṇi kṣīravṛkṣodbhavāni ca
caturdvāreṣu saṃsthāpyāḥ kumbhāḥ srakpalla vānanāḥ
paṃcaratnasamāyuktāḥ saptadhānyoparisthitāḥ
ṛgvedapāṭhakau dvau ca pūrvakuṇḍe niyojayet
atraiva kecidicchaṃti ṛṣayaḥ ṣoḍaśartvijaḥ
homadravyāṇi sarvāṇi tilājyaṃ samidhastathā
sruvāḥ srucaśca śastrāṇi viṣṭaraḥ kusumāni ca
lokapālāḥ suvarṇāstu patākāḥ paritaḥ śubhāḥ
mahādhvajaṃ ca badhnīyātpaṃcavarṇaṃ vitānakam
etatsarvaṃ samāhṛtya puṇyeahani vicakṣaṇaḥ
varddhakirbrāhmaṇaiḥ sārddhaṃ sarvaśilpaviśā radaḥ
saṃpūrṇaṃ yajamānāya darśayedyajñamaṃḍapam
yajamānastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ
prakṣipellokapālānāmebhirmaṃtraiḥ śubhairbalim
saṃvījyamānopsarasāṃ gaṇena rakṣādhvaraṃ no bhagavannamaste
ehyehi sarvāmarahavyavāha munipravīrerabhihṛṣṭamānasaḥ
śubhāśubhānaṃdakṛtāmadhīśa rakṣādhvaraṃ me bhagavannamaste
oṃ yamāya namaḥ
ehyehi rakṣogaṇanāyakastvaṃ viśālavetālapiśācasaṃghaiḥ
oṃ nirṛtaye namaḥ
ehyehi yādogaṇavāridhīnāṃ gaṇena parjanya sahāpsarobhiḥ
ehyehi yajñe mama rakṣaṇāya mṛgādhirūḍhaḥ saha siddhasaṃghaiḥ
prāṇādhipaḥ kālakaveḥ sahāyo gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ bhagavannamaste
ehyehi yajñeśvara yajñarakṣāṃ vidhatsva nakṣatragaṇena sārddham
sarvauṣadhībhiḥ pitṛbhiḥ sahaiva gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ bhagavannamaste
ehyehi viśveśvara viśvamūrte triśūlakhaṭvāṅgadhareṇa sārddham
lokena bhūteśvara yajñasiddhyai gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ bhagavannamaste
ehyehi pātāladharādharendra nāgāṃganākinnaragīyamāna
ehyehi viśvādhipate munīṃdra lokeśa sārddhaṃ pitṛdevatābhiḥ
viśādhvarāṃtaḥ satataṃ śivāya pitāmahastvaṃ satataṃ namaste
trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca
brahmaviṣṇuśivaiḥ sārddhaṃ rakṣāṃ kurvaṃtu tāni me
devadānavagandharvā yakṣa rākṣasapannagāḥ
sarve mamādhvare rakṣāṃ prakurvaṃtu mudānvitāḥ
ityāvāhya surāndadyādṛtvigbhyaḥ kaṇṭha bhūṣaṇam
kuṃḍalāni ca haimāni sūtrāṇi kaṭakāni ca
tathāṃgulipavitrāṇi vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca
dviguṇaṃ gurave dadyādbhūṣaṇā cchādanādikam
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ
praṇavādisvanāmnā ca svāhāṃto homa ucyate
homaḥ surāṇāṃ kartavyo ye caivātra pratiṣṭhitāḥ
grahāṇāṃ lokapālānāṃ śivakeśavayostathā
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
śuklamālyāṃbaro bhūtvā tāṃ tulāmabhimaṃtrayet
namaste sarvadevānāṃ śaktistvaṃ satyamāsthitā
sākṣibhūtā jagaddhātri nirmitā viśvayoninā
ekataḥ sarvasatyāni tathānṛtaśatāni ca
tvaṃ tule sarvabhūtānāṃ pramāṇamiha kīrtitā
māṃ tolayaṃtī saṃsārāduddharātra namostute
yoasau tattvā dhipo devaḥ puruṣaḥ pacaviṃśakaḥ
tvaṃ hare tārayasvāsmānasmātsaṃsārasāgarāt
puṇyakālamathāsādya kṛtvaivamadhivāsanam
praṇamya parayā bhaktyā tāṃ tulāmāruhedbudhaḥ
sa saṅgacarmakavacī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ
dharmarājamathādāya hemasūryeṇa saṃyutam
karābhyāṃ baddhamuṣṭibhyāmāste paśyanharermukham
vāme yamaṃ tathā gṛhya dakṣiṇe ca raviṃ tathā
sāmyādabhyadhikaṃ yāvatkāṃcanaṃ cātinirmalam
puṣṭikāmastu kurvīta bhūmisaṃsthaṃ nareśvara
kṣaṇamātraṃ tataḥ sthitvā punaretadudīrayet
namaste sarvabhūtānāṃ sākṣibhūte sanātane
pitāmahena devi tvaṃ nirmitā parameṣṭhinā
prāpya teṣāmanujñāṃ vā tathānyebhyoapi dāpayet
dīnānātha viśiṣṭādīnpūjayedbrāhmaṇaiḥ saha
tiṣṭhadbhayāvahaṃ yasmātkaṣṭavyādhikaraṃ bhavet
rātriṃ parasvīkara ṇācchriyaṃ prāpnotyanuttamām
karpūreṇa tathecchaṃti kecidbrāhmaṇapuṃgavāḥ
tathāsitatṛtīyāyāṃ nāryaḥ saubhāgyavardhitāḥ
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ rājañchṛṇuṣva gadato mama
vimānavaramāsthāya nārī vā puruṣoapi vā
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ gaṃdha rvanagaropamam
nānāvṛkṣākulaṃ ramyaṃ nānāgaṃdhādhivāsitam
anekaratnaviddhāṃgaṃ muktādāmāvalaṃbitam
śayanāsanasaṃkīrṇaṃ patākā bhiralaṃkṛtam
ghaṃṭāśataravoddhuṣṭaṃ cāmaravyajanānvitam
mitvā tatra rājeṃdra kalpamekaṃ nirāmayaḥ
viśveṣāṃ caiva devānāṃ deva rāja pure tathā
punarmānuṣamabhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
yajvā dānapatirdhīmāñchatrupakṣakṣayaṃkaraḥ
yaścaitacchṛṇuyādbhaktyā mahādānānukīrtanam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tulāpuruṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcasaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
tvattulyo jāyate yena āyuṣā yaśasā śriyā
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi tava lokahitecchayā
yenopāyena jāyaṃte mattulyā mānavā bhuvi
pārthasnehānmahābhāga pravakṣyāmi hitaṃ tava
gobrāhmaṇārthe maraṇaṃ prāptaṃ yena sumedhasā
prayāgeanaśanaṃ vāpi pūjito vātha śaṃkaraḥ
prayāti brahmasālokyaṃ śrutireṣā sanātanī
yena matsamatāṃ yāti tatte vakṣyāmyataḥ param
dānaṃ hiraṇyagarbhākhyaṃ kathyamānaṃ nibodha me
pavitraṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ pāvanaṃ paramaṃ mahat
tadapāṃ garbhamāviśya punarjātaṃ tu bhūtale
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
yatpramāṇaṃ yathācaitaddātavyaṃ parameśvara
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
ayane viṣuve caiva grahaṇe śaśisūryayoḥ
vyatīpāteatha kārtikyāṃ janmarkṣe vā narottama
gaṃgāyāṃ yamunāyāṃ ca siṃdhusāgarasaṃgame
puṇyanadyaśca dānesminpraśastāḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ
ārāme vā taḍāge vā śucau deśe vidhānataḥ
tatra bhūśodhanaṃ kuryātprāgudakpravaṇaṃ śubham
hastā dvādaśa kartavyaṃ maṃḍapaṃ tu suśobhanam
tanmadhye vedikāṃ kuryātpaṃcahastāmalakṛtām
vitānamupariṣṭācca puṣpamālāvalaṃbitum
tasya pramāṇaṃ vakṣyāmi rūpaṃ vai sthaṃḍilodbhavam
śilpinaṃ pūjayetpūrvaṃ vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā
brāhmaṇānvācayetpaścāttataḥ karma samārabhet
suvarṇena saṃśuddhena śaktitaḥ kārayedbudhaḥ
aṃgulāni catuḥṣaṣṭirdairghyaṃ ca parikīrtitam
vartulaṃ karṇikākāraṃ cārugraṃthivivarjitam
pidhānamupariṣṭācca kartavyaṃ cāṃgulādhikam
astrāṇi daśa kurvīta nālaṃ sūryaṃ ca kāṃcanam
dātraṃ sapaṭṭikaṃ caiva sarvopaskaraṇānvitam
sūcīkṣuraśca haimāni tatsarvaṃ parikalpayet
pārśvataḥ sthāpayettasya hemadaṃḍakamaṃḍalū
chatrikāpādukāyugmaṃ vajravaiḍūryamaṃḍitam
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃyuktaṃ kṛtvā garbhaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ
brahmaghoṣeṇa mahatā śaṃkhatūryaraveṇa ca
hastinā śakaṭenātha rājanbrahmarathena vā
ānayenmaṃḍapaṃ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇamataṃdritaḥ
samālabhya punaḥ sarvaṃ kuṃkumena sugaṃdhinā
kauśeyavāsasī śubhre tatastaṃ paridhāpayet
samaṃtātpuṣpamālābhiḥ pūjayedbhaktitaḥ sudhīḥ
dhūpaiḥ sudhūpitaṃ kṛtvā maṃtrametamudīrayet
evaṃ saṃpūjayitvā tu tau rātrimadhivāsayet
vedyāścaturdiśaṃ caiva kuṃḍāni parikalpayet
catuścāraṇikāstatra brāhmaṇā maṃtrapāragāḥ
sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāḥ sarve cāhatavāsasaḥ
tāmrapātradvayopetā gaṃdhapuṣpādipūjitāḥ
tatra grahāṃllokapālānbrahmaviṣṇumaheśvarān pūjayetsvarṇaghaṭitānpuṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ
patākābhiralaṃkṛtya maṃḍapaṃ toraṇaistathā
tulāpuruṣamaṃtraiśca lokapālabaliṃ kṣipet
pālāśyaḥ samidhastatra praśastā homakarmaṇi
svaliṃgairhomayetpūrvaṃ maṃtrairvyāhṛtibhiḥ pumān
ayute dve ca homasya saṃkhyāmāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ
yajamānastataḥ snātvā śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ
ityuccārya svayaṃ bhaktyā kṛtvā caiva pradakṣiṇām
kṣīrājyadadhisaṃpūrṇaṃ tadgarbhaṃ praviśedbudhaḥ
sauvarṇaṃ dharmarājaṃ tu savye kṛtvā kare tataḥ
bhāskaraṃ dakṣiṇe caiva muṣṭiṃ baddhvā prayatnataḥ
jānvoraṃtarataścaiva śiraḥ kṛtvā samāhitaḥ
ucchvāsapaṃcaka tiṣṭheccetasā ciṃtayañchivam
garbhādhānaṃ puṃsavanaṃ sīmaṃtonnayanaṃ tathā
jātakarmādikāḥ kuryuḥ kriyāḥ ṣoḍaśa cāparāḥ
tata utthāya niḥsṛtya punaḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇām
sauvarṇā pṛthivī yāvanna dṛṣṭā spaṣṭacakṣuṣā
aṣṭau dvijāḥ suvarṇāṃgā sauvarṇaiḥ kalaśaiḥ śubhaiḥ
raupyairauduṃbarairvāpi mṛṇmayairvā suśobhanaiḥ
puṣpairāveṣṭitagrīvairavraṇaiḥ kalaśairdṛḍhaiḥ
tatra sthāpya mahābhāga yajamānaṃ dvijottamāḥ
adya jātasya teṃagāni abhiṣekṣyāmahe vayam
divyenānena vapuṣā ciraṃjīvamukhī bhava
evaṃ kṛtābhiṣekastu yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ
dadyāddhiraṇyagarbhaṃ taṃ sodakenaiva pāṇinā
tānsaṃpūjya ca bhāvena bahubhyo vā tadājñayā
anyeṣāṃ caiva viprāṇāṃ ye ca tatra sabhāsadaḥ
teṣāṃ caiva pradātavyaṃ dānaṃ cātra viśeṣataḥ
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇānāṃ ca dātavyaṃ sārvakāmikam
vāpīkūpataḍāgādyairjalasthānairalaṃkṛtam
udyānaśatasaṃsthānaṃ padmākaraniṣevitam
prāsādaśatasaṃkīrṇaṃ varastrīśatasevitam
vīṇāveṇumṛdaṃgānāṃ śabdairāpūritaṃ mahat
bhūmayo yatra rājendra divyā maṇimayāḥ śubhāḥ
dhṛtaṃ stambhasahasreṇa sukṛtaṃ viśvakarmaṇā
jaṃbūdvīpamaśeṣaṃ tu bhuṃkte divyaparākramaḥ
dhārmikaḥ satyaśīlaśca brahmaṇyo guruvatsalaḥ
daśa janmrānyasau rājā jāyate rogavarjitaḥ
yastvidaṃ śṛṇuyādbhaktyā rahasyaṃ pāpanāśanam
soapi varṣaśataṃ sāgraṃ suraloke mahīyate
niḥsṛtya taddvijavarāya nivedya bhaktyā mārtaṇḍavaddivi virājati divyadehaḥ iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hiraṇyagarbhadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭsaptatyuttaraśatata tamoadhyāyaḥ cha
brahmāṇḍadānavidhivarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
agastyena purā gīto dānānāṃ vidhiruttamaḥ
śṛṇu tvaṃ rājaśārdūla kathyamānaṃ mayādhunā
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ vāpi kāyikaṃ ca sudustaram
maṃgalyaṃ maṃgalaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvadāneṣu cottamam
dhanyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ paralokabhayāpaham
brahmāṃḍaṃ kāṃcanaṃ kṛtvā sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam
vimānaśatakoṭībhirbhūṣitaṃ cāpsarovaraiḥ
śivācyutārkaśikharamumālakṣmīsamanvitam
vitasteraṃgulaśataṃ yāvadāyāmavistaram
kuryādviṃśatpalādūrdhvamāsahasrācca bhaktitaḥ
śakaladvayasaṃyuktaṃ puṭākāraṃ susaṃhitam
śilpinā vihitaṃ yasmādbrahmāṃḍaṃ sarvakāmadam
anyeṣvapi tu kāleṣu śraddhāvittasamanvitaḥ
puṣpamaṃḍapikāṃ kṛtvā tatra saṃsthāpayedbudhaḥ
tasya dikṣu ca sarvāsu pūrṇakumbhāṃśca vinyaset
aṣṭādaśaiva cānyāni droṇamātrāṇyathāharet
gṛhe vā maṃḍape vāpi sthāpayettadvicakṣaṇaḥ
pādukopānahacchatrabhājanāsanadarpaṇaiḥ
kārayetkuṇḍamekaṃ tu hastamātraṃ vidhānataḥ
catuścāraṇikāstatra homaṃ kuryurdvijottamāḥ
sarvābharaṇasampannā susnātāhatavāsasaḥ
tathā purohitaścaiva rājñā ṣaṣṭho vidhīyate
itareṣāṃ tu pañcaiva kuryuryajñamataṃdritāḥ
grahayajñavidhānena grahāṇāṃ yajña iṣyate
brahmaviṣṇuśivānāṃ ca tannāmnā juhuyāttilān
ayutaṃ homayetpaścānmahāvyāhṛtibhirnṛpa
tataḥ sarvasamāptau tu snātvā śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ
brahmāṃḍaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
vāṅmayāṃta nimagnāya brahmāṃḍa śubhakṛdbhava
brahmāṃḍodaravartīni yāni sattvāni kānicit
tāni sarvāṇi me tuṣṭiṃ prayacchatvatulāṃ sadā
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca lokapālāstathā grahāḥ
nakṣatrāṇi tathā nāgā ṛṣayo marutastathā
sarve bhavaṃtu saṃtuṣṭāḥ saptajanmāṃtarāṇi me
ityuccārya tato dadyādbrahmāṃḍaṃ sarvakāmadam
sadakṣiṇaṃ ca taṃ kṛtvā vasu saṃpādayeddvijān
tatteahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva gadato mama
āsīdādiyuge rājā sudyumno nāma bhārata
nāgāyutabalaḥ śrīmānbahubhṛtyaparicchadaḥ
triṃśadvarṣasahasrāṇi kṛtvā rājyamakaṃṭakam
tataḥ saṃsthāpya tanayaṃ rājā rājye vanaṃ yayau
praviśya ca vanaṃ ghoraṃ tapastīvraṃ cacāra ha
adhyātmagatitattvajñaḥ karmakāṃḍaṃ visṛjya ca
kālena mahatā rājā diṣṭāṃtamagamatpurā
divyaṃ vimānamāruhya nānā vādyaravākulam
tasyāsanaṃ dideśātha brahmāsuragaṇairvṛtaḥ
divyaṃ kanakacitrāṃgaṃ ratnālaṃkṛtavigraham
bubhukṣayā naraśreṣṭha tathātyaṃtapipāsayā
sa pīḍyamāno brahmāṇaṃ kṛtāṃjalirabhāṣata
atra sthitaṃ ca māṃ deva kṣuttṛṣṇā ca prabādhate
tvayā hi kurvatā rājyaṃ puṣṭānyaṃgāni pārthiva
dānaṃ baṃdhātmakaṃ matvā tasmāddattaṃ tvayā na hi
jñānādbrahmapadaṃ prāptamadānātkṣutprabādhate
rājovāca
bhagavaṃstṛṣāpanuttiḥ syātkathaṃ me parameśvara
bhūyo gatvā mahīṃ rājanbrahmāṃḍaṃ sārvakāmikam
brahmāṃḍaṃ tu vidhānena brāhmaṇebhyaḥ pradattavān
sa jagāma punaḥ svargaṃ lebhe tṛptiṃ ca śāśvatīm
brahmāṃḍaṃ yaḥ prayaccheta tena dattaṃ carācaram
tārayetkulajāndattvā bhaviṣyāṃśca na saṃśayaḥ
manvaṃtarāṇi ṣaṭtriśadbrahmaloke mahīyate
na dāridyaṃ na ca vyādhiṃ viyogaṃ naiva paśyati
nārī vā puruṣo vāpi dānasyāsya prabhāvataḥ
yaścaitacchṛṇuyādbhaktyā bhaktānāṃ śrāvayecca yaḥ
brahmāṃḍakhaṃḍayugalaṃ sakulācalaṃ ca digbhāgasāgarasarovarasiddhajuṣṭam
diksaṃkhyayā guṇavatāṃ dvijasattamānāṃ dattvā pumānpadamupaiti pitāmahasya iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhisaṃvāde brahmāṃḍadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptasaptatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
bhagavāñchaṃkaraḥ pūrvaṃ kṛtodvāho mayā saha
ramamāṇastayā sārddhaṃ bahuvarṣagaṇānsthitaḥ
tataḥ suragaṇāḥ sarve paraṃ trāsamupāgatāḥ
tayorapatyasya bhayāttameva śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ
vaiśvānaramukhā devā mahādevaṃ trilocanam
prasannaścābhavatteṣāṃ vibudhānāṃ trilocanaḥ
īśvara uvāca
kiṃ bhītāstridaśāḥ sarve kaṃ varaṃ ca dadāmi vaḥ
devā ūcuḥ
bhagavaṃstava saṃyogātpārvatyā saha śaṃkara
aśaktāḥ sma vayaṃ sarve bhavadojo vidhāraṇe
śrībhagavānuvāca
ataḥ prabhṛtyahaṃ devā ūrdhvaretā vyavasthitaḥ
tataḥ kruddhā umā teṣāṃ devānāṃ vākyamabravīt
vitathaṃ putrajaṃ saukhyaṃ bhavadbhirme kṛtaṃ surāḥ
tataḥ prabhṛti vai devāḥ prasūyaṃte na bhūpate
dattvā śāpaṃ tato devī devānāmāha śaṃkaram
aputrasya gatirnāsti itīyaṃ śrūyate śrutiḥ
bhagavānuvāca
aputraḥ puruṣo yaśca nārī vā parvatātmaje
sauvarṇastena dātavyaḥ kalpavṛkṣo guṇānvitaḥ
kṛtrimaṃ vāpi gṛhṇīyādvṛkṣaṃ vā sthāvarādikam
tena putravatāṃ lokā devi tasya na saṃśayaḥ
kalpavṛkṣastu kartavyaḥ śuddhakāṃcanasaṃbhavaḥ
bahuśākhaḥ suvarṇāṃgopyanekakusumānvitaḥ
mahāskaṃdhasvarūpaśca ratnālaṃkṛtavigrahaḥ
kuryāviṃśatpalādūrddhvaṃ śaktyā vā nṛpasattama
pravālāṃkurasaṃchannaṃ muktādāmāvalaṃbitam
catuṣkoṇeṣu kurvīta caturaḥ kāṃcanadrumān
suvarṇasya pramāṇaṃ ca kathayāmi varānane
nadyāstīre gṛhe vāpi devatāyatane tathā
prāgudakpravaṇe deśe maṃḍapaṃ tatra kārayet
daśahastapramāṇena daśahastāśca vedikāḥ
hastamātrapramāṇena kuṃḍamekaṃ suśobhanam
āgneyyāṃ kārayedrājanmekhalāmupalepanam
tatra vai brāhmaṇā yojyā ṛgyajuḥsāmapāṭhakāḥ
upadeṣṭā ca tatraiva tṛtīyaḥ paṃcamoatha vā sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāstāmrapatradvayānvitāḥ
anuliptāścaṃdanena vastramālyādibhūṣitāḥ
brahmaviṣṇuśivopetaṃ paṃcaśākhaṃ sabhāskaram
saṃtānaṃ saha gāyatryā pūrvato lavaṇopari
maṃdāraṃ dakṣiṇe pārśve śriyā saha tathā ghṛte
paścime pārijātaṃ tu umayā saha pādapam
kauśeyavastrasaṃyuktānikṣumālyaphalānvitān
tathāṣṭau pūrṇakalaśānsamaṃtātparikalpayet
agnipraṇayanaṃ kṛtvā adhivāsya ca pādapān
dhānyāni caiva sarvāṇi samaṃtātparikalpayet
nānā bhakṣyāṇi naivedyaṃ sarvaṃ tatra niyojayet
dīpamālā vicitrāśca jvālayeta samaṃtataḥ
kāmadastvaṃ hi devānāṃ kāmavṛkṣastataḥ smṛtaḥ
mayā saṃpūjito bhaktyā pūrayasva manorathān
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhinā jāgaraṃ tatra kārayet
homaṃ ca brāhmaṇāḥ kuryurmadgatenāṃtarātmanā
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ
talliṃgaiḥ sthāpitāndevānhomenāpyāyayettataḥ
tataḥ prabhāte cotthāya snātvā śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ
dadyātparvasamīpe tu kalpavṛkṣaṃ sada kṣiṇam
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya maṃtrametamudīrayet
viśvaṃbharāya devāya namaste viśvamūrtaye
yasmāttvameva viśvātmā brahmasthāṇudivākarāḥ
mūrtāmūrtaparaṃ bījamataḥ pāhi sanātana
evamāmantrya taṃ dṛṣṭvā gurave kalpapādapam
caturbhyaścāpi ṛtvigbhyaḥ sāmaṃtādīnprakalpayet
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ devi śṛṇuṣva gadato mama
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ kiṃkiṇījālamālitam
yajvā śūroapi vidvāṃśca naro bhavati dhārmikaḥ
punaraṃte prāpnuyādvai lokaṃ devasya śārṅgiṇaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kalpavṛkṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭasaptatyuttaraśatata moadhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
niṣpāpo jāyate yena āyuṣā yaśasā śriyā
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi tava lokahitepsayā
yenopāyena jāyaṃte sabhāgyā mānavā bhuvi
pārtha snehānmahābhāga pravakṣyāmi hitaṃ tava
vakṣye kalpalatādānaṃ śobhanaṃ vidhipūrvakam
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ
tataḥ sarvasamīpe tu snātaḥ śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ
puṣpadhūpairathābhyarcya vāsobhiḥ saphalākṣataiḥ
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya maṃtrānetānudīrayet
namo namaḥ pāpavināśinībhyo brahmāṃḍalokeśvarapālanībhyaḥ āśāśatādhikyaphalapradābhyo digbhyastathā kalpalatāvadhūbhyaḥ
yā yasya śaktiḥ paramā pradiṣṭā vede purāṇe surasattamasya
tāṃ pūjayāmīha pareṇa sāmnā sā me śubhaṃ yacchatu tāṃ natoasmi
evamuccārya tāḥ sarvā brāhmaṇebhyo nivedayet
daśāśāḥ parayā bhaktyā tāstāḥ saṃkalpya cetasi
tataḥ kṣamāpayedviprānpraṇipatya sadakṣiṇān
mahāśaktivṛtaḥ paścādetya rājanrasātalam
yā ca nārī mahārāja dānametatprayacchati
yaśca paśyeddīyamānaṃ dattaṃ yaścānumodate
śṛṇoti vācyamānaṃ ca sopi pretya vimucyate
yāḥ śakravahniyamanairṛtapāśahastā vāteṃdurājaśivakeśavaśaṃbhuśaktyaḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kalpalatādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonāśītyuttaraśatatamoa dhyāyaḥ cha
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
bhagavankṣatriyaiḥ śūraiḥ svavīryopāttasaṃcayaiḥ
kāni dānāni deyāni pavitrāṇi śubhāni ca
anyairvā puruṣaiḥ kṛṣṇa adharmabhayabhīrubhiḥ
grahapīḍāṅisaṃtaptairduḥsvapnādyupatāpitaiḥ
viśeṣavihitaṃ dānaṃ kathayasva mahāmate
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
śṛṇu bhūpāla bhadraṃ te dānadharmamanuttamam
viśeṣeṇa mahīpānāṃ hitāya ca na saṃśayaḥ
dānāni bahurūpāṇi nānāśāstroditāni ca
godānādīni rājendra pradhānāni na saṃśayaḥ
kiṃ tu pradhānamekaṃ te dānaṃ vakṣyāmi bhārata
vairocanāya yatsarvaṃ śukraḥ provāca bhārata
śukra uvāca
śṛṇu daityapate dānaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
ādhayo vyādhayaścaiva grahapīḍā sudāruṇāḥ
kārttikyāmayane caiva grahaṇe śaśisūryayoḥ
dānametatpradātavyaṃ viṣuve sūryasaṃkrame
saṃsthāpya dārujaṃ divyaṃ hemapaṭṭairalaṃkṛtam
puṣpaprakarasaṃkīrṇe prāgudakpravaṇe śubhe
nadyāstīreatha vā goṣṭhe vicitre vā gṛhāṃgaṇe
rathasya pūrvabhāge tu kṛtvā vedīmanuttamām purāṇavedavidyāvānvinayācārasaṃyutaḥ
tasyāṃ saṃsthāpayeddevānbrahmādīnkathayāmi te
madhye brahmā pratiṣṭhāpyaḥ pūjayetpraṇavena tam
viṣṇuruttarataḥ sthāpyaḥ pauruṣeṇa tamarcayet
sūktena rudraṃ raudreṇa dakṣiṇasyāṃ samarcayet
grahānsūryamukhāṃścaiva vidhivatpūjayettathā
pūjayedgaṃdhakusumaiḥ śvetavastraiḥ sacaṃdanaiḥ
śaṃkhabherīmṛdaṃgānāṃ śabdaiḥ sarvatragāmibhiḥ
kuṃḍaṃ kṛtvā vidhānena hastamātrapramāṇataḥ
āgneyyāṃ diśi rājeṃdra brāhmaṇāṃstatra pūjayet catuścāraṇikānviprānpūjitānbrahmabhūṣaṇaiḥ
homopakaraṇaṃ sarvaṃ melayitvā tilānghṛtam
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu hutvā prāgvacca tau tataḥ
viṣṇave śitikaṇṭhāya maṃtraiḥ pūrvoditaiḥ śubhaiḥ
grahayajñoditaiścaiva grahāṇāṃ homa iṣyate
evaṃ yajñavidhiṃ kṛtvā yajamāno dvijaiḥ saha
vicitratanusaṃvītau śubhakakṣau sughaṃṭikī
hemapaṭṭaiḥ sutilakaiḥ śobhitau śaṃkhacāmaraiḥ
mahāmātrānvitau caiva sarvābharaṇabhūṣitau
evaṃ vidhiṃ tataḥ kṛtvā rathaṃ taṃ sagajaṃ naraḥ
bhūṣitaṃ kaṇṭhakaṭakaiḥ karṇaveṣṭāṃgulīyakaiḥ
baddhatūṇiṃ dhanuṣpāṇiṃ bahucarmavibhūṣitam
khaḍgadhenukayā naddhaṃ hārālaṃkṛtavigraham
yajamānastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ
rathaṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
imamuccārayenmantraṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
kumudairāvaṇau padmaḥ puṣpadaṃtoatha vāmanaḥ
supratīkoṃjanaḥ sārvabhaumoaṣṭau devayonayaḥ
teṣāṃ vaṃśaprasūtau tu balarūpasamanvitau
rathoayaṃ yajñapuruṣo brāhmaṇotra śivaḥ svayam
mamebharathadānena prīyetāṃ śivakeśavau
ityuccārya mahābhāge pūjayitvā punaḥpunaḥ
svadāranirataṃ śāṃtaṃ vedavedāṃgapāragam
ādvāramanugacchecca praṇipatya gṛhaṃ viśet
tato yajñāvasāne tu dīnāṃdhādīñjaḍānkṛśān
kuṇḍamaṃḍapasaṃbhārabhūṣaṇācchādanādikam
hayau lakṣaṇasaṃyuktau khalīnālaṃkṛtānanau
vicitravastusaṃvītau kaṇṭhābharaṇabhūṣitau
taṃ pradakṣiṇamāvṛttya maṃtrametamudīrayet
rathoayaṃ savitā sākṣādvedāścāmī turaṃgamāḥ
aruṇo brāhmaṇaścāyaṃ prayacchaṃtu sukhaṃ mama
āropayedgṛhāddvāraṃ yāvadetamanuvrajet
tasmādvāharathaṃ rājyaṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇe vimāne sūryavarcase
divyabhogānvitaḥ śrīmānkāmacārī vaseddivi
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
putrapautrānvitaścaiva ciraṃjīvī priyātithiḥ
ekenāśvenāśvarathaḥ kathyate vedavādibhiḥ
dānamaṃtrāsta evoktāḥ phalaṃ tatra nigadyate
yacchaṃti ye rathavaraṃ sudhurākṣacakraṃ vikrāṃtavāraṇayutaṃ turagānvitaṃ vā
sopaskaraṃ kanakapaṭṭavicitritāgaṃ te syaṃdanena surarājapuraṃ prayāṃti
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde gajarathā śvarathadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāśītyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
dānānyanyāni me kṛṣṇa kathayasva yadūttama
maṃgalyāni pavitrāṇi sarvapāpaharāṇi ca
saṃsārasāgarottārahetubhūtoasi mādhava
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
dānāni bahurūpāṇi kathitāni mayā tava
kathitāni mayā tubhyaṃ kathayiṣyāmi yāni ca
kāmyo dānavidhiḥ pārtha kriyamāṇaḥ prayatnataḥ
jñeyaṃ niṣkaśataṃ sarvadāneṣu vidhiruttamaḥ
evaṃ vṛkṣaratheṃdrāṇāṃ dhenoḥ kṛṣṇājinasya ca
aśaktasyāpi kṛṣṭoayaṃ paṃcasauvarṇiko vidhiḥ
atoanyūnena yo dadyānmahādānaṃ narādhipa
pratigṛhṇāti vā tasya duḥkhaśokāvahaṃ bhavet
ādau tāvatpravakṣyāmi kālākhyaṃ puruṣaṃ tava
saptasāgaradānaṃ ca mahābhūtaghaṭantathā
suvarṇāśvaḥ smṛtaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ suvarṇāśvarathoaparaḥ
sarvadānottamaṃ rājankṛṣṇājinamathāṣṭamam
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya bhūmibhāge same śubhe
caturthyāṃ vā caturdaśyāṃ viṣṭyāṃ vā pāṃḍunaṃdana
pumānkṛṣṇatilaiḥ kāryo raupyadaṃtaḥ suvarṇadṛk
khaḍgodyatakaro dīrṇo japā kusumakuṃḍalaḥ
raktāṃbaradharaḥ sragvī śaṃkhamālāvibhūṣitaḥ
tīkṣṇāsipatradhanuṣā visphāritakaṭītaṭaḥ
upānadyugayukto hi kṛṣṇakaṃbala pārśvagaḥ
gṛhītamāṃsapiṃḍaśca vāme karatale tathā
evaṃ vidhaṃ naraṃ kṛtvā gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
svagṛhyoktavidhānena śatamaṣṭottaraṃ yajet
yajamānaḥ prasannātmā imaṃ maṃtramudīrayet
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ tvamasādhyoasi suvrata
pūjitastvaṃ mayā bhaktyā prārthitaśca tathā sukham
evaṃ saṃpūjayitvā taṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet
brahmāṇaṃ prathamaṃ pūjya vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā
dakṣiṇāṃ śaktito dadyātpraṇipatya visarjayet
dehāṃte sūryabhavanaṃ bhittvā yāti paraṃ padam
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
saṃpūjya kālapuruṣaṃ vidhivaddvijāya dattvā śubhāśubhaphalodayahetubhūtaḥ
rogāṃtare sakaladoṣamaye ca dehī no vadhyabhāvamupagacchati tatprabhāvāt iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kālapuruṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikāśītyuttaraśatatamodhyāyaḥ
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi pārthadānamanuttamam
saptasāgarakaṃ nāma sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya yugādigrahaṇādikam
kārayetsaptakuṇḍāni kāṃcanāni vicakṣaṇaḥ
prādeśamātrāṇi tathā ratnimātrāṇi vā punaḥ
kuryātsaptaśatādūrdhvamāsahasrācca śaktitaḥ
saṃsthāpyāni ca sarvāṇi kṛṣṇājinatilopari
prathamaṃ pūrayetkuṃḍaṃ lavaṇena vicakṣaṇaḥ
dvitīyaṃ payasā tadvattṛtīyaṃ sarpiṣā punaḥ
ṣaṣṭhaṃ śarkarayā tadvatsaptamaṃ tīrthavāriṇā
sthāpayellavaṇasyāṃte brahmāṇaṃ kāṃcanaṃ śubham
śarkarāyāṃ nyasellakṣmīṃ jalamadhye tu pārvatīm
sarveṣu sarvaratnāni dhānyāni ca samaṃtataḥ
sthāpayetpuruṣaśreṣṭha yathālābhaṃ yathāsukham
tataḥ parvasamīpe tu snātaḥ śuklāṃbaro gṛhī
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya maṃtrānetānudīrayet
namo vaḥ sarvasiṃdhūnāmādhārebhyaḥ sanātanāḥ
jaṃtūnāṃ prāṇadebhyaśca samudrebhya namonamaḥ
pūrṇāḥ sarve bhavaṃto vai kṣāra kṣīraghṛtaikṣavaiḥ
tasmādaghaughavidhvaṃsaṃ kurudhvaṃ mama mānadāḥ
alakṣmīḥ praśamaṃ yātu lakṣmīścāstu gṛhe mama
evamuccārya tāndadyādbrāhmaṇebhyo yudhiṣṭhira
bahūnāmetaduddiṣṭaṃ dānamekasya vā punaḥ
deyaṃ vā sarvasāmānyaṃ kriyāviprānurūpataḥ
tasya gṛhānna calati lakṣmīryāvatkulāṣṭakam
pūjyamānaḥ suragaṇaiḥ siddhavidyādharoragaiḥ
iti dadāti rasāmarasaṃyutāñchuciravismayadāniha sāgarān
haimānvidhāya jaladhīnvitarasva śaktyā prāpnoṣi yena sarasāni samīhitāni iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saptasāgaradānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvyaśītyuttaraśatatamoa dhyāyaḥ
mahābhūtaghaṭadānavarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
mahābhūtaghaṭaṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam
puṇyāṃ tithiṃ samāsādya svanulipte gṛhāṃgaṇe
kārayetkāṃcanaṃ kuṃbhaṃ mahāratnānvitaṃ punaḥ
prādeśādaṃgulaśataṃ yāvatkuryātpramāṇataḥ
śaktyā paṃcapalādūrdhvamāśatācca narottama
kṣīrājyapūritaṃ kṛtvā kalpavṛkṣasamanvitam
padmāsanagatāstatra brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ
lokapālā mahendrāśca svavāhanasamāsthitāḥ
ṛgvedaḥ sākṣasūtraśca yajurvedaḥ sapaṃkajaḥ
vīṇādhārī sāmavedo hyatharvā srakchubhānvitaḥ
purāṇavedo varadaḥ sākṣasūtrakamaṃḍaluḥ
pādukopānahacchatraṃ cāmarāgryāsanāyudhān
triḥ pradakṣiṇamāvṛtya maṃtrametamudīrayet
mahābhūtamayaścāyaṃ tasmācchāṃtiṃ dadātu me
atra sannihitā devāḥ sthāpitā viśvakarmaṇā
te me śāṃtiṃ prayacchaṃtu bhaktibhāvena pūjitāḥ
ityevaṃ pūjayitvā tu mahābhūtaghaṭaṃ naraḥ
brāhmaṇaṃ pūjayitvā tu bhūṣaṇācchādanādibhiḥ
mahābhūtaghaṭaṃ dadyātparvakāle yatavrataḥ
punaḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya brāhmaṇaṃ taṃ kṣamāpayet
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
ajeyaḥ śatrusaṃghātairmahābala parākramaḥ
aṣṭāpadottamaghaṭaṃ vimalaṃ vidhāya brahmeśakeśavayutaṃ sahalokapālaiḥ
kṣīrājyapūrṇavivaraṃ praṇipatya bhaktyā viprāya dehi tava dānaśataiḥ kimanyaiḥ iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mahābhūtaghaṭadāna vidhivarṇanaṃ nāma tryaśītyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śayyādānavidhivarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
śayyādānaṃ pravakṣyāmi tava pāṃḍukulodvaha
śayyādānaṃ prayacchaṃti sarvadaiva dvijottamāḥ
anityaṃ jīvitaṃ yasmātkonyaḥ paścātpradāsyati
tāvatsa baṃdhuḥ sa pitā yāvajjīvati bhārata
mṛto mṛta iti jñātvā kṣaṇātsneho nivartate
tasmātsvayaṃ pradātavyaṃ śayyābhojyajalādikam
ātmaiva yo hi nātmānaṃ dānabhogaiḥ samarcayet
tasmācchayyāṃ samāsādya sāradārumayīṃ dṛḍhām
daṃtapatracitāṃ ramyāṃ himapaṭṭairalaṃkṛtām
haṃsatūlīpraticchannāṃ subhagāṃ sopadhānikām
pracchādanapaṭīyuktāṃ gaṃdhadhūpādhivāsitām
tasyāṃ saṃsthāpayeddhaimaṃ hariṃ lakṣmīsamanvitam
ucchīrṣake dhṛtaṃ caiva kalaśaṃ parikalpayet
vijñeyaṃ pāṃḍava sadā sanidrākalpakaṃ budhaiḥ
tāṃbūlaṃ kuṃkumakṣodakarpūrāgaru caṃdanam
pārśveṣu sthāpayecchaktyā saptadhānyāni caiva hi
bhṛṃgārakādyapuṣpāṇi paṃcavarṇavitānakam
śayyāmevaṃvidhāṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇāyopadāpayet
namaste sarvadeveśa śayyādānaṃ kṛtaṃ mayā
yathā na kṛṣṇa śayanaṃ śūnyaṃ sāgarajātayā
śayyā mamāpyaśūnyāstu tathā janmanijanmani
ekādaśāheapi tathā vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ
dadāti yadi dharmārthaṃ mānavo bāṃdhave mṛte
viśeṣaṃ cātra rājeṃdra kathyamānaṃ nibodha me
yadiṣṭaṃ ca tathāsyāsīttatsarvaṃ parikalpayet
sa eva puruṣo haimastasyāṃtaṃ sthāpayettathā
pūjayitvā pradātavyo mṛtaśayyā yathoditā
sukhaṃ vasatyasau jaṃtuḥ śayyādānaprabhāvataḥ
pīḍayaṃti na taṃ yāmyāḥ puruṣā bhīṣaṇānanāḥ
vimānavaramārūḍhaḥ sevyamānopsarogaṇaiḥ
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ yāvattiṣṭhetpātakavarjitaḥ
śayyāpradānamamalaṃ tava pāṃḍuputrasaṃkīrtitaṃ sakalasaukhyānidhānametat
tayo dadāti vidhivatsvayameva nāke talpe vikalparahitaḥ sa vibhāti satyam iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śayyādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturaśītyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
tatteahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi dānaṃ mānavivardhanam
dānakālaḥ sadā tasya munibhiḥ parikīrtitaḥ
puṇyaiḥ puṇyadinaṃ pārtha prāpyate jīvitairna ca
lohajāṃ prakṛtiṃ bhavyāṃ kārayitvātmano nṛpa
abhīṣṭavāhanagatāmiṣṭālaṃkārasaṃyutām
abhīṣṭalokasahitāṃ sarvopaskarasaṃyutām
tataḥ paṭṭapaṭīvastraiśchāditāṃ ratnabhūṣitām
kuṃkumenānuliptāṃgīṃ karpūrāguruvāsitām
strī ceddadāti śayane śayitāṃ kārayetsvayam
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ kiṃcittatsarvaṃ pārśvato nyaset
upakārakaraṃ strīṇāṃ svaśarīre ca yadbhavet
tatsarvaṃ sthāpayetpārśve svayaṃ saṃciṃtya cetasi
pūjayitvā lokapālāngṛhāndevīṃ vināyakam
tata śuklāṃbaraḥ snātvā gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
ātmanaḥ pratimā ceyaṃ sarvopakaraṇairyutā
ātmā śaṃbhuḥ śivaḥ śauriḥ śakraḥ suragaṇairvṛtaḥ
tasmādātmapradānena mamātmā suprasīdatu
ityuccārya tato dadyādbrāhmaṇāya yudhiṣṭhira
brāhmaṇaścāpi gṛhṇīyātkodāditi ca kīrtayan
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya visarjayet
yaḥ pumānatha vā nārī śṛṇuyātphalamāpnuyāt
sāgraṃ varṣaśataṃ divyaṃ svargaloke surairvṛtaḥ
abhīṣṭaphaladānena hyabhīṣṭaphalabhāgbhavet
tatraiva sarvakāmānāṃ phalabhāgbhavate nṛpaḥ
iṣṭabaṃdhujanaiḥ sārddhaṃ na viyogaṃ kadācana
prāpnoti puruṣo rājansvarge cānaṃtyamaśnute
yaścātmanaḥ pratikṛtiṃ varavāhanasthā haimīṃ vidhāya dhanadhānyasamākulāṃ ca
sopaskaraṃ dvijavarāya dadāti bhaktyā caṃdrārkavatsa divi bhāti hi rājarājaḥ iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda ātmapratikṛtidānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcāśītyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
hiraṇyāśvadānavidhivarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
sāṃprataṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi hiraṇyāśvavidhiṃ param
yasya prasādātpuruṣaḥ śāśvataṃ phalamaśnute
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya pātraṃ vāpi guṇādhikam
śaktitastripalādūrdhvamāśatācca narottama
khalīnālaṃkṛtamukhaṃ kārayeddhemavājinam
mukharaṃ sonnataskaṃdhaṃ dṛḍhajānuṃ savāladhim
saṃpūjya kusumaiḥ śvetaiścaṇakānvinivedya ca
tataḥ parvasamīpe tu gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ purāṇoktaṃ yatavrataḥ
vājirūpeṇa māmasmātpāhi saṃsārasāgarāt
tvameva saptadhā bhūtvā chaṃdorūpeṇa bhāskaram
yasmāddhārayase lokānataḥ pāhi sanātana
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praṇipatya visarjayet
anena vidhinā rājanhiraṇyāśvama laṃkṛtam
dattvā pāpakṣayādbhānorlokamāpnoti śāśvatam
purāṇaśravaṇaṃ tadvatkārayedbhojanādanu
itthaṃ hiraṇyāśvavidhiṃ karoti yaḥ supuṇyamāsādya dinaṃ nareṃdra
yo vā śṛṇoti puruṣoapyatha vā smaredvā haimāśvadānamabhinaṃdati dīyamānam
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hiraṇyāśvadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍaśītyuttaraśatata moadhyāyaḥ cha
hiraṇyāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi tava pāṃḍukulodvaha
puṇyaṃ hemarathaṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam
kṛṣṇājinatilānkṛtvā kāṃcanaṃ sthāpayedratham
caturasraṃ mahābhāga catuścakraṃ sakūbaram
brahmāṇamagrataḥ kṛtvā gṛhītapragrahaṃ śubham
iṃdranīlena kuṃbhena dhvajarūpeṇa saṃyutam
lokapālāṣṭakopetaṃ padmarāgadalānvitam
catvāraḥ pūrṇakalaśā dhānyānyaṣṭādaśaiva tu
kauśeyavastrasaṃvītamupariṣṭādvitānakam
evaṃvidhaṃ pūjayitvā mālyagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ
puṇyaṃ kālaṃ tataḥ prāpya snātaḥ saṃpūjya devatāḥ
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
śuklamālyāṃbaradhara imaṃ maṃtramudīrayet
namonamaḥ pāpavināśanāya viśvātmane devaturaṃgamāya
dhātrāmadhīśāya bhavābhavāya rathasya dānānmama dehi śāṃtim vasvaṣṭakādityamarudgaṇānāṃ tvameva dhātā paramaṃ nidhānam
dedīpyamānavapuṣā ca jitaprabhāvamākramya maḍalamakhaṃḍalacaṃḍabhānoḥ siddhāṃganānayanayugmaprani pīyamānavaktrāṃbujeṃabujabhavena ciraṃ sahāste
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hiraṇyāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptāśītyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
kṛṣṇājinadānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
kṛṣṇājinapradānasya vidhikālaṃ mamānagha
brāhmaṇaṃ ca samācakṣva tatra me saṃśayo mahān
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
yugādiṣūparāgeṣu saṃkrāṃtau dinasaṃkṣaye
māghyāṃ vā grahapīḍāsu duḥsvapnādbhutadarśane
deyametanmahādānaṃ dravyamātrāgame tathā
āhitāgnirdvijo yaśca vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ
purāṇābhirato dakṣo deyaṃ tasmai ca pārthiva
yathā yena vidhānena tanme nigadataḥ śṛṇu
ādāveva samāstīrya śobhitaṃ vastramāvikam
kartavyaṃ rukmaśṛṃgaṃ tadraupyadaṃtaṃ tathaiva ca
muktādāmnā tu lāṃgūlaṃ tilacchannaṃ tathaiva ca
tilaiḥ kṛtvā śiro rājanvāsasācchādayedbudhaḥ
suvarṇenābhitaḥ kuryādalaṃkuryādviśeṣataḥ
kāṃsyapātrāṇi catvāri teṣu dadyādyathākramam
ghṛtaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi kṣaudramevaṃ dattvā yathāvidhi
kṛṣṇaḥ kṛṣṇamalo deva kṛṣṇājinavarastathā
tvaddānāpāstapāpasya prīyatāṃ me namonamaḥ
trayastriṃśatsurāṇāṃ ca ādhāre tvaṃ vyavasthitaḥ
kṛṣṇoasi mūrtimānsākṣātkṛṣṇājina namoastu te
evaṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya punaḥ punaḥ
tatpratigrāhakaṃ vipraṃ vedavedāṃgapāragam
snātaṃ vastrayugācchannaṃ svaśaktyā vāpyalaṃkṛtam
anena vidhinā dattvā yathāvatkṛṣṇamārgaṇam
samagraṃ bhūmidānasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ
kṛṣṇājinatilānkṛtvā hiraṇyaṃ madhusarpiṣī
sarvāmllokāṃścaraṃtyeva kāmacārā viyadgatāḥ
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ yāvatsvargaṃ prāptā na saṃśayaḥ
kṛṣṇājinasamaṃ dānaṃ na cāsti bhuvanatraye
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyāti dattvā kṛṣṇājinaṃ kṣaṇāt
kṛṣṇekṣaṇaṃ kṛṣṇamṛgasya carma dattvā dvijedrāya samāhitātmā
yathoktametanmaraṇaṃ na śocetprāpnotyabhīṣṭaṃ manasaḥ phalaṃ yat
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kṛṣṇājinadānavidhivratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭāśī tyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
yasya pradānādbhavanaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ yāti mānavaḥ
parvakālaṃ samāsādya saṃkrāṃtau grahaṇeapi vā
kuryāddevarathākāraṃ rathaṃ maṇivibhūṣitam
dhvaje ca garuḍaṃ kuryātkūbarāgre vināyakam
lokapālāṣṭakopetaṃ brahmārkaśivasaṃyutam
madhye nārāyaṇopetaṃ lakṣmīpuṣṭisamanvitam
kṛṣṇājinatiladroṇaṃ kṛtvā taṃ sthāpayedratham nānāphalasamāyuktamupariṣṭādvitānakam
kuryātpaṃcapalādūrdhvamāśatācca narottama
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
namonamaḥ śaṃkarapadmajārkalokeśavidyādharavāsudevaiḥ
yattatpadaṃ paramaguhyatamaṃ purāṇamānaṃdahetugaṇarūpavimuktabandhāḥ
yogaikamānasadṛśo munayaḥ samādhau paśyaṃti tattvamasi nātha ratheti rūḍhaḥ yasmāttvameva bhavasāgarasaṃplutānāmānaṃdabhāṃḍacitamadhyagapānapātram
vidyādharāmaramunīṃdragaṇābhijuṣṭaṃ prāpnotyasau padamatīṃdriyamiṃdumauleḥ kṛtaduritavitānātuṣṭisadvahnipālavyatikarakṛtadehodvegabhānoapi baṃdhūn
nayati ca pitṛpautrānrauravādapyaśeṣātkṛtagajarathadānaḥ śāśvataṃ sadma viṣṇoḥ iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hemahastirathadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonanavatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
viśvacakramiti khyātaṃ sarvapāpavināśanam
tasyāpyarddhaṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ syādviśvacakramudāhṛtam
ṣoḍaśāraṃ tataścakraṃ bhramannemyaṣṭakāvṛtam
nābhipadmesthitaṃ viṣṇuṃ yogārūḍhaṃ caturbhujam
śaṃkhacakreasya pārśvasthe devyaṣṭakasamāvṛtam
dvitīyāvaraṇe tadvatpūrvato jalaśāyinam
atrirbhṛgurvaśiṣṭhaśca brahmā kaśyapa eva ca
matsyaḥ kūrmo varāhaśca nārasiṃhotha vāmanaḥ
rāmo rāmaśca kṛṣṇaśca buddhaḥ kalkī ca te daśa
tṛtīyāvaraṇe gaurī manubhirvasurbhiryutā
caturthe dvādaśādityā vedāścatvāra eva ca
pañcame pañca bhūtāni rudrāścaikādaśaiva tu
lokapālāṣṭakaṃ ṣaṣṭhe diṅmātaṃgāstathaiva ca
saptameastrāṇi sarvāṇi maṃgalāni ca kārayet
antarāṃtarato devānvinyasedaṣṭame punaḥ
daśahastaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā patākātoraṇānvitam
maṃḍapaṃ kuṇḍamekaṃ ca kārayedvastrasaṃyutam
kṛṣṇājinoparigataṃ viśvacakraṃ vidhānataḥ
tathāṣṭādaśadhānyāni rasāśca lavaṇādayaḥ
pūrṇakumbhāṣṭakaṃ tadvadvastramālyavibhūṣitam
phalāni dāpayetpārśve pañcavarṇavitānakam
adhivāsya tataścakraṃ paścāddhomaṃ samācaret
cātuścaraṇikāṃstatra brāhmaṇāṃścaturotha vā
homaṃ kuryurjitātmāno vastrābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ
cakrapratiṣṭhitānāṃ tu surāṇāṃ homa iṣyate
tato maṃgalaśabdena snātaḥ śuklāṃbaro gṛhī
homādhivāsanāṃte tu gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ
imamuccārayanmaṃtraṃ kṛtvā tattriḥpradakṣiṇam
namo viśvaṃbharāyeti viśvacakrātmane namaḥ
paramānaṃdarūpī tvaṃ pāhi naḥ pāpakardamāt
tejomayamidaṃ yasmātsadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ
hṛdi tatra guṇātītaṃ viśvacakraṃ namāmyaham
anyonyādhārarūpeṇa praṇamāmi sthitāviha
viśvacakramidaṃ yasmātsarvapāpaharaṃ hareḥ
āyudhaṃ cādhivāsaśca tasmācchāntiṃ dadātu me
vaikuṇṭhalokamāsādya caturbāhunarāvṛtam
praṇamedvātha yaḥ kṛtvā viśvacakraṃ dinedine
tasmāccakraṃ sadā kāryaṃ dhāryaṃ ca svagṛhe naraiḥ
kāṃcanaṃ vātha raupyaṃ vā tadabhāveatha tāmrajam
atha sudarśanatāṃ prayāti śatrormadanasudarśanatāṃ ca kāminībhyaḥ
sa sudarśanakeśavānurūpaḥ kanakasudarśanadānadagdhapāpaḥ
kṛtaguruduritoapi ṣoḍaśārapravitaraṇātpravarākṛtirmurāreḥ
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde viśvacakradānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma navatyuttaraśatatamo adhyāyaḥ
bhuvanapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
pratiṣṭhā śāśvatī kena dānena madhusūdana
sadgatiṃ ca tathā yāṃti sarve pitṛpitāmahāḥ
saṃtatiścākṣayā loke vibhavaścāpi puṣkalaḥ
sthāpanātsarvadevānāṃ kathaṃ syādyadunaṃdana
tadācakṣva mahābhāga dānena niyamena vā
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā rājamllokānāmupakārakam
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā bhūtvā guhyaṃ paramamuttamam
bhuvanānāṃ samāsena pratiṣṭhāṃ kathayāmi te
devāsurāstathā nāgā gaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasāḥ
pretāḥ piśācā bhūtāśca sthāpitāḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ
sapta hastaṃ paṭaṃ kṛtvā caturasraṃ susaṃhatam
abhinnāṃgaṃ dṛḍhaṃ śuddhaṃ śuddhasphaṭikavarcasam
cāturvarṇyakamānīya vicitraṃ citrakarmaṇi
yuvānaṃ vyādhirahitaṃ bhavyaṃ citrakaraṃ śubham
saṃpūjayitvā yatnena divyavāsovibhūṣaṇaiḥ
śaṃkhabherīninādaiśca gītamaṃgalanisvanaiḥ
puṇyāhajayaghoṣaiśca brāhmaṇānpūjyettataḥ
ācāryamapi saṃpūjya vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā
diśāsu lokapālānāṃ puroaṣṭau surasaṃyutāḥ
saptadvīpavatī pṛthvī sapta caiva kulācalāḥ
sāgarāḥ sapta cātraiva nadyo hradāḥ sarāṃsi ca
pātālāḥ sapta cātraiva sapta svargavibhūtayaḥ
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ bhuvanāni yathākramam
devadānavagandharvā yakṣa rākṣasapannagāḥ
suparṇādyāśca vihagā nāgāścairāvatādayaḥ
evaṃvidhaṃ paṭaṃ rājankārayitvā suśobhanam
tattejasā vṛtaṃ bhūyo mahatogreṇa sarvataḥ
tejastadvāyunā vāyurākāśena samāvṛtaḥ
bhūtādinā tathākāśaṃ bhūtādirmahatā tathā
avyaktena mahāṃścaiva vyāpto vai śuddhilakṣaṇaḥ
avyaktaṃ tamasā vyāptaṃ tamaśca rajasā tathā
evamāvaraṇopetaṃ brahmāṃḍamakhilaṃ nṛpa
puruṣeṇāvṛtaṃ sarvaṃ sabāhyābhyaṃtaraṃ tathā
etatsarvaṃ paṭasthaṃ tu kṛtvā citramayaṃ sudhīḥ
pūjayedyena vidhinā tatsamāsena me śṛṇu
purato maṃḍapaṃ tasya vicitraṃ kārayedbudhaḥ
tatra kuṇḍāni catvāri caturasrāṇi kārayet
yajñopakaraṇopetau vastrābharaṇabhūṣitau
paṭe sthitānāṃ devānāṃ maṃtrairoṃkārapūrvakaiḥ
yajamānastataḥ snātaḥ sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitaḥ
ācāryeṇasamaṃ kuryātpūjāmagre paṭasya tu
brahmāṃḍodaravartīni bhuvanāni caturdaśa
tāni saṃnihitānyatra pūjitāni bhavaṃtu me
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudro hyādityā vasavastathā
pūjitāḥ supratiṣṭhāśca bhavaṃtu satataṃ mama
evaṃ paṭaṃ taṃ saṃpūjya kṛtvā caiva pradakṣiṇam
bhakṣyānnānāvidhāṃścaiva naivedyaṃ tatra dāpayet
śaṃkhatūryaninādaiśca jāgaraṃ kārayettataḥ
punaḥ prabhāte vimale snātvā śuciralaṃkṛtaḥ
pūrvoktavidhinānena punaḥ saṃpūjya taṃ paṭam
ṛtvikpūjāṃ tataḥ kṛtvā gośatena vicakṣaṇaḥ
athavā goyugaṃ dadyādekaika syātyalaṃkṛtam
upānahau tathā chatraṃ gṛhopakaraṇāni ca
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ kiṃcitsarvaṃ dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ
tataḥ prakalpayedyānaṃ nāgayuktamalaṃkṛtam
alābhe vājisaṃyuktaṃ patākādhvajaśālinam
sahasraṃ dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā tatastvāropayetpaṭam
brāhmaṇaṃ vā rathenātha nayeddevālayaṃ budhaḥ
tatrasthaṃ sthāpayennītvā gandhaiḥ puṣpaiśca dhūpayet
pūjā tatrāpi mahatī kartavyā bhūtimicchatā
caṃdrātapatraṃ ghaṇṭāṃ ca dhvajādyaṃ dāpayetsudhīḥ
yathāśaktyā ca rājendra guruṃ gauravayaṃtritaḥ
abhyarcya dakṣiṇābhiśca brāhmaṇāṃśca visarjayet
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇānāṃ ca bhojanaṃ cāpyavāritam
kuryānnaro vā nārī vā pratiṣṭhāṃ sārvalaukikīm
kulaṃ ca tāritaṃ tena satputreṇa yudhiṣṭhira
yāvacca devatāgāre paṭastiṣṭhati pūjitaḥ
dānena kīrtiryāvaṃti martyalokeṣu gīyate
vaseddhṛṣṭamanāḥ svarge yāvadiṃdrāścatu rdaśa
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
putrapautrānvitaḥ śrīmāndīrghāyuratidhārmikaḥ
daśa janmāni rājendra jāyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
śrūyate ca purā rājā rajirnāma mahābalaḥ
cakravartī dṛḍhamatirjitārirvijiteṃdriyaḥ
jitvā daityabalaṃ sarvaṃ dattavāṃstridivaṃ punaḥ
mahendrāya mahābhāga sarvaṃ nihatakaṃṭakam
sa kadācitsabhāmadhye yāvadāste mahī patiḥ
tāvattatrājagāmātha pulastyo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ
śiṣyaiḥ parivṛtaḥ śrīmānvedavedāṃgapāragaiḥ
dattārghastu tadā tena upaviṣṭo varāsane pāṭhā dattārdhastu
śuśubhe parayā lakṣmyā pitāmaha ivāparaḥ
atha taṃ pūjayitvāgre madhuparkeṇa pārthivaḥ
papraccha vinayopetaḥ kathāmātmodbhavāṃ nṛpaḥ
śrīriyaṃ mama dharmajña tejaścāvyāhataṃ bhuvi
balaṃ puṣṭiṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ putrapautraṃ tathottamam
śṛṇu rājankathāmetāmātmīyāṃ sumanoharām
katheyamabhinirvṛttā śṛṇuṣvaiśvaryavarddhinīm
āsīstvaṃ vaiśyajātīyo vārāṇasyāṃ narottama
dānāśrayā bahuvidhā vratāni vividhāni ca
prasaṃgena kadācicca pratiṣṭhā bhauvanī tvayā
śrutā rājendra vidhivatkṛtā ca vahupuṇyadā
aparāṇyapi janmāni sapta rājā bhaviṣyasi
paścādyogikule bhūtvā nirvāṇaṃ samavāpsyasi
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ yanmāṃ paripṛcchasi
nārī vā puruṣo vāpi pratiṣṭhāṃ bhauvanīṃ tu yaḥ
ityuktvā sa munistatra rājānaṃ śaṃsitavrataḥ
yayāvadarśanaṃ tatra sūrye vaiśvānaropamaḥ
khyātā mayeyamadhunā tava dānaniṣṭhā tannāsti yanna kurute bhuvanapratiṣṭhā
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhuvanapratiṣṭhāvarṇanaṃ nāmaikanavatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
śruto dānavidhiḥ sarvaḥ prasādātte ramādhava
nakṣatradānasyedānī dānakalpaṃ pracakṣva me
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
atrāpyudāharaṃtīmamitihāsaṃ purātanam
devakyāścaiva saṃvādaṃ devarṣernāradasya ca
dvārakāmanusaṃjātaṃ nāradaṃ devadarśanam
papracchedaṃ tathā praśnaṃ devakī dharmadarśinī
tasyāḥ saṃpṛcchamānāyā devarṣirnāradastataḥ
ācaṣṭa vidhivatsarvaṃ yattacchṛṇu viśāṃpate
nakṣatrayogaṃ vakṣyāmi sarvapātakanāśanam
kṛttikāsu mahābhāga pāyasena sasarpiṣā
saṃtarpya brāhmaṇānsādhūmllokānprāpnotyanuttamān
rohiṇyāṃ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha māṃsairannena sarpiṣā
saṃtarpya brāhmaṇānsādhūmllokānprāpnotyanuttamān
payoaannadānaṃ dātavyamānṛṇyārthaṃ dvijātaye
ārdrāyāṃ kṛśarāṃ dattvā tilamiśrā samāhitaḥ
pūṣānpunarvasau dattvā ghṛtapūrṇānsupācitān
yaśasvī rūpasaṃpannaḥ sajjano jāyate kule
puṣye tu kāṃcanaṃ dattvā kṛtaṃ vākṛtameva vā
āśleṣāsu tathā raupyaṃ yaḥ surūpaṃ prayacchati
maghāsu tilapūrṇāni vardhamānāni mānavaḥ
pradāya paśumāṃścaiva putravāṃśca prajāyate
phālgunīpūrvasamaye vaḍavāṃ dvijapuṃgave
dattvā puṇyakṛtāṃllokānprāpnoti surasevitān
uttarāphālgunīyoge dattvā sauvarṇapaṃkajam
haste tu hastinaṃ dattvā kāṃcanaṃ śaktitaḥ kṛtam
yātyasau śakrasadanaṃ varavāraṇadhūrgataḥ
citrāsu vṛṣabhaṃ dattvā puṇyānāṃ puṇyamuttamam
svātīṣu ca dhanaṃ dattvā yadabhīṣṭamihātmanaḥ
prāpnoti ca śubhāṃllokāniha loke mahadyaśaḥ
viśākhāsu mahārāja dhuraṃdharavibhūṣitam
sopaskaraṃ ca śakaṭaṃ sadhānyaṃ vastrasaṃvṛtam
dattvā prīṇāti sa pituḥ pretya cānantyamaśnute
na ca durgāṇyavāpnoti rauravādīni mānavaḥ
dattvā yatheṣṭaṃ viprebhyo gatimiṣṭāṃ sa gacchati
kambalānyanurādhakṣeṃ dattvā prāvaraṇāni ca
svarge varṣaśataṃ sāgramāste suragaṇairvṛtaḥ
kālaśākaṃ ca viprebhyo dattvā martyaḥ samūlakam
jyeṣṭhānujyeṣṭhatāmeti gatimiṣṭāṃ ca gacchati
mūle mūlaphalaṃ dattvā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ samāhitaḥ
pitṛrnprīṇayate sarvāngatiṃ prāpnotyanuttamām
atha pūrvāsvaṣāḍhāsu dadhipātrāṇi mānavaḥ
putrapautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ paśumāndhanavāṃstathā
udamaṃthaṃ sasarpiṣkaṃ prabhūtamadhuphāṇitam
dattvottarāsvaṣāḍhāsu sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt
śravaṇe pustakaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ pradadātīha yo naraḥ
svecchayā yāti yānena sarvāṃllokānna saṃśayaḥ
goyugaṃ ca dhaniṣṭhāsu dattvā viprāya mānavaḥ
tathā śatabhiṣāyoge dattvā sāgaru caṃdanam
prāpnotyapsarasāṃ loke pretya gaṃdhāṃśca śobhanān
pūrvabhādrapadāyoge rājamāṣānpradāpayet
pitṛrnprīṇāti sakalānpretya cānaṃtyamaśnute
kāṃsyopadohanāṃ dhenuṃ revatyāṃ yaḥ prayacchati
sa pretya kāmānādāya dātāramupagacchati
rathamaśvasamāyuktaṃ dattvāśvinyāṃ narottama
hastyaśvarathasaṃpūrṇe varcasvī jāyate kule
gāvaḥ prabhūtāḥ prāpnoti naraḥ pretya yaśastathā
ityeṣa dakṣiṇoddeśaḥ prokto nakṣatrayogataḥ
sarvapāpapraśamanaḥ sarvopadravanāśanaḥ
vittaṃ śraddhā ca rājendra kāraṇaṃ cātra kathyate
tadyo dadāti vibhave sati sādhuvṛtte kiṃ tena pārtha na kṛtaṃ bhavatīha loke iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nakṣatradānavidhivarṇanaṃnāma dvinavatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ cha
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
tithidānamidānīṃ te kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ cāpi karmajaṃ yadaghaṃ bhavet
sarvaṃ praśamamāyāti dānenānena pāṃḍava
śrāvaṇe kārtike caitre vaiśākhe phālgune tathā
vittaṃ śraddhāsahāyaśca pātraprāptistathaiva ca
tīrthe devālaye goṣṭhe gṛhe vā niyatātmavān
yaddadāti naraśreṣṭhastadānaṃtyāya kalpate
sauvarṇamaravindaṃ ca kārayitvāṣṭapatrakam
puṣpairdhūpaiḥ pūjayitvā viprāya pratipāda yet
īpsitāṃllabhate kāmānniṣkāmo brahmasātmyatām
vahniṃ pūjya dvitīyāyāṃ bhūrbhuvaḥsvariti kramāt
tilājyena śataṃ hutvā dattvā pūrṇāhutiṃ tataḥ
vaiśvānaraṃ tu sauvarṇaṃ sthāpayettāmrabhājane
guḍājyapūrite rājaṃstoyapūrṇaghaṭopari
yāvajjīvakṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ
mṛto vahni puraṃ yāti prāhedaṃ nārado muniḥ
tṛtīyāyāṃ mahārāja rādhāṃ svarṇamayīṃ śubhām
jīrakaṃ kaṭukaṃ caiva guḍaṃ pārtheṣu dāpayet
puṣpadhūpaiḥ sanaivedyaiḥ pūjayitvā dvijātaye
prāsādā yatra sauvarṇā nadyaḥ pāyasakardamāḥ
gandharvāpsaraso yatra tatra te yāṃti mānavāḥ
nārī vā tadguṇairyuktā bhavatīha na saṃśayaḥ
caturthyāṃ vāraṇaṃ haimaṃ palādūrddhvaṃ suśobhanam
kāmayitvāṃkuśayutaṃ tiladroṇopari nyaset
tatastu brāhmaṇe dadyādgaṇeśaḥ prīyatāmiti
kāryāraṃbheṣu sarveṣu tasya vighnaṃ na jāyate
vāraṇāḥ sapta janmāni bhavaṃti madavihvalāḥ
kṣīrājyapatramadhyasthaṃ pūjayitvā pradāpayet
dvijaṃ saṃpūjya vāsobhiḥ praṇipatya kṣamāpayet
prāyaścittaṃ tathā proktaṃ nāgadaṣṭasya śaṃbhunā
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śaktisamopetaṃ kumāraṃ śikhivāhanam
kārayitvā yathāśaktyā hemamālāvibhūṣitam
taṃḍulenātha śikhare vāsobhiḥ pūjya bhaktitaḥ
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ skaṃdaṃ yathāśakti kṛtvā skaṃdaṃ hiraṇmayam
namaskṛtya tato dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine
iha bhūtiṃ parāṃ prāpya pretya svarge mahīyate
śūdro brāhmaṇatāmeti brāhmaṇo brahmalokatām
saptamyāṃ bhāskaraṃ pūjya brāhmaṇānaśvamuttamam
dadyādalaṃkṛtagrīvaṃ saparyāṇaṃ sadakṣiṇam
gaṃdharvāstuṣṭimāyāṃti datteaśve samalaṃkṛte
aṣṭamyāṃ vṛṣabhaṃ śvetamavyaṃgāṃgaṃ dhuraṃdharam
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ ghaṃṭābharaṇabhūṣitam
dadyātpraṇamya viprāya prīyatāṃ vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā ādvārāṃtamanuvrajet
vṛṣaskaṃdhe pratiṣṭhaṃti bhuvanāni caturdaśa
tasmādvṛṣabhadānena dattā bhavati bhāratī
navamyāṃ kāṃcanaṃ siṃhaṃ kārayitvā svaśaktitaḥ
muktāphalāṣṭakayutaṃ nīlavastrāvaguṇṭhitam
dadyāddevīmanusmṛtya duṣṭadaityanibarhaṇīm
dvijātipravarāyetthaṃ sarvānkāmānsamaśnute
kāṃtāravanadurgeṣu cauravyālā kule pathi
hiṃsakāstaṃ na hiṃsaṃti dānasyāsya prabhāvataḥ
mṛto devīpuraṃ yāti pūjyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
daśamyāṃ nṛpaśārdūla daśāśāḥ svarṇanirmitāḥ
lavaṇe ca guḍe kṣīre niṣpāveṣu tileṣu ca
gavyatraye taṃduleṣu māṣāṇā supari sthitāḥ
anena vidhinā yastu pumānstrī vātha vā punaḥ
nirvāpayati rājeṃdra tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu
sakalāstasya sarvāśā yāḥ kāścinmanasecchitāḥ
ekādaśyāṃ garutmaṃtaṃ kārayitvā hiraṇmayam
yathāśaktyā tāmrapātre ghṛtasyopari pūjitam
paṃcāgnyabhirate vipre purāṇajñe viśeṣataḥ
gāṃ vṛṣaṃ mahiṣīṃ hemaṃ saptadhānyānyajāvikam
vaḍavāṃ guraḍarasānsa rvāṃstathā bahuphaladrumān
puṣpāṇi ca vicitrāṇi gaṃdhāṃścoccāvacānbahūn
yathāśaktyā melayitvā vastrairācchādayennavaiḥ
dvādaśyāṃ dvādaśaitāni brāhmaṇebhyo nivedayet
ekasya vā mahārāja yatphalaṃ tanniśāmaya
iha kīrtiṃ parāṃ prāpya bhuktvā bhogānyathepsitān
tato viṣṇupuraṃ yāti sevyamānoapsaroṇaṇaiḥ
karmakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
yajñayājī dānapatirjīvecca śaradāṃ śatam
snāpayedbrāhmaṇāṃścātra trayodaśyāṃ trayodaśa
bhojayīta sumiṣṭānnaṃ dakṣiṇāṃ vinivedayet
yathāśaktyā hemakhaṇḍāndharmātmā prīyatāmiti
dharmarājāya kālāya citraguptāya daṃḍine
mṛtyave kṣayarūpāya aṃtakāya yamāya ca
mahiṣasthāya devāya nāmānīha trayodaśa
yaḥ karoti mahārāja pūjāmetāṃ manoramām
yamamārgagataḥ paścādduḥkhaṃ nāpnotyasau pumān
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya sa sukhī nīrujo bhavet
mahiṣaṃ suśubhaṃ kuṃbhaṃ caturdaśyāṃ payobhṛtam
taṃ karṣakeṇa saṃyuktaṃ hemnaḥ sadvastrasaṃyutam
ghaṃṭābharaṇaśobhāḍhyaṃ vṛṣabheṇa samanvitam
yo dadyācchivabhaktāya brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine
vṛṣaṃ dattvā naraśreṣṭha śivaloke mahīyate
paurṇamāsyāṃ vṛṣotsargaṃ kārayitvā vidhānataḥ
dadyādviprāya saṃkalpya vāsolaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ
kṣīrodārṇavasaṃbhūta trailokyāṃgaṇadīpaka
umā pateḥ śiroratnaśivaṃ yaccha namonamaḥ
apsarobhiḥ parivṛto yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam
te brahmaviṣṇubhuvaneṣu sukhaṃ vihṛtya yāṃtyekatāṃ saha śivena na saṃśayo me
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tithidānavarṇanaṃ nāma trinavatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
ādivārāhadānaṃ ta kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira
dharaṇyai yatpurā proktaṃ varāhavapuṣā mayā
mahāpāpādidoṣaghnaṃ pūjitaṃ dharmasattamaiḥ
deyaṃ saṃkramaṇe bhānorgrahaṇe dvādaśīṣvatha
yajñotsavavivāheṣu duḥsvapnādbhutadarśane
tadaiva dānakālaḥ syādadhruvaṃ jīvitaṃ yataḥ
kurukṣetrāditīrtheṣu gaṃgādyāsu nadīṣu ca
pureṣu ca pavitreṣu araṇyeṣu vaneṣu ca
goṣṭhe devālaye vāpi rathe vā svagṛhāṃgaṇe
deyaṃ purāṇavidhinā brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine
kuśairāstīrya tāṃ pārtha praṇavākṣaramaṃtritaiḥ
upariṣṭāttilaisteṣāṃ varāhaṃ parikalpayet
drauṇaiścaturbhiḥ saṃpūrṇaṃ tadardhenātha vā punaḥ
āḍhakenātha kurvīta vitta śāṭhyaṃ na kārayet
rājatīṃ kārayeddaṃṣṭāṃ padmarāgavibhūṣitām
śaṃkhaṃ ca sthāpayetpārśve vanamālāṃ hiraṇmayīm
puṣpairvā kārayedvidvānpādau rūpyamayau tathā
daṃṣṭrāgralagnavasudhāṃ sauvarṇīṃ kārayecchubhām
sarvadhānyarasopetāṃ vastrālaṃkṛtavigrahām
romarājiṃ kuśaiḥ kṛtvā gaṃdhapuṣpairathārcayet
navagrahamakhaḥ kāryo homa ścātra tilaiḥ smṛtaḥ
varāheśa praduṣṭāni sarvapāpaphalāni ca
marddamardda mahādaṃṣṭra bhāsvatkana kakuṃḍala
śaṃkhacakrāsihastāya hiraṇyākṣāṃtakāya ca
daṃṣṭroddhṛtadharābhṛte trayīmūrtimate namaḥ
tatastaṃ brāhmaṇe dadyādvastrālaṃkārabhūṣitam
evaṃ dattvā mahīnātha varāhaṃ sarvakāmadam
yathāśaktyā samuddhṛtā varāheṇa vasuṃdharā
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ strīṇāṃ śūdrajanasya ca
etatsādhāraṇaṃ dānaṃ śaivavaiṣṇavayoginām
viprāya vedaviduṣe nṛvarāharūpaṃ dattvā tilāmalasuvarṇamayaṃ savastram
iti śrībhaviṣyemahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛpṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde varāhadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturnavatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
rudreṇa yatpurā proktaṃ nāradāya mahātmane
meroḥ pradānaṃ vakṣyāmi daśadhā punareva te
purāṇeṣu ca vedeṣu yajñeṣvadhyayaneṣu ca
tasmādvidhānaṃ vakṣyāmi parvatānāmanukramāt
prathamo dhānyaśailaḥ syaddvitīyo lavaṇācalaḥ
paścamastilaśailaḥ syātṣaṣṭhaḥ kārpāsaparvataḥ
saptamo ghṛtaśailaśca rasaśailastathāṣṭamaḥ
rājato navamastadvaddaśamaḥ śarkarācalaḥ
vakṣye vidhānameteṣāṃ yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ
śuklapakṣe tṛtīyāyāmuparāge śaśikṣaye
vivāhotsavayajñe vā dvādaśyāmatha vā punaḥ
śuklāyāṃ pañcadaśyāṃ vā puṇyarkṣe vā pradhānataḥ
dhānyaśailādayo deyā yathāśāstraṃ vijānatā
tīrthe vāyatane vāpi goṣṭhe vā saṃgameapi vā
prāgudakpravaṇaṃ tatra prāṅmukhaṃ vā vidhānataḥ
gomayenānuliptāyāṃ bhūmāvāstīrya vā kuśān
madhyamaḥ paṃcaśatikaḥ kaniṣṭhaḥ syāttribhiḥ śataiḥ
yaḥ syācca gārutmatanīlaratnaiḥ saumyena vaiḍūryasarojarāgaiḥ
śrīkhaṃḍakhaṇḍairabhitaḥ pravāla latānvitaḥ śuddhaśilātalaḥ syāt
brahmātha viṣṇurbhagavānpurārirdivākaroapyatra hiraṇmayaḥ syāt
śuklāṃbaroanyaśca surācalaḥ syātpūrveṇa kṛṣṇāni ca dakṣiṇena
vāsāṃsi paścādatha kesarāṇi raktāni caivottarato dalāni
raupyā maheṃdrapramukhāstathāṣṭau saṃsthāpayellokapatīnkrameṇa
nānāphalālī ca samaṃtataḥ syānmanoramāmālyavilepanādyā
vitānakañcopari pañcavarṇamamlānapuṣpābharaṇaṃ sitaṃ vā
itthaṃ niveśyāmaraśailamapyunmanāstu viṣkambhagaṇānkrameṇa
turīyabhāgena caturdiśaṃ ca saṃsthāpayetpuṣpavilepanādyān
kāmena kāṃcanamayena virājamānamākārayetkusumavastravilepanāḍhyam kṣīrāruṇodasarasātha tathā vanena raupyeṇa śaktighaṭitena virājamānam
saṃsthāpya taṃ vipulaśailamathottareṇa śailaṃ supārśvamapi māṣamayaṃ suvapram
rātrau ca jāgaramanuddhatagītatūryairāvāhanaṃ ca kathayāmi śiloccayānām
kṣemaṃ vidhatsva kuru śāṃtimanuttamāṃ naḥ saṃpūjitaḥ paramabhaktimataḥ pradehi tvameva bhagavānīśo brahmā viṣṇurdivākaraḥ
mūrtāmūrtaparaṃ bījamataḥ pāhi sanātana
yasmāttvaṃ lokapālānāṃ viśvamūrteśca maṃdiram
keśavārkavasūnāṃ ca tasmā cchāṃtiṃ prayaccha me
tasmānmāmuddharāśeṣa duḥkhasaṃsārasāgarāt
yasmāccūḍāmaṇirjaṃbūdvīpe tvaṃ gandhamādanaḥ
hiraṇyamayapāṣāṇastasmācchāṃtiṃ prayaccha me
supārśva rājase nityamataḥ śrīrakṣayāstu me
evamāmaṃtrya tānsarvānprabhāte vimale punaḥ
śeṣāṃśca paṃca tāndadyādṛtvigbhyaḥ kramaśo nṛpa
gāvo deyāścatustriṃśadathavā daśa bhārata
śaktitaḥ sapta vāṣṭau vā evaṃ dadyādaśaktimān
parvatānāmaśeṣāṇāmeṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
grahāṇāṃ lokapālānāṃ brahmādīnāmagaiḥ saha
svamaṃtreṇaiva sarveṣu homaḥ śaileṣu śasyate
vidhānaṃ sarvaśailānāṃ kramaśaḥ śṛṇu bhārata
dānakāleṣu ye mantrāḥ parvateṣu ca yatphalam
annaṃ brahma yataḥ proktamanne prāṇāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ
apsarogaṇagaṃdharvairākīrṇena virājatā
vimānena divaḥ pṛṣṭhe sa yāti ṛṣisevitaḥ
puṇyakṣaye rājarājyamāpnotīha na saṃśayaḥ
dhānyācalaṃ kanakavṛkṣavirājamānaṃ viṣkaṃbhaparvatayutaṃ surasiddhajuṣṭam
iti śrībhaviṣye purāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dhānyaparvatadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcanavatyuttaraśatatamoadhyāyaḥ
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi lavaṇācalamuttamam
uttamaḥ ṣoḍaśadroṇaḥ kartabyo lavaṇācalaḥ
vittahīno yathāśaktyā droṇādardhaṃ tu kārayet
caturthāṃśena viṣayānparvatānkārayetpṛthak
vidhānaṃ pūrvavatkuryādbrahmādīnāṃ ca sarvadā
śirāṃsi kāmadevādīṃstadvattatra niveśayet
kuryājjāgaramatrāpi dānamaṃtrānnibodha me
saubhāgyarasasaṃbhūto yatoayaṃ lavaṇorasaḥ
dānātmakatvena ca māṃ pāhi pāpānnagottama
tasmādannarasāḥ sarve notkṛṣṭā lavaṇaṃ vinā
yasmātparvatarūpeṇa pāhi saṃsārasāgarāt
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ
